name: Marsha Blackburn
subject: Never expected to get the cold shoulder from YOU
body:
Peter, why have you been giving us the cold shoulder?
I know I've reached out this week about this issue.My team tells me they've texted and emailed at least twice too!
Is everything ok? Should we take the hint and assume you aren't interested in these messages?
That would be truly shocking to me since you've always been such a steadfast supporter of mine and President Trump's mission to save America, so I'm giving you one more chance!

name: President Obama
subject: How we come out the other side with our democracy intact
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
The work to decide who holds power in this country is happening right now.

---
Peter, The midterm elections may be a year away, but the work to decide who will win the House of Representatives is happening _right now_. Republicans know their policies aren’t helping people. The polls show that their agenda, and their leaders, are deeply unpopular. And in this month’s elections in New Jersey, Virginia, and Pennsylvania, we saw an electorate that is eager for a different path forward. That’s why Republicans have launched an unprecedented attempt to entrench themselves in power. In several Republican-led states, they’ve gerrymandered the maps so that they can avoid being accountable to the will of the people. Now, thanks to your support and the work of the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, they’re running into some real resistance. In California, voters overwhelmingly supported a temporary measure to counter the gerrymandering crisis. Other states are exploring following California’s lead. And in states like Missouri and Kansas, citizens are organizing to stop their leaders from using manipulated maps. Like many of us, voters overwhelmingly believe that the maps should be fair — because _elections_ should be fair. **But the other side isn’t finished with their assault on our democracy.** They are banking on other states, like Florida, Indiana, and New Hampshire, to enter the fray and continue the cycle of perpetual gerrymandering. And they’re asking the Supreme Court to strike down a critical part of the Voting Rights Act so they can throw out maps where communities of color have fair representation. **Attorney General Holder and I started the NDRC to safeguard democracy in moments like this.[That work has never been more important — which is why I’m asking for your support right now to help ensure we can keep up the fight against Republican power grabs.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119918293/584657950/-139457290?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_ObamaNov_email_20251124-NDRC-Tier1-ObamaNov-NOR_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20251124-NDRC-Tier1-ObamaNov-NOR_&utm_campaign=ObamaNov&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU0NzI0ZDZlLTkxYzktZjAxMS04MTk2LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=nSqWjWTX47V2LwsRX9liICzb0XFE6VSnQiVCTouoEm0=)** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

The people in power are counting on your cynicism. They want you to think there is nothing you can do, because that’s how they win. Don’t let them.**If there’s one thing history has taught us, it is that the most important position in a democracy is citizen.**
We don’t need to speculate about what’s at stake. We’re witnessing it. We know now where this administration wants to take this country. We know how they want to corrupt our democracy.
[**That’s why the work of the NDRC is among the most urgent causes in the country. We can fight back, we can win, and we can come out on the other side with our democracy intact — but it’ll take all of us doing our part.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119918300/584657957/-139457290?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_ObamaNov_email_20251124-NDRC-Tier1-ObamaNov-NOR_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20251124-NDRC-Tier1-ObamaNov-NOR_&utm_campaign=ObamaNov&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU0NzI0ZDZlLTkxYzktZjAxMS04MTk2LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=nSqWjWTX47V2LwsRX9liICzb0XFE6VSnQiVCTouoEm0=)

clean_body: The work to decide who holds power in this country is happening right now. Peter, The midterm elections may be a year away, but the work to decide who will win the House of Representatives is happening right now. Republicans know their policies aren’t helping people. The polls show that their agenda, and their leaders, are deeply unpopular. And in this month’s elections in New Jersey, Virginia, and Pennsylvania, we saw an electorate that is eager for a different path forward. That’s why Republicans have launched an unprecedented attempt to entrench themselves in power. In several Republican-led states, they’ve gerrymandered the maps so that they can avoid being accountable to the will of the people. Now, thanks to your support and the work of the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, they’re running into some real resistance. In California, voters overwhelmingly supported a temporary measure to counter the gerrymandering crisis. Other states are exploring following California’s lead. And in states like Missouri and Kansas, citizens are organizing to stop their leaders from using manipulated maps. Like many of us, voters overwhelmingly believe that the maps should be fair — because elections should be fair. But the other side isn’t finished with their assault on our democracy. They are banking on other states, like Florida, Indiana, and New Hampshire, to enter the fray and continue the cycle of perpetual gerrymandering. And they’re asking the Supreme Court to strike down a critical part of the Voting Rights Act so they can throw out maps where communities of color have fair representation. Attorney General Holder and I started the NDRC to safeguard democracy in moments like this.= | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = The people in power are counting on your cynicism. They want you to think there is nothing you can do, because that’s how they win. Don’t let them.If there’s one thing history has taught us, it is that the most important position in a democracy is citizen. We don’t need to speculate about what’s at stake. We’re witnessing it. We know now where this administration wants to take this country. We know how they want to corrupt our democracy. = Please make a donation today — and let’s keep building the movement we need to preserve and strengthen our democracy. Your support matters, especially right now. Thank you, Barack Obama = = | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 712 H St NE, #25 Washington, DC 20002 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC. Text MAPS to 36787, STOP to end. Msg and Data rates may apply

body:
I’m NOT running for Governor. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119918776/584660250/-1860252395?refcode=-footer-&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzA0M2FkOTktOTFjOS1mMDExLTgxOTYtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=54zN91idSzQ8WXGC_cu0D6hVkKpW6RtOaZ2KuaQeOOU=) | Peter, I’ve got a big announcement today: **I’m NOT running for Governor of California.** I know, I know. The list of Democrats throwing their hat in the ring keeps growing by the day. It’s going to be a wild race to watch! But for me, the choice is clear. I’ve got two young kids at home, and I really care about the work I’m doing here in the House. Someone has to do the hard work to actually get things done, especially for a community like mine that’s been left behind for way too long. As terrible as Congress can be some days (trust me, I know...), this job is truly the honor of my life. At this time in our country’s history, I want to be in the fight and do this job to the best of my abilities. **This might not be the news some of you were hoping for (appreciate your emails and texts though!), but I’m proud to continue representing California’s 9th District in Congress.** [_**I’ve made my decision. Now I need your support to defend this seat and do our part to help Democrats take back the House next year. clean_body: I’m NOT running for Governor. | = | Peter, I’ve got a big announcement today: I’m NOT running for Governor of California. I know, I know. The list of Democrats throwing their hat in the ring keeps growing by the day. It’s going to be a wild race to watch! But for me, the choice is clear. I’ve got two young kids at home, and I really care about the work I’m doing here in the House. Someone has to do the hard work to actually get things done, especially for a community like mine that’s been left behind for way too long. As terrible as Congress can be some days (trust me, I know...), this job is truly the honor of my life. At this time in our country’s history, I want to be in the fight and do this job to the best of my abilities. This might not be the news some of you were hoping for (appreciate your emails and texts though!), but I’m proud to continue representing California’s 9th District in Congress. = If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your payment will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- Thanks for being with me every step of the way, — Josh *

name: Shontel Brown
subject: Trump called for the death of Democratic lawmakers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress
body:
We can’t sweep this under the rug.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119918788/584660345/1806897946?refcode=EM_C_251121Violence_N_SB_90DO_6_NG_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMWNlZmViOC05MWM5LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e6J-NKNPAyfPqPNlfruTBSCNOyKSeymQSq1gic3S124=) Peter,

Trump said that Democratic lawmakers who reminded military service members they were obligated to refuse illegal orders engaged in **“SEDITIOUS BEHAVIOR, punishable by DEATH!”**

He has openly called for political violence against members of the Democratic Party. When he says 'jump,' his supporters say 'how high?' This is terrifying and criminal behavior by the leader of our country.

**Peter, we cannot let comments like this get the usual Trump treatment – being pushed under the rug with some excuse of this being a “joke.”**

Political violence is not a laughing matter. According to the _Washington Post_ , the U.S. military adheres to the Uniform Code of Military Justice – military service members take an oath to the Constitution, not to the president. If they are being asked to follow “manifestly unlawful orders,” they can refuse. **THAT is the law.**

He doesn’t care about the law. He doesn’t care about violence. He only cares about power, his ballroom, and money.

**I absolutely condemn this act of political violence. We cannot let the Republicans remain in power as they excuse behavior like this.**

I stand firm with my Democratic colleagues,

Shontel Brown | Shontel Brown is proud to be elected as the Congresswoman for Ohio’s 11th District. She has spent the last decade serving the people of Ohio and building coalitions. As she enters her second full term in Congress, she will use that experience to continue the fight for affordable quality health care, jobs that pay fair wages, a strong public education system, and to preserve and protect our democracy for generations to come. Will you join her and be the change we need?
---

body:
I have to tell you about the other Epstein files the Trump Administration is STILL HIDING.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119919405/584666423/2140832878?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjhjNGExYy05M2M5LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OhvPLTogF1s4PAtFAYs1_D4gZiFlWwmu5tZZzHBtDK0=&emci=6e2b8cc2-7fc9-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=528c4a1c-93c9-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=9818364)

| | Last week, Congress passed the Epstein Files Transparency Act to demand that Trump's Justice Department release its Epstein files. This is a good step forward. It shows there is a growing, bipartisan demand for _accountability_ and _transparency_. But I have major concerns about what Trump and his stooges could do to those files before they're released. There's a very real possibility that Trump or the people around him could have the files sanitized to benefit some wealthy and powerful people. That's why I have to tell you about the OTHER Epstein files the Trump Administration is **_STILL HIDING,_** and need to be released. The Treasury Department has its own Epstein file containing thousands of Epstein's bank records. Last year, my investigators reviewed a portion of these records, and I've been demanding that Treasury Secretary Bessent produce the file for further investigation. **He has refused repeatedly.** **These records contain a money trail.** They would show how Epstein got his money, how he acquired and controlled his victims, and who he trafficked his victims to. These records contain a clear paper trail of which individuals and banks enabled Epstein's crimes, and who to hold accountable. One of those banks was JPMorgan Chase. Just last week, I released a bombshell report with new findings from my investigators, showing that executives at the bank – all the way to the very top – helped enable and cover up Epstein's trafficking operation. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119919407/584666426/-2044921950?refcode=2025-11-24-epstein&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=528c4a1c-93c9-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjhjNGExYy05M2M5LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OhvPLTogF1s4PAtFAYs1_D4gZiFlWwmu5tZZzHBtDK0=) For years, the bank failed to disclose Epstein's suspicious transactions to federal law enforcement. Epstein was one of the bank's biggest clients, and top executives repeatedly ignored internal warnings about how he was moving money around. They closely supervised his accounts and even coached Epstein on how to sanitize his suspiciously large cash withdrawals. It's clear that a lot of wealthy and powerful people and banks helped Epstein commit his atrocities for decades on end. And there's a paper trail sitting at the Treasury Department that would tell us exactly who. But Secretary Bessent is stonewalling the release of those Treasury Epstein files, and he is bizarrely claiming that the Treasury has no role in investigating these records at all. **That's a lie. My investigators have seen the paper trail with their own eyes.** It's impossible that Secretary Bessent doesn't know about the Treasury's extensive role in investigating the financial crimes that Epstein must have been committing. Scott Bessent, Kash Patel, and Pam Bondi are continuing to run interference for pedophiles. Now, we need to force the Treasury to release the Epstein bank records. I have a bill to make that happen. **I'm going to keep following the money until the American people know the full truth.** More soon, _Ron_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Ron Wyden instantly:
| [$5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119919409/584666427/-2044921950?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=2025-11-24-epstein&refcode2=528c4a1c-93c9-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjhjNGExYy05M2M5LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OhvPLTogF1s4PAtFAYs1_D4gZiFlWwmu5tZZzHBtDK0=) | [$15](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119919412/584666430/-2044921950?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=2025-11-24-epstein&refcode2=528c4a1c-93c9-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjhjNGExYy05M2M5LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OhvPLTogF1s4PAtFAYs1_D4gZiFlWwmu5tZZzHBtDK0=) | [$25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119919416/584666433/-2044921950?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=2025-11-24-epstein&refcode2=528c4a1c-93c9-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjhjNGExYy05M2M5LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OhvPLTogF1s4PAtFAYs1_D4gZiFlWwmu5tZZzHBtDK0=) | [$50](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119919419/584666437/-2044921950?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=2025-11-24-epstein&refcode2=528c4a1c-93c9-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjhjNGExYy05M2M5LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OhvPLTogF1s4PAtFAYs1_D4gZiFlWwmu5tZZzHBtDK0=)

body:
| | Peter,

We’re less than a year out from the 2026 election, and elections experts are calling WA-03 a toss-up. They say this race could decide control of the House – and that I’m once again one of the most vulnerable Democrats in Congress.

But pundits have underestimated this grassroots team before. **I believe they’re doing it again.**

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/11977770-7d18-4297-b6aa-bba595eb15e0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
[](https://substack.com/redirect/0a86c0c9-6b76-4da9-b606-801d8ba99cf7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
_**by[Cliff Schecter](https://open.substack.com/users/31941177-cliff-schecter?utm_source=mentions) **_
There's something almost poetic--even mythopoetic--about how so much of the literati, glitterati, and paparazzi who cover Donald Trump still don't get him. After nine _long_ years of chaos, coups, and covfefe, many pundits, reporters, authors, and influencers continue to inanely analyze him as some Machiavellian mastermind.
Others who don't bestow upon him _that_ level of credulous pornographic composition or oral flatulence, still pretend, or worse believe, there's purpose to what Trump does beyond the obvious. Some hidden complexity determinative of his impulsive, unpredictable and self-sabotaging conduct.
And this is why there were so many ludicrous takes about why Trump got on so well with Zohran Mamdani--or kissed his arse, if you will. I _t 's because Mamdani is from New York!_ Nope. _It 's because Mamdani is a winner!_ Maybe a tick, but still not even close. Lotsa folks doubted it was even real in our days of AI fake-outs.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e8f3de67-a24d-46fc-b432-b2d7378c5b84?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
So many ill-informed, rapid-fire belches came out of monopolistic media outlets I was waiting for someone to yelp "It's because Trump converted to Islam!"
For those of us not quite Jane Goodall, but also not JD Vance trying to order donuts, it's so easy to watch what Trump does and says and know why he's doing it that hearing these takes was serious tomfool. With a side of knuckleheaded.
Seriously, getting Trump is like handing a dog a bone and observing what follows. Trump's a creature of almost frightening simplicity. Any deeper analysis is like trying to figure out the motivation of _Ace Ventura: Pet Detective_ when he makes his butt cheeks talk.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/946bdc08-67ce-4298-a2f8-b225503ae2d1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/11977770-7d18-4297-b6aa-bba595eb15e0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Trump doesn't operate from strategy, his 5-hour-energy bursts are derived from _ego maintenance_. You don't need to decode his ideology because there isn't one. His entire inner life can be summed up in five words he repeats like a mantra:
> He said nice things about me.
Seriously, how do people who ostensibly think for a living not get this by now? I know often we're dealing with corporate-concocted crania (Latin plural!), but still? How have they not seen him repeat this phrase, and slight variations of it, again and again? (See video above).
That's it. All there is. That's the whole operating system. It's like he runs on DOS.
But if that's not enough, let me try to break it down for you: He loves murderous dictators like Kim Jong Un or Putin not because of shared policy goals, but because they flattered him.
"He wrote me beautiful letters," Trump slobbered about Kim, sounding less world leader than middle-schooler showing off a note passed by Vlad, who got it from Recep during social studies, handed off by Viktor during recess about his new crush, Kim.
* Why did Trump pick Mike Pence as Vice President? Well, according to the book _American Carnage_ by _Vanity Fair, "_**he says nice things about me "**
* Why couldn't he criticize Putin's brutality? Per George Stephanopoulos, _"_**But he also said if he says nice things about me, I 'm going to say nice thing about him**."
* When asked if he'd pardon Sean P Diddy Combs for his Eptsein-esque grotesquery Trump offered he might do it beause "**He used to really like me a lot**."
* When asked what he thought about Melania's forthcoming memoir a year ago, he responded, "**I hope she said good things about me. "**

Anyone noticing a pattern? **This is all that matters to Trump**.
He is such a flaccid donkey d*k he becomes putty around anyone nice to him. Infamously, the "you're fired" tough guy on tv has other people fire people for him, because he's too chicken to do it himself.
* * *
Blue Amp Media is a reader-supported publication--please subscribe!
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.SVb4Cdbdpx1GBbwYtfkvDMOzyRj2sGb2j-lho7Ov5B8?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=179828810)
* * *
So when the Trump-Zohran Mamdani meeting went well, corporate media treated it like Yalta, but with a shocking twist, like a telenovela plot line no one saw coming.
FFS. Of course it went well!
Mamdani reached out to Trump for the meeting, paying him homage of sorts, he traveled to meet with Trump, and he let Trump sit in his big chair with the gauche _National Treasure_ backdrop in the Oval--Trump's home turf that gives him the feels.
Mamdani refused to insult him to the press, though they tried. He met with Trump politely, with restraint, and Trump responded the only way he knows how: fawning like Stephen Miller when he's just foraged insects, nectar and blood for lunch.
It was damn-near Niagrara Falls from Trump's swollen eye socket balls. He gushed about Mamdani, throwing ally Elise Stefanik under the bus (_" Zohran was nice to me,_ _where was Elise_?"). The same Stefanik who's spent years debasing herself to go from Bush Republican to embrace every last, crass nook of MAGA moron-hood.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/f90aacf3-098d-48ca-a8a5-65f540940a91?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
You see, friends, **Mamdani gave him what he craves more than money or power: affirmation.** Suddenly Mamdani wasn't a Marxist as Elise claimed, seemed like a likeable guy and had talent and would do good things in New York City.
This is also why you can feed Trump the craziest h*t in the world, and he'll buy it. Because as long as you're *nice to him* by telling him what he wants to hear, _what his ego_ _must hear_ --[like he won the 2020 election, but Maduro had voting machines switch votes--he'll bomb Venezeula, maybe invade](https://substack.com/redirect/9f519211-df8f-4ef8-b350-bde5e8904f8f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)--you own him.
I really wish I weren't being serious here. Meanwhile, if you're "nasty" to Trump, you could be Jesus Christ himself and he'd say:
> "Jesus Christ. What a sucker. A loser. He gave up his life for humanity? What did he get out of it? He'll never be great.
So when a reporter questions the weak-as-a-foundation-of-a-Trump-tower goof with a "rude," question, it was "quiet piggy." When Springsteen ripped him for "treason" and "corruption," Trump called him "over-rated" (this, I lol at) and other choice words.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/02c0d9ae-d73c-406c-a99a-8f0e751b7e3f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---

* * *
Worse, even if he once loved you if you don't do exactly what he asks--including breaking the law for him, there's nothing he won't do to you.
Nothing.
Which [explains his history of alleged sexual assaults of women and the fact that he's an adjudicated rapist](https://substack.com/redirect/4eb0b3c6-7f9f-4d93-9161-13efa1aa72e7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). When Pence wouldn't use power _he didn 't have_ to refuse to certify electoral votes, Trump was told by family and staff his Jan 6th lunatics wanted to hang Pence.
His response? Maybe if Pence did what was asked of him this wouldn't be happening. The [empathy you might expect from a criminal and alleged serial abuser](https://substack.com/redirect/1602b95b-acd0-4ab6-b64b-1dcc1a8f4762?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
Jeff Sessions, his first U.S. Senate endorser, was excommunicated and his political career destroyed for refusing to break the law as Trump's Attorney General to prosecute Hillary Clinton. Hell Lindsey Graham's been through this cycle of "he said nice things about. me" and vicious personal insult via Tweet at least three times.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/11977770-7d18-4297-b6aa-bba595eb15e0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Loyalty means nothing to Trump unless it comes with the right tone of adoration and a willingness to do anything. The moment you stop feeding him that sugar rush of flattery and "what do you need boss, I'll do anything" you become "disloyal," "weak," "a loser."
The man shared a tweet saying [six Democrats should be hanged because they did an ad telling our military and intelligence they must reject illegal orders from Trump](https://substack.com/redirect/e8f3de67-a24d-46fc-b432-b2d7378c5b84?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). This feels like a proportionate response to this incredibly damaged soul because in his verbiage, ["they don't like him."](https://substack.com/redirect/f90aacf3-098d-48ca-a8a5-65f540940a91?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/11977770-7d18-4297-b6aa-bba595eb15e0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
And that's why this entire Trump-Greene-Mamdani circus makes perfect sense if you drop the pretense that Trump's anything more than a toddler ready to kick the kid in front of him in the ice cream line who got the last Push Up. Yet if the kid swivels around to hand it to Trump, he's a great guy, "people are really saying he's done some great things, beautiful things."
MTG loved Trump, groped a cardboard cutout of him, tried to help him overthrow the government! But then she "turned on him" by refusing to back off on Epstein, H1-B Visas and Obamacare subsidies. [So he was justified--in that little Trump-hair covered brain of his--in inciting violence against her](https://substack.com/redirect/02c0d9ae-d73c-406c-a99a-8f0e751b7e3f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
He's a 77-year-old man with the emotional needs of an infant and the moral compass of a hedge fund. If you attack him, you're an enemy of the state. If you flatter him, you can get away with murder, literally, in Putin's case. Or his friend of the week, Bone Saw MBS of Saudi Arabia.
Many Republicans, to their eternal disgrace, have figured this out. That's why every Cabinet meeting looks like the North Korean Politburo, with grown adults praising his "great leadership" while trying not to burst out laughing or cry about their life's choices.
It's why Mamdani's polite meeting worked, which weak-corporate insiders still can't see because grift is blind, or they see and choose to ignore because they're as degenerate as Trump.
Look, he's been broadcasting the cheat code for years. The boy's not complicated. He's a walking Yelp review of himself. Rate him five stars, you can have anything you want. Place him anywhere else, beware of the night of the long ketchup bottles.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/11977770-7d18-4297-b6aa-bba595eb15e0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---

Trump isn't a strategist -- he's a praise-powered reaction machine. Mamdani proved it, dictators exploit it, and the media still can't grasp it. | | and | Nov 25 | | | ---|---|--- | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- by There's something almost poetic--even mythopoetic--about how so much of the literati, glitterati, and paparazzi who cover Donald Trump still don't get him. After nine long years of chaos, coups, and covfefe, many pundits, reporters, authors, and influencers continue to inanely analyze him as some Machiavellian mastermind. Others who don't bestow upon him that level of credulous pornographic composition or oral flatulence, still pretend, or worse believe, there's purpose to what Trump does beyond the obvious. Some hidden complexity determinative of his impulsive, unpredictable and self-sabotaging conduct. And this is why there were so many ludicrous takes about why Trump got on so well with Zohran Mamdani--or kissed his arse, if you will. I t 's because Mamdani is from New York! Nope. It 's because Mamdani is a winner! Maybe a tick, but still not even close. Lotsa folks doubted it was even real in our days of AI fake-outs. | | ---|---|--- So many ill-informed, rapid-fire belches came out of monopolistic media outlets I was waiting for someone to yelp "It's because Trump converted to Islam!" For those of us not quite Jane Goodall, but also not JD Vance trying to order donuts, it's so easy to watch what Trump does and says and know why he's doing it that hearing these takes was serious tomfool. With a side of knuckleheaded. Seriously, getting Trump is like handing a dog a bone and observing what follows. Trump's a creature of almost frightening simplicity. Any deeper analysis is like trying to figure out the motivation of Ace Ventura: Pet Detective when he makes his butt cheeks talk. | | ---|---|--- | | ---|---|--- Trump doesn't operate from strategy, his 5-hour-energy bursts are derived from ego maintenance. You don't need to decode his ideology because there isn't one. His entire inner life can be summed up in five words he repeats like a mantra: He said nice things about me. Seriously, how do people who ostensibly think for a living not get this by now? I know often we're dealing with corporate-concocted crania (Latin plural!), but still? How have they not seen him repeat this phrase, and slight variations of it, again and again? (See video above). That's it. All there is. That's the whole operating system. It's like he runs on DOS. But if that's not enough, let me try to break it down for you: He loves murderous dictators like Kim Jong Un or Putin not because of shared policy goals, but because they flattered him. "He wrote me beautiful letters," Trump slobbered about Kim, sounding less world leader than middle-schooler showing off a note passed by Vlad, who got it from Recep during social studies, handed off by Viktor during recess about his new crush, Kim. Why did Trump pick Mike Pence as Vice President? Well, according to the book American Carnage by Vanity Fair, "he says nice things about me " Why couldn't he criticize Putin's brutality? Per George Stephanopoulos, "But he also said if he says nice things about me, I 'm going to say nice thing about him." When asked if he'd pardon Sean P Diddy Combs for his Eptsein-esque grotesquery Trump offered he might do it beause "He used to really like me a lot." When asked what he thought about Melania's forthcoming memoir a year ago, he responded, "I hope she said good things about me. " Anyone noticing a pattern? This is all that matters to Trump. He is such a flaccid donkey dk he becomes putty around anyone nice to him. Infamously, the "you're fired" tough guy on tv has other people fire people for him, because he's too chicken to do it himself. Blue Amp Media is a reader-supported publication--please subscribe! So when the Trump-Zohran Mamdani meeting went well, corporate media treated it like Yalta, but with a shocking twist, like a telenovela plot line no one saw coming. FFS. Of course it went well! Mamdani reached out to Trump for the meeting, paying him homage of sorts, he traveled to meet with Trump, and he let Trump sit in his big chair with the gauche National Treasure backdrop in the Oval--Trump's home turf that gives him the feels. Mamdani refused to insult him to the press, though they tried. He met with Trump politely, with restraint, and Trump responded the only way he knows how: fawning like Stephen Miller when he's just foraged insects, nectar and blood for lunch. It was damn-near Niagrara Falls from Trump's swollen eye socket balls. He gushed about Mamdani, throwing ally Elise Stefanik under the bus (" Zohran was nice to me, where was Elise?"). The same Stefanik who's spent years debasing herself to go from Bush Republican to embrace every last, crass nook of MAGA moron-hood. | | ---|---|--- You see, friends, Mamdani gave him what he craves more than money or power: affirmation. Suddenly Mamdani wasn't a Marxist as Elise claimed, seemed like a likeable guy and had talent and would do good things in New York City. This is also why you can feed Trump the craziest ht in the world, and he'll buy it. Because as long as you're nice to him by telling him what he wants to hear, what his ego must hear -- own him. I really wish I weren't being serious here. Meanwhile, if you're "nasty" to Trump, you could be Jesus Christ himself and he'd say: "Jesus Christ. What a sucker. A loser. He gave up his life for humanity? What did he get out of it? He'll never be great. So when a reporter questions the weak-as-a-foundation-of-a-Trump-tower goof with a "rude," question, it was "quiet piggy." When Springsteen ripped him for "treason" and "corruption," Trump called him "over-rated" (this, I lol at) and other choice words. | | ---|---|--- Blue Friday means spending money on things that matter--like supporting independent journalism and planning for 2026. ! subject: The insiders are wired and ready — but this story dies without $38k in 10 days
body:
I still get chills thinking about what we pulled off together last month.
[View in Web Browser](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e77888/VaHR0cHM6Ly9vZGIubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3Yvc3RVeGIyWTJoWQ/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTExMjU/LbmNsYmdBdTNYVw/qP2hpZHM9bmM4YUV1VzRqc1lOYjhscw/gaST2kQ/sar9be103e7)

| | | | [****](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)
[****](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.) Dear Friend,

I still get chills thinking about what we pulled off together last month.

Because we kept our cameras rolling, we exposed that massive 8(a) contracting scam — executives on hidden tape admitting they were gaming the system for hundreds of millions. Tribal members we interviewed called it straight: "They're renting our sovereignty."

And it worked. The SBA suspended ATI Government Solutions. The Treasury Department launched a **$9 billion investigation**.

Real fraudsters are sweating, real money is being clawed back for taxpayers — **all because a few thousand everyday Americans like you said, "Enough is enough.**

[**And I need your help to keep the pressure on in every direction.**](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)

That's the power we have when we stand together. No corporate overlords. No government strings. Just pure, citizen-funded journalism that forces accountability. [**Are you in**](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)?

But right now, I'm writing you from the war room because we've got something even larger locked in — insiders ready to blow open the kind of entrenched corruption that makes the 8(a) mess look like small change.

The kind involving leverage, compromise, the shadows where power really hides.

The team is geared up and raring to go. Whistleblowers are putting everything on the line.

[**But we're staring at a**](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)**[**$38,000 shortfall**](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)**[**to launch safely**](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.): cross-country flights for undercover meets, secure tech that can't be traced, legal shields for sources, and keeping paychecks coming for the staff who work 80-hour weeks without complaint because they believe in this mission as much as I do.

We've got **10 days** before this window slams shut. If we miss it, the evidence gets destroyed, sources get scared off, and the story dies. [**Chip in to help cover these costs so we can bring the truth to the light.**](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)

When I started my career as an investigative journalist, I was scraping by on credit cards and prayers. Then the FBI raided me, the lawsuits piled up — and it was only because Americans like you stood by me. [**I need you again now**](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.).

I'm a journalist who's paid a price for this work — arrests, betrayals, everything but regret.

And the one thing that keeps me going is knowing there are friends like you who understand: **if the price of truth isn't your life, then you're for sale**.

This is that moment again. [**Four hundred of us at $100 closes the gap tonight**](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.). A few stepping up bigger gets the cameras rolling by morning.

[**Will you stand with me one more time?**](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.) Whatever you can give today fuels the exposé that could change everything.

[**Rush your gift here.**](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)

From the bottom of my heart — thank you for being the reason we're still in this fight.

In Truth,
James O’Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

P.S. When this drops and the headlines explode (and they will), I want you to remember: [**you were the one who made it possible. Sunlight is still the best disinfectant — and you're holding the torch.**](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)

---
[****](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)
---

This email was sent to **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)** as part of your subscription to **Free Thinker Daily**

108 S Washington St. Suite 200
Alexandria, VA 22314

[Unsubscribe](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e77888/VaHR0cHM6Ly9vZGIubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3N1YnNjcmlwdGlvbnMvdW5zdWJzY3JpYmU/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTExMjU/LbmNsYmdBdTNYVw/qP2hpZHM9bmM4YUV1VzRqc1lOYjhscw/gaST2kQ/sbpc6b95228)

subject: The Department of War is coming after me

body:
You can bet this was ordered by Donald Trump and carried out by Pete Hegseth. But right now, that's besides the point.

The Department of War is coming after me because they don’t like what I have to say. name: AOC
subject: The Wizard of Oz
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
You yank back the curtain, and it's a little guy.
#
This administration is much more prepared and planned this time around, in terms of the kinds of chaos that they're trying to unleash.
More than legal programs, more than policy, **they are trying to invoke _fear_**.
That is how authoritarianism works. These are the tools to get us to sacrifice and surrender our civil liberties, more than they take them.
Trump pardoned virtually all the January 6th insurrectionists, including specifically people who were arrested with threats against my life.
**I'm not going to give them my fear**. I feel more like squaring up than anything else.
When I was running in 2018, people would say, “Why should we vote for a waitress instead of this 20-year incumbent?” — understandably, right? I didn't have experience. They did. And I often talked about the story of _The Wizard of Oz_.
This was my mom's favorite movie. I know it's in the zeitgeist now because _Wicked_ is out, but genuinely: all of these big, scary things, it reminds me of the end of _The Wizard of Oz_ , where you yank back the curtain — and _it's a little guy_.
**It's a small, scared, incompetent little man**.
I think we need to remain focused. Yes, they are capable of immense amounts of damage.
It can be scary. It's not something we ignore. It's not something we check out from.
But we register it. We say, “OK.” **Then we figure out what our options are and we do the best we can, day by day**.
They're relying on us giving up. **Hell no**.
We’re going to keep standing with trans people.
We’re going to keep standing with the LGBT community.
We’re going to keep standing for the working class.
We’re going to keep fighting for a better minimum wage.
We’re going to keep fighting to guarantee healthcare.
[Help us continue the fight with a grassroots contribution today.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20251124-pm.ikpBqe&refcode=em20251124-10273-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=10273%2E2526796%2ECnBuzy)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20251124-pm.ikpBqe&refcode=em20251124-10273-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=10273%2E2526796%2ECnBuzy)**
In solidarity,
Alexandria

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20251124-pm?refcode=em20251124-10273-P_FND_EGR_GRM&t=21&refcode2=10273_2526796_CnBuzy&akid=10273%2E2526796%2ECnBuzy)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20251124-10273-P_FND_EGR_GRM&t=22&akid=10273%2E2526796%2ECnBuzy)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=23&akid=10273%2E2526796%2ECnBuzy) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=24&akid=10273%2E2526796%2ECnBuzy) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=25&akid=10273%2E2526796%2ECnBuzy) | [](https://bsky.app/profile/aoc.bsky.social?t=26&akid=10273%2E2526796%2ECnBuzy)
---|---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [¿Hablas español?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/espanol-2025/?source=em20251124-10273-P_FND_EGR_GRM)

name: Dr. Amy Acton
subject: nothing will stop us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
a powerful grassroots movement
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119919716/584677000/73607213?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.11.24_Amy-Acton-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_90AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OTg4NTNhMS05NWM5LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8lW6hUzKCWd4zghfSLfZVTRHjPaShm4OUMDySvgrhsk=) Hi there, folks. It’s Dr. Amy Acton, the Democrat running for Ohio governor. I wanted to take a moment to say thank you. Thanks to your support, _we’re in this race to win it_ , and we’ve united Democrats — and even some Republicans — behind us. **Here’s what we’ve accomplished together:**
* We’ve made this a **neck-and-neck** race in MULTIPLE polls.
* We’ve traveled all over Ohio, seeing massive crowds and building truly unprecedented grassroots enthusiasm.
* We’ve broken fundraising record after record – in fact, thanks to your support, we’ve received a historic number of donations.

**Together, we've ignited a grassroots movement across our state unlike any seen before – and we're _ready_ to win this race.** Together, we can lower costs, give Ohioans a little breathing room, and build the Ohio we all deserve. But we have a lot of work ahead of us to win this race. This powerful grassroots movement has shown up for me again and again, and I’m going to need you with me every step of the way. [**_Thanks to your support, we’ve made this a _neck-and-neck_ race against Vivek. Now, I am asking you to once again step up to keep our movement going strong and help me pull into the lead. clean_body: a powerful grassroots movement = Hi there, folks. It’s Dr. Amy Acton, the Democrat running for Ohio governor. I wanted to take a moment to say thank you. Thanks to your support, we’re in this race to win it , and we’ve united Democrats — and even some Republicans — behind us. Here’s what we’ve accomplished together: We’ve made this a neck-and-neck race in MULTIPLE polls. We’ve traveled all over Ohio, seeing massive crowds and building truly unprecedented grassroots enthusiasm. We’ve broken fundraising record after record – in fact, thanks to your support, we’ve received a historic number of donations. Together, we've ignited a grassroots movement across our state unlike any seen before – and we're ready to win this race. Together, we can lower costs, give Ohioans a little breathing room, and build the Ohio we all deserve. But we have a lot of work ahead of us to win this race. This powerful grassroots movement has shown up for me again and again, and I’m going to need you with me every step of the way. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Dr. Amy Acton and Kirsten Gillibrand will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = I'm in this fight to win. subject: Your support before the end of 2025 has never been more critical
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
The outcome of elections next year will be shaped by the resources we raise this year.
#
Here’s the truth, Peter: **Your support _right now_ in 2025 could make _even more_ of an impact than it would in 2026.**
Why? Because the outcomes of next year’s elections will be shaped by the work we’re doing right now. Recruiting. Organizing. Building momentum in the states + districts that will decide control of Congress next year.
**All of that takes time, energy, and grassroots support from people like you.**
If we wait ‘til 2026, we’re already behind. But if we act NOW, we can flip the Senate, take back the House, and save our democracy next year.
**That’s why we’re asking:[Can you chip in $5 today to help us hit the ground running?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98260?refcode=em20251124-9757&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9757%2E614464%2EMuHdzm)**

name: Leaders We Deserve
subject: This incumbent just lost it
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
An incumbent Democrat we’re challenging just compared our primary challenge to Pearl Harbor.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20251124-1&t=1&akid=2877%2E587540%2EZWNNKA)
**An incumbent Democrat we’re challenging just compared our primary challenge to Pearl Harbor.**
Yes, Peter, you read that right. And it should tell you _everything_ you need to know about why we’re in this race.
We’ve got the full details for you. But if you’re ready now to **[keep triggering complacent Democrats in Congress and elect new progressive leaders who will actually fight for their community, please chip in $5 or more now.](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20251124_1_ph.c1sIzD&refcode=em20251124-2877&amount=5&t=2&akid=2877%2E587540%2EZWNNKA)**
Here’s the deal:
**We endorsed Justin J. Pearson, a young and bold progressive leader, in Tennessee’s 9th District because he is exactly the kind of leader we were founded to support.**
You might remember him as a part of the “Tennessee Three.” He demanded action after a school shooting, was expelled for speaking out, and then re-elected with _94%_ of the vote. He’s also organized to beat two billion-dollar oil companies to protect Memphis’ water and consistently protected his community from corporate greed.
The incumbent in the district, Congressman Steve Cohen is the opposite — someone who may have started with good intentions but, after nearly 20 years in Washington, simply isn’t meeting the moment for the people he represents.
So Justin is challenging him. And we’re proud to back him.
Cohen isn’t taking it well. In a recent interview, he said — and this is a direct quote:
_“He could’ve waited two years, he could’ve waited four years. He could’ve talked to me, he interned for me in high school, and he never talked to me about running for office. It was kinda like uh... uh...**Pearl Harbor."**_
If that sounds insane to you, it’s because it genuinely is. Comparing a young leader running for office to a surprise attack that killed over 2,000 Americans ... We've heard some wild stuff from pissed off incumbents, but that’s a new one!
The saddest part? His response isn’t that far off from the current state of the Democratic Party. There is a deeply ingrained culture where incumbents in Congress feel entitled to their seats — not to their constituents’ needs.
And telling Justin to _“wait his turn”_ for another two, another four years? _Classic._ Members of Congress say that and then keep running again and again.
To them, a young person saying _my community can’t wait anymore_ is an attack. But families in Memphis going years without real results? That’s apparently “normal.”
We’re here to remind people like Steve Cohen:
**Your seat doesn’t belong to you. It belongs to your constituents.** And if you want to avoid a primary (which is apparently your own personal Pearl Harbor), maybe start by just trying to be a better Congressman and being in touch with your community!
**Power isn’t given, Peter — it’s taken.** And it’s time we take it back from do-nothing incumbents and put it in the hands of leaders like Justin who will actually fight for their communities.
[**If you’re ready to help us take power, chip in any amount today:**](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20251124_1_ph.c1sIzD&amount=5&%3Brefcode=em20251124-2877&t=3&akid=2877%2E587540%2EZWNNKA)
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20251124_1_ph.c1sIzD&amount=5&refcode=em20251124-2877&t=22&akid=2877%2E587540%2EZWNNKA)**
Let’s keep pissing off corporate Democrats in Congress together.
— Leaders We Deserve
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20251124-1&t=23&refcode2=2877_587540_ZWNNKA&akid=2877%2E587540%2EZWNNKA)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=24&akid=2877%2E587540%2EZWNNKA)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=2877%2E587540%2EZWNNKA)

To give by check:
Leaders We Deserve
611 Pennsylvania Ave SE
#192
Washington, DC 20003
Email us: [info@leaderswedeserve.com](mailto:info@leaderswedeserve.com)
PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE.COM, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE

name: Team Swalwell
subject: Eric has never been afraid to stand up to Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Swalwell for Governor 2026
body:
We need a Governor who will protect us! | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119920056/584681830/-1649076153?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MzI1OTFhNy05NmM5LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=V4OOE71WjIuStT9rM2Hibltcj2gb2DcGCAhvX7ydE8I=)
---
Friends, **Donald Trump is the worst President in our history, and California needs a Governor who will keep him out of our homes, out of our streets, and out of our lives.** _That person is Eric Swalwell. He’s a fighter and a protector._ Eric has never been afraid to stand up to Trump. Peter ,
Something extraordinary is happening in the House.
Marjorie Taylor Greene’s resignation in January doesn’t just shrink the GOP’s already-razor-thin majority; it exposes just how unstable their grasp on power really is.
And with two special elections in Texas and New Jersey where Democrats are favored, the margins between Republicans and Democrats could narrow to 218–215 within months.
But first comes Tennessee’s special election on Dec 2nd, where we're working to turn out the vote in an election that could flip another red seat BLUE.
If our candidate Aftyn Behn pulls off the upset in TN-07, the House would sit at 217–216. One retirement... one resignation... one unexpected vacancy... and the House could be split 216–216!
We need to expand our on-the-ground GOTV program, not next month, not after the holidays, but right now.
Will you chip in $15 to fuel our organizing work in the districts that could determine control of the House even before 2026 arrives? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email11242025]

I’m an organizer, state rep, and pissed-off social worker facing off against Trump’s hand-picked candidate in less than one month. And the stakes couldn’t be higher. Flipping TN-07 means rewriting the playbook for the Deep South. It means we can get to work feeding kids, fixing roads, and funding hospitals. name: State Representative Ryan Chamberlin
subject: Newsletter from Rep. Ryan Chamberlin
body:
Newsletter from Rep. Ryan Chamberlin | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/repryanchamberlin/newsletter-from-rep-ryan-chamberlin-12931220?e=d1c1b9864f)
---
| |
---
| | **NEWSLETTER FROM REP. RYAN CHAMBERLIN**
---
|
---
| Friends and Neighbors,

The past several weeks have been full and productive. We just closed out **Committee Week 4** and will finish the final two committee weeks in December. As we pause for Thanksgiving with family and loved ones, I am grateful for the opportunity to be in the district and connected with the people we serve. I look forward to the important work ahead as we move toward the legislative session in January.

**My fellow legislators and I are working tirelessly to put Florida first!** Our state is leading the nation in so many areas, but if we want to keep it that way, we must continue to promote legislation that prioritizes freedom, fiscal responsibility, and our conservative values.**Stay tuned for updates on our progress in the weeks and months to come!**

As always, please do not hesitate to [contact my office](https://ryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=a115671be6&e=d1c1b9864f) if there is something we can do for you. My team and I would be more than happy to help you in any way we can.
---
| | _**Committee Meetings**_
---
|
---
| **I have the honor of serving on several important committees for the upcoming 2026 Legislative Session.** I've**** wrapped up committee week 4. There are two final committee weeks in December, then I will head back to Tallahassee for the 2026 legislative session.
* [Economic Infrastructure Subcommittee](https://ryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=05c5edf5e7&e=d1c1b9864f)
* [Justice Budget Subcommittee](https://ryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=09b5dbbfb8&e=d1c1b9864f)
* [Intergovernmental Affairs Subcommittee](https://ryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=03d1f3e7da&e=d1c1b9864f)
* [Select Committee on Property Taxes](https://ryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=b8da47d05e&e=d1c1b9864f)

---
| | _**Events and Receptions in Tallahassee**_
---
| I had the pleasure of attending several events in Tallahassee, including a**Monday Night Football Party** , a gathering with the **Florida Retail Federation** to hear about issues facing retailers across the state, the **Jefferson County REC** meeting to connect with local leaders, the **Capital Young Republicans Fall Harvest Celebration** , and a meet and greet with the **Florida Association of Nurse Practitioners** to learn more about their work and priorities.
---
| | _**Meetings in Tallahassee**_
---
|
---
| I had the opportunity to meet with the incredible students of **SADD (Students Against Destructive Decisions)**. Their commitment to promoting safe choices, building strong peer leadership, and creating a healthier future for their classmates is truly inspiring.

It’s encouraging to see young leaders taking initiative and speaking up for the well-being of their schools and communities. Proud to support their mission and the positive impact they’re making every day.
---
|
---
|
---
| Great meeting with **FDOT Secretary Tyler** to discuss transportation priorities and the continued growth of Marion County and our State.

I appreciate Secretary Tyler’s leadership and commitment to keeping Florida moving forward.
---
| | | _**Meetings and Events in the District**_
---
|
---
| It was wonderful to join the **Community Foundation for the Give4Marion check presentation,** celebrating an incredible **$2.48 million raised** for local nonprofits!

Each dollar represents generosity, compassion, and a shared commitment to making Marion County stronger. Thank you to everyone who gave and to the organizations that continue to serve our community every day.
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| I appreciated meeting with **Voices of Change Animal League (VOCAL)** to learn more about their outstanding work supporting animal welfare and responsible pet ownership in our community. Their efforts to provide affordable care, promote adoption, and prevent pet homelessness are making a real difference across Marion County.
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
---
| I was proud to join **Senator McClain** for the check presentation to the **ROCK Program at West Port High School.** Thanks to our successful appropriation this past session, **we secured $350,000** to support their incredible work.

These funds will not only strengthen the program here in Marion County, but also expand the ROCK Program into Citrus, Lake, and Sumter counties. This expansion represents a significant step forward for the organization-allowing them to reach more students and create an even greater positive impact across our region.

**Congratulations to the ROCK team on this milestone.** I look forward to seeing the continued growth and success of this inspiring program.
---
|
---
|
---
| I was honored to speak with students at the **College of Central Florida** as they **launched their new Turning Point USA chapter.**

It’s inspiring to see young people engaging in civic dialogue, leadership, and a passion for America’s founding values.

Turning Point USA stands as a testament to Charlie Kirk’s lasting legacy — empowering students across the nation to think freely, lead boldly, and stand firm in their beliefs. **I’m grateful for the opportunity to join them and look forward to seeing the impact this chapter will make on campus and in our community.** 🇺🇸
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| It was great to attend the **Horse Farms Forever Conservation Summit,** where leaders, landowners, and advocates came together to discuss the future of Marion County’s farmland and our world-class equine community.

Protecting our open spaces isn’t just about preserving our landscape; it’s about safeguarding the heritage, economy, and way of life that make this region so special. I’m grateful for the thoughtful conversations and the shared commitment to responsible growth and long-term conservation.

**Proud to support efforts that keep Marion County the Horse Capital of the World.**
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
---
| I was honored to join **Empath for their ceremonial check presentation and a hardhat tour of the new Nancy Renyhart Center for Dementia Education.** This project is a true testament to **Mr. and Mrs. Renyhart’s** vision, generosity, and commitment to improving care for those living with dementia.

Their dedication is helping bring a much-needed resource to our community—one that will provide families and patients with specialized support, education, and compassionate care. I**’m grateful for Empath and the Renyhart family for leading the way on such an important initiative.** This center will make a meaningful difference for so many.
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| Honored to attend the **Florida Fallen Firefighter Memorial** with our **CFO Blaise Ingolglia** and **Senator Tom Wright**.

We came together to remember the brave men and women who made the ultimate sacrifice in service to our state. Their courage, commitment, and love for their communities will never be forgotten.

**Grateful for our firefighters, their families, and all who continue to protect Floridians every day.**
---
|
---
---
|
---
| Thank you for your continued support of my leadership in the Florida House! I look forward to sharing with you again soon.

Have a great week!

Best regards,

**Ryan Chamberlin**
******State Representative**
**District 24**
---
| | _Copyright © 2025 Ryan Chamberlin for State Representative, All rights reserved._

Paid by Ryan Chamberlin, Republican, for State Representative

**Our mailing address is:**
Ryan Chamberlin for State Representative
526 E Park Ave
Tallahassee, FL 32301-2568

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://ryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/profile?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=929c76fdea&e=d1c1b9864f&c=1278f46ecf) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://ryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=929c76fdea&t=b&e=d1c1b9864f&c=1278f46ecf).

---

**High school dropout. Waffle House waitress. First woman to graduate from The Citadel. Single mom. Fighter.** **Nancy Mace wasn’t born into power. She worked for every inch of ground she’s gained.** At 17, she dropped out of high school and took a job slinging hash browns at Waffle House to survive. No silver spoon. No Ivy League connections. Just grit, grace, and a whole lot of graveyard shifts. **By the grace of God, she turned that struggle into a story no politician can touch.** She made history as the first woman to graduate from The Citadel, South Carolina’s legendary military college. She built her own business. She raised two kids on her own. And when the Left came for everything she believed in, she stood her ground.Now, she’s running for Governor of South Carolina. Nancy Mace is a battle-tested conservative who’s walked through fire and come out swinging. In Congress, she’s been one of President Trump’s fiercest allies, fighting to secure our border, protect our daughters, and stop the Left’s sick agenda dead in its tracks. **She’s not here to make friends. She’s here to make history.** Nancy is fighting to:
* Eliminate South Carolina’s Income Tax—the highest in the Southeast
* Prosecute violent criminals and pedophiles with zero leniency
* Crack down on sanctuary sheriffs who let illegal aliens roam free
* Defund radical public universities that indoctrinate, not educate
* Reform education so students learn how to think—not what to think
* Work hand-in-hand with President Trump to put South Carolina FIRST

Through every hardship, Nancy never gave up. And now she’s ready to do what she’s always done: roll up her sleeves, take the heat, and lead from the front. **South Carolina is worth fighting for. And Nancy Mace is just getting started.**
---
| |
# PAID FOR BY NANCY MACE FOR GOVERNOR

name: Jon Ossoff
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
body:
#

**$5,** Peter.
That is the contribution I’m asking you to make — today — to my reelection campaign here in Georgia.
**$5** because winning in 2026 is our only hope to regain Congressional power and reverse this descent toward one-man rule.
**$5** because if the GOP flips this seat red and turns Georgia red, they will lock in control of the Senate for years to come.
**$5** because there is no path back from the brink of authoritarianism without defending this seat — the very seat that secured the Democratic majority in 2021.
You might think that a single $5 contribution can’t make a difference in an election as expensive and competitive as this one.
But as you read this, lots and lots of people are chipping in their own $5 — and it adds up fast when lots of people chip in.
[**Please use this link to make a $5 contribution to my reelection campaign today. My team and I will put your donation right to work WINNING this U.S. Senate race.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-nov25.fw0_9v&refcode=em251124-2-f-&t=1&akid=1142%2E5691347%2EjneDR8)
**[DONATE](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-nov25.fw0_9v&refcode=em251124-2-f-&t=2&akid=1142%2E5691347%2EjneDR8)**
Gratefully,
Jon Ossoff

Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Thank you for supporting Jon Ossoff. name: Brad Finstad
subject: ICYMI: Remember how Al Franken got to the Senate?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Finstad for Congress
body:
| | | | |
---
| Friend, you probably remember how Al Franken first got elected. It took months of recounts, court fights, and “found” ballots that flipped a Republican win into a Democrat victory. That narrow and questionable win gave Democrats the one vote they needed to pass Obamacare. One vote that changed the course of our healthcare system forever. Now, Al Franken is trying to do it again. His political action committee recently donated to my Democrat opponent, hoping to bring that same kind of politics and disastrous policies back to Washington. Minnesota doesn’t need more Al Franken Democrats. We need proven conservative leadership that stands up to the D.C. crowd and defends our values. I’m fighting to make sure the First District keeps a commonsense, conservative voice. But I can’t do it without your help. Will you chip in $25, $50, or even $100 today to help us counteract the liberal money pouring in?

subject: Every restriction erodes our fundamental right to vote
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Every chip here, every little slice there, every restriction passed on our fundamental right to vote erodes our democracy . At a time when every level of government seems pushed and strained to stretch the limits of legality, we can't afford bills like this passing in North Carolina or anywhere else.
We need your help to stop opponents of voting rights from testing more limits on our rights. RUSH $25 or more right now to defend our elections and stop these deeply partisan anti-voting measures >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=112425_3&amount=25]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
NC Newsline: NC House bill would allow elections board workers to be replaced with political hires [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=112425_3&amount=25]
Get this, Team: Opponents of voting rights in North Carolina introduced a sweeping elections bill that, among other steps, would bar election officials from encouraging or promoting voter turnout. This is just the latest and most stark example of a trend among the vote suppressors of opposing even nonpartisan outreach efforts that could boost voting rates.
This bill would also take more than a third of existing nonpartisan staff positions at the state elections office and convert them to jobs for partisan political appointees deeply invested in the results of the elections they would be in charge of. Finally, the measure would add new voting restrictions for military and overseas voters, and ban ranked choice voting.
The bill and proposed ban on promoting turnout “ raises real questions about what democracy means in North Carolina, who really holds the power, who government is answering to ” according to Andrew Garber, a counsel in the nonpartisan Brennan Center’s Voting Rights and Elections Program.
Opponents of voting rights in North Carolina are more focused on expanding and cementing their own power than they are in serving the people and having fair elections. It's just another example of what they'll export around the country if they get away with it here.
This troubling bill has the potential to impact us all, no matter what state we live in. Please step up with $25 or whatever you can today to help us stop voter suppression in North Carolina and across the country >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=112425_3&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=112425_3&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=112425_3&amount=25] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=112425_3&amount=50]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=112425_3&amount=100] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=112425_3&amount=250] OTHER AMOUNT [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=112425_3&amount=35]
Wondering how this impacts you? It's as simple as this: Rep. Allison Dahle, a top defender of voting rights on North Carolina’s House Elections committee, said, “ I think North Carolina has become a testing ground. It’s become a place where they say, ‘let’s see if it works.’ ”
For decades, the voter suppression movement has taken bills that pass in one state and exported them across the country. The leaders at a sprawling, dark money conservative think-tank have taken credit for it, caught on camera bragging about writing the legislation at their headquarters. For example -- the sweeping suppression bill passed in Georgia in March of 2021 was adapted and passed in states like Texas, Florida, and beyond in the months afterward.
It's all just the latest extreme anti-democracy tactic pioneered by North Carolina vote suppressors over the last decade or so. In 2016, a court found that the state’s voter suppression law targeted Black voters with “surgical precision.” They drew multiple gerrymandered maps, and stripped the new governor of several election-related powers before he took office. After the 2024 election, they waged a months-long campaign, ultimately unsuccessful, to overturn a Supreme Court race by having over 65,000 valid votes thrown out after the vote-counting, and two recounts, had been completed. It's not going to end until we stop them.
We have to fight back every time they try to chip away at our fundamental right to vote. Will you chip in $25 or whatever you can today to stop this bill and suppression bills like it nationwide? >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=112425_3&amount=25]
https://voteractionproject.org/ [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=112425_3&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=112425_3&amount=20]
Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code.
A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003.
Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www.voteractionproject.org, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
Integrity First Voter Action Project
P.O. Box 19294
Portland, OR 97280
United States
This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails are a crucial way to keep supporters up to date on the latest attacks on voting rights and our efforts to expand ballot access for all Americans. If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/FQb7Rbo110qLPmSvMAn63Q2?unsubscribedata=5%2BBtZaZA6Dw9q1FIeftk8GHbQoOv8grOEIxxbEb%2B0CSMfUScXL2ZZFMl7U4%2B7R7BQ5Z%2BACmbDoWGHrAeBl4fKQTkZiEHTF%2B9MRbTUgYeqE48mTT1nF67Z9TX713byIIXXht4tb0d%2FfdGYobHVPrV%2FY6xYoJTkaJOLMKRuIxiOLdFVlTGQaLhILb5z5Gvp4qLNjhaMLVtJ%2B%2B81OEEHqc17YBrD7O8iCui5Zzphtzg40L2JrpcvSO980wNxpmr%2BhaCzT2oKRl3rDHAZkwgkOiJocThhbPLHVFxYdyPLPs6c8P7%2BY0JjeKJb4OPrfUvfegjMppzR5D0MrXNenJRJI4PL6lF2NSBhK55vKUc%2B%2BQPOaY2t2AIu2v29c3U5pkO98eOb4tACxW66SvxJMgetGfxuAEp3I1%2BED1rDUayiiYARZ4%3D .

name: Mark Ronchetti
subject: They paid parents $1,500/month to fake autism diagnoses
body:
Plus: Economy tanks GOP hopes, MTG resigns, and the bizarre Oval Office meeting | New for dpwillis67@gmail.com

| | | | | |
---
[|
---](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=aa8b9d4aa0&e=567664f14c)
| | | | | |

**This is outrageous.** The Department of Justice just exposed a $400 million fraud scheme where parents were paid cash to fake autism diagnoses for their kids — and [federal investigators say](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=edf398495d&e=567664f14c) the money allegedly funded an Al-Qaeda linked terrorist group.
---
[|
---](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=f3eb49c75a&e=567664f14c)
| |
**$400 MILLION AUTISM FRAUD EXPOSED**
Here's what happened in Minneapolis:
Fraudsters recruited Somali families and paid them $300-$1,500 per month to enroll their children in autism therapy programs. Didn't matter if the kids actually had autism — they facilitated fake diagnoses.
The numbers are staggering: Federal autism funding went from $3 million in 2018 to $399 million by 2023. That's a 13,200% increase in just five years. Autism providers exploded from 41 to 328. One in sixteen Somali four-year-olds were diagnosed with autism — triple the state average.
**Where did the money go?****Why wasn't this stopped earlier?**
We break down exactly how the kickback scheme worked, why politicians protected their careers instead of taxpayers, and what this means for families who legitimately need autism services.
---
| [Stream Episode Now](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=b4d635acde&e=567664f14c)
---
| |
**WHY QUALIFIED REPUBLICANS MAY NOT RUN IN 2026**
New Mexico should have six or seven serious Republican candidates announcing for Governor, Congress, and Senate by now. Instead? The field is nearly empty.
The reason is brutal: economy numbers have collapsed so dramatically that experienced candidates are sitting out.
Mark breaks down a timing issue, why this is different from normal election cycles, and which candidates might still take the leap anyway.

**NYC MAYOR-ELECT'S BIZARRE OVAL OFFICE LOVEFEST**
Zohran Mamdani spent months calling the president a "fascist." Then they met in the Oval Office and suddenly they're best buddies — literal pat-on-the-back energy.
Mark's take on the meeting: "If you watch their press conference, you'd think they're going to be part of a buddy cop drama on HBO Max."
We explain what this bizarre political theater actually means.
---
| [Stream Episode Now](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=a1651e4051&e=567664f14c)
---
| |

**PLUS:** Marjorie Taylor Greene announces January resignation after getting dumped, Showboat Sam Bregman proposes term limits for NM legislature and gets savagely attacked by Deb Halland's campaign, why New Mexico needs to follow Utah's lead on small modular nuclear reactors, and our Thanksgiving traditions (plus Mark's Cowboys game anxiety).
---
|
---
| | ✅ **LIKE** the episode on [YouTube](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=0c2a1c4a2e&e=567664f14c)[
](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=d7c5935be3&e=567664f14c)
✅ **SUBSCRIBE** to [our channel](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=71278f1074&e=567664f14c) and hit the 🔔 for updates

✅ **RATE & REVIEW** us on [your favorite podcast platform](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=83f226d2f7&e=567664f14c)

✅ **DONATE** to support independent, fearless commentary at: 🌐 [NoDoubtAboutItPodcast.com](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=a77fc0d4aa&e=567664f14c)

Thank you for being part of this community — real talk, real issues, and no spin.

**Mark & Krysty Ronchetti **
_No Doubt About It Podcast 🎙️_
---

---](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=07fc09f4b0&e=567664f14c)
