name: Update via Team Jena
subject: re: conspiracy theories from Tina Peters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jena for Colorado
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2511-q4-jg?refcode=251121-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2511-q4-jg?refcode=251121-email]
Peter –
Tina Peters’ attorney is continuing to push the election conspiracy theories that Trump, Peters, and their far-right supporters have been pushing since 2020. A few weeks ago, Peters’ attorney wrote a letter to Jena and Gov. Polis demanding that Colorado’s voting systems be completely overhauled by eliminating voting machines and mail ballots. He also stated false claims about Colorado’s voting machines to instill fear and mistrust in our safe and secure elections.
Enough is enough, Peter. When far-right extremists continue to spread misinformation, it is on all of us to stand up and shut it down.
That’s exactly what Jena did when she released the statement:
“Colorado elections are safe and secure. These types of conspiracies have repeatedly been rejected by courts of law. Voters will have their voices heard in 2025 and every election.”
Now, we need you to step up and show your support for Jena’s campaign for Attorney General – so she can keep being at the forefront of standing up for our democracy.
Chip in any amount you can to support Jena’s campaign and send the message that Coloradans won’t stand for these conspiracy theories any longer. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2511-q4-jg?refcode=251121-email]
Thank you for stepping up when the stakes are highest.
– Team Jena

I'm reaching out to you from the **Sound of Freedom Foundation** -- the organization that funds real-time rescue operations in partnership with law enforcement and former special forces to find and extract children from traffickers -- fast.When a tip comes in, the teams made up of former Navy SEALs, undercover investigators, and cyber-intelligence analysts move within hours, sometimes minutes.In partnership with local law enforcement, we pull these children out of hotels, vehicles moving across the country, and brothels.The **Sound of Freedom Foundation** team works tirelessly to protect youth from the ravages of human trafficking and exploitation. Our mission is clear - to create a world where no child ever has to live in fear of being trafficked or exploited. We don't wait.Today -- a child is waiting to be found.I'm personally asking you: will you help me rescue one before midnight?

Friend, the facts continue to haunt me and tear me apart every day:
---
* Most victims are only 12 years old
* 35-40 million suffer in sex trafficking worldwide every single day
* Less than 0.04% are ever found - but we can change that

---
We can't continue to stand by and let these children live in fear and terror.Your gift today goes straight to the next rescue:
---
* $25 keeps our 24/7 rescue hotline open one more shift
* $50 provides transportation to a safe house
* $100 gives one rescued child 72 hours in a safe house with a warm bed, food, and someone to hold them while they cry

---
I wish I could do this alone, but I can't.I need you with me today. Please don't close this email without helping. clean_body: Today a child is waiting to be found—will you answer the call?| | | Friend, Every 40 seconds a child goes missing in America. Many are lured in when they are on Snapchat or TikTok by predators who confine these children to traffic them for sex.Today, a child is waiting to be found. My name is Eduardo Verastegui. I produced the movie Sound of Freedom because I couldn't stay silent anymore. I've seen these children after raids -- shaking, crying, whispering "Please don't let them take me again." They look just like my nieces and nephews. Their eyes haunt me every single night.Can you help me put an end to the nightmare for these children? I'm reaching out to you from the Sound of Freedom Foundation -- the organization that funds real-time rescue operations in partnership with law enforcement and former special forces to find and extract children from traffickers -- fast.When a tip comes in, the teams made up of former Navy SEALs, undercover investigators, and cyber-intelligence analysts move within hours, sometimes minutes.In partnership with local law enforcement, we pull these children out of hotels, vehicles moving across the country, and brothels.The Sound of Freedom Foundation team works tirelessly to protect youth from the ravages of human trafficking and exploitation. Our mission is clear - to create a world where no child ever has to live in fear of being trafficked or exploited. We don't wait.Today -- a child is waiting to be found.I'm personally asking you: will you help me rescue one before midnight? Friend, the facts continue to haunt me and tear me apart every day: Most victims are only 12 years old 35-40 million suffer in sex trafficking worldwide every single day Less than 0.04% are ever found - but we can change that We can't continue to stand by and let these children live in fear and terror.Your gift today goes straight to the next rescue: $25 keeps our 24/7 rescue hotline open one more shift $50 provides transportation to a safe house $100 gives one rescued child 72 hours in a safe house with a warm bed, food, and someone to hold them while they cry I wish I could do this alone, but I can't.I need you with me today. Please don't close this email without helping. One child's future -- one little boy or girl who still believes someone is coming -- is hanging on what we do in the next few hours.Click below to give today - Every single dollar lands instantly where seconds save lives. From the bottom of my heart, thank you. Eduardo Verastegui Sound of Freedom, Producer For the Sound of Freedom Foundation "Let the little children come to me." -- Jesus 2024 National Center for Missing & Exploited Children 6671 Southwest Freeway, Suite 700, Houston TX 77074

subject: Judicial Watch Sues Justice Department for FBI Records Found in Secret Room
body:
Judicial Watch announced that it filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit against the U.S. Department of Justice for “hidden” records from former FBI Director James Comey’s era that were referenced during a Fox News interview with Deputy Director Dan Bongino (Judicial Watch v U.S. Department of Justice (No.1:25-cv-04047)).

---
| | | Because no one is above the law! | Nov 24, 2025
---|---|---

The Biden Justice Department accused Bushell of being a “purported” monk and alleged that he and Stockton improperly used Covid relief funds. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=77925&L=36566&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvbW9uay1hcnJlc3RlZC1ieS1iaWRlbi1kb2otZmJpLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=1cc210b0cebb98a91a708f015b84bb7c2389f76cae72f0b28380f0e0e994a8c9)
---|---
| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=77925&L=36567&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdXNwcy05LWJpbGxpb24tbmV0LWxvc3MvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=493fdb04236170947f8fa67f2b1451cae4816229fb7f4652ffc4bc26714f4b08) | **[Even after $916 Million Budget Increase USPS ends FY 2025 with $9 Billion Net Loss](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=77925&L=36567&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdXNwcy05LWJpbGxpb24tbmV0LWxvc3MvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=493fdb04236170947f8fa67f2b1451cae4816229fb7f4652ffc4bc26714f4b08)** The bleeding continues full throttle at the U.S. Postal Service (USPS), the agency plagued by scandals for secretly spying on Americans that just a few years ago received a staggering $107 billion taxpayer bailout to mitigate its chronic losses. USPS is under water yet again closing fiscal year 2025, which ended in September, with a net loss of $9 billion despite receiving a $916 million increase in operating revenue over 2024, for a total of $80.5 billion to perform its duties. Postmaster General David Steiner, who inherited a huge mess when he took over in July, says the USPS must explore new revenue opportunities to improve the agency’s business model. “More importantly, we must operate more efficiently and compete more effectively to best perform our public service mission,” he stressed. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=77925&L=36567&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdXNwcy05LWJpbGxpb24tbmV0LWxvc3MvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=493fdb04236170947f8fa67f2b1451cae4816229fb7f4652ffc4bc26714f4b08)
---|---
| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=77925&L=36524&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdHJhbnNnZW5kZXItY2xhc3NtYXRlcy1iaW9sb2dpY2FsLXByb25vdW5zLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=586938fc4dda6291e74f1f0d5354d4e0928164d973bab5cc45be75223a615d9a) | **[Reversing Clinton Judge Appeals Court Rules Students Can’t be Punished for using Transgender Classmates’ Biological Pronouns](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=77925&L=36524&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdHJhbnNnZW5kZXItY2xhc3NtYXRlcy1iaW9sb2dpY2FsLXByb25vdW5zLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=586938fc4dda6291e74f1f0d5354d4e0928164d973bab5cc45be75223a615d9a)** Is the learning environment disrupted when students in kindergarten through high school refer to all classmates—including those who identify as transgender—by their biological pronoun? A public school district in Ohio claims it is and a few years ago enacted an “anti-harassment” policy that punishes students who refuse to use the preferred pronouns of transgender classmates. This is widely known among leftists as “misgendering” and the Olentangy Local School District Board of Education in the northern suburbs of Columbus created a measure to discipline students who use language that inaccurately represents another person’s gender identity as part of a series of speech codes in support of the district’s preferred viewpoints. clean_body: Judicial Watch announced that it filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit against the U.S. Department of Justice for “hidden” records from former FBI Director James Comey’s era that were referenced during a Fox News interview with Deputy Director Dan Bongino (Judicial Watch v U.S. Department of Justice (No.1:25-cv-04047)). | | | Because no one is above the law! | Nov 24, 2025 ---|---|--- Today's Top Stories | | | | | Judicial Watch announced that it filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit against the U.S. Department of Justice for “hidden” records from former FBI Director James Comey’s era that were referenced during a Fox News interview with Deputy Director Dan Bongino (Judicial Watch v U.S. Department of Justice (No.1:25-cv-04047)). ---|--- | | | | | In the early morning hours of October 13, 2022, heavily armed federal agents raided the St. Nicholas monastic complex in Marblehead, MA, and arrested Father Brian Andrew Bushell, 50, and General Counsel Tracey M.A. Stockton, 66. The Biden Justice Department accused Bushell of being a “purported” monk and alleged that he and Stockton improperly used Covid relief funds. ---|--- | | | | | The bleeding continues full throttle at the U.S. Postal Service (USPS), the agency plagued by scandals for secretly spying on Americans that just a few years ago received a staggering $107 billion taxpayer bailout to mitigate its chronic losses. USPS is under water yet again closing fiscal year 2025, which ended in September, with a net loss of $9 billion despite receiving a $916 million increase in operating revenue over 2024, for a total of $80.5 billion to perform its duties. Postmaster General David Steiner, who inherited a huge mess when he took over in July, says the USPS must explore new revenue opportunities to improve the agency’s business model. “More importantly, we must operate more efficiently and compete more effectively to best perform our public service mission,” he stressed. ---|--- | | | | | Is the learning environment disrupted when students in kindergarten through high school refer to all classmates—including those who identify as transgender—by their biological pronoun? A public school district in Ohio claims it is and a few years ago enacted an “anti-harassment” policy that punishes students who refuse to use the preferred pronouns of transgender classmates. This is widely known among leftists as “misgendering” and the Olentangy Local School District Board of Education in the northern suburbs of Columbus created a measure to discipline students who use language that inaccurately represents another person’s gender identity as part of a series of speech codes in support of the district’s preferred viewpoints. ---|--- | | | Sedona Red Rock News The Sedona Police Department removed a policy on Oct. 7 that appeared to condone the use of firing warning shots by its officers as a means to gain compliance from suspects. It’s a tactic described by Judicial Watch Southwest Projects Coordinator Mark Spencer as “incredibly dangerous and is a city liability waiting to happen,” he wrote in August. “In police work we call this ‘Barney Fife firearms tactics.’ This policy [was] foolish because it is dangerous and costly for all involved.” | CLIPS | | | | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | | | | | ---|---|--- Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2025, All Rights Reserved |

name: Katie Porter
subject: Had to walk home
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
When we talk about which candidate will actually lower costs for Californians, it comes down to who is living our cost crisis and the stress Californians are feeling firsthand.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=40474%2E3422442%2Eszyqjg)
Peter,
Last week, I lost my mini-van’s keys while grabbing a last-minute ingredient from the grocery store to cook my kids' dinner—and I had to walk all the way home.
Being a single mom means all the stresses of life: stretching a grocery budget, meal planning, car maintenance, and yes, even dealing with things like lost keys.
It’s not the end of the world for me, but it is a reminder that when we talk about which candidate will actually lower costs for Californians, it comes down to who is living our cost crisis and the stress Californians are feeling firsthand. I’ll never lose sight of what millions of families need when I’m Governor, because I’ve experienced those needs too.
Here’s the truth: my billionaire opponents _will never understand_ what life is like for the rest of us in California.
When push comes to shove, they can't really relate to the struggles that normal people go through on a daily basis.
I'm running for governor because California deserves a leader who will put our families first, not billionaires and special interests.
But we have to raise serious money online to combat the multi-million ad buys that have already been spent against us—with more sure to come.
**[I’m counting on grassroots supporters like you to help me fight back. Can you chip in $5 to our campaign today to help me get my message out across California.](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20251124_2_ak.utDljJ&refcode=em20251124-40474&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=40474%2E3422442%2Eszyqjg)**
[Donate ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20251124_2_ak.utDljJ&refcode=em20251124-40474&t=22&akid=40474%2E3422442%2Eszyqjg)
Thank you,
Katie

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20251124-40474&amounts=&t=23&refcode2=40474_3422442_szyqjg&akid=40474%2E3422442%2Eszyqjg)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4g-emails?source=40474&t=24&akid=40474%2E3422442%2Eszyqjg)

I’ll never lose sight of what millions of families need when I’m Governor, because I’ve experienced those needs too. Here’s the truth: my billionaire opponents will never understand what life is like for the rest of us in California. When push comes to shove, they can't really relate to the struggles that normal people go through on a daily basis. I'm running for governor because California deserves a leader who will put our families first, not billionaires and special interests. But we have to raise serious money online to combat the multi-million ad buys that have already been spent against us—with more sure to come. Thank you, Katie Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change.

body:
We need to act now

| Hi friend, we’re reaching out again because the threat to the U.S. Postal Service hasn’t gone away — in fact, it’s getting worse.

Donald Trump is doubling down on his push to privatize the USPS, **even though it’s protected by the Constitution and essential to millions of Americans.**

If he succeeds in handing over a vital public service to private corporations, it would set a dangerous precedent that presidents can dismantle core public services without any oversight.

New Dems are fighting back, but we need the backing of the American people who are paying attention and ready to push back.

**[Will you take a moment to add your name and stand with us to protect the Postal Service? »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119921629/584708119/830179060?refcode=NDCAF_20250915_EMPET_E2_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZDljNGQ3Yy1hMmM5LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ovsyL47PPQV0fgRESW5FurcMWt_3iWHOatLammkbCOE=&emci=4269e4c8-6692-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=ed9c4d7c-a2c9-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=48524772)** | [YES, I’M STANDING WITH NEW DEMS TO DEFEND THE USPS! »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119921630/584708120/830179060?refcode=NDCAF_20250915_EMPET_E2_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZDljNGQ3Yy1hMmM5LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ovsyL47PPQV0fgRESW5FurcMWt_3iWHOatLammkbCOE=&emci=4269e4c8-6692-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=ed9c4d7c-a2c9-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=48524772)

Here's what you need to know and what you can do to help save the Postal Service.

1\. **The Post Office is enshrined in the U.S. Constitution and created by an act of Congress.** _Trump’s efforts to unilaterally dismantle it are unconstitutional!_

2\. **Privatizing USPS would mean higher costs, slower delivery, and the loss of universal service** — especially for rural communities, seniors, and people with disabilities.

3\. **It’s a threat to our elections.** Millions depend on the USPS to vote by mail. Weakening it makes it harder for everyday Americans to participate in our democracy.

We can’t allow Trump to dismantle the USPS and privatize it completely.

**[As New Dems fight to defend working Americans’ access to the USPS, we need you to have our back! Can you add your name to defend the USPS? »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119921634/584708124/830179060?refcode=NDCAF_20250915_EMPET_E2_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZDljNGQ3Yy1hMmM5LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ovsyL47PPQV0fgRESW5FurcMWt_3iWHOatLammkbCOE=&emci=4269e4c8-6692-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=ed9c4d7c-a2c9-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=48524772)**

name: Ken Mitchell
subject: Reflections from the campaign trail
body:
Friends- The support that I’ve received since announcing my campaign for the 6th district has been nothing short of overwhelming. I’m incredibly grateful for the kind words, the time folks have taken | | | [](https://v8k6.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=69250e2e275701193eb2052a&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.kenmitchellforvirginia.com%2F%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D69250b74ba7ccd42ee42ba37%26ss_email_id%3D69250e2e275701193eb2052a%26ss_campaign_name%3DReflections%2Bfrom%2Bthe%2Bcampaign%2Btrail%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2025-11-25T02%253A02%253A40Z&w=6578fd556ef54c70acb54115&c=b_69250b74ba7ccd42ee42ba37&l=en-US&s=J7kT7gO-N1Dx3u0SrM3sNWvX1TI%3D)
---
|
#### **Friends** -
The support that I’ve received since announcing my campaign for the 6th district has been nothing short of overwhelming. I’m incredibly grateful for the kind words, the time folks have taken to meet and talk with me, and the generous donations which will help us reach voters across the Valley and in the Highlands.In my campaign announcement, I described my vision for positive change, and that’s what I want to share with you in this newsletter. From the last few weeks on the campaign trail, I have three observations that I think merit some thought:
1. Change starts with how we talk to each other. My “candidate and coffee” event last week was just the first of many opportunities to meet with residents around the 6th district. I hope that these conversations will be a chance to listen to opposing viewpoints, acknowledge each other’s opinions, and build mutual respect across the district. In an interview on SchezzWho on Friday, I spoke to the importance of independent voters, including folks who have turned away from the Republican Party after being hurt by Ben Cline and Donald Trump’s policies. It’ll be critical to lean into conversations with our independent friends and neighbors to drive home the reality that it’s Republicans, not Democrats, who have caused our current issues.
2. Change starts with looking out for one another. When I announced my campaign in Harrisonburg two weeks ago, I spoke about the need for us to work toward a common purpose–and elect leaders who do likewise. As our region struggles under health care cuts, risks to SNAP and other benefits, and harmful agricultural and energy policies, there are too many people being left behind. As I talk with people around the 6th district I make a point to sincerely ask how they’re doing–that’s something I believe we need more of. More neighborly compassion, more willingness to reach out, and more eagerness to fill the needs of those around us. Where there’s a place for that in our hearts and homes, there’s a place for it in Congress, too.
3. Change starts with keeping our promises to each other. One thing I’ve heard consistently from people is how let down they feel by our current representation in Congress. Ben Cline has repeatedly refused to hold town halls, he’s made it harder for residents to access health care with his support for the Republican Big Beautiful Bill, and has failed to defend 6th district farmers against Trump’s Argentina beef import plans. When we vote for a candidate in any election, our vote is a declaration of trust, a belief that the candidate we’re voting for will keep their promises and stay true to their word. My commitment to you is this: When in Congress, I’ll address issues head-on, make myself available to your thoughts and opinions, and always do what I believe is best for the 6th district.

I appreciate the time you’ve taken to read and consider my thoughts. In the months ahead, I hope I’ll get the chance to hear your perspectives about change and your vision for the future of our district.**Ken**
---

clean_body: This is a big deal. As far as we’re aware, no sitting Senator has ever been threatened the way Mark Kelly was today. Team — just wanted to make sure you saw Mark's email from earlier today. This is a big deal. As far as we’re aware, no sitting Senator has ever been threatened the way Mark Kelly was today. We need all hands on deck. Please, take a minute to read what he had to say — The Department of War is coming after me because they don’t like what I have to say. When I was 22 years old, I swore an oath to the Constitution. I've upheld that oath every day since. If Trump is trying to intimidate me from doing my job, it won’t work. I’ve given too much to this country to be silenced by bullies who care more about their own power than about protecting the Constitution. Call this what it is: Political persecution. You can bet this was ordered by Donald Trump and carried out by Pete Hegseth. But right now, that's besides the point. If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | | | | | | | | ** We will not give up the ship. Mark Kelly Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate

name: Kelly Morrison
subject: November Campaign Update + 11/30 Holiday Party
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Morrison for Congress
body:
https://kellyforcongress.org [https://kellyforcongress.org]
Hi Peter,
I hope this finds you well. I can’t believe how fast this season has gone by - Thanksgiving is just around the corner! I hope you are able to spend some time with your family and friends this week to reflect on this last year and get excited for the year ahead! Personally, I am so grateful for all of the volunteers and supporters who joined our campaign for Congress and who continue to fight everyday for our democracy.
I’m reaching out today to share a campaign update before your week gets too busy, but first I want to remind you that our campaign is hosting a holiday party this Sunday, November 30th in Minnetonka - we’d love to have you join us! If you haven’t already, please RSVP online here [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kellyholidayparty25] , and don’t hesitate to reply to this email with any questions. If you have already RSVP’d - I’m excited to see you there! ☺️
I’m happy to fill you in on what our campaign has been up to over the past month or so! It was great to join friends in CD1 in Owatonna to support Jake Johnson, who is running for Congress to flip the seat blue! Jake is a father, a teacher, and a union leader who will be a great addition to Minnesota’s congressional delegation.
Photos of Kelly with people at the CD1 dinner, including candidate Jake Johnson. [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP59/1/109390/images/people/kelly-morrison_jake-johnson.png]
CD1 Dinner in Owatonna - 11/2/25
Earlier this month, I had the pleasure of joining a press conference hosted by 314 Action with my incredible colleague Rep. Lauren Underwood, Wisconsin’s Lieutenant Governor Sara Rodriguez, and more STEM (science, technology, engineering, and math) candidates. We discussed the Trump administration’s cuts to SNAP funding, their attacks on healthcare, and the importance of electing STEM candidates to office.
This past Saturday night, I was thrilled to join SD35 in Andover for their ‘Dine for Democracy’ fundraiser with DFL Chair Richard Carlbom, Reps. Kari Rehrauer and Zack Stephenson, and a room full of incredible activists who are working hard to turn SD35 all blue. I’m looking forward to working alongside SD35 to elect Democrats up and down the ballot next November!
Photo of Kelly speaking at a banquet event. [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP59/1/109390/images/people/25_sd35-dine-for-democracy.jpg]
SD35 Dine for Democracy - 11/22/25
Like many of you and millions of Americans across the country, I joined a ‘No Kings’ protest in October. More than 7 million of us came out to peacefully protest this administration and its authoritarianism. It was an inspirational and hopeful day. Let’s keep the momentum going!
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP59/1/109390/images/people/kelly-morrison_no-kings.jpg]
No Kings Protest - 10/18/25
While the past few months have been heavy at times and the future can feel uncertain, I am inspired by everyone who continues to stand up for democracy. Courage and kindness can both be contagious and we need both right now. It is vital that we show up for one another with kindness, courage, and compassion.
Thank you so much for taking the time to read our campaign update, Peter. I hope to see you at the holiday party this Sunday!
With gratitude,
Kelly Morrison
P.S.: If you can’t make it to our holiday party, we would be grateful if you’d consider chipping in to help us meet our end of year goal. Thank you so much! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2025holidaycard]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2025holidaycard]
https://www.facebook.com/KellyMorrisonForCongress [https://www.facebook.com/KellyMorrisonForCongress] https://twitter.com/Morrison4MN [https://twitter.com/Morrison4MN] https://instagram.com/kellymorrisonforcongress [https://instagram.com/kellymorrisonforcongress] kellyforcongress.org [kellyforcongress.org]
Email is the best way to keep our supporters up to date.
If you only want to receive our most important emails, click here to receive fewer emails. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/hHyPtKcXyUeK_xcY7BEsAQ2]
We’d hate to see you go, but if you want you can unsubscribe here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/4Dh5T9ni_kaWmPt-auzpZw2?unsubscribedata=SeEFIQ6CGN3eWf5G0bcQUM1tCYcf1vuKVapxmCGhdfECfW1NaTeFc%2FuSYVIuED0feo6SFWlgsLnN9XPsf3gRnKLHcg2hN6SkSSzJHEO05DMDp6TKZSJxu0fPI%2B3qV1hJo9fap3JfHK29kYIpYKiO2xaoEw1hVjtr6L6ISNuCpwO85txq5vsX1SesZQOHWGB6RChdQs8%2BhT5ZJ5Ku8OYT3Znz9rwJ9lHn78y2%2Fi8yxcatYoCagrI3NT87BkR9vzobS3D3APqgrqJHMqJdERvdhenYu8kagN9Rn8vI2QNeFZzjA0heM2J7fkwrB3iGbX%2FVM5PRD%2BS1E4xS2lT1jpmGEXGJwmTjYVCKdtLAU%2F3DVo53vzRCBCJvVLCQLXk7xJ7zqs4gbmcWL60bP6AfVWS24IPhnTqhvFqqFcwy8hipdEc4NjvAjQwVkhpHo%2FG1iKJl] .
Morrison for Congress

Wayzata, MN 55391
United States

name: Rep. Anna Paulina Luna
subject: They’re TREMBLING. Let’s show them they’re right to be afraid.

body:
For years, hearing aids just made everything louder. Restaurants were still too loud, family gatherings still overwhelming. You could hear sound and noise but speech remained far from clear.

| | |
---
---
# **The New Hearing Aid Technology That Brings Back Speech Clarity**
---
For years, hearing aids just made everything louder. Restaurants were still too loud, family gatherings still overwhelming. You could hear _sound_ and noise but _speech remained far from clear_.
---
**So what changed?** A new generation of hearing technology now uses **two processors working at the same time** : one dedicated to the voice you’re trying to follow, one dedicated to understanding and balancing the room around you. **The result:** next-level speech clarity that feels _crisp and natural_ , even in places that used to be frustrating. You don’t just hear _more_ , you understand more. **Ready for clearer conversations? Your free IX trial starts here.**

clean_body: For years, hearing aids just made everything louder. Restaurants were still too loud, family gatherings still overwhelming. You could hear sound and noise but speech remained far from clear. | | | The New Hearing Aid Technology That Brings Back Speech Clarity For years, hearing aids just made everything louder. Restaurants were still too loud, family gatherings still overwhelming. You could hear sound and noise but speech remained far from clear. So what changed? A new generation of hearing technology now uses two processors working at the same time : one dedicated to the voice you’re trying to follow, one dedicated to understanding and balancing the room around you. The result: next-level speech clarity that feels crisp and natural , even in places that used to be frustrating. You don’t just hear more , you understand more. Ready for clearer conversations? Your free IX trial starts here. | Signia’s NEW IX hearing aids bring back speech clarity like no other hearing aid out there. name: Victor Riches
subject: She found the chest binder Then came the big lies
body:
It’s a moment that would shock ANY parent, Amber Lavigne found a chest binder in her 13-year-old daughter’s bedroom...

|
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zp47kljtfvubi1qrkl6jvnms0i8723d37mmadvig_rp22sh2s8i6eor1c1hm1ob6c5h2bs)
**It’s a moment that would shock ANY parent, Friend**

Amber Lavigne found a _chest binder_ in her 13-year-old daughter’s bedroom...

...and found out her daughter’s SCHOOL had given it to her... that they had convinced her to “socially transition” to male...

...and they did _ALL of this without Amber’s knowledge or consent._

Even worse, a school counselor told her daughter: _**HIDE IT from your mother.**_

This isn’t just one bad decision.

**It’s part of an ongoing issue of parents being kept in the dark by schools when it comes to the well-being of their children.**

When Amber turned to the Goldwater Institute, _we sprang into action_ :
* We **UNLEASHED America’s most powerful network of pro bono constitutional attorneys,**

* We **FILED a federal lawsuit** against Amber’s school district,

* And we’re working to **ENSURE that this travesty never happens again.**

**If we don’t draw the line here, they’ll keep crossing it. **

With the new school year underway, [we need to DRAMATICALLY expand this fight](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z697dqkcasqbne2i5or3869jn26kbalqgrul4oj8_rp22sh2s8i6eor1c1hm1ob6c5h2bs) before more families are blindsided by what is going on in their children’s schools.

[Pitch in just $10 TAX-DEDUCTIBLE to help the Goldwater Institute take this fight to EVERY corner of the country and protect EVERY child >>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zsthpamdshum3c11m756dmn1fg44cvksos8838eg_rp22sh2s8i6eor1c1hm1ob6c5h2bs)

[Donate $100](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7tfjeousil1ot8k001oo0e40rv2tov4abbs1d70_rp22sh2s8i6eor1c1hm1ob6c5h2bs)

[Donate $250 ](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z2g8t5jgo2p6f3nicubsvj442ahbr19o6cjtpn68_rp22sh2s8i6eor1c1hm1ob6c5h2bs)

[Donate $1,000](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z2iv7bbg7sl5345qcuviudjhrketd4elgo5qau98_rp22sh2s8i6eor1c1hm1ob6c5h2bs)

I wish I could say Amber’s story was rare, Friend.

But it’s happening across the nation...

School districts have decided THEY — not you — have the final say over our children’s lives.

It’s a BLATANT violation of your constitutional rights.

For more than three decades, **the Goldwater Institute has been THE premiere nationwide legal center protecting the constitutional rights of all Americans.**

[Winning in court takes serious resources. ](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zfnt9j1q7a954tk29n3fbk49f8t4b64su2ks7a2g_rp22sh2s8i6eor1c1hm1ob6c5h2bs)

Lauren Boebert has an almost pathological need to create chaos, drama, and lurid scandals that grab news headlines. Let’s send her home this Midterm.
| | | | | [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Ugwf8rDMFjCCtpn85uGauZj9XrK2P8QNCWHmNvGPSUan-A36xmNbuBTf5VwerzGpCx9hAhcmfL2QV_izHHLkG_HHUr6lUzG5sCe2c4Lqd7_gs7UFsmFvPzXrRUrosUs8wq3VrZ5khPTIwgTlMeJyy5Jo9E-SQcNouxOVkpTnBp-_JXpb5JYzxhuIgy5avleZxeqesc5SLaUvtkTpHbkJ6LmLLkDU7OCc&c=Gr-kvovZ_3Me21RwzlQJlu38Yw0ZP0ccSEUBT17O9bpJSiAuK7ZDlg==&ch=H8KKFZDRj-Uoubh0BYAWq8DnUYHBEIdXyat7KwbkED-ppEuJuwc9CQ==)

Peter,
She's at it again.
Carpetbagger Lauren Boebert didn't get her way, and once again she melted down and used the floor of the United States House of Representatives to stage another shouting match.

---
| [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Ugwf8rDMFjCCtpn85uGauZj9XrK2P8QNCWHmNvGPSUan-A36xmNbuBTf5VwerzGpCx9hAhcmfL2QV_izHHLkG_HHUr6lUzG5sCe2c4Lqd7_gs7UFsmFvPzXrRUrosUs8wq3VrZ5khPTIwgTlMeJyy5Jo9E-SQcNouxOVkpTnBp-_JXpb5JYzxhuIgy5avleZxeqesc5SLaU3SWw6tDYv9LjyvxQSlZyp&c=Gr-kvovZ_3Me21RwzlQJlu38Yw0ZP0ccSEUBT17O9bpJSiAuK7ZDlg==&ch=H8KKFZDRj-Uoubh0BYAWq8DnUYHBEIdXyat7KwbkED-ppEuJuwc9CQ==)
---

Boebert acts like a toddler, but in reality she is a 38 year-old grandmother who should be setting a better example for her children and grandchildren.
Boebert has an almost pathological need to create chaos, drama, and lurid scandals that grab headlines--like when she was kicked out of a Denver theater during an afternoon showing of Beetlejuice for vaping, rudely yelling at staff, and inappropriate sexual touching with her date, in full view of children.
Lauren Boebert needs a timeout from politics.
Trisha Calvarese is Boebert's hometown Democratic opponent. In 2024, Trisha had the best performance a Democrat has ever had in this district--overperforming Kamala Harris by 6 pts. Boebert embarrassingly underperformed Trump in every county because Colorado voters are sick and tired of her nonsense.
Boebert is only in Congress because of 546 votes. And now, we can put an end to her temper tantrums and attention-seeking behavior once and for all.
[Will you help send Boebert home by making a donation to Democrat Trisha Calvarese? Trisha is on the ground in this district every day connecting with voters and building the organization that will defeat Boebert this election.](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Ugwf8rDMFjCCtpn85uGauZj9XrK2P8QNCWHmNvGPSUan-A36xmNbuBTf5VwerzGpCx9hAhcmfL2QV_izHHLkG_HHUr6lUzG5sCe2c4Lqd7_gs7UFsmFvPzXrRUrosUs8wq3VrZ5khPTIwgTlMeJyy5Jo9E-SQcNouxOVkpTnBp-_JXpb5JYzxhuIgy5avleZxeqesc5SLaU-NvvfjeG2cjapF0JL5bPu&c=Gr-kvovZ_3Me21RwzlQJlu38Yw0ZP0ccSEUBT17O9bpJSiAuK7ZDlg==&ch=H8KKFZDRj-Uoubh0BYAWq8DnUYHBEIdXyat7KwbkED-ppEuJuwc9CQ==)

Lauren Boebert has an almost pathological need to create chaos, drama, and lurid scandals that grab news headlines. Let’s send her home this Midterm.
| | | | | [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001vYYkU2ACzUUGczKMo3FC5qQ_I1h-oywd0WAWl6XFQlR476vD96vOoBfXLyy-F4ucVxM7c83xp7Zw2aTW4CdtcNxKrdkmFujJr4ZYKMFwDyPrnWXinrnw3BzAQlIHNyBliK4LIMSMXKupbp-8AxWdKJxtzWQMzF-RFWo3oML9JUW7fK8Thg9JgeZNjfxFV3i4cYHJYyIW89aytfw42NbwU3A8KRZqxdV4&c=j9OrCdtpflCd3PDt3-DUBP_y9ky249uDETURjKeL_nacTaN7YpRpiw==&ch=mPlV0q9MppWlfYzQUkdO_ceVVALI97J3vqTFH6_YKAgkgiyUcSdsgA==)
---
|

Peter,
She's at it again.
Carpetbagger Lauren Boebert didn't get her way, and once again she melted down and used the floor of the United States House of Representatives to stage another shouting match.

---
| [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001vYYkU2ACzUUGczKMo3FC5qQ_I1h-oywd0WAWl6XFQlR476vD96vOoBfXLyy-F4ucVxM7c83xp7Zw2aTW4CdtcNxKrdkmFujJr4ZYKMFwDyPrnWXinrnw3BzAQlIHNyBliK4LIMSMXKupbp-8AxWdKJxtzWQMzF-RFWo3oML9JUW7fK8Thg9JgeZNjfxFV3i4cYHJYyIW89alwtNyyc4YN0gfbQCRrMKQ&c=j9OrCdtpflCd3PDt3-DUBP_y9ky249uDETURjKeL_nacTaN7YpRpiw==&ch=mPlV0q9MppWlfYzQUkdO_ceVVALI97J3vqTFH6_YKAgkgiyUcSdsgA==)
---

Boebert acts like a toddler, but in reality she is a 38 year-old grandmother who should be setting a better example for her children and grandchildren.
Boebert has an almost pathological need to create chaos, drama, and lurid scandals that grab headlines--like when she was kicked out of a Denver theater during an afternoon showing of Beetlejuice for vaping, rudely yelling at staff, and inappropriate sexual touching with her date, in full view of children.
Lauren Boebert needs a timeout from politics.
Trisha Calvarese is Boebert's hometown Democratic opponent. In 2024, Trisha had the best performance a Democrat has ever had in this district--overperforming Kamala Harris by 6 pts. Boebert embarrassingly underperformed Trump in every county because Colorado voters are sick and tired of her nonsense.
Boebert is only in Congress because of 546 votes. And now, we can put an end to her temper tantrums and attention-seeking behavior once and for all.
[Will you help send Boebert home by making a donation to Democrat Trisha Calvarese? Trisha is on the ground in this district every day connecting with voters and building the organization that will defeat Boebert this election.](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001vYYkU2ACzUUGczKMo3FC5qQ_I1h-oywd0WAWl6XFQlR476vD96vOoBfXLyy-F4ucVxM7c83xp7Zw2aTW4CdtcNxKrdkmFujJr4ZYKMFwDyPrnWXinrnw3BzAQlIHNyBliK4LIMSMXKupbp-8AxWdKJxtzWQMzF-RFWo3oML9JUW7fK8Thg9JgeZNjfxFV3i4cYHJYyIW89Y3x-YgJztEEYnM9yl5CXPk&c=j9OrCdtpflCd3PDt3-DUBP_y9ky249uDETURjKeL_nacTaN7YpRpiw==&ch=mPlV0q9MppWlfYzQUkdO_ceVVALI97J3vqTFH6_YKAgkgiyUcSdsgA==)

name: Team Downing
subject: China is taking over the USA one farm at a time.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
It’s time to draw a line in the sand. Please read:

Peter,
Whether you want to admit it or not, the Chinese Communist Party is quietly taking over America one farm at a time.
China already owns land in **27 states** , including properties alarmingly close to U.S. military bases. **
* **Our ****farmers are being undercut.**
* **Our food supply is at risk.**
* **The CCP is expanding its footprint on American soil.**

** We’re not just facing a serious economic threat. This is a full-blown national security crisis.
**It’s time to draw the line.**
President Trump’s Cabinet, including Treasury Secretary Bessent, is working overtime to rein in the abuse China has inflicted on the United States for far too long. But that’s not enough.
We need grassroots support to stop this takeover. That means citizens like YOU stepping up and demanding real action to thwart China’s takeover efforts.
[Peter, we’re begging you to add your name RIGHT NOW and support a federal ban on China buying U.S. farmland:](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MTEyNV9ESC1PRi4xMTAxMTdfdDE3NTkzMzktMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTExMjVfREgtT0YuMTEwMTE3X3QxNzU5MzM5LTI4OTkifQ/vLuKUlRyOmRUbHpL8N5f6w) [](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MTEyNV9ESC1PRi4xMTAxMTdfdDE3NTkzMzktMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTExMjVfREgtT0YuMTEwMTE3X3QxNzU5MzM5LTI4OTkifQ/_8iEdq0xShQvlhirV62Olw) [ BAN CHINA FROM BUYING OUR LAND
](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MTEyNV9ESC1PRi4xMTAxMTdfdDE3NTkzMzktMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTExMjVfREgtT0YuMTEwMTE3X3QxNzU5MzM5LTI4OTkifQ/BdkCnOVwx12nbH5HGKhYKg) [ SIGN THE PETITION TODAY

body:
Patriot,

Families felt safe in Mequon, but now they are being terrorized.

Police warn of a South American illegal immigrant burglary ring [https://www.jsonline.com/story/communities/north/2025/11/17/mequon-police-say-south-american-crime-ring-behind-string-of-burglaries-details-are-fuzzy/87323249007/] targeting high-end homes. Trail cams show suspects in backpacks, gloves, and face coverings. This crew is linked to at least a dozen break-ins this year across southeastern Wisconsin.

While criminal aliens terrorize our neighborhoods, Democrats protect them:

Francesca Hong pushes to block ICE and end immigration holds in local jails [https://wisconsinexaminer.com/2025/01/29/wisconsin-democrats-seek-to-prohibit-state-and-local-cooperation-with-ice-and-deportation-efforts/].Supreme Court candidate Judge Chris Taylor co-sponsored bills to ban new ICE facilities [https://thefederalist.com/2025/07/01/chris-taylor-is-the-lefts-anti-ice-pro-sanctuary-state-candidate-for-wi-supreme-court/] and make Wisconsin a sanctuary state.

Democrats say they're "protecting communities", but whose? Wisconsin families deserve leaders who put public safety first, not illegal immigrant criminals.

Secure the border. Deport criminal aliens. Keep our neighborhoods safe.

PREVENT WISCONSIN FROM BECOMING A SANCTUARY STATE [https://secure.winred.com/republican-party-of-wisconsin-fed/donate]

Stop radicals like Chris Taylor from turning our courts against citizens.

-Team WisGOP

name: The Flyover
subject: Comey Case Dismissed, Beef's Record Prices, and the Cat Menace
body:
A federal judge [dismissed the indictments against](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2O6yAQhZ_G7rAw4L-C4jbuctstLQyDMxEGCyax8vYrR7tPsMVIozPS6Hzf1225GQwYt_9mB00-LRHOEoAI8mLTDm9rCjgsO5YCbgXwJcMiuOhY2zLRLc5geC-qdtoDCJA16HboFe_HYezruzbS8NWbaVzFwP04jSP33eq8W6WUTk016utb217De6GaVk4wAbdcyK6TXV8pDg4p5eaRMNIdfHinF-TGpr0O-k50lEr-q8Rcifk8zyau9qK47pWYjxSQ0JZKzI9nIbTAHBwm0w6RPqHbgP0iFnYBF_Yw-7VfBlgAQkLzk3mMDuPGjpwK2CelzE5TWLbRCKWGoauzdseJIWDph0rxbTcYPmXpT4ZfWnwHAAD__xDFk2I) former FBI Director James Comey and New York Attorney General Letitia James after finding that Lindsey Halligan, the prosecutor who brought both cases, was not lawfully appointed as interim U.S. attorney.

| | |
---
| [](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykjzuOwyAUAE9juljw-CUFxTbpsu2WCMMjfhEOEaBYvv0qe4UtppyR5ufmb4EKPe_fYUM3cvVP3HvBMbD5WDc8YuiYqG_UO6YFMfeGHjjokxAn0D4FKodXLLmMCCgZOmGN4uZsz4atDmTIIuaQFmltWMLCE4CKmSfLI2jByH1qQnzgBtQs5AUvyCMHqbXUZlIcE43a5kel51gxl6O-sc2xbqy4dYxXn-TXBNcJruuRWt3n_njPVCe42gCwJNZceu1UCnVjJ8XvW6Dy549_Tb8d_AYAAP__E5ZqWA) | |
# Tuesday, November 25, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this date in 1905, _Scientific American_ published the first ad for a home "wireless telegraph," which we would call a radio set. The kit included a spark coil, a strap key, and a sender for $8.50, close to $300 in today's money. ([See Ad](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFuwyAQgOGnsbdYxxmDGRi6ZEvXjoiYI74KQgQ0kd--Sl-hw79-w_91cRfPie-3T5_J9ljcnV4tUe9U3VYyHZtvFLhlbo3ClSi2Sg4Bl5MQJ1xc8JwOJ8dgIxHSPJIVWklQq17VuFuUCnXU0VyvkozWMeAKYDYplSaAdWT71oR4BwrlJGZDhmADnJdlXtQggQL3Uqfvwve-U0xHeVKdtpLHZPfeH22YPwY8D3gmX9NRfeCyc-ulHtNPG_AsDCydEk97z2O14fHilLgpPUi4Zc_pD-v_OvC0-BsAAP__-5Ruog)) When an Oklahoma pastor was struggling to read his Bible in a TSA line, he had no idea he was planting the seed for an app that would one day become a global phenomenon, recently hitting 1 billion users. This landmark comes as more people embrace Scripture digitally. Read our article below and then click here to get [exclusive, untold details on ](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykj71uwyAYAJ8Gtljw8WN7YGgHb-7YjoifzzEVNpEhifz2VfoKGW68k-5ntrNLOe3XL7ehaUuxOz5rxtbwsKFseAZXMaa6pVoxesSlHmiBgbpwfgFlo0v5tJJGsyACCoqG91oyPfSDpqtRQvQ-DLBINwrutWIBmIcY9BBF9JIm86px_oJpkB0XI47IAgOhlFCaSIYxtXJ0vyXtbcUln-WBRxfKRrNZW7tVIj4ITASms9zbvfNIYBq_2fxZFWQu6WHi7ZlyTlX3RLLr5lL-99tb0w8DfwEAAP__N1Fo_A)_[The Flyover Podcast](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykj71uwyAYAJ8Gtljw8WN7YGgHb-7YjoifzzEVNpEhifz2VfoKGW68k-5ntrNLOe3XL7ehaUuxOz5rxtbwsKFseAZXMaa6pVoxesSlHmiBgbpwfgFlo0v5tJJGsyACCoqG91oyPfSDpqtRQvQ-DLBINwrutWIBmIcY9BBF9JIm86px_oJpkB0XI47IAgOhlFCaSIYxtXJ0vyXtbcUln-WBRxfKRrNZW7tVIj4ITASms9zbvfNIYBq_2fxZFWQu6WHi7ZlyTlX3RLLr5lL-99tb0w8DfwEAAP__N1Fo_A) _with Amy Hess. If you've been searching for a true full-body workout you can actually look forward to, today's sponsor, [Hydrow's biggest sale of the year](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykjzuOwyAUAE9juljw-CUFxTbpsu2WCMMjfhEOEaBYvv0qe4UtppyR5ufmb4EKPe_fYUM3cvVP3HvBMbD5WDc8YuiYqG_UO6YFMfeGHjjokxAn0D4FKodXLLmMCCgZOmGN4uZsz4atDmTIIuaQFmltWMLCE4CKmSfLI2jByH1qQnzgBtQs5AUvyCMHqbXUZlIcE43a5kel51gxl6O-sc2xbqy4dYxXn-TXBNcJruuRWt3n_njPVCe42gCwJNZceu1UCnVjJ8XvW6Dy549_Tb8d_AYAAP__E5ZqWA), is your chance to bring an immersive, athlete-led rowing experience into your home for up to $600 off.
|
---
## Judge Voids Charges Against Comey, James
A federal judge [dismissed the indictments against](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2O6yAQhZ_G7rAw4L-C4jbuctstLQyDMxEGCyax8vYrR7tPsMVIozPS6Hzf1225GQwYt_9mB00-LRHOEoAI8mLTDm9rCjgsO5YCbgXwJcMiuOhY2zLRLc5geC-qdtoDCJA16HboFe_HYezruzbS8NWbaVzFwP04jSP33eq8W6WUTk016utb217De6GaVk4wAbdcyK6TXV8pDg4p5eaRMNIdfHinF-TGpr0O-k50lEr-q8Rcifk8zyau9qK47pWYjxSQ0JZKzI9nIbTAHBwm0w6RPqHbgP0iFnYBF_Yw-7VfBlgAQkLzk3mMDuPGjpwK2CelzE5TWLbRCKWGoauzdseJIWDph0rxbTcYPmXpT4ZfWnwHAAD__xDFk2I) former FBI Director James Comey and New York Attorney General Letitia James after finding that Lindsey Halligan, the prosecutor who brought both cases, was not lawfully appointed as interim U.S. attorney. Judge Cameron Currie ruled that Halligan's [appointment violated federal procedures](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L9qwzAQBvCnkTcb-_TPGTQUird0KaWjUaSzc0GygqQm-O2LA32CDjcdfHy_7_s8ny0F2tYPG9HUJc0bPkvAWjHPLkXcnS3oqUQqBf0FcSkZZ-hBtsPQgpy9pbDPovFmQQTkDZpBK9GrUY-quRoLUqEeF-uEkIvXIAFGL0_e6wsKLxsyR9owHNcrEN3AT3jC3vXApeRSMdGjp5pyd0u01SsuYU8PzJ1LsQnmWuu9MP7GYGIw2Ys7BN2ajjeD6euTwXT78Su2f4zSukyRNhvaQ1faF7S92YiFwVRqyjvjE3nG3wfQmoNSY5ONvz8pBCpKM9Gv0VJ4Vaj_2u1h4DcAAP__UgiAvA) governing vacancies, and because she was the sole prosecutor to present evidence and sign the indictments, her actions were considered "void" under the law. The decision leaves the Justice Department weighing whether the cases can be refiled within a six-month statutory window, while defense attorneys argue the statute of limitations has already expired. Comey welcomed the dismissal as overdue, James praised the ruling, and the [White House insisted Halligan](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGO8yAQhJ8Gd45ggbVTUPyNu_ztlRaBdbwRmMhwifL2J0e6J7hipZVGM6Nvvi7zxXPi7fbfZ3JtKfNGr5qoNdrnUDK9g68UuWauleKVaKk7zSDB9kr1YOfoOb1n00W3EAHpjpwa0EgchxG71WklzRX9YgMsYwjjGRHjcEXQGn0I1LE70pQ6TiKYk9JnOpMMErS12qIwkiK3sp_uhbe20pLe5Un7KZTcJbe29qhC_xMwCZjaSiundGgCprVkOoAETD5m3ri23Tcum4DJIsjRjP39O96o_0Ws_Ye6v_t8_L7SYe52Fx8vTokrDsLIW_b86ejan0Z7OvgJAAD__zrNgPM) was legally appointed and promised a swift appeal.
## Pentagon to Investigate Sen. Mark Kelly
The Pentagon opened an [investigation into Sen. Mark Kelly](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2u4yAQhZ8GdxPBGJykoNjG3d12S4vA-Ia9_FgwuZHffsW-wi1GGulIn875_nxsHy6mWD5_u0yW97oVevdEzNQ2XzOd3nUKsefYO4UH0d4bbSjRgFKAZgsupnPTU7A7EdI8kVXXRcvldr0t09PetNEBnZwfuBjjQnD0uGtD5u7l1cjbFO2gKTVOLqgvar7TnaSXOBszm0VoSSFybZe_NRZ-0p7O-k3t4muekn0yH13MvwSuAtdyHrXziASuAyxwVWr8WuD66jD2CVwDHa5xpsJQd3i7BvWg0iHH7msJL89wtPogiIUrdCqQXfuCL0rpBLczNeD2ygc471-dAjxjHqQhi2MtAtep2XC8Y0qxL1eh5Wd2Mf0vzT8y_W3xXwAAAP__lPGS_Q) (D-Ariz.) after he and five other Democratic legislators released a video urging military members to "refuse illegal orders," a message that quickly drew fire from President Trump. Trump accused the group of treason and demanded prosecution, prompting the Pentagon to review whether Kelly, a former fighter pilot who retired with the rank of captain, improperly used his rank to give official weight to a video that could undermine military discipline. Legal analysts noted that [investigating a retired officer](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLvOozAYRJ8GOpCvEAoX26TLtlsiB4_h2_gS2VYi3n7FvsJfTDea0Tl_HuvDUqC0_7YRpvm8JnxrQGso65Yjzs1WOKqRaoV7Ar4WrIIJPXA-CL06S-FcVe-MBwRkD8PnSbHpNt-m_jDSidu8MP_kWnq9-YlbD3gorfBUzPdkrjXOr7BJqJHLBQvYxoTUWuqpUwyOWi7j30ypHfDhzB-UccuxD-Zo7V07-asT907cNzteBONpj5yvRifub6Rm95wGSh_URrttlPahItmWyxBteQ0vhHAOfOaLFnIR49Fi6Itx7y-FQHWaO8X2aCn8f20_UvUx4l8AAAD__-Mjfg8) for post-retirement comments is unusual and could involve recalling Kelly to active duty for potential court-martial proceedings. Kelly [dismissed the probe](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0D1urDAcBPDTmI6Vv4HCxWvo9rUpkcED_LMGI2ztittH5AopphrNr5iv5_D0FGlf_vsNrsxp2PHJEaXgHKa04Zp8RqC8Uc4IIzDnE4Pk0tRC1NIMwVO8Bl0FNwMSqoITjdXctk1rq9XZUbZKtVKMzag9tAgakxHz2JpG205U5G5NiDvcSv0QqkMHPnGpjFHGMs0RqKTz8Z1oLyvmeKU3zseUtiq6tZQjM_WPyZ7JvqxYKca7Y7I_UqTpYrIPmLFnMNkbK7nquvrAXvyS9pr2N3KhxRfkevPnq34hxntUnS4cH4qRsm2Y5svm6Veuyp-uejv5EwAA__9u5Xxy) as political intimidation and said the video was driven by his concerns over Trump's possible use of the military.
## Bible App Hits 1 Billion Downloads
The YouVersion Bible App, a ministry and initiative of the Edmond, Oklahoma-based Life.Church--one of the largest churches in the U.S.--recently surpassed [one billion installations](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkU3K3DAMQE_j7DzEcn4miyymlOymULr46Co4sTJRcexgecbk9sW9QhcCwYMHT_p6zk9DjvzrhzlwTFuYPWZ2mBLGeQ0HXqthtMQHMaNdEDeOOEMNrVRKQjtbQ-6am8qOGyKgrnBUfdfU3b2_d9U-3nvT63XdQNcLrHox3dYpvWyDWvR9GNqKxmJTqkzdQXNTesAB67UG3ba67URTo6UU4u1PIJ923NwVPhhvazgqN-4pnSz0Q8AkYMo53w72hQmY0Ms3C5iO4PESMIW0YxQwLbQ4lOY8Je-mtLI8yCGn4FFmSrssy0LOUfDShuxdMJalYbmZgiN-6GOc5Hd8IcscorOZLAqYTJSPh_r5--sZhZ7CSlbo79_KiTHzL4xnFUd75uLmrhdN_ToMuX8x6b8-8BnhbwAAAP__wWydXA) across its family of apps since its launch in 2008. Judge Cameron Currie ruled that Halligan's governing vacancies, and because she was the sole prosecutor to present evidence and sign the indictments, her actions were considered "void" under the law. The decision leaves the Justice Department weighing whether the cases can be refiled within a six-month statutory window, while defense attorneys argue the statute of limitations has already expired. Comey welcomed the dismissal as overdue, James praised the ruling, and the was legally appointed and promised a swift appeal. Pentagon to Investigate Sen. Mark Kelly The Pentagon opened an (D-Ariz.) after he and five other Democratic legislators released a video urging military members to "refuse illegal orders," a message that quickly drew fire from President Trump. Trump accused the group of treason and demanded prosecution, prompting the Pentagon to review whether Kelly, a former fighter pilot who retired with the rank of captain, improperly used his rank to give official weight to a video that could undermine military discipline. Legal analysts noted that for post-retirement comments is unusual and could involve recalling Kelly to active duty for potential court-martial proceedings. Kelly as political intimidation and said the video was driven by his concerns over Trump's possible use of the military. Bible App Hits 1 Billion Downloads The YouVersion Bible App, a ministry and initiative of the Edmond, Oklahoma-based Life.Church--one of the largest churches in the U.S.--recently surpassed across its family of apps since its launch in 2008. The milestone was celebrated at a Beyond a Billion event last week. Founder Bobby Gruenewald, who also serves as a pastor and innovation leader for the church, noted that the record-breaking achievement reflects a global and faith, with daily app engagement currently at an all-time high. Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw
Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18]

Atlantic Ave., Suite 200 Delray Beach, FL 33444 Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18] | | | First Invеstmеnt Updаtеs brоught tо уоu bу Іnception Media, LLC. name: Shinji Oh
subject: Are We There Yet?
body:
Friends– What feels longer than being a kid on a holiday road trip? Waiting for Virginia to finally have a Prescription Drug Affordability Board.
| | |
---
| |
---
| |
---
| Friends-
What feels longer than being a kid on a holiday road trip? Waiting for Virginia to finally have a Prescription Drug Affordability Board. [1 out of every 4 Virginians](https://dpxqxvhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001z5xdTpuzy2DHxr2gvpoIrA0vm5cSX_ZsRkCaTNiUGxWn9pXl_08wwYQ059iZlUC1NcOodRyUpRr3Fn-vz-swSVAu9EbTCzf9U1qJxtCya34gWVv5GtEFmW_AukqVKqyCL193KzvtvVMKA3ZdNzk3kTo11bak0Ij3ze8nXjxoj2oDf2bC94tqSHz3Y6vawgvUrkg6O5ilErIOcK9_zienkQROGho0wTHGy9mMj2Ks2EBNo4dTH5zj2Dz-fS5wEyRf9n18ycuIuqtCp_KPxwcawVl_xuv8tQfmonnQAD0gxUMP2_Dylisbw6VSU2L-Jf73wUwPSPnoYpg=&c=TFtUFq8_fl_oVgh_y7eoqbbbtqnvGjuR_v5n_NFC_0VeJ-h95-Mc4w==&ch=wu-_hjevpgfyTb24VGfqradPKNpAmQP0LQgnciTZiPvBSSraoOjL3w==) who depend on prescriptions chooses not to take those medications solely because they cannot afford them. This means that Virginians are choosing to forgo life saving and life sustaining medications in order to pay rent, bills, and put dinner on the table for their families.
Virginia's government has the opportunity to ease the burden on hardworking Virginians by creating a Prescription Drug Affordability Board, an independent body of health and medical experts appointed by the governor, House, and Senate who use proven, data-based strategies that are already working in other states to lower prescription drug prices. PDABs are already working across the country in states like Colorado and Maryland, with Colorado becoming the [first state](https://dpxqxvhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001z5xdTpuzy2DHxr2gvpoIrA0vm5cSX_ZsRkCaTNiUGxWn9pXl_08wwYQ059iZlUC14-n5Ls-Cbnboiwllq1t65Pmmxu9dmam71VLWdL7437VQT9g6gzellrot8tk7sAf6RMbxVMv5GyucDUk5fM5C-PxLWb-cJNqAyJFK-OjFQBryHw3PSZNU00SJJn92SW9ir7RoJM6MiCKQlVWt7sRjU_GJp7PdblFWhiv0NPzV9llkUJJt6PcTcjH6uQINzBSEK1XXleqrQb-Qsmi-MqSWjinx3n6x-TNXf6VFOt19u_aCIepSb_kpWT3uq6GSoUSREX4qiGE8eisyvmNsjKfTwRUPeN4tCRly2KDUOJtD7GBOPQCOukg4zIfFQII69nbu&c=TFtUFq8_fl_oVgh_y7eoqbbbtqnvGjuR_v5n_NFC_0VeJ-h95-Mc4w==&ch=wu-_hjevpgfyTb24VGfqradPKNpAmQP0LQgnciTZiPvBSSraoOjL3w==) to set an upper payment limit on a prescription drug earlier this year.
No one should have to choose between providing for their families and taking their life-saving medications. It's time to end the wait for a PDAB in Virginia.
Shinji Oh Digital Manager

body:

The company was the first steamship line to operate in Texas. Rare Australian white-spotted jellyfish are appearing in increasing numbers on Texas beaches. When an Oklahoma pastor was struggling to read his Bible in a TSA line, he had no idea he was planting the seed for an app that would one day become a global phenomenon, recently hitting one billion users. This landmark comes as more people, especially Gen Z, embrace faith and Scripture digitally. Get exclusive details on [_The Flyover Podcast_ with Amy Hess](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykzz1uxCAQQOHT2N1azBgbXFAkxXabMikRmGGNgs3KzP749lFyhRzgPen7utiLSzlt1w-3kuFXLHajZ83ETLvdXUilsuNUtsXN3xQqrYk2tihwOAGccLDBpXxY2QbjRZigJQNqlEKhmES7GK0HdD6OE_m-H_rZz4GkHOcIGr3S0CbzOwPAAVAAqm6UvYyjBu19VOhkIwWFxGXveCGml6sxH-VBezeXtc1mYb7Vpn9r8Nzg-Sh3vneeGjxPn-LyXgfMINvdhNsz5ZzqqBoprqtL-a_n_6kfBn8CAAD__4QAanc). ## 'ShamWow Guy' Running for Congress
Offer Vince Shlomi, the infomercial pitchman known for hawking the super-absorbent ShamWow towel, has [filed to run](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0D2upDAQBODTQGbkbn5f4GATsrfphqjBbWitsZHteczcfjVzhY1L-kpVf76XbxIvYf9NJ5vydHEJfGfPpXBaElmJuVCRGA7a_rLNfAqHsqDGXgEo7BdL4l9LV1uzavsFNRsYh06PqL90fRiE0U16BQQ3DKCRsKVVk52g71vbQy3mjQFgD6gBx2bo2s4NE0zr6kakruo0WykxNeXgwk_Kzr_iD6dmi2ftzVHKlav2V4VzhfN9342Lz_eKd17hfEUvRbZc4ZwPOu94q_3xUk48Z5UeQW0x7IlzVh9cJb4eq5eNgtooWLFUuE7GXrd4L3kYq07vJ4n_9Jf_e-3H4L8AAAD__82pg7I) for Congress in Texas. He is one of a dozen or so candidates challenging incumbent John Carter, an 84-year-old Republican whose district includes several counties north of Austin. The 61-year-old Israeli-American said he was [inspired to run](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2OhCAUxfGngc4JXBGYgmIbu9l2S4NylZsFMULm4-03M6-w9Ul-yfn_3Kabp0T79u0zuvZcy7TjoyZsDc_p9IFKbb5R2aNffjFUzIR7m0DA0EnZwTAFT-k1KR7cLMJVcnTSaCUMiKvg0QU7axWUVb22s521tr1ZFlBKDL1ZETm5NyYlDBKEBHPRqlerttLO82rAK6YEBmrlvLSIDZ--rulV7nhelpJ5crG1o7L-i8HIYGwRI6X03hiMsWR8H2IwLj4fnradwThoEIO13Z32BbsaU8nUbeXoPjqDkZ8uHA9Kiao2TIkte_qQvP0v0t3BXwAAAP__N1d6xg) for office by the late Charlie Kirk and a desire to stop "political infighting in the country." He added he wants to "destroy wokeism" and "make America happy." After achieving success selling the ShamWow, Shlomi [made infomercials](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL1uwyAURp8GNkdwg8EeGLp4S9eOFjaX-KrYRHCVn7ev0q1z1-_TOcP5usyXQJmO62fY0fMzlfnAR8vIjHWuIVJpHJjKsYX1G2PDnfDgGRT0ndYd9HMMlF-zkdEvKo5aotfOGuVAjUpuvu9VHCw6YwfnRjUEFbGPi06jdtailuTfMq2h16A0uJM1Z5PsoIdlSQ6CEUZhJC71xBsyPkNL-VXuWE9r2WX2G_OtifOHgEnAREcqO9aVQn7_f5duK42bgOlOx4pdSQmrgElWH28PypmadcKo6x7ol5b8vyZ3Dz8BAAD__70qdf0) for the Slap Chop kitchen utensil and the reusable Schticky lint roller. In 2009, he made headlines when he was arrested in Miami Beach after an altercation with a sex worker, an incident for which he took "full responsibility" and credited with motivating him to [change his ways](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOhCAURb9GOw08QbSg2MZutt3SIDz1ZREmwIwzf79xfmG7m9zknpz7c5tvhjyF7dscqMtrjXPAM3ssBdOcjKOYiykUw27sL7qMB2EoMzCQDecNyNkZ8u9Z1E4vzI28Rs1VL5gCNrJ610IOgzSdVFyBsKtFtg7GyQ6UdGYcWU36GuMcJAfGQbW96MTaD3xYllWBEZVg6KjE1JYdC75MXv07PjG1Nh6113sp91x1XxVMFUznebZhsZfF1Vcw3aOnQjZXMKFHe8lcOe_mOOPZbI93kx4hUNgaG8OWMOfmg2mSDQaE7HlfJ-3uJ3lPuVeVYNthyH_45X-vPTX8BQAA__-c2YKw).
## Houston Radio Station Hacked
A Houston radio station's [signal was hacked](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFuwyAYBOCnwZst-I3BHhi6eEvXjhYxvwMqBgv-xsnbV0kfofNJd_ru67JcbIgh3T7tjoYeW14SnjUiEZalWBdyJUshJ2_Xb3QV94CJFuAwtEK0MCzOhvhcZOPMlbtJNGiEVpJr4BNvvJl6QBjVOFi-TZPc0OoetYJ-AMGxt00wrzIhYBDABehOyV5uahTj9bppsJJJji5QLh15JHzYusVnvmPp1rw30Xiio7L-g8HMYD7Ps1t9yemVMpjrkQtVBrMtFNaIDGasR2rfttbnn0o5tX-6FgRwOSrZHf5oinHHGWIMVWkm-W23Ib4n6X9H3Q38BgAA__84M3xi) Sunday afternoon, briefly interrupting its broadcast of the Cowboys-Eagles game. A racist country song and an automated voice promoting several social media profiles aired on ESPN Radio's 97.5 FM multiple times between 4 and 5 p.m. In a social media post, the station stated that its "signal had been hacked" and [assured listeners](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLHSpCAQhJ8GMyxmFmUNCC4h-y-90BplXKkfYUvYdX37K-8e4c866Orur_98jV8UYkiP37SxrZ8lj4mPErlW3sedfMilUg05rTR_sy-8BU51RIWdBJDYjZ5CPEfdeDspP0DDFkyvlUE1qGa1s59hAFb9YmgYerj7G040aeBB9wZ0E-wVBoAdoAI0ba9veunvcJ-mxSBpoRX7UPPe1pUrf6gs8cxv3ts5b020a63PIm6_BDqB7jiOdo5h_sY1v0rN6XIJdBeWQBfzTFGguzoFOoBLa4GOyzPJwXRy2WShs8hQiyzhkSjKg4r8zy_LK3k6JS2V95RzEuia3frnEWIMpTdCq8dGIf7bVn_26Nvi3wAAAP__e5qJiw) that it was "actively trying to rectify the problem." On Monday, General Manager Todd Farquharson said that the station's transmitter was damaged when its radio tower [experienced a power outage](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGO2zAMhp9G3hhIjGPnBg9Z3C53Q5eOhmzRNlFZCkxedHn7Im7f4DYCxP_j_77f78O758hp-fAbdfo15yFRkUiqtA-7D5xFvXJOq5_-UBDamJIOaPECzgFehuA5Poe6Ct1ow5urqHNtU9sW7Zut1m68tjh5mq7jOLfTGCjMjSdyaK_NPE1Ycfcqcw4vDq3D9tTU53puru5IoK9NbSmw5v2kKyl9eZnjMz9oP015q2K3qt7FnG8Ge4N9KeW0SXr9DPaU4FMM9i8og_1xr_lTNCcBknuCgxH-Q8LCDxJIVCCQeo4COcGaC7BC8QL_LEBhXWH3E4vCRiJ-4bQY7P0Ot5v7df7x86Pau3AvHCNL05raLpvneCzW73l-dPg3AAD__7i6la8) on Saturday, and a bot hacked the backup equipment the station used to stay on the air. "_We're disappointed to be victims of this attack and the offensive messaging it broadcast_ ," he said. "_We're taking steps to prevent this from happening in the future_.”
## Aggie Helps Create 3D Turkey Gut Model
A Texas A&M undergraduate student has helped create a 3D model of a turkey's gut to facilitate the study of [treatments for blackhead disease](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0DGOgzAQBdDTmM7IHhwghYtt6LLtlmjAY7AwENmTkNx-RbQ32G6k-Xr6-j-3_oYhhm36xpUsv_zeb3TkSMyU-oQu7JmRw77NOC7kMq2BNu5BwUVqLeHSOwzx3ZvC2UG5qy7I6qY2qgF1VcVsB4LW-JpIjW1VN64axwZbcyXjB6NaVQR7YlrDRYPS0JS1qYyvW90Og28AjTCKXOA9lTwT0wuzj-_9Sakc97WIdma-Z1F9CegEdMdxlMvAr_MpoDttAZ3W520EdB9A4iozPxxtLGeK9yzHRMgkfUiZZeUkP9JCbzk9WK67oyh9mGaWQ8RxmQmddCETZvoLZgFdkay7HyHGkOtGGDWtGOKnI_9v2aeF3wAAAP__25GOMg), a parasitic infection that has a mortality rate of up to 80% in poultry. Leila Chang, a senior whose interest in poultry science dates back to raising turkeys in middle school, worked with Dr. Yuhua Farnell to [develop cecal organoids](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD2upDAQhE9jMo9sY8wQONiEbDbdEDV0g60xeGT3_N1-xbvCy0oqqVTf9-823SCmeGx_YSfPnzVPB71rImYqUwGMuTJwzEeA5U5YaY908GSU6aTW0nQTQkzfyTboZ4WDbsjr3lnVGzWoJngCgGXVrnWKOrwqq61THdoF3NC6eWiiP8e0Np02Spv-4mxrV3fV13leewNWWEUYOZcLB2L6QF3TN7-oXJa8N8kH5kcV7R9hRmFG2FYo-wlx1sKMZxRmLFQJyhKoVIn0opQfskW5PVnuGSlJzrLyE79yTrDcAwFKOFBmDlQkxkpQqTbF4-MdU4rV9cKqbYeYfn7w7-y9vPkfAAD__1DZhoc) from turkey stem cells. The breakthrough enables researchers to study the development and treatment of blackhead disease without using live turkeys. Potential applications for the model include research on other intestinal diseases and management practices that affect poultry gut health. Chang plans to become a professor and wants to develop tools that help producers protect flocks. "_Science has given me a new perspective on the turkey we eat at Thanksgiving_ ," [she said](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LHOozAQBOCnMZ2RvRj8U7i4hi7XXokWvIAVY0d4ScLbn5JX-JspvxnNv9t4wxBDWv_iTo7fSx4TvUokZjrGA33IhZFDThvOd_KF9kCJR1DQSq0ltKPHEK_RVN5Nyve6IqdtZ5QF1atqc0ZNHfY4L8b3YBrV-mbyWhk9276zna2C-2BaQ6tBabB1ZxqzdD_6Z5oWC2iEUeQD56PmjZjeWJZ45Scd9Zz3KrqN-VFE80fAIGDA9QgxLMTZ41Uz7mdN_hQwfFoEDFp_AgQMW35JlF9Q4i4Ln54SF8nncadLrifLPXuKcs5n9HLeMK0kecN0L2t4hrQKGKrD-ccrxBhKZ4VR644hfofx7-58OvgfAAD__2I9ic0). "_Knowing that what we are working on will impact this industry is very rewarding_."

On this day in 1837, the steamship Columbia, of the , departed New Orleans on its inaugural voyage to Galveston. The company was the first steamship line to operate in Texas. Rare Australian white-spotted jellyfish are appearing in increasing numbers on Texas beaches. Click for a photo of the invasive 16-inch creature. When an Oklahoma pastor was struggling to read his Bible in a TSA line, he had no idea he was planting the seed for an app that would one day become a global phenomenon, recently hitting one billion users. This landmark comes as more people, especially Gen Z, embrace faith and Scripture digitally. Get exclusive details on . If you've ever wished you could make a real, immediate difference in a child's life, today's sponsor, gives you the chance to turn a simple gift into the daily meals--and hope--that hungry children desperately need.
