Listen to our daily 15-minute podcast while commuting, cooking, or walking the dog--your Flyover fix, anywhere. | | 'ShamWow Guy' Running for Congress Offer Vince Shlomi, the infomercial pitchman known for hawking the super-absorbent ShamWow towel, has for Congress in Texas. He is one of a dozen or so candidates challenging incumbent John Carter, an 84-year-old Republican whose district includes several counties north of Austin. The 61-year-old Israeli-American said he was for office by the late Charlie Kirk and a desire to stop "political infighting in the country." He added he wants to "destroy wokeism" and "make America happy." After achieving success selling the ShamWow, Shlomi for the Slap Chop kitchen utensil and the reusable Schticky lint roller. In 2009, he made headlines when he was arrested in Miami Beach after an altercation with a sex worker, an incident for which he took "full responsibility" and credited with motivating him to . Houston Radio Station Hacked A Houston radio station's Sunday afternoon, briefly interrupting its broadcast of the Cowboys-Eagles game. A racist country song and an automated voice promoting several social media profiles aired on ESPN Radio's 97.5 FM multiple times between 4 and 5 p.m. In a social media post, the station stated that its "signal had been hacked" and that it was "actively trying to rectify the problem." On Monday, General Manager Todd Farquharson said that the station's transmitter was damaged when its radio tower on Saturday, and a bot hacked the backup equipment the station used to stay on the air. "We're disappointed to be victims of this attack and the offensive messaging it broadcast ," he said. "We're taking steps to prevent this from happening in the future.” Aggie Helps Create 3D Turkey Gut Model A Texas A&M undergraduate student has helped create a 3D model of a turkey's gut to facilitate the study of , a parasitic infection that has a mortality rate of up to 80% in poultry. Leila Chang, a senior whose interest in poultry science dates back to raising turkeys in middle school, worked with Dr. Yuhua Farnell to from turkey stem cells. The breakthrough enables researchers to study the development and treatment of blackhead disease without using live turkeys. Potential applications for the model include research on other intestinal diseases and management practices that affect poultry gut health. Chang plans to become a professor and wants to develop tools that help producers protect flocks. "Science has given me a new perspective on the turkey we eat at Thanksgiving ," . "Knowing that what we are working on will impact this industry is very rewarding." | Flying together with our sponsor Children are hungry. Let’s change that. Food. For those of us who have enough, it’s an easy need to fill. But millions of children go hungry. Their bodies can’t develop, much less their minds. They need a miracle. You can be their miracle. Anita knew hunger firsthand. She loves to sing and aspires to a career in the music industry. She wants to do well in school, but hunger used to distract her and hold her back. That was before Convoy of Hope came to her village in Nepal. “My family and I didn’t trust outside organizations, because they would leave after a short period of time,” Anita remembers. “But Convoy has done so much. They didn’t just give us food; they taught us to grow it ourselves.” Many children are going to bed hungry tonight. . You give. Convoy delivers. And hundreds of thousands of children are fed. | ➤ Attorney General Ken Paxton is suing the Texas Department of Housing and Community Affairs for alleged discrimination against faith-based organizations, which are currently barred from accessing public funds unless they pledge to refrain from religious activities. () ➤ Brown County Judge Alan Shane Britton was arrested yesterday on five felony charges, including abuse of official capacity and assault on a public servant. He was released on a $30,000 bond. () ➤ San Antonio: Organizers for the annual Raul Jimenez Thanksgiving Dinner purchased 678 turkeys to provide free meals to a record 30,000 people on Thursday. About 4,000 volunteers are working throughout the week to prepare the feast. It’s one of the largest such events in the country. () ➤ Tyler: A 23-year-old woman was killed Friday in a "vicious attack" by three pit bulls she was dog-sitting. Madison Riley Hull was set to graduate from UT Tyler next year with a degree in early childhood education. () ➤ Webb County Judge Tano Tijerina has been accused of skirting federal campaign reporting laws to avoid resigning from office to run for the seat held by U.S. Rep. Henry Cuellar (D-Laredo). Tijerina, a former Democrat who announced his affiliation with the Republican Party earlier this year, has the complaint as a political smear. () ➤ Austin: Eve Stephens, the former police chief for UT Austin, filed a wrongful termination lawsuit claiming she was dismissed as part of a "coordinated purge of female employees." () ➤ Odessa: The city has asked an Ector County court to dismiss a class action lawsuit by residents who claim they were overbilled for water service due to faulty meters and software issues. The city has denied the allegations and maintains it has governmental immunity. subject: Maine’s Largest State Worker Union Accuses Mills Administration of ‘Bad-Faith Bargaining’
body:
Here's the latest breaking news at The Maine Wire

** Maine’s Largest State Worker Union Accuses Mills Administration of ‘Bad-Faith Bargaining’ (https://mainepolicy.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a975bf67c40a8d8be91ad606d&id=637eb3d4a1&e=f093fa355c)
------------------------------------------------------------
By Jon Fetherston on Nov 25, 2025 06:50 am
Maine’s largest union representing state employees has filed a formal complaint accusing the Mills administration of refusing to negotiate in good faith, escalating an already tense standoff over expired labor contracts. The Maine Service Employees Association Local 1989, which represents roughly 10,000 state workers, filed its grievance Monday with the Maine Labor Relations Board. The [...]

** Charges Dismissed Against Woman Shot by Maine Border Patrol Agent in Chicago (https://mainepolicy.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a975bf67c40a8d8be91ad606d&id=27d71eb3a0&e=f093fa355c)
------------------------------------------------------------
By Jon Fetherston on Nov 24, 2025 02:09 pm
Federal prosecutors on Thursday moved to dismiss charges against a woman who was shot multiple times by a Maine-based Border Patrol agent during an immigration enforcement operation on Chicago’s southwest side last month. subject: Peter, do you need a reminder?
body:
You haven’t responded

| | | | Peter,
We’re following up with you. A couple of days ago, we sent you an email offering you our exclusive [GOP Platinum Membership](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn.).
We only invite our top supporters to join this exclusive club, and you made the cut! So, imagine our reaction when we found out you still HAVEN’T accepted your offer.

We’re sure it was just a mistake. Maybe the email got lost in your inbox. Whatever the reason, we’re following up with you here. Zach from Team Marsha Blackburn

subject: We flipped Georgia when no one thought it was possible
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action
body:
And I am the only Democratic U.S. Senator up for reelection in a state Trump won.
| | | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb2cc8cc9-1a0d-4385-af9e-3f6578d2a074/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| Hey Peter, it’s Jon. I’m respectfully asking:[ Can you split a donation of $10 to my reelection campaign and Blue Amp Action today? ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T86f7c50f-ade0-4c37-9e43-0f4bc46b5ea1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Sorry to be so direct, but winning in 2026 is our only hope to regain Congressional power and reverse our ongoing descent toward one-man rule. And I am the only Democratic U.S. Senator up for reelection in a state Trump won. That makes me MAGA’s #1 target in 2026. They’re already spending MILLIONS of dollars to try to defeat me. There is no path back from the brink of authoritarianism without defending this seat — the very seat that secured the Democratic majority in 2021. So I'm asking for your help. Not for me, for all of us. [If you’re able, please make a contribution of any amount to my campaign and Blue Amp Action today.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T91882078-101c-4c13-bdc6-2dca527cab25/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) The campaign will be brutal. But this team wins the hardest battles. We flipped Georgia when no one thought it was possible. Remember? We unseated an entrenched GOP incumbent to win the Senate majority. And we will win again — with your help. [Please: send $10 to my reelection campaign and Blue Amp Action today. ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T84fe268a-03c6-4489-abd4-da3dd6c6240f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) With gratitude, Senator Jon Ossoff

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade, it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in a democracy, not a dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. name: Andrew Yang
subject: Meta’s Shame
body:
In a huge revelation this week, a federal court unsealed a brief filed by plaintiffs in a major lawsuit against social media companies, most prominently Meta, which owns Facebook, Instagram and Threads.

| |
---|---|---
| | | Forwarded this email? [Subscribe here](https://substack..tTQkC4UoQkI79hVGgnxBz85rLVxsmmekha7fTTf-7IE?) for more

---|---|---
* * *
# [Meta's Shame](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=287304&post_id=179827446&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc5ODI3NDQ2LCJpYXQiOjE3NjQwNzU5NjEsImV4cCI6MTc2NjY2Nzk2MSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI4NzMwNCIsInN1YiI6InBvc3QtcmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.Ds0sI_3I9cnWj-5zFEVV0TqZOkDb9Tu5vcwTIwb8rPs)
| | [Andrew Yang](https://substack.com/@andrewyang)
---
| Nov 25
---
| [](https://substack.com/@andrewyang)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=287304&post_id=179827446&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc5ODI3NDQ2LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc2NDA3NTk2MSwiZXhwIjoxNzY2NjY3OTYxLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMjg3MzA0Iiwic3ViIjoicmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.LasUHemirmWb5uYGpUZGoUULT54j9yLSa9Ht9Y77avo&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=287304&post_id=179827446&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc5ODI3NDQ2LCJpYXQiOjE3NjQwNzU5NjEsImV4cCI6MTc2NjY2Nzk2MSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI4NzMwNCIsInN1YiI6InBvc3QtcmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.Ds0sI_3I9cnWj-5zFEVV0TqZOkDb9Tu5vcwTIwb8rPs&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=287304&post_id=179827446&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc5ODI3NDQ2LCJpYXQiOjE3NjQwNzU5NjEsImV4cCI6MTc2NjY2Nzk2MSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI4NzMwNCIsInN1YiI6InBvc3QtcmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.Ds0sI_3I9cnWj-5zFEVV0TqZOkDb9Tu5vcwTIwb8rPs)
---
| | [](https://substack..7VHa_b_ASyFz-Ae_KtGdTLR_R6iE2663kOo_OhPVukY?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/andrewyang/p/metas-shame?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

In a huge revelation this week, a federal court unsealed a brief filed by plaintiffs in a major lawsuit against social media companies, most prominently Meta, which owns Facebook, Instagram and Threads.
The [details](https://substack.com/redirect/e26c3c69-d91f-4e90-baa3-6dca7ae670cd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) of this filing were staggeringly terrible.
For example, Instagram's former head of safety Vaishnavi Jayakumar testified that she was shocked to learn in 2020 that Instagram had a '17-strike' policy for accounts that solicited sex or prostitution, including trafficking. In other words, an account could go around asking for sex over a dozen times, including possibly of minors, without being suspended.
That's gross and disturbing.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/cb9b3033-ce0e-48e4-87cf-61bdc2268f0a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
It doesn't stop there. According to the plantiffs, Meta was aware that millions of adults were contacting minors on its sites, that its products were making adolescents anxious or depressed, and had done the math on what changes would mean for 'engagement' and decided that it wasn't worth it to address the concerns. For example, there was not a way for users to easily report child sexual abuse content, while they could do so for 'spam' or an 'intellectual property violation.' Indeed, multiple employees suggested ways to reduce harms to younger users only to be blocked by senior management.
The brief is supposedly based on sworn depositions of current and former Meta employees as well as documents obtained during the lawsuit's discovery process.
According to the brief, in 2019 Meta designed a 'deactivation study' which found that users who stopped using Instagram or Facebook became happier after a week. This is consistent with [research](https://substack.com/redirect/bd681474-a8c0-4135-90b1-c4acb14935ed?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) done by other academics. Meta halted the study and didn't publicly disclose the results. One employee worried, "is it going to look like tobacco companies doing research and knowing cigs were bad and then keeping that info for themselves?" The following year, Meta answered 'No' to the question posed by the Senate Judiciary Committee whether it was 'able to determine whether increased use of its platform among teenage girls has any correlation with increased signs of depression.'
Yeah, I think they did know.
This has come to light in part due to the success of Jonathan Haidt's book, "The Anxious Generation" which has highlighted the destructiveness of social media on adolescents and gotten smartphones out of schools in dozens of states. The data has been clear for a number of years; I remember first becoming alarmed about social media's effect on teenagers while reading Jean Twenge's book 'iGen' in 2018.
Meta is a super-data-driven organization. I bet someone there could tell me how much they spent on paperclips last year. If social scientists like Jean Twenge and Jonathan Haidt could identify what its products were doing to teenage girls' psyches from the outside looking in, Meta clearly knew. When I spent time in Silicon Valley for the past 10 years, many of the parents wouldn't let their kids near social media. They knew what the products were doing to childrens' malleable minds.
If only they had thought to tell the rest of us. Or better yet, done something about it.
This lawsuit is likely only the beginning of what's to come for Meta, TikTok and the social media companies. If this lawsuit is successful, I'd expect Congressional action to follow.
These companies are now worth hundreds of billions of dollars on the back of maximizing engagement. In some ways, it's not a surprise that when given a choice between mitigating harm and revving up user engagement, they chose the latter. We will be dealing with the repercussions for generations. For some families, it's a little too late.
To get off your phone more, check out [Noble Mobile](https://substack.com/redirect/475799cc-1cfa-4779-9dd0-56e5f5dca0df?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) \- email [matt@noblemobile.com](https://substack.com/redirect/c3d2bd71-7b2a-47f2-b4fd-c8ef8cd21b29?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and use my name if you want a few months for free. [Offline](https://substack.com/redirect/3ab39f84-e752-458b-aeff-ff2f07f79cf4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)'s IRL no-phones party is coming to Boston, Baltimore, and back to NYC. To help reform social media, check out [Center for Humane Technology](https://substack.com/redirect/982d4bc2-7fdc-4c2d-87e2-89e46a1ff987?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Remember to look up.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/b8e4f438-1b1c-44c6-90fc-1a4116549e79?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---

---
|
# With Gratitude
---
| |
---
| **This Thanksgiving,** TFVC is deeply grateful for YOU, our dedicated supporters who helped make our **tenth year of advocacy****so memorable and successful.** We cannot thank you enough for every email you sent, every phone call you made, every office you visited, every event you attended, every dollar you donated - all to **advance the cause of medical liberty** in Texas. With your help, we passed **seven bills** that significantly strengthened parents’ and patients’ rights, including OTC ivermectin and print-at-home exemptions! Your support also allowed our **network of devoted volunteers to blossom** to nearly one hundred Outreach Coordinators; these Texans are truly the hands and feet of our movement! And we cannot overstate how thankful we are to each and every one of you who watched and shared **“Follow the Silenced,” the groundbreaking documentary film** about vaccine injury that TFVC was blessed to produce with a team of amazing filmmakers and storytellers. **As we celebrate with loved ones, we also share our 2025 victories with you. Have a blessed Thanksgiving.**

---
| |
---
|
# News
---

clean_body: | | Grateful for You | | | | | | With Gratitude | | | This Thanksgiving, TFVC is deeply grateful for YOU, our dedicated supporters who helped make our tenth year of advocacyso memorable and successful. We cannot thank you enough for every email you sent, every phone call you made, every office you visited, every event you attended, every dollar you donated - all to advance the cause of medical liberty in Texas. With your help, we passed seven bills that significantly strengthened parents’ and patients’ rights, including OTC ivermectin and print-at-home exemptions! Your support also allowed our network of devoted volunteers to blossom to nearly one hundred Outreach Coordinators; these Texans are truly the hands and feet of our movement! And we cannot overstate how thankful we are to each and every one of you who watched and shared “Follow the Silenced,” the groundbreaking documentary film about vaccine injury that TFVC was blessed to produce with a team of amazing filmmakers and storytellers. As we celebrate with loved ones, we also share our 2025 victories with you. Have a blessed Thanksgiving. | | | News | | | | | | Aaron Siri Rewind | Did you miss TFVC's recent event with Aaron Siri? body:
You can bet this was ordered by Donald Trump and carried out by Pete Hegseth. But right now, that's besides the point.
#

_Peter, we’re sharing this important message from Mark Kelly. Earlier this week, Donald Trump called for elected Democrats — including Mark — to be executed. And yesterday, his Department of War announced a formal investigation into Mark._
_Please read Mark’s note below and then, if you can,[**split a $5 contribution to help fight back.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-nov25-kelly.WuAWqz&refcode=em251125-1-subs-b&t=1&akid=1144%2E5691347%2E7-FYbL) Thank you - Team Ossoff_
* * *
Peter, it’s Sen. Mark Kelly.
The Department of War is coming after me because they don’t like what I have to say.
[](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-nov25-kelly.WuAWqz&refcode=em251125-1-subs-b&t=2&akid=1144%2E5691347%2E7-FYbL)
When I was 22 years old, I swore an oath to the Constitution. I've upheld that oath every day since.
If Trump is trying to intimidate me from doing my job, it won’t work.
I’ve given too much to this country to be silenced by bullies who care more about their own power than about protecting the Constitution.
Call this what it is: **Political persecution.**
You can bet this was ordered by Donald Trump and carried out by Pete Hegseth. But right now, that's besides the point.
[**The point is that I need you to chip in whatever you can afford to Jon Ossoff and me so we have the resources necessary to fight back against what comes next.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-nov25-kelly.WuAWqz&refcode=em251125-1-subs-b&t=3&akid=1144%2E5691347%2E7-FYbL)

name: Trisha Calvarese
subject: MAGA extremist Lauren Boebert can be defeated next year
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trisha 4 Colorado
body:
| | | | | [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001LWUhMToejuQPL5JWRZOqivGH6P-E-WmhPgg7h-IyiXNOSFt1tT1WlAz4qrNEynWV5KcmfGnwH52BHbDnHcvOKdj9n_01z6apS8szM9_jDUXDw80aHahWMPSqV_QOSzo-wDMTFCgrdKmwNtE-Yu5vNYD1pnP6fQb0B8U36WtxOJfnptlLcc--9NWClBudlD7JFPGjqjhiemYlzsJlo0_t4EHRtLIAXiuZLfxenA2wVSI=&c=7vTf4x8Bm7aAJJ-9lS9N4PhpGUTWhNGSl9dS_JE6TqXEhJNKwxADGQ==&ch=PLwm7TfJErvivQ8jEyMBzquZNOdpE2fFlJ1sMU-9Z1829xM0vG3Gcw==)
---
|

Peter,
Lauren Boebert is more vulnerable than she has ever been.
She's only in Congress because of 546 votes. Last quarter, my campaign outraised her 5 to 1. And when I faced her in 2024, I had the best performance by any Democrat in this district's history -- outperforming Kamala Harris by six points in a red wave election.
Now I'm back to finish the job in 2026.
The ingredients for a massive upset are there and the timing is perfect. Recent polling shows Democrats poised to flip districts once considered safely Republican in 2026.
This is shaping up to be a massive year, the kind where a district like Colorado's 4th can finally turn the page on Boebert's chaos and elect a representative who actually delivers for working people.
[If you're ready to defeat Lauren Boebert once and for all, will you donate $5 or whatever you can spare to help us win this race?](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001LWUhMToejuQPL5JWRZOqivGH6P-E-WmhPgg7h-IyiXNOSFt1tT1WlAz4qrNEynWVf5vJnYf9YnuSa_YbaZ6hAqyV6oruozNPBxa0-YObxX_Jbbio8jP_FxcJm4Uc8hhy8Wqx7kP8d1Rbtu-E1UZFJ6akmz2NFNkKxTxq7JzZCQPuZykHpC3IUSzms9Mj6gEQGRa9C8cY3sFjvVtxBzUci8ank-LwNyurADplVWsZgFaiRdo19hQ56g==&c=7vTf4x8Bm7aAJJ-9lS9N4PhpGUTWhNGSl9dS_JE6TqXEhJNKwxADGQ==&ch=PLwm7TfJErvivQ8jEyMBzquZNOdpE2fFlJ1sMU-9Z1829xM0vG3Gcw==)

Before I ever ran for office, I was a labor leader and public servant.
I gave voice to 12.5 million working people at the AFL-CIO as a speechwriter, working alongside leaders like Richard Trumka and Liz Shuler to strengthen unions, pass historic infrastructure investments, and help secure the largest climate bill in American history that is poised to create thousands of clean-energy manufacturing jobs right here in CO-04.
I served my country at the U.S. National Science Foundation, helping advance bipartisan investments to rebuild American science, technology, and innovation--major legislation that reshored manufacturing and expanded opportunity in communities too often left behind.
And when both my parents fell ill with cancer, I came home to Highlands Ranch to care for them at the end of their lives. Before he passed, my dad, a lifelong Republican, told me to step up and give back to the community that gave us so much. [That's why I'm running and why I have what it takes to topple Lauren Boebert once and for all. If you're able, will you chip in $5 today to help us finish what we started?](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001LWUhMToejuQPL5JWRZOqivGH6P-E-WmhPgg7h-IyiXNOSFt1tT1WlAz4qrNEynWVf5vJnYf9YnuSa_YbaZ6hAqyV6oruozNPBxa0-YObxX_Jbbio8jP_FxcJm4Uc8hhy8Wqx7kP8d1Rbtu-E1UZFJ6akmz2NFNkKxTxq7JzZCQPuZykHpC3IUSzms9Mj6gEQGRa9C8cY3sFjvVtxBzUci8ank-LwNyurADplVWsZgFYsI25k5RBUzA==&c=7vTf4x8Bm7aAJJ-9lS9N4PhpGUTWhNGSl9dS_JE6TqXEhJNKwxADGQ==&ch=PLwm7TfJErvivQ8jEyMBzquZNOdpE2fFlJ1sMU-9Z1829xM0vG3Gcw==)

Now I'm back to finish the job in 2026. The ingredients for a massive upset are there and the timing is perfect. Recent polling shows Democrats poised to flip districts once considered safely Republican in 2026. This is shaping up to be a massive year, the kind where a district like Colorado's 4th can finally turn the page on Boebert's chaos and elect a representative who actually delivers for working people. == If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | == | == | == | | == | == | == | == Before I ever ran for office, I was a labor leader and public servant. I gave voice to 12.5 million working people at the AFL-CIO as a speechwriter, working alongside leaders like Richard Trumka and Liz Shuler to strengthen unions, pass historic infrastructure investments, and help secure the largest climate bill in American history that is poised to create thousands of clean-energy manufacturing jobs right here in CO-04. I served my country at the U.S. National Science Foundation, helping advance bipartisan investments to rebuild American science, technology, and innovation--major legislation that reshored manufacturing and expanded opportunity in communities too often left behind. And when both my parents fell ill with cancer, I came home to Highlands Ranch to care for them at the end of their lives. name: Movement 4 Freedom
subject: We’re standing with Summer Lee.
body:
She is a champion for the people.

| | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/32f649385dbb/tockcw1cwy-189?e=81ab29c4d2)
---
[|
---](https://movement4freedom.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c20cdecc59106d39c65725a01&id=332273d0e5&e=81ab29c4d2)
| | | | | | Peter,
---
| | Today, we’re honored to announce that **we’re endorsing Congresswoman Summer Lee** — a true politivist whose work, values, and courage have made her one of the most people-centered leaders in Congress.
Summer has never waited for permission to do what’s right. **She has legislated with purpose, clarity, and compassion** — fighting for food assistance, affordable housing, reparations, justice for Palestinians, and a government that works for the working class.
She is a representative who leads from the ground up, not the top down.She is a champion who brings movement power into the halls of Congress.And she is exactly the kind of leader our opponents would love to silence.
---
[|
---](https://movement4freedom.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c20cdecc59106d39c65725a01&id=74cf0a56c3&e=81ab29c4d2)
| | Well-funded special interest groups like AIPAC have shown their willingness to flood elections with dark money to unseat bold, progressive, pro-humanity champions. And they will absolutely be targeting leaders like Summer who stand firmly with the people.
That’s why we’re showing Summer that we have her back just as fiercely as she has had the people’s. **This is about more than just seats, it’s about transforming the system itself.**
---
| [JOIN THE MOVEMENT](https://movement4freedom.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c20cdecc59106d39c65725a01&id=22d8ed27a6&e=81ab29c4d2)
---
| | This season, instead of pouring our holiday dollars into corporations that profit off inequality, **we’re asking our community to participate in the Black Friday Blackout** — to redirect resources toward supporting leaders like Summer Lee who fight for our best interests every single day.
[Every dollar we give to candidates like Summer is a dollar we withhold from the systems trying to buy our democracy. Will you chip in today to help us defend Summer Lee’s seat and fuel this movement?](https://movement4freedom.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c20cdecc59106d39c65725a01&id=cffa6f0b6c&e=81ab29c4d2)
Let’s make it unmistakably clear: **if they try to knock Summer down, they’ll find a movement standing in the way.**
---
| |
**In solidarity,****The Movement for Freedom Team**
---
| | | | | | | [|
---](https://movement4freedom.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c20cdecc59106d39c65725a01&id=b4d11a0079&e=81ab29c4d2)
| | _Copyright (C) 2025 Movement 4 Freedom. All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

Our mailing address is:
Movement 4 Freedom P St NW Washington, DC 200033 USA

You can [update your preferences](https://movement4freedom.us16.list-manage.com/profile?u=c20cdecc59106d39c65725a01&id=6276f39f53&e=81ab29c4d2&c=45c8cb4037) or [unsubscribe](https://movement4freedom.us16.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=c20cdecc59106d39c65725a01&id=6276f39f53&t=b&e=81ab29c4d2&c=45c8cb4037)

name: DemsGive
subject: We need to act fast if we’re going to flip the House
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Protect Our Democracy Fund_
body:
DOJ moves to block California’s new map. The stakes are huge.
| | | | | [ ](https://ctrk.klclick.com/l/01KAXMD9A339Z753QR6N6VAS2D_0)
---
| | | | Hey Peter,

The United States Department of Justice just stepped into the fight, [suing to block Proposition 50 in California, a move aimed at redrawing congressional districts](https://ctrk.klclick.com/l/01KAXMD9A339Z753QR6N6VAS2D_1) and giving Democrats a shot at gaining five seats in the next U.S. House election. Here’s the truth:
* If Democrats don’t secure those seats in 2026, the GOP could keep control of the House,
* If we wait, we’ll have fewer resources when the fight intensifies.
* This is a nationwide fight over how maps get drawn, who gets heard, and whose vote counts.

We’re in the fight. But we **can’t win without our grassroots movement powering us.**

[**Chip In Today**](https://ctrk.klclick.com/l/01KAXMD9A339Z753QR6N6VAS2D_2)

– Jesse, DemsGive

Before I ever ran for office, I was a labor leader and public servant.
I gave voice to 12.5 million working people at the AFL-CIO as a speechwriter, working alongside leaders like Richard Trumka and Liz Shuler to strengthen unions, pass historic infrastructure investments, and help secure the largest climate bill in American history that is poised to create thousands of clean-energy manufacturing jobs right here in CO-04.
I served my country at the U.S. National Science Foundation, helping advance bipartisan investments to rebuild American science, technology, and innovation--major legislation that reshored manufacturing and expanded opportunity in communities too often left behind.
And when both my parents fell ill with cancer, I came home to Highlands Ranch to care for them at the end of their lives. Before he passed, my dad, a lifelong Republican, told me to step up and give back to the community that gave us so much. [That's why I'm running and why I have what it takes to topple Lauren Boebert once and for all. If you're able, will you chip in $5 today to help us finish what we started?](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qQhO_mX0MwCJghN2DrMztCoKarllHOo4aOwtGCWDLcQQ11KnIX1G0le2w1MaNgGNnmLFA7puWvwKhArjmzHKw-onxMsJMMnh40XIn6FbPHXFz-ocCdfBIr2LAIbAgdfRWXhtdJya_0HabI9thRW4ePywRTEXuaYvuSPuniuw5ggvEuHifu87F9O5Mt3P5pByPlGjWSt_gXa_iXOcOUUg_Zv1kFYpXy43LlcoRrYIEP6lajLvuh-QYQ==&c=Al2jepwxEWjCaqE8tnn-3yiLDBx1Uh0XugYfOsUSFHPfCzKtRWg0hw==&ch=y1tjZF-xPhzzsvc2lftnnKBfnXa5FMThI3tVmp8rzNFm81NoV5VODg==)

clean_body: | | | | | == | Peter, Lauren Boebert is more vulnerable than she has ever been. She's only in Congress because of 546 votes. Last quarter, my campaign outraised her 5 to 1. And when I faced her in 2024, I had the best performance by any Democrat in this district's history -- outperforming Kamala Harris by six points in a red wave election. Now I'm back to finish the job in 2026. The ingredients for a massive upset are there and the timing is perfect. Recent polling shows Democrats poised to flip districts once considered safely Republican in 2026. This is shaping up to be a massive year, the kind where a district like Colorado's 4th can finally turn the page on Boebert's chaos and elect a representative who actually delivers for working people. == If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | == | == | == | | == | == | == | == Before I ever ran for office, I was a labor leader and public servant. I served my country at the U.S. National Science Foundation, helping advance bipartisan investments to rebuild American science, technology, and innovation--major legislation that reshored manufacturing and expanded opportunity in communities too often left behind. And when both my parents fell ill with cancer, I came home to Highlands Ranch to care for them at the end of their lives. **There are THREE things happening in Florida we need you to be aware of, Peter:** 1️⃣ While Floridians struggle with skyrocketing costs, the highest insurance rates in America, and historic utility rate hikes, Attorney General James Uthmeier protects the corporations crushing you instead of taking them to court. 2️⃣ In fact, Uthmeier faces serious accusations of corruption, including money laundering and wire fraud involving $10 million in Medicaid settlement funds meant to help Floridians. He was even found in contempt of court for ignoring a federal judge's orders. This is who's supposed to be fighting for us. 3️⃣ We have a real opportunity to defeat this corruption and elect Jose Javier Rodriguez — someone who's spent his entire career fighting for working people, taking on utility giants, and standing up to the powerful. But keeping this campaign competitive requires resources, and that's why we set a $5,000 fundraising goal to hit by November 30. Every single dollar helps us build the movement Florida needs. **[Jose is fighting to elect an Attorney General who serves the people of Florida, not just Trump, DeSantis, and their wealthy donors. But keeping this campaign competitive requires resources, and that's why we set a $5,000 fundraising goal to hit by November 30. Every single dollar helps us build the movement Florida needs. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = = Onward, Team Rodriguez | = = PAID FOR BY JOSE JAVIER RODRIGUEZ FOR FLORIDA ATTORNEY GENERAL Jose Javier Rodriguez for Attorney General 701 S. Howard Avenue #106-813 Tampa, FL 33606

_**EXHIBIT 1 - JOINT FUNDRAISING NOTICE **_

Team Nunn ("JFC") is a joint fundraising committee composed of Iowans for Zach Nunn ("Campaign"), Call to Service PAC ("LPAC") and NRCC (each, a "Committee," and, collectively, the "Committees"). Any contribution to the JFC permissible under the Federal Election Campaign Act, as amended ("FECA"), from contributors who have not exceeded their applicable federal contribution limits, shall be allocated among the Committees pursuant to FECA and the formula set forth in this Notice.

_**Contributions Made by an Individual or Federal Non-Multicandidate Political Committee:**_
Individuals or federal non-multicandidate PACs may contribute up to $322,100. Such contributions shall be allocated in the following order:
1\. Campaign shall receive any contribution not exceeding $7,000, designating up to $3,500 to the primary election and up to $3,500 to the general election, provided such limits apply.
2\. LPAC shall receive any contribution not exceeding $5,000 annually.
3\. NRCC shall receive for its general account any contribution not exceeding $44,300 annually.
4\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $132,900 for its Building Fund, provided such limits apply.
5\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $132,900 for its Legal Proceedings Fund, provided such limits apply.

_**Contributions Made by a Federal Multicandidate Political Committee:**_
Multicandidate PACs may contribute up to $120,000. Such contributions shall be allocated in the following order:
1\. Campaign shall receive any contribution not exceeding $10,000, designating up to $5,000 to the primary election and up to $5,000 to the general election, provided such limits apply.
2\. LPAC shall receive any contribution not exceeding $5,000 annually.
3 .NRCC shall receive for its general account any contribution not exceeding $15,000 annually.
4\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $45,000 for its Building Fund, provided such limits apply.
5 .NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $45,000 for its Legal Proceedings Fund, provided such limits apply.

Contributions to Team Nunn, or to any participating Committee individually, are not deductible as charitable donations for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor organizations, national banks, federal government contractors, foreign nationals without green cards, and other federally impermissible sources are prohibited. The contributor's signature designates his or her contribution to the elections described above. Contributions that exceed a donor's contribution limit to a participating Committee shall be reallocated to the remaining Committees according to this allocation formula to the extent permitted by FECA. Any contributor may designate his or her contribution to a specific participant Committee to the extent permitted by FECA. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle or calendar year, as applicable.
Paid for by Team Nunn, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Iowans for Zach Nunn, Call to Service PAC, and NRCC.

* * *
# Leavitt on Zohran Mamdani/Trump meeting: "Talk is cheap..."
White House press Sec. Karoline Leavitt responded to President Donald Trump's meeting with NYC Mayor-elect Zohran Mamdani:
"Talk is cheap... The fact that President Trump is willing to meet with somebody who said those types of things about him shows that he really is interested in being a President for ALL Americans."
[](https://substack.com/redirect/b2538ca9-ea29-43b8-b646-f233c0a5a824?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

**[Together with Home Title Lock](https://substack.com/redirect/58a61f7c-fc9f-4ae3-b74b-39d5b71d4b87?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# **[Protect Your Home from Title Theft and Fraud](https://substack.com/redirect/58a61f7c-fc9f-4ae3-b74b-39d5b71d4b87?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/58a61f7c-fc9f-4ae3-b74b-39d5b71d4b87?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The FBI warns of **a rise in title fraud,** a crime where scammers use forged documents to steal a homeowner's ownership on records, often leaving victims unaware until it is too late.
**Criminals file fraudulent deeds, manipulate public records, and may even impersonate owners to gain control of a home.** If the stolen property is mortgaged or sold, it can create serious financial and legal consequences, including displacement, loss of property, emotional distress, and lengthy battles to reclaim it.
**Title fraud can affect anyone,** regardless of location, property type, or ownership duration. To protect your home and preventing irreversible damage, Homeowners are urged to monitor their records, check local filings, and watch for unexpected correspondence.
**[Beyond monitoring, Home Title Lock provides a comprehensive solution.](https://substack.com/redirect/d84296f8-e931-40fd-b029-6f5546e3d2c4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
Subscribers receive 24/7 monitoring of their title records, urgent alerts of any activity, access to a dedicated team of legal experts who act on their behalf, and full restoration services for properties that fall victim to fraud.
Backed by up to $1 million in restoration protection, Home Title Lock offers homeowners more than just awareness--they gain active protection, legal support, and the resources needed to reclaim and secure their property if title fraud occurs.
[Protect your home today](https://substack.com/redirect/d84296f8-e931-40fd-b029-6f5546e3d2c4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
# **Greta Thunberg banned and fined for dyeing Grand Canal green**
Climate activist Greta Thunberg, 22, received a 48-hour ban from entering Venice, Italy and was fined $172 along with roughly 35 other demonstrators after joining Extinction Rebellion **[protesters in dyeing the Grand Canal bright green](https://substack.com/redirect/50d183a4-1ec1-44b2-a02c-1d7c9bcce2ad?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** using what the group claimed was a fluorescent, non-toxic tracer commonly employed in environmental studies.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/50d183a4-1ec1-44b2-a02c-1d7c9bcce2ad?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Coordinated actions across ten Italian cities:** The protest occurred as the COP30 United Nations climate conference ended in Brazil, with Extinction Rebellion coordinating actions in ten Italian cities including dyeing fountains in Genoa and Padova, turning rivers green in Turin, Bologna and Taranto, and hanging a "Stop Ecocide" banner from Venice's iconic Rialto Bridge while silent protesters in red veils moved through tourist crowds.
* **Italian officials condemn stunt as disrespectful:** Veneto Province Gov. Luca Zaia criticized Thunberg and Extinction Rebellion's action as "a gesture that risks having consequences for the environment" and "a disrespectful act towards our city, its history and its fragility," while the group argued the stunt aimed to "draw attention to the massive effects of climate collapse" and criticized Prime Minister Giorgia Meloni's government for resisting stronger climate measures.

* * *

* * *
# **University of Minnesota warns of "Whiteness Pandemic"**
The University of Minnesota-Twin Cities' "Culture and Family Lab" website **[warns against a"whiteness pandemic"](https://substack.com/redirect/758da405-e2c9-4d73-9d56-daaa8ba7507d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** and provides "resources" on how to "halt and reverse" the issue, stating that if you were "born or raised in the United States, you have grown up in the Whiteness Pandemic" and can play a role in reversing it, especially if White due to "power and privilege."
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/758da405-e2c9-4d73-9d56-daaa8ba7507d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Website describes "whiteness" as driving force behind racism:** The webpage explains that while racism should be viewed as an "epidemic" or "pandemic," the "whiteness pandemic" is "lurking" behind and driving that issue, defining "Whiteness" as referring to "culture, not biology" featuring "colorblindness, passivity, and White fragility," with the family system being "one of the most powerful systems involved in systemic racism."
* **Research funded by federal mental health agency:** Funding for the project comes from various sources including the National Institute of Mental Health (NIMH), with one paper surveying mostly liberal White female mothers with average income over $125,000 concluding that "Family socialization into the centuries-old culture of Whiteness...perpetrates and perpetuates U.S. racism," while resources include literature from Ibram X. Kendi and Robin DiAngelo.
* **Watchdog criticizes program as entrenched DEI:** Parents' rights watchdog Defending Education put out a report Tuesday outlining the university's efforts, with research director Rhyen Staley telling Fox News Digital this is "another example of how ingrained DEI is in higher education and is not going away any time soon," calling for universities to "end this nonsense yesterday," while the university defended its "commitment to the principles of academic freedom."

* * *

clean_body: | | | | | | | Peter, Silicon Valley has unleashed AI chatbots across the internet—without safeguards, without accountability, and without regard for the human cost. Worst of all, children are being targeted in suggestive conversations by machines that never sleep and never stop. Enough is enough. These AI chatbots are out of control—and unless we fight back, it’s only going to get worse. | | | | | | Big Tech is getting richer. Americans are getting hurt. Families are being put at risk. Take the survey and provide your critical viewpoint about AI. In Liberty, Josh Hawley | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- | | | Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee | | | | |

name: Hoosiers for Haggard
subject: Happy Thanksgiving Hoosiers!
body:
I wanted to take a moment to wish you all a Happy Thanksgiving!

| | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/4d7687263132/happy-thanksgiving-hoosiers?e=72dace1453)
---
|
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| |
# Happy Thanksgiving!
---
|
---
| | With my final statehouse session approaching, I had the chance to talk to many conservative leaders gathered to call for our special session to continue and work with President Trump to get fair representation in Congress.
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
| |
---
|
---
| | This past weekend, I travelled up to Lebanon for the annual Indiana Federation of Republican Women Holiday Brunch where I had the chance to talk with some amazing women leaders and grassroot organizers who are working hard to elect amazing Republicans to office!
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
| |
---
|
---
|
---
| | And to end off, I want to wish you all a Happy Thanksgiving. From my family to yours I hope you have an amazing holiday filled with great moments and good food!
---
|
---
|
---
| | I will continue highlighting the endorsements I continue to receive throughout the district from local leaders and groups that put their faith in me to represent them in Congress. Our momentum is just getting started and I can’t wait to continue to share with you who is already on board. If you ever want to get involved or endorse, please reach out!
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
| |
---
| |
---
|
---

name: The Turning Point USA Team
subject: Charlie showed us how we take back our culture for good
body:
Charlie Kirk knew something long before the rest of America caught on.

| | |
---
Friend,Charlie Kirk knew something long before the rest of America caught on. That the next generation of young Americans were desperate for** ** truth... That the Left's grip on the culture wasn't as strong as it looked... And with boldness, hard work, and a focused strategy -- WE COULD WIN. Charlie didn't just talk about it. _He built a movement that's changed history._ **And long before he left us... he wrote ****_How We Win_**** -- the playbook that lays it all out.**
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zcgonvclg0vqkb47qs9i1ap93mf3ohldrvo2318g_rp22sh2s8i6eor1c1ie9o32clh2bs)
---
Today, Turning Point USA wants to send it to you for FREE when you make a gift of any amount to carry Charlie's mission forward.
---
[ **Make My Gift &**
**Claim My FREE Book**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zorpbs9e114f639hbn1uba8nv5l7da1m1a19oa7o_rp22sh2s8i6eor1c1ie9o32clh2bs)
---
Friend, this isn't just a book... **It 's the exact blueprint Charlie used to:** 🔥 Launch Turning Point USA chapters in all 50 states
🔥 Wake up more than 820,000 student activists
🔥 Inspire a historic generational shift toward FREEDOM Charlie saw it coming before anyone else did. He showed the world that the American Culture War wasn't lost. While the media said Gen Z was gone, Charlie believed in them. He met them face to face. On the campuses. At the rallies. In the fight. He proved the Left and the Fake News Media wrong. **He showed us HOW WE WIN.**
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zbidoqnc379mdktg8d9adnkhp4poo6qu0a39dv90_rp22sh2s8i6eor1c1ie9o32clh2bs)
---
Now it's up to us to finish what he started. You and I have the opportunity to carry his torch, reach the next student, change more hearts and minds, and save the future of America. _But we can't do it without grassroots patriots like you._ **_How We Win_**** is the game plan -- written in Charlie's words, forged in real fights, and ready to be handed to the next bold American who says "YES, I'll stand up."** Let that be you, Friend. This book isn't a political piece... It's not about playing games in the D.C. swamp... It's a blueprint for taking back our culture and rebuilding the foundations of this country. **Faith. Freedom. Family. Truth.** The Left is still attacking those values every single day. But now we have the roadmap to FIGHT BACK. Charlie didn't just write it -- he lived it. Every single day. [**Make your gift to join Turning Point USA today, and we'll send you your FREE copy of ****_How We Win_**** today.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zrtgki5h70t913g9dplh4bnpjqmfksagkm36ng5o_rp22sh2s8i6eor1c1ie9o32clh2bs)
---

---
Together, we can make sure his mission doesn't just survive... But that it multiplies. Let's keep the fire going. Let's honor Charlie's legacy. Let's win. **For Charlie,** **The Turning Point USA Team**
---
[ **Make My Gift &**
**Claim My FREE Book**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zc4p71ma4uicembl9ckpn58uastu3p8mobl6bpj8_rp22sh2s8i6eor1c1ie9o32clh2bs)

name: Mark Kelly
subject: The Department of War is coming after me
body:
You can bet this was ordered by Donald Trump and carried out by Pete Hegseth. But right now, that's besides the point.
The Department of War is coming after me because they don’t like what I have to say.
[](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251125-1.x-X0qM&refcode=em-20251125-1&t=1&akid=973%2E1086043%2EkUVdSF)
When I was 22 years old, I swore an oath to the Constitution. I've upheld that oath every day since.
If Trump is trying to intimidate me from doing my job, it won’t work.
I’ve given too much to this country to be silenced by bullies who care more about their own power than about protecting the Constitution.
Call this what it is: **Political persecution.**
You can bet this was ordered by Donald Trump and carried out by Pete Hegseth. But right now, that's besides the point.
**[The point is that I need you to chip in whatever you can afford to Wes Moore and me so we have the resources necessary to fight back against what comes next.](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251125-1.x-X0qM&refcode=em-20251125-1&t=2&akid=973%2E1086043%2EkUVdSF)**
**[Donate $5 ››](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251125-1.x-X0qM&amount=5&refcode=em-20251125-1&t=21&akid=973%2E1086043%2EkUVdSF)**
We will not give up the ship.
Mark Kelly
[](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251125-1.x-X0qM&refcode=em-20251125-1&t=22&akid=973%2E1086043%2EkUVdSF)
* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=23&akid=973%2E1086043%2EkUVdSF)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.wesmoore.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=973%2E1086043%2EkUVdSF)

Email us: [info@wesmoore.com](mailto:info@wesmoore.com)
BY AUTHORITY: WES MOORE FOR MARYLAND, MARY TYDINGS, TREASURER

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Re: Trump’s Truth Social posts
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=9235%2E5257348%2EM5pE8o)
Derek —
Donald Trump has been on another social media rampage — with very real, very dangerous consequences.
In between posts about his favorite MAGA members of Congress, his football takes, and deranged AI-generated art — including the one below featuring me:
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q42025_abs_em.dd-KUe&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20251125_AM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=9235%2E5257348%2EM5pE8o)
**Trump is once again projecting himself as King, and threatening his political enemies, with “justice” — another reference to his many abuses of the Justice Department.**
In fact, Donald Trump has been expanding his threats against Democratic members of Congress, including those speaking out against Trump’s abuses of power in the Department of Defense.
He's threatening veterans like my colleagues Mark Kelly and Elissa Slotkin, accusing them of sedition and reposting calls for them to be hanged.
Now, Pete Hegseth is drawing up a bogus investigation into Mark Kelly — adopting one of Trump’s favorite tactics to smear his rivals.
These attacks have dangerous implications for our country and our democracy. Threatening members of Congress who don’t agree with you is egregious in and of itself and is directly pulled from the authoritarian playbook. Attacking veterans, brave men and women who served our country and fought for our freedoms, is downright deplorable and dangerous.
While Trump’s posts get more outrageous and damaging, we need to keep up the fight to hold him accountable to the rule of law. We need to stand up to these threats and support the brave veterans who serve in Congress.
And we need to do whatever the hell we can to put some checks on Trump’s power. **[Chip in to help me fight back against these threats from the president.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q42025_abs_em.dd-KUe&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20251125_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=9235%2E5257348%2EM5pE8o)**
[DONATE](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q42025_abs_em.dd-KUe&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20251125_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=6&akid=9235%2E5257348%2EM5pE8o)
---
More soon from me,
Adam
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q42025_abs_em.dd-KUe&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20251125_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=7&akid=9235%2E5257348%2EM5pE8o)

clean_body: | Derek — Donald Trump has been on another social media rampage — with very real, very dangerous consequences. In between posts about his favorite MAGA members of Congress, his football takes, and deranged AI-generated art — including the one below featuring me: Trump is once again projecting himself as King, and threatening his political enemies, with “justice” — another reference to his many abuses of the Justice Department. In fact, Donald Trump has been expanding his threats against Democratic members of Congress, including those speaking out against Trump’s abuses of power in the Department of Defense. He's threatening veterans like my colleagues Mark Kelly and Elissa Slotkin, accusing them of sedition and reposting calls for them to be hanged. Now, Pete Hegseth is drawing up a bogus investigation into Mark Kelly — adopting one of Trump’s favorite tactics to smear his rivals. These attacks have dangerous implications for our country and our democracy. Threatening members of Congress who don’t agree with you is egregious in and of itself and is directly pulled from the authoritarian playbook. Attacking veterans, brave men and women who served our country and fought for our freedoms, is downright deplorable and dangerous. While Trump’s posts get more outrageous and damaging, we need to keep up the fight to hold him accountable to the rule of law. We need to stand up to these threats and support the brave veterans who serve in Congress. And we need to do whatever the hell we can to put some checks on Trump’s power. More soon from me, Adam | | 135 E. Olive Ave., #750 Burbank CA, 91502 | mailto:contact@adamschiff.com | PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE Sign up to receive or . Text JOIN to 724433. name: The Turning Point USA Team
subject: His words are now our mission
body:
Charlie Kirk knew something long before the rest of America caught on.

| | |
---
Friend,Charlie Kirk knew something long before the rest of America caught on. That the next generation of young Americans were desperate for** ** truth... That the Left's grip on the culture wasn't as strong as it looked... And with boldness, hard work, and a focused strategy -- WE COULD WIN. Charlie didn't just talk about it. _He built a movement that's changed history._ **And long before he left us... he wrote ****_How We Win_**** -- the playbook that lays it all out.**
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zr7nbcao67vi32on79jpo9ebi02vkspduuq3bnk8_rp22sh2s8i6eor1c1ie9p71c5h2bs)
---
Today, Turning Point USA wants to send it to you for FREE when you make a gift of any amount to carry Charlie's mission forward.
---
[ **Make My Gift &**
**Claim My FREE Book**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zg7eiii10d77quf3jlro1mgjrlqtv7ilf8rnna90_rp22sh2s8i6eor1c1ie9p71c5h2bs)
---
Friend, this isn't just a book... **It 's the exact blueprint Charlie used to:** 🔥 Launch Turning Point USA chapters in all 50 states
🔥 Wake up more than 820,000 student activists
🔥 Inspire a historic generational shift toward FREEDOM Charlie saw it coming before anyone else did. He showed the world that the American Culture War wasn't lost. While the media said Gen Z was gone, Charlie believed in them. He met them face to face. On the campuses. At the rallies. In the fight. He proved the Left and the Fake News Media wrong. **He showed us HOW WE WIN.**
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9cechl6n9mnt536l3eqgkl5bh58af240dgl3gv0_rp22sh2s8i6eor1c1ie9p71c5h2bs)
---
Now it's up to us to finish what he started. You and I have the opportunity to carry his torch, reach the next student, change more hearts and minds, and save the future of America. _But we can't do it without grassroots patriots like you._ **_How We Win_**** is the game plan -- written in Charlie's words, forged in real fights, and ready to be handed to the next bold American who says "YES, I'll stand up."** Let that be you, Friend. This book isn't a political piece... It's not about playing games in the D.C. swamp... It's a blueprint for taking back our culture and rebuilding the foundations of this country. **Faith. Freedom. Family. Truth.** The Left is still attacking those values every single day. But now we have the roadmap to FIGHT BACK. Charlie didn't just write it -- he lived it. Every single day. [**Make your gift to join Turning Point USA today, and we'll send you your FREE copy of ****_How We Win_**** today.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsdnpet8i0e383nm67dco8ttvp0sa2lqtm1shmp8_rp22sh2s8i6eor1c1ie9p71c5h2bs)

---
Together, we can make sure his mission doesn't just survive... But that it multiplies. Let's keep the fire going. Let's honor Charlie's legacy. Let's win. **For Charlie,** **The Turning Point USA Team**
---

body:

Peter, before you delete this email, let us make our case: **[We only need 60 seconds of your time to request a dollar (that’s it) from your pocket.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97857?refcode=em20251125-9745&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=1&t=1&akid=9745%2E614464%2E761VEg)**

Meanwhile, far-right actors are already pouring millions of dollars into defeating Roy. _Experts say this could be the first Senate race in history to cost over a BILLION dollars._
This is the moment we HAVE to create a groundswell of grassroots support to turn the tide back in our favor, Peter, and your support is critical to our success. Showing your support by donating now could help change the course of this toss-up race.

**High school dropout. Waffle House waitress. First woman to graduate from The Citadel. Single mom. Fighter.** **Nancy Mace wasn’t born into power. She worked for every inch of ground she’s gained.** At 17, she dropped out of high school and took a job slinging hash browns at Waffle House to survive. No silver spoon. No Ivy League connections. Just grit, grace, and a whole lot of graveyard shifts. **By the grace of God, she turned that struggle into a story no politician can touch.** She made history as the first woman to graduate from The Citadel, South Carolina’s legendary military college. She built her own business. She raised two kids on her own. And when the Left came for everything she believed in, she stood her ground.Now, she’s running for Governor of South Carolina. Nancy Mace is a battle-tested conservative who’s walked through fire and come out swinging. In Congress, she’s been one of President Trump’s fiercest allies, fighting to secure our border, protect our daughters, and stop the Left’s sick agenda dead in its tracks. **She’s not here to make friends. She’s here to make history.** Nancy is fighting to:
* Eliminate South Carolina’s Income Tax—the highest in the Southeast
* Prosecute violent criminals and pedophiles with zero leniency
* Crack down on sanctuary sheriffs who let illegal aliens roam free
* Defund radical public universities that indoctrinate, not educate
* Reform education so students learn how to think—not what to think
* Work hand-in-hand with President Trump to put South Carolina FIRST

Through every hardship, Nancy never gave up. And now she’s ready to do what she’s always done: roll up her sleeves, take the heat, and lead from the front. **South Carolina is worth fighting for. And Nancy Mace is just getting started.**
---

Hi Peter,

My name is Diana Bula, and, as the newest Her Bold Move team member, I am writing to introduce myself! I’m thrilled to announce that I will officially be serving as Political Manager at this incredible organization – and I couldn’t be more honored or excited.

Women and girls everywhere deserve to see themselves reflected on the ballot and in positions of power. **Joining Her Bold Move enables me to contribute to the effort to ensure women’s voices are heard and protected.**

Here’s a little about me:

I am a Latina immigrant who believes that every woman deserves unrestricted access to reproductive health care. I grew up in Texas, which has given me a firsthand perspective into how difficult it has been for women, especially those in my community, to access basic, fundamental reproductive healthcare.

**As I set my vision for Her Bold Move’s endorsement roster, I want us to make sure we’re uplifting women who often go overlooked. These are the changemakers who step up not because it’s easy, but because their communities deserve a voice.**

I will be searching for trailblazers from communities that have long been underrepresented; women stepping into races where support is scarce but the need for leadership is greatest. Her Bold Move candidates have been shattering ceilings, making history, and becoming the first to hold positions where women, and particularly women of color, have never been represented before.

**These are the kinds of candidates who don’t just want to win an election; they want to change the world. And together, Her Bold Move will help them do just that.**

[**We have already started meeting with candidates for the 2026 elections, but we won’t be able to offer them the game-changing support they’ll need without your help. clean_body: I am so excited to join Her Bold Move!| | | | | = Hi Peter, My name is Diana Bula, and, as the newest Her Bold Move team member, I am writing to introduce myself! I’m thrilled to announce that I will officially be serving as Political Manager at this incredible organization – and I couldn’t be more honored or excited. Women and girls everywhere deserve to see themselves reflected on the ballot and in positions of power. Joining Her Bold Move enables me to contribute to the effort to ensure women’s voices are heard and protected. Here’s a little about me: I am a Latina immigrant who believes that every woman deserves unrestricted access to reproductive health care. I grew up in Texas, which has given me a firsthand perspective into how difficult it has been for women, especially those in my community, to access basic, fundamental reproductive healthcare. As I set my vision for Her Bold Move’s endorsement roster, I want us to make sure we’re uplifting women who often go overlooked. These are the changemakers who step up not because it’s easy, but because their communities deserve a voice. I will be searching for trailblazers from communities that have long been underrepresented; women stepping into races where support is scarce but the need for leadership is greatest. Her Bold Move candidates have been shattering ceilings, making history, and becoming the first to hold positions where women, and particularly women of color, have never been represented before. These are the kinds of candidates who don’t just want to win an election; they want to change the world. And together, Her Bold Move will help them do just that. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately: | | = | | = | = | | = | = | | = I am very grateful and humbled to be a part of Her Bold Move and this phenomenal work. name: Marsha Blackburn
subject: Should I assume we won’t hear back from you?
body:
Peter, is everything OK?

| | | | Peter, why have you been giving us the cold shoulder?
I know I’ve reached out this week about this issue.My team tells me they’ve texted and emailed at least twice too!
Is everything ok? Should we take the hint and assume you aren’t interested in these messages?
That would be truly shocking to me since you’ve always been such a steadfast supporter of mine and President Trump’s mission to save America, so I’m giving you one more chance!
[My ONLY request right now is that you complete the Official Trump Voter Profile before the end of the week.](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn.-ttt9Qh6Fu_Q) Really, that’s it! I just need your feedback, nothing more! | [ SUBMIT MY TRUMP VOTER PROFILE ](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn.)
---
You still have time, but not much, so I encourage you to complete your profile sooner rather than later! I’m also really starting to worry that we haven’t heard from you!

[Please, Peter, if you have a few minutes submit your Voter Profile before time expires!](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn.-NmkP6O6TYlpQ86Qg)

THANK YOU,
[](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn._yBYEHw)
Marsha Blackburn
[ SUBMIT MY TRUMP VOTER PROFILE ](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn._-cQy8wsrPPTWyU9f7Q)

name: Chris Taylor for Justice
subject: We can stop them, but it won’t be easy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Taylor for Justice
body:
Right-wing special interests poured millions of dollars into Pennsylvania trying to take control of the Pennsylvania Supreme Court.
# [](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/18?refcode=em20251125-848&t=1&akid=848%2E294397%2EsPAcdv)
Folks, this headline says it all:
[](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/31?c0=em_ms_jct_20251125_1_ak.2X80D3&amount=10&refcode=em20251125-848&t=3&akid=848%2E294397%2EsPAcdv)
Right-wing special interests poured _millions_ of dollars into Pennsylvania trying to take control of the Pennsylvania Supreme Court.
Despite their record-breaking spending, voters fought back and won. They protected the court’s liberal majority and kept it working for the people, not for powerful interests.
**Now, those same dark money groups are turning their attention to Wisconsin.**
They’ve handpicked Maria Lazar, our extreme opponent backed by election deniers and right-wing billionaires, and will spend whatever it takes to try and prevent Judge Chris Taylor from winning.
We _can_ stop them, but it won’t be easy. We must be ready for whatever they throw our way.
Every grassroots donation we raise today helps us fight back against right-wing special interests and build the campaign it will take to elect Judge Chris Taylor to the Wisconsin Supreme Court.
[**Can you chip in $10 to help us prepare before the holiday?**](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/31?c0=em_ms_jct_20251125_1_ak.2X80D3&amount=10&refcode=em20251125-848&t=4&akid=848%2E294397%2EsPAcdv)
**[Donate $10 ››](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/31?c0=em_ms_jct_20251125_1_ak.2X80D3&amount=10&refcode=em20251125-848&t=23&akid=848%2E294397%2EsPAcdv)**
Thank you,
Team Taylor
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_jct_footer?refcode=em20251125-848&t=24&refcode2=848_294397_sPAcdv&akid=848%2E294397%2EsPAcdv)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=25&akid=848%2E294397%2EsPAcdv)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=848%2E294397%2EsPAcdv)

Madison, WI 53701

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34711?t=1062&refcode=email-20251125_v&akid=9896%2E5885482%2EZ_0Rnl ]Our Revolution logo

Peter Willis,

🚨🚨Our Revolution is going ALL IN to take back a crucial House seat from
MAGA in a Tennessee special election, just ONE WEEK from today. 🚨🚨

We have the momentum to shatter MAGA’s grip on this gerrymandered district
and Trump’s world is quaking.

The Democratic nominee, Aftyn Behn, is a progressive state legislator Our
Revolution helped elect. Her opponent is a rubber stamp for Trump’s
far-right agenda. That’s why we’re organizing a massive push in these
crucial final days – talking to THOUSANDS of voters via text and by phone.
This could be the difference between victory or another MAGA holdout in
Congress.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34711?t=1108&amount=22&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&refcode=email-20251125nd&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9896%2E5885482%2EZ_0Rnl ]We have ONE WEEK to go – can you rush a donation to allow us to fire up
our GOTV machine in Tennessee to help WIN against Trump’s MAGA machine and
take back this TN House seat on December 2?

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.

Here’s what’s at stake: Congress is under MAGA control by a razor-thin,
five-seat margin. Every single seat counts — and after Democrats massive
electoral success earlier this month, this is a race we can WIN. But we
can’t let them out-organize us.

Aftyn is a progressive state representative and former healthcare
community organizer who has been called the "AOC of Tennessee." And her
message is clearly resonating with voters across Tennessee as MAGA money
floods into the race to try to stop her momentum.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34711?source=email-20251125&t=1111&akid=9896%2E5885482%2EZ_0Rnl ]Headline: TN-07 special election tightens as Aftyn Behn gains momentum
ahead of Dec. 2 vote

we’re outspent and drowned out by MAGA super PAC cash, none of that
matters.

The truth is that the way to defeat MAGA money is grassroots power. That’s

body:

name: Katie Hobbs
subject: I’m running
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Our work to keep moving Arizona forward has only just begun, and the stakes in this race are sky-high.
#

[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-hobbs-2025.m17H88&refcode=em251125-1-b&t=1&akid=11057%2E3935704%2EzhHt-k)
---
Team, it’s Governor Katie Hobbs. I asked Gabby if I could share some exciting news with you:
**I’m officially running for re-election as governor of Arizona.**
[**If you’re with me, will you split a donation between me and GIFFORDS PAC to become a Founding Donor of my re-election campaign? Political experts agree that this race is going to be a**pure toss-up** , and that means we can’t win this without you.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-hobbs-2025.m17H88&refcode=em251125-1-b&t=2&akid=11057%2E3935704%2EzhHt-k)
**[DONATE](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-hobbs-2025.m17H88&refcode=em251125-1-b&t=3&akid=11057%2E3935704%2EzhHt-k)**
I don’t have the story of a typical politician
[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-hobbs-2025.m17H88&refcode=em251125-1-b&t=4&akid=11057%2E3935704%2EzhHt-k)
I grew up in a working-class family in the heart of Tempe. When my dad was between jobs, my family relied on our church community and food stamps to get by.
I got my first job at 16, working at Burger King and then Pizza Hut to put myself through high school and college. My husband and I raised our kids through the Great Recession, experienced a home foreclosure, and we’re still paying off our student loans.
Even after I was elected to public office, I took a second job driving for Uber to make sure my kids had Christmas presents.
So when I say this work is personal to me, I mean it. I know deeply what it’s like to do whatever it takes to provide for your family.
**As governor, I’ve always pledged to fight just as hard every day for your family as I fought for mine – and that’s what I promise to keep doing when re-elected.**
Over the last three years, we’ve cut taxes for middle-class families, small businesses, and veterans. We lowered childcare costs so working parents aren’t saddled with yet another expense. We erased medical debt for more than 350,000 Arizonans.
_**But all our progress is on the line in this race.**_
Donald Trump and National Republicans have made the Arizona governor’s race one of their top targets to flip red in 2026, and they’re prepared to spend whatever it takes to do it. It’s why political experts at the _Cook Political Report_ , _Larry Sabato’s Crystal Ball_ , and _Inside Elections_ have already called this race a pure **toss-up.**
Unlike my THREE GOP opponents, I don’t have a vast personal fortune or far-right billionaires on speed dial. I have something far better: **You.**
[**So please: Split a donation between me and GIFFORDS PAC to become a Founding Donor of my re-election campaign. We won by less than 1% in 2022, and if we’re going to win one of the most competitive races in the country and keep moving Arizona forward, it’s going to take all of us.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-hobbs-2025.m17H88&refcode=em251125-1-b&t=5&akid=11057%2E3935704%2EzhHt-k)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly between Katie Hobbs and GIFFORDS:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-hobbs-2025.w173nQ&amount=3&refcode=em251125-1-b&t=24&akid=11057%2E3935704%2EzhHt-k)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://go.giffords.org/go/17017?c0=giffords-em-hobbs-2025.EHeCs4&refcode=em251125-1-b&t=25&akid=11057%2E3935704%2EzhHt-k)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://go.giffords.org/go/17010?c0=giffords-em-hobbs-2025.JofKnd&refcode=em251125-1-b&t=26&akid=11057%2E3935704%2EzhHt-k)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://go.giffords.org/go/17011?c0=giffords-em-hobbs-2025.hwjON3&refcode=em251125-1-b&t=27&akid=11057%2E3935704%2EzhHt-k)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://go.giffords.org/go/17012?c0=giffords-em-hobbs-2025.guB2TP&refcode=em251125-1-b&t=28&akid=11057%2E3935704%2EzhHt-k)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-hobbs-2025.w173nQ&refcode=em251125-1-b&t=29&akid=11057%2E3935704%2EzhHt-k)**
---
****
Let’s get to work!
— Katie

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=30&akid=11057%2E3935704%2EzhHt-k) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

The fluid building up in your legs is NOT in your bloodstream.

"drainage system" that no one's talking about.

The real problem is buried deep inside your body

It's a forgotten network most doctors ignore.

We call it your

Now, here's the good news...

A 32-year veteran holistic doctor has developed a breakthrough

name: Tim Walz
subject: I need you by my side
disclaimer_text: paid for by Walz for Governor
body:
#
Peter,
We are reaching the end of November and it’s time to show what our campaign is made of.
Since I announced that I was running for reelection, I’ve been humbled by the incredible outpouring of support from folks like you. Now we have to show that our strong start wasn’t just a fluke.
**But this isn’t going to be a cakewalk.** Several extremist Republicans have announced campaigns against me, actively seeking Donald Trump’s endorsement and threatening to tear apart all the progress we’ve made.
If we’re going to defeat these MAGA Republicans and keep moving forward as One Minnesota, we’re going to have to build on our strong start.
**My team has set a $50,000 fundraising goal for us to hit by the end of the month.** It’s an ambitious goal, but with you by my side, we haven’t missed one yet.
**[Will you chip in $5 or more today to make sure we’re able to keep up our momentum, defeat our extremist opponents, and continue to build on our One Minnesota?](https://act.timwalz.com/go/73?c0=em_tw_20251125.GVB4XN&amount=5&refcode=em20251125-164&t=1&akid=164%2E34582%2ECrD3Wk)**
**[Donate $5 ››](https://act.timwalz.com/go/73?c0=em_tw_20251125.GVB4XN&amount=5&refcode=20251125-164&t=20&akid=164%2E34582%2ECrD3Wk)**
I’m grateful,
Tim Walz

**[Donate ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_tw_footer?refcode=em20251125-164&t=21&refcode2=164_34582_CrD3Wk&akid=164%2E34582%2ECrD3Wk)**
---
[](https://timwalz4gov.org/JOIN)
Email us: [info@walzforgovernor.org](mailto:info@walzforgovernor.org)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.walzforgovernor.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.walzforgovernor.org/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=22&akid=164%2E34582%2ECrD3Wk)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.walzforgovernor.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=23&akid=164%2E34582%2ECrD3Wk)

Prepared and paid for by Walz for Governor
Tim Walz for Governor
P.O. Box 4337
St. Paul MN 55104
