name: Jon Ossoff
subject: We flipped Georgia when no one thought it was possible:
body:
---
Hey Derek, it’s Jon. I’m respectfully asking: [**Can you split a donation of $20 between my reelection campaign and the DNC today?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-ossoff-split-2025?refcode=em_20251125_5364_fr&amount=20&refcode2=5364_22930333_o9XGNh&akid=5364%2E22930333%2Eo9XGNh) Sorry to be so direct, but winning in 2026 is our only hope to regain Congressional power and reverse our ongoing descent toward one-man rule. | | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him.
---

[Watch it here >>>](https://links.main.yourcapitalminds.com/u/click?_t=affa6bfca09a497f86454ba803e6a9a2&_m=bf5878f42e654a89a0935f2c432d3128&_e=y5vx4dzgFWI9BR4n1dd05xPpsMhO1w-mmCV9TZzcnWMjlqldmyOKVXM-3BWWAW6KLgHDleT7rXDpHJHLvwJWMEr0n_QR2KBP07PPpp3FpmJkkXaGDOMp7wRYgbJHeUf7aSa7KMdIdqjM_mdHjmw3bOoU86m_CUOrUXnS7VmJMpuOWYvQVXazfEFiIHw5bjdEqkKWqFFFB0UgXIao-nqjqGjRKnQwdf6Sj_W7YRu7IOQPEJC3x0vMoulRVLKQI4vHwjuj4nlhIPZLpF8jga0NTQNDoJw2YNpbTbYkqDs4CzBmYSqGuq7E0BfDWhzyasCoYKx6i7C2Ms4h4vI6i2M2g3Xc2Z_zvpzJ8FbgtWG43ABTiY1evBy_TRHImHbozh5mVE8o49IM8nafDdMKZ3xDxTK2LBsA-7zSrEyDx0_-AA6wB2RkLdrlHsADSGWf35R0GPsOEiGoTLFvddcqXuGPEuW3B9BS2xWga3er3kXSmcibkuVq9u1p52XwJ2zYYutcuo-x_IAjrrG0tFJxhf4VvVurqA8OThTwbrw9RnYZYw_TxWYTicRa_waLLpjzkpvamkw4K6vqelWNpg6lr_V8fw%3D%3D)
Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675*, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671.

Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him. Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him. | | | I just saw footage that doesn’t feel real. A man cruising down the highway — hands nowhere near the wheel — just chilling with his laptop. No driver. No fear. Just confidence. And then... how I see technology’s next phase. You have to see this for yourself before it disappears. Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675*, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671. | | You are receiving this newsletter from Your Capital Minds (YCM), an esteemed member of the Stark Media LLC family. You see, we’re facing unified GOP efforts to defeat us — they’re already spending heavily against me, and experts expect that this race could become the first Senate election to ever cost a billion dollars or more. clean_body: Can I count on you? | = I’ll get right to the point, Peter — My team sets finance metrics that we have to hit each month to keep our campaign on track. Our goal is to raise $825,000 online in November, and with just five days left, we’re not where we need to be. = Now, I know that fundraising isn’t what’s going to be the only thing that will win this campaign, Peter. The real success comes from connecting with people and sharing our vision for this nation — a vision that can get us back on track. But your support now is what will let us make those critical connections here in North Carolina. You see, we’re facing unified GOP efforts to defeat us — they’re already spending heavily against me, and experts expect that this race could become the first Senate election to ever cost a billion dollars or more. That’s why the earlier your support comes in, the more of a difference you can make. A donation right here, right now — today — will go further than at any other point from here on out. Our team can plan our expenses more effectively with more time, putting your donation to the best use. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = = = Thanks so much, Roy Cooper = Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here. National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us. Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party. Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy. = = = mailto:info@roycooper.com | Cooper Victory Fund PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 Paid for by Cooper Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Cooper for North Carolina, DSCC, and North Carolina Democratic Party — Federal. name: Sarah Kline
subject: Re: Will you continue supporting volunteers like Eileen?
body:
Hello again,
Our volunteers like Eileen need your support! A gift to the OLCV PAC today will help ensure that we have the resources to recruit new volunteers like Eileen to knock on doors and talk to voters next year. That’s how we win elections, and we’re coming up on a big election year so we need your help. Will you make a gift now? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/5zGcLKjrckS5lWLLpIGsGA2]
Give now [https://secure.ngpvan.com/5zGcLKjrckS5lWLLpIGsGA2?am=20&amtOpts=&recurringAm=20&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&contactdata=2OXgzGlLH9hwnENQI9+XVmms0mfyxQYmSm3u9Y4KGdS9/+tGgVepsqH1Tqf1J2123l9xBXdjoBFePzQlInLmbbK4zyBbbcvwh/+nR45aFMz51DVOm/ABjo7bOehlVRLj]
With gratitude,
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AVLCV/1/70877/images/Sarah%20Signature.png]
Sarah Kline (she/they)
OLCV Communications & Membership Coordinator
P.S.: We are in the big push for end of year fundraising. If you would no longer like to receive emails related to end of year fundraising, please fill out this form here to opt-out [https://secure.everyaction.com/c2_U_ki-NEyU8Gdkttquug2] but still remain on our general email list!
https://secure.ngpvan.com/2aYH7oLMDUGCzowlqvcGrQ2?am=20&amtOpts=&recurringAm=20&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&contactdata=2OXgzGlLH9hwnENQI9+XVmms0mfyxQYmSm3u9Y4KGdS9/+tGgVepsqH1Tqf1J2123l9xBXdjoBFePzQlInLmbbK4zyBbbcvwh/+nR45aFMz51DVOm/ABjo7bOehlVRLj [https://secure.ngpvan.com/2aYH7oLMDUGCzowlqvcGrQ2?am=20&amtOpts=&recurringAm=20&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&contactdata=2OXgzGlLH9hwnENQI9+XVmms0mfyxQYmSm3u9Y4KGdS9/+tGgVepsqH1Tqf1J2123l9xBXdjoBFePzQlInLmbbK4zyBbbcvwh/+nR45aFMz51DVOm/ABjo7bOehlVRLj]
Hi Peter,
Did you know that you can use Oregon’s Political Tax Credit to make a gift to the OLCV PAC and get it back when you file your taxes? With Oregon’s Political Tax Credit, eligible tax-paying Oregonians can give $50 (individual) or $100 (couple filing jointly) to the OLCV PAC, as essentially a free donation. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/5zGcLKjrckS5lWLLpIGsGA2] Your donation will then go directly to recruiting volunteers to knock on doors and speak to voters about pro-climate and pro-environment candidates in 2026!
Give now [https://secure.ngpvan.com/5zGcLKjrckS5lWLLpIGsGA2?am=20&amtOpts=&recurringAm=20&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&contactdata=2OXgzGlLH9hwnENQI9+XVmms0mfyxQYmSm3u9Y4KGdS9/+tGgVepsqH1Tqf1J2123l9xBXdjoBFePzQlInLmbbK4zyBbbcvwh/+nR45aFMz51DVOm/ABjo7bOehlVRLj]
A gift to the OLCV PAC will allow us to continue supporting volunteers like Eileen Sleva, from Hillsboro, Oregon. Here’s her story:
I moved to Oregon in 2007 from Pennsylvania. An activist for the environment since Earth Day 1970, I was excited to live in a state that values the health or our earth. I quickly became aware that many people are apathetic when it comes to protecting our earth. Standing on street corners with signs, visiting my senators and representatives, writing letters and making telephone calls to legislators to create awareness of what we are doing to our mother earth became my passion. Eighteen years later and I am still at it. Now I have grandchildren and I grieve for their future. We cannot give up. We must continue to teach, preach and march for our earth. She is all we have.
If you agree with Eileen, please make a gift to the OLCV PAC to support our work! [https://secure.ngpvan.com/5zGcLKjrckS5lWLLpIGsGA2]
Give now [https://secure.ngpvan.com/5zGcLKjrckS5lWLLpIGsGA2?am=20&amtOpts=&recurringAm=20&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&contactdata=2OXgzGlLH9hwnENQI9+XVmms0mfyxQYmSm3u9Y4KGdS9/+tGgVepsqH1Tqf1J2123l9xBXdjoBFePzQlInLmbbK4zyBbbcvwh/+nR45aFMz51DVOm/ABjo7bOehlVRLj]
You’re eligible for Oregon’s Political Tax Credit if:
✔ You are an Oregon resident
✔ You will submit an Oregon tax return for 2025
✔ You make less than $75,000 (individual) or $150,000 (couple filing jointly)
We’re coming up on a critical election year for Oregon, so we’re building resources now to ensure we’ve got what it takes to win big in the upcoming election. That means we’ll need a lot of volunteers to help us elect new leaders next year who will fight for our climate and environment. Will you help by using your Political Tax Credit to donate to the OLCV PAC today? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/5zGcLKjrckS5lWLLpIGsGA2]
With gratitude,
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AVLCV/1/70877/images/Sarah%20Signature.png]
Sarah Kline (she/they)
OLCV Communications & Membership Coordinator
P.S.: We are in the big push for end of year fundraising. If you would no longer like to receive emails related to end of year fundraising, please fill out this form here to opt-out [https://secure.everyaction.com/c2_U_ki-NEyU8Gdkttquug2] but still remain on our general email list!
https://www.facebook.com/oregonlcv [https://www.facebook.com/oregonlcv] https://bsky.app/profile/olcv.org [https://bsky.app/profile/olcv.org] https://www.instagram.com/olcv/?next=%2F [https://www.instagram.com/olcv/?next=%2F] https://x.com/OLCV [https://x.com/OLCV]

Oregon League of Conservation Voters
1110 SE Alder Suite 220
Portland, OR 97214
United States

8 Mind-Blowing Health Benefits of Gratitude We're Thankful For

Gratitude is more than politeness. It’s something of a superpower released with simple words and gestures, generous thoughts, and
prayers of thanksgiving. We now know that grateful people reap significant benefits across almost every aspect of life.

It seems too simple. But science has revealed that thankful living can improve a person’s health, mentally and physically, their
relationships, stress levels, ability to cope, and overcome, even adding to longevity. It increases the instinct to care for
others, and not so surprisingly, can help us grow in our faith.

Family meals are not as common as they used to be. We know they are important, but it can be hard to find the time. Ken and Linda
Koldenhoven joined the Moms for America Podcast with tips and encouragement for making family meals a priority. Their book
"Connecting Around the Table: Discover the Power of Eating Together as a Family" offers practical solutions for today's parents.
You will come away from the conversation empowered to grow closer as a family. Like, subscribe and share.

clean_body: Saying thank you is so much more than an old-fashioned habit. It is a life-giving practice with far-ranging health benefits. If you are having trouble viewing this email click here to view in your browser. [] [] [] November 25, 2025 • Newsletter Moms for America Weekly Blog [] [] 8 Mind-Blowing Health Benefits of Gratitude We're Thankful For Gratitude is more than politeness. It’s something of a superpower released with simple words and gestures, generous thoughts, and prayers of thanksgiving. We now know that grateful people reap significant benefits across almost every aspect of life. It seems too simple. But science has revealed that thankful living can improve a person’s health, mentally and physically, their relationships, stress levels, ability to cope, and overcome, even adding to longevity. It increases the instinct to care for others, and not so surprisingly, can help us grow in our faith. Read the Blog [] The Importance of Family Meals Moms for America Weekly Podcast [] [] Moms for America Weekly Podcast [] Family meals are not as common as they used to be. We know they are important, but it can be hard to find the time. Ken and Linda Koldenhoven joined the Moms for America Podcast with tips and encouragement for making family meals a priority. Their book "Connecting Around the Table: Discover the Power of Eating Together as a Family" offers practical solutions for today's parents. You will come away from the conversation empowered to grow closer as a family. Like, subscribe and share. View the Podcast [] Listen to the Podcast [] Listen to the Podcast on Spotify [] [] In Truth & Liberty, Kimberly Fletcher Founder and President Moms for America® [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] Copyright © 2025 Moms for America, All rights reserved. Our mailing address is: Moms for America 1440 State HWY 248, Suite Q304 Branson, MO 65616 Visit our Website [] Visit our Store [] Visit us on Truth Social [] DONATE TODAY []

name: TN House Democratic Caucus
subject: No Tennessean should go hungry because of politics
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Tennessee House Democratic Caucus, Ronnie Glynn, Treasurer_
body:
Families across Tennessee are vulnerable without food assistance. And Republicans don’t care.
| | | | Can't see this email? [View in Your Browser](https://ctrk.klclick.com/l/01KAXV4X3VN8672RTDMCE55J8D_0)
---
| | | [ ](https://ctrk.klclick.com/l/01KAXV4X3VN8672RTDMCE55J8D_1)
---
| | | | | [ ](https://ctrk.klclick.com/l/01KAXV4X3VN8672RTDMCE55J8D_2)
---
| Dear Peter, As we approach Thanksgiving, a time when families across Tennessee gather to share a meal and give thanks, it's heartbreaking to consider that more than 700,000 of our neighbors across the state face food insecurity. **This reality was painfully clear over the past month as SNAP benefits were frozen.**

Hundreds of thousands of parents, seniors, and children across our state were at risk of going hungry because elected leaders in Washington and Nashville lack empathy and refused to consider the real life challenges of Tennessee’s working families.

This catastrophe was not an accident. It was a choice. While Republicans protect tax breaks for the wealthiest individuals and corporations, Tennessee families were left wondering how they'd put food on their table - not just at Thanksgiving, but every day.

**Tennessee House Democrats are standing up for our neighbors. We are fighting to ensure that no Tennessean goes hungry and that every family has the support they need to thrive.** We believe that in a state as great as ours, no one should have to choose between paying bills and feeding their family.

But we need your help to keep up this fight.
---
| | [ Chip in to build a state that never lets its people go hungry. ](https://ctrk.klclick.com/l/01KAXV4X3VN8672RTDMCE55J8D_3)
---
| | | |
---
| _Paid for by the Tennessee House Democratic Caucus, Ronnie Glynn, Treasurer_

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119959372/584789635/-165121341?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_trumpnews_251125_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YmU3NTM3ZS0xN2NhLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7K6AYLKnckKC9nfnjGuMLtEH_f19gu1tuWSqndeEHac=) Derek,

**When are Republicans in Congress going to grow a spine to call out Trump’s dangerous words and actions?**

Last week, Donald Trump said a group of my Democratic colleagues – _who simply encouraged servicemembers to follow the law_ – should be put to death.

Now Pete Hegseth’s Defense Department has opened an investigation into Senator Mark Kelly.

Even in the face of such egregious words and actions by this administration, my Republican colleagues have largely remained silent.

Frankly, it’s more important than ever that we flip the balance of power in the Senate, so we have the votes we need to hold this administration accountable.

[_**And I need you to join me in this effort. If you’re in a position to donate today, I am asking you to chip in to hold the line in Virginia and flip the Senate blue.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119959375/584789672/-165121341?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_trumpnews_251125_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YmU3NTM3ZS0xN2NhLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7K6AYLKnckKC9nfnjGuMLtEH_f19gu1tuWSqndeEHac=) ********[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119959377/584789691/-165121341?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_trumpnews_251125_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YmU3NTM3ZS0xN2NhLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7K6AYLKnckKC9nfnjGuMLtEH_f19gu1tuWSqndeEHac=)******** Let’s be clear: Violence has NO place in our politics.

Trump and Hegseth’s actions should alarm every single American. Seriously, if there is any moment to stand up to Trump, that moment is now.

Thank you,

Mark Warner **Before you go:**

Republicans will spend whatever it takes to hold onto power, no matter how unpopular their agenda is with voters.

**And they know that there’s no Senate majority for Democrats without Virginia.**

[_**Will you consider a contribution today as an early investment in the campaign infrastructure we're building to reelect Mark Warner and flip control of Congress? Your donation today will have a much bigger impact than a donation of the same amount made right before the midterm elections.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119959379/584789726/-165121341?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_trumpnews_251125_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YmU3NTM3ZS0xN2NhLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7K6AYLKnckKC9nfnjGuMLtEH_f19gu1tuWSqndeEHac=)**__********[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119959381/584789734/-165121341?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_trumpnews_251125_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YmU3NTM3ZS0xN2NhLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7K6AYLKnckKC9nfnjGuMLtEH_f19gu1tuWSqndeEHac=)**********

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119960659/584793682/-1787004069?refcode=header&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDAzNTUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTQ4ZGM0ZDItMTdjYS1mMDExLTgxOTYtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=_qeAP10esxRhzE0DbemrvUi1M27bIVDFMfKG1Yf77ns=) | **Steve has been clear: Protecting Minnesota’s elections means preparing for every scenario, even the ones we hope never happen.** The federal government refuses to say it won’t interfere in the 2026 elections. That alone requires vigilance. Meanwhile, we’re still fighting the DOJ’s lawsuit demanding personal data on millions of Minnesota voters. We’re still countering disinformation. And we’re still watching federal agencies weaken their own election-security units. This moment demands strength, organization, and resources. **[We’re closing in on our November end-of-month fundraising deadline, and we need to raise $7,500 to stay competitive after an opponent entered the race. subject: My Service Still Guides Me, And This Deadline Does Too.
body:
I served this country once — now I'm fighting for it again.
| | |
---
| | [](https://xbdizvxp.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Freeves-for-senate%2Fnov-eom-2%3Futm_campaign=20251124_Reeves_NovEOM2%26utm_id=CE%26utm_medium=email%26utm_source=ac/1/0100019abbc05f37-f993c73b-c03e-4167-83a2-0faeecdbeab4-000000/M0J8hidh-w-ozgaUbvhRb_8RNj0=454)
---
| |
---
| Peter, Before I ever entered politics, I served this country in uniform – and that experience still defines the way I lead today. **The Army taught me discipline, accountability, and to put mission above ego and country above politics.** Washington doesn't operate that way anymore. _Too many Senators treat public office like a career –**not a calling.**_ _Too many decisions are driven by party bosses –**not the people.**_ _Too many leaders have forgotten what**service actually means.**_ I didn't wear the uniform to let Washington become a place where integrity comes last. **And that 's why this Senate race, and this week's end-of-month deadline, matters so much.**
---
| | [CRUSH OUR END-OF-MONTH DEADLINE](https://xbdizvxp.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Freeves-for-senate%2Fnov-eom-1%3Futm_campaign=20251124_Reeves_NovEOM1%26utm_id=CE%26utm_medium=email%26utm_source=ac/1/0100019abbc05f37-f993c73b-c03e-4167-83a2-0faeecdbeab4-000000/Rvpf6QNribWr2L206UACYuqPbAo=454)
---
| When I talk about fighting for military and veteran families, it isn't a talking point. **It 's personal. It's how I was raised – and it's what I lived.** They deserve leaders who understand sacrifice, not politicians who've never served a day in their lives. **And I can only continue building the campaign we need if I hit our end-of-month goal before midnight on November 30th.** If you want a Senate that remembers what service, duty, and honor look like – I'm asking you to stand with me. [** _Help me win this race. Help me restore integrity to Washington. Help me fight for the people who serve our country every day. >>>_**](https://xbdizvxp.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Freeves-for-senate%2Fnov-eom-1%3Futm_campaign=20251124_Reeves_NovEOM1%26utm_id=CE%26utm_medium=email%26utm_source=ac/2/0100019abbc05f37-f993c73b-c03e-4167-83a2-0faeecdbeab4-000000/aFNib_XaB1VoUxh0hjb1xXJtQN8=454)

---

name: EMILYs List
subject: We need to be honest about where things stand
body:
Our $20k per day goal → |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119961335/584795543/-1510725204?sourceid=1057377&refcode=WUEFEK61_20251125_NovText_PL_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOWZjMjdlYi0xN2NhLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=T2LH4yGChnmtZzbgf93hHEevntD7x5Yt1No26MsgGfE=) Peter, we need to be honest about where things stand.

We're falling behind this month, and we need to raise $20,000 every single day for the rest of November in order to hit our End-of-Month goal.

If we don’t close this gap soon, we risk not being able to invest early in our candidates’ campaigns, which is the very premise of our work here at EMILYs List. [**So, please, will you donate now to help us raise $20,000 before midnight tonight?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119961340/584795548/-1510725204?sourceid=1057377&refcode=WUEFEK61_20251125_NovText_PL_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOWZjMjdlYi0xN2NhLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=T2LH4yGChnmtZzbgf93hHEevntD7x5Yt1No26MsgGfE=) | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119961344/584795552/-1403821653?sourceid=1057377&refcode=WUEFEK61_20251125_NovText_PL_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOWZjMjdlYi0xN2NhLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=T2LH4yGChnmtZzbgf93hHEevntD7x5Yt1No26MsgGfE=)
---
Right now, anti-choice Republicans are already plotting their strategy for 2026. They're recruiting candidates, building war chests, and targeting the Democratic women who stand in their way. And they're counting on us to fall short.

We can’t prove them right.

EMILYs List has been electing Democratic pro-choice women for 40 years — and in that time, we've learned something critical: **Early money makes all the difference.** The resources we raise right now will determine whether we win in 2026.

This deadline isn't arbitrary. It's a real measure of whether we'll have the resources to fight back when it matters most.

[**Will you donate now at this critical juncture to help hit our November fundraising goal?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119961348/584795583/-1510725204?sourceid=1057377&refcode=WUEFEK61_20251125_NovText_PL_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOWZjMjdlYi0xN2NhLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=T2LH4yGChnmtZzbgf93hHEevntD7x5Yt1No26MsgGfE=)

clean_body: Our $20k per day goal → | = Peter, we need to be honest about where things stand. We're falling behind this month, and we need to raise $20,000 every single day for the rest of November in order to hit our End-of-Month goal. If we don’t close this gap soon, we risk not being able to invest early in our candidates’ campaigns, which is the very premise of our work here at EMILYs List. = | = Right now, anti-choice Republicans are already plotting their strategy for 2026. They're recruiting candidates, building war chests, and targeting the Democratic women who stand in their way. And they're counting on us to fall short. We can’t prove them right. EMILYs List has been electing Democratic pro-choice women for 40 years — and in that time, we've learned something critical: Early money makes all the difference. The resources we raise right now will determine whether we win in 2026. This deadline isn't arbitrary. It's a real measure of whether we'll have the resources to fight back when it matters most. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you for your support, the EMILYs List team = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. name: Voter Action Project
subject: Stunning assault on voters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
CBS: Experts warn the proposed SAVE Act could make it harder for some married women to vote. Here's who could be affected. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=112525_1&amount=25]
The SAVE Act was fast-tracked by opponents of voting rights and passed the U.S. House of Representatives. This bill is a stunning assault on our fundamental right to vote, and we can not afford to let this anti-democratic legislation become law, folks.
Don’t be fooled by the name. This bill would force every voter to present proof of citizenship to register -- something millions of eligible Americans don’t have on hand. And that’s the point.
PITCH IN $25 RIGHT NOW TO STOP THE SAVE ACT NOW ➜ [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=112525_1&amount=25]
The bill would also obliterate popular methods of voter registration for all voters, including:
* Registration by mail

* 3rd party voter registration drives

* Online voter registration in states that allow it

* Automatic voter registration
Some estimates say that this bill could disenfranchise up to 11 million eligible Americans , especially women and those who live in under-resourced communities.
“ There’s never been an attack on voting rights out of Congress like this ,” said Alexander Keyssar, a professor of History and Social Policy at the Harvard Kennedy School, and a leading historian of voting rights. “ It’s always been the federal government trying to keep states in check on voting rights, for the most part. ”
Team, the consequences of a bill like this passing would be catastrophic for our democracy. Chip in with $25 or whatever you can today to stop the SAVE Act and other voter suppression bills from becoming law >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=112525_1&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=112525_1&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=112525_1&amount=20]

clean_body: Voter Action Project [] CBS: Experts warn the proposed SAVE Act could make it harder for some married women to vote. Here's who could be affected. [] The SAVE Act was fast-tracked by opponents of voting rights and passed the U.S. House of Representatives. This bill is a stunning assault on our fundamental right to vote, and we can not afford to let this anti-democratic legislation become law, folks. Don’t be fooled by the name. This bill would force every voter to present proof of citizenship to register -- something millions of eligible Americans don’t have on hand. And that’s the point. PITCH IN $25 RIGHT NOW TO STOP THE SAVE ACT NOW ➜ [] The bill would also obliterate popular methods of voter registration for all voters, including: Registration by mail 3rd party voter registration drives Online voter registration in states that allow it Automatic voter registration Some estimates say that this bill could disenfranchise up to 11 million eligible Americans , especially women and those who live in under-resourced communities. “ There’s never been an attack on voting rights out of Congress like this ,” said Alexander Keyssar, a professor of History and Social Policy at the Harvard Kennedy School, and a leading historian of voting rights. “ It’s always been the federal government trying to keep states in check on voting rights, for the most part. ” Team, the consequences of a bill like this passing would be catastrophic for our democracy. Chip in with $25 or whatever you can today to stop the SAVE Act and other voter suppression bills from becoming law >> [] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [] OTHER AMOUNT [] [] [] [] [] [] Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country. Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? Los Angeles, like Phoenix, has been an epicenter of abuse and brutal ICE activity: family separations, inhumane detention, and mass deportations. Under current Republican leadership, Congress has neglected to do its duty to hold the Trump administration accountable. That’s why Oversight Democrats aren’t backing down. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thanks for being a part of this. name: Tom Barrett
subject: The Furries Are Coming for Me…
body:
A self-proclaimed “furry” is running against me - as a furry. | | | [](https://p9t2.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=6925d2ef05b37d0fb08b9fec&u=https%3A%2F%2Ftombarrettforcongress.com%2F%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D692594c97cd94132d483c10a%26ss_email_id%3D6925d2ef05b37d0fb08b9fec%26ss_campaign_name%3DThe%2BFurries%2BAre%2BComing%2Bfor%2BMe%25E2%2580%25A6%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2025-11-25T16%253A13%253A10Z&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&c=b_692594c97cd94132d483c10a&l=en-US&s=L952H7i48mtnyHX9i6VwiW28ViU%3D)
---
| Peter Willis, I’d heard of furries, but to be honest, I didn’t think they were real.Then one filed to run against me for Congress.
---
|
---
| [](https://p9t2.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=6925d2ef05b37d0fb08b9fec&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.bark.us%2Fblog%2Fwhat-is-a-furry%2F%3Fsrsltid%3DAfmBOooh8rde-6EosBVvjTYBQMNX6L-_VxANalA1yI2D-4i2idEEk11P&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&c=b_692594c97cd94132d483c10a&l=en-US&s=CNneylv-kVrd6QTDGasBAyRhDEE%3D)
---
|
---
[_ _**Stop the Furries** _ _](https://p9t2.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=6925d2ef05b37d0fb08b9fec&u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Ftom-barrett-for-congress%2Ffurries-are-coming&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&c=b_692594c97cd94132d483c10a&l=en-US&s=wx2Njf6VXB4bvz1izLltIhEmylQ%3D)
---
Samuel Smeltzer, whose furry name is Elyon Badger, announced he’s running against me, in costume, on a far left progressive platform.
---
|
---
| [](https://p9t2.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=6925d2ef05b37d0fb08b9fec&u=https%3A%2F%2Fpridesource.com%2Farticle%2Felyon-badger&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&c=b_692594c97cd94132d483c10a&l=en-US&s=qh3ZGkmLgu7PFK3-mdm0nTJHYvA%3D)
---
|
---
[_ _**Stand with Tom** _ _](https://p9t2.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=6925d2ef05b37d0fb08b9fec&u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Ftom-barrett-for-congress%2Ffurries-are-coming&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&c=b_692594c97cd94132d483c10a&l=en-US&s=wx2Njf6VXB4bvz1izLltIhEmylQ%3D)
---
On a serious note, Elyon isn’t much of a threat. But his Democratic primary opponents are and that’s why I need your help.National Democrats have recruited multiple top tier candidates, including two Deep State liberals, and a progressive activist...
* Bridget Brink - President Biden’s Ambassador to Ukraine, who has never lived in the 7th District and mentioned Ukraine seven times in her announcement video before she mentioned Michigan.
* Matt Masdaam - A former military aide to President Obama, who has also never lived in the 7th District - and still doesn’t! He’s from Nebraska and openly admits he picked the 7th because it is a “bellwether district.”
* William Lawrence - a far left progressive activist whose campaign has largely consisted of organizing protests outside my office and harassing my staff - but at least he’s actually from the 7th District!

---
| | | | |
---|---|---|---|---
[_ _**Drain the Swamp** _ _](https://p9t2.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=6925d2ef05b37d0fb08b9fec&u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Ftom-barrett-for-congress%2Ffurries-are-coming&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&c=b_692594c97cd94132d483c10a&l=en-US&s=wx2Njf6VXB4bvz1izLltIhEmylQ%3D)
---
I was one of just five Republicans to flip a Democratic seat in 2024 and now I am a top target of national Democrats.Dark money groups have already spent more than $3 million against me while my opponents have raised more than $2 million combined.New polling shows two of my opponents with a narrow lead just one year before the election.My 2024 race cost $40 million and cemented our House majority. My 2026 will cost even more and that’s why I need your help.
---
[_ _**Defend Our Majority** _ _](https://p9t2.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=6925d2ef05b37d0fb08b9fec&u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Ftom-barrett-for-congress%2Ffurries-are-coming&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&c=b_692594c97cd94132d483c10a&l=en-US&s=wx2Njf6VXB4bvz1izLltIhEmylQ%3D)
---
Furries aside, this is serious business and national Democrats are pulling out all the stops to defeat me. I hope I can count on your support.
---
|
---
|
---
| [](https://p9t2.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=6925d2ef05b37d0fb08b9fec&u=https%3A%2F%2Ftombarrettforcongress.com%2F%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D692594c97cd94132d483c10a%26ss_email_id%3D6925d2ef05b37d0fb08b9fec%26ss_campaign_name%3DThe%2BFurries%2BAre%2BComing%2Bfor%2BMe%25E2%2580%25A6%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2025-11-25T16%253A13%253A10Z&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&c=b_692594c97cd94132d483c10a&l=en-US&s=L952H7i48mtnyHX9i6VwiW28ViU%3D) | [ ](https://p9t2.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=6925d2ef05b37d0fb08b9fec&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.instagram.com%2FtombarrettMI7&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&c=b_692594c97cd94132d483c10a&l=en-US&s=vcIgJF7K6Umu1rFjh4CUbV7amK4%3D) | | [ ](https://p9t2.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=6925d2ef05b37d0fb08b9fec&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Ftombarrettmi7&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&c=b_692594c97cd94132d483c10a&l=en-US&s=FwzWciafpcPld1K48AmOZGHnMBc%3D) | | [ ](https://p9t2.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=6925d2ef05b37d0fb08b9fec&u=https%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2Ftombarrettmi7&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&c=b_692594c97cd94132d483c10a&l=en-US&s=nvuQ88JnR-9ihUEFmD7feDvvzf8%3D) | | [ ](mailto:campaign@tombarrettforcongress.com) | | [ ](https://p9t2.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=6925d2ef05b37d0fb08b9fec&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Fin%2Ftombarrettmi7%2F&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&c=b_692594c97cd94132d483c10a&l=en-US&s=GajnojUpWGrjjLxaEjwY-0H07gQ%3D)

Friend,

Fellow American - I'll make this quick because I know you're busy...

We are just days away from the end of November, and we haven't hit our monthly digital goal.

[**HELP US CATCH UP →**](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=385e427d9f3a43edad3b70d55f4ccf3f&_e=Oh3UlrKdFLqz6PwExQwbeXXjl7QPm6QsgvhSFcoss-mvH5COJL34OSFjIyoLQKcXpV4RHpcbDA03trYv5JQA7OOqycbCxvE-79YZCAZ1SHeg3VkDxHUp8mu4fWMwKEAMCO_Z3btrxCR8dWA2E99X8egbZaHEb8mtx8iEHlh3yrxpVSSG0xjDiX41F3egrTJFUCW0XHsyANqku77tltamMgiQDA3hnHas1Biq4EDBRyi6cYfQPkWClGtP7eOkjfJhE4MtPtmpTJvyll5k6F-vdMrRs7W_cKkFN014XsmiCE5pHQBxZSnXQaYBBIhzGJhAqzUTGZnpdy1q9QBPIAIceNtKqHKZXnooA0WVeiAqCPaUQ1WAIne37kkQyfj3cMqLCm8HeTzSWXZLuOh5XrPbrXOHLwSiZrx3hVUEO4JwwLafKS1kmRGHzeaj0tAAGwDcRYA5zQzjfN3f74n-jhIi9VpvaBP2elKcXlgsGWvQ2Ujp3Fx5dNo9ieR9HqFiGdG691Y4yWHG22SXn5QhkNtMcE_kwNoRV1KFMC-MTw0fX0eU039804UtO5tAGbmRvWMlT-7Dx_b9DCBhVcbSPJGyJwioMB8VV2havFWq4gZd7feklp4-VyQo94NZpJklfpuENYxQgAiuSni9FKBv5jZhWhYVAGFWOWJdrBpG5QstiIA3HDr9V1x-LlzimpmzBVDfPHE1n52lG2eMfHSond5fq2T5Sfa5uimBA-Rte1MxqRNN9UprutclnKo3rnIdT1xfvcS0MFqaNUC2nvWOuBIWvQ%3D%3D)
Here's the thing, Fellow American - with Thanksgiving falling so late this year, we only have three days after the holiday to close the books on the month. With travel, spending time with friends and family, I figured I would reach out early this month.

I don't want to bug you, so here it goes...

Steve Daines is a fifth-generation Montanan, life-long sportsman and father of four serving the people of Montana as their Senator. Steve is committed to always putting Montana first as he works to bring real change to Washington and fights for more jobs, less government and common sense solutions to get our country back on track. clean_body: I don't want to bug you, but I have to ask... | Fellow American - I'll make this quick because I know you're busy... We are just days away from the end of November, and we haven't hit our monthly digital goal. Here's the thing, Fellow American - with Thanksgiving falling so late this year, we only have three days after the holiday to close the books on the month. With travel, spending time with friends and family, I figured I would reach out early this month. I don't want to bug you, so here it goes... Thanks, Steve Daines Steve Daines is a fifth-generation Montanan, life-long sportsman and father of four serving the people of Montana as their Senator. Steve is committed to always putting Montana first as he works to bring real change to Washington and fights for more jobs, less government and common sense solutions to get our country back on track. Senator Steve Daines - | | Paid for by Steve Daines for Montana

name: Justin Streiff, Turning Point USA
subject: ANTIFA tried to break us at Berkeley...
body:
The Left wanted empty seats. We filled every one.| | | [](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=76130e4b27a84200a91102f1ea0ab2e4&_e=V9sQAatOp4lZEvc7b3vIdIOPD-72VWJ5QsBbH0hV_WrZyNYNDxEO_MAJlubKL88m0yBXrvp9yl3SPyo4DSb8uXgqK2OOseOaOe-S0F7Kfb9cD47XKbJBRb9mUY5Blu0KJnjsk9JKW4aJGEASr0Hq87U0obfCgihXcNIdiUDZIgZXw3NYfATxUHVZR9uhABDHIov20BhWc6MjRX1WuxAtFmUJ39dsITnp2asDy8Qgiwz22vt6Plvfxh-5nuMf2noo0-r1ZN3N5SGqFSbqJzW9TeHrsu2Whss8GIu7mPLpxMmWT3tbA0vHmLrFj6HmFYmNGqVmb1iIMABxnl1gPjUMjo22XpYIIyRPfVLgXl3q2uIYgrl5rB1_kJ-6STNkXjn1vwqaMOoyeRIiLHgf_rc0t39abcNC8w_TzFg3xgI8_qOpIbPmJmX0BLeLt2LmalR165OgMH9j438QdMTaeHGHtw_zgUn7rIRlOn6sD06WdEyplsgLkL-tkVSIH52WSaOHpCjoxV_N088rOH8o38sDNR1u7Aun7LHMVuflizFIzOWZ1IWm7TQGqUGYRgS4PWAEgnBtGqv8nw7xapnsZNdSC8-Asqw2TqPLkNVfd1CStyaC0pt4gHesyzKt7BdN9GT1SJTb99YyZgm9iVI0a32jFQs5FsGfmkXa1tzwfXoHZvc%3D)
---
Friend,They tried to break us. At UC Berkeley -- one of the most hostile, left-wing campuses in America -- ANTIFA tried to shut down our final campus tour stop of 2025.They showed up hours early. Wearing masks. Lighting flares and smoke bombs. Throwing paint and glass bottles at attendees. Waving Mexican and rainbow flags. They mocked Charlie's assassination... pointing to their own necks where he was shot. They chanted: _" F*** Charlie Kirk"... "No safe space for fascist scum"... "Fascists out of Berkeley."_ And they rushed police barricades, hoping to break through and disrupt our final campus tour stop of the semester.
---
[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=76130e4b27a84200a91102f1ea0ab2e4&_e=V9sQAatOp4lZEvc7b3vIdIOPD-72VWJ5QsBbH0hV_WrZyNYNDxEO_MAJlubKL88m0yBXrvp9yl3SPyo4DSb8uXgqK2OOseOaOe-S0F7Kfb9cD47XKbJBRb9mUY5Blu0KJnjsk9JKW4aJGEASr0Hq87U0obfCgihXcNIdiUDZIgZXw3NYfATxUHVZR9uhABDHIov20BhWc6MjRX1WuxAtFmUJ39dsITnp2asDy8Qgiwzh46UvAMtblBSIDzwJ29hDpWoU9g-FPMtKQLfipn_b2BqZ0iIW-x3JIybT_S3_yvCIQbR04U80_JBfvLUC2kgOVEfUTS2q6MMHtWymhVwO-WGCrnFmNPmIuNDbRrNT86YwNJlQcqH1SrytceOG0P6LJJrj3mo-5uvhFQolrJ5mHdQ13aWNwnA8ee-PlZmHSZJ9AqHY2qrauK93HT_m2Dos4t3aZJC1cno7wJm3hOm80T4pLZ6Dmu6HFicEK6UKETGzyKwSSdNMtkbYbLhFBoYiXO6RGCUyrRPEmgrDA5t77eMbX6LgmyU7gqoSjyn9mhXHkbUyhtsPIifpmNB8AyLL0Nx5T3gWH9K6g3IgMaLFl3kHqpzqJmt8Vokfq9Pg7sbincqOQG1cyzXOcIZQwzmDUfudAzVkXJrG71YdguOVl-Fo3GlSY81DmbZpyufKKyU%3D)
---
ANTIFA surrounded the venue, blocking every entrance. Even after our students and attendees were leaving, ANTIFA located their exit and continued to meet them with violence. The mob swarmed every student, speaker, and parent who came to hear a message of faith, family, and freedom. A mother holding her two daughters was forced to push through a wall of protesters screaming profanity in her children's faces. Another attendee, blood dripping from his brow, was pulled to safety after being struck in the chaos outside the event. These out-of-control Leftists weren't satisfied with merely being heard in protest --_They wanted to pick a fight._ Police made multiple arrests. **UC Berkeley, a so-called "bastion" of free speech, turned into a war zone.**
---

name: Haley Stevens
subject: I'm not trying to be alarmist, but here's the truth
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
this is an important moment for us

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=1466%2E49239%2EVuKFEs)

---
Null, I just got out of an emergency meeting with my finance team, and I need to be honest with you:
**Fundraising has been brutally slow this month.** We’re pacing well behind where we need to be for November, and with GOP megadonors already flooding this race with dark money, we cannot afford to fall short.
That’s why we’ve set an urgent $100,000 goal before Thanksgiving. I know. It’s ambitious, but it's necessary. **[Will you rush $5 right now to help us hit this goal and keep Michigan blue?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/9408?t=3&akid=1466%2E49239%2EVuKFEs)**
| | [Donate](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/9413?t=4&akid=1466%2E49239%2EVuKFEs)
---
I don’t mean to sound alarmist, but I do want to be clear: **This is one of the most important moments our campaign has faced so far.** MAGA Republicans are circling this seat. And if we fall behind now, I’m worried we won’t have the resources to fight back.
So I’m personally asking: **[Will you chip in $5 or whatever you can afford so we can hit this goal, stay on track, and win this race?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/9408?t=5&akid=1466%2E49239%2EVuKFEs)**
_Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue._ | | | [Donate $5](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/9408?t=6&akid=1466%2E49239%2EVuKFEs)

Haley
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/9416?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=10&akid=1466%2E49239%2EVuKFEs) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/9407?t=11&akid=1466%2E49239%2EVuKFEs)

Thank you,
Haley

Dave Jacobson here, one of Tony's campaign consultants, with some BIG news!
We’re fresh out of the field with a poll conducted by the nationally respected firm Lake Research.
It’s among the first polls publicly released that reflect the latest field of new entrants into the race. While we start out in single digits — the poll shows Tony’s message works — and once voters hear it — he’s tied for first place among the Democratic candidates.
It’s clear that Tony’s plans to raise taxes on mega-millionaires and billionaires — those worth $100 million and more to pay for public services like healthcare and public schools, childcare, fire fighting, higher education and more — resonates with voters.
The poll also shows that Tony’s record of fighting back against Donald Trump and his vision for single-payer, guaranteed healthcare for all, has broad appeal with California’s electorate.
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/75524F63322B386470424B692B4C503568754B417A4D6577335A5832453441654656397770493062635A38337652673236654855717A79466F7245336C79356C/editor_images/IMG_4471.png]
But here’s the cold, hard truth.
If Tony doesn’t have the resources to communicate this message statewide — then voters won’t hear it.
The Lake Research poll shows that Tony can jump to the top of the Democratic field — if and when — voters hear his story.
That’s where you come in.
Can you chip in a donation right now of $25, $50, $100 or more to help Tony build the war chest he needs to compete with his well-funded opposition? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/thurmondforgovernor]
Now that we have evidence that Tony’s message of progressive change works — it’s on all of us, his supporters, to fuel his campaign with the resources to get this message out.
Thanks for all that you do,
Dave

name: Save the Redwoods League
subject: Get ready, Giving TREESday is coming!
body:
https://www.savetheredwoods.org [https://www.savetheredwoods.org]
https://secure.savetheredwoods.org/a/donate-rrf-2 [https://secure.savetheredwoods.org/a/donate-rrf-2]
Dear Peter,
Our ancient redwood forests have stood for millennia—but did you know only 5% of the original old-growth coast redwood forests remain?
As coast redwood forests and giant sequoias face mounting threats from wildfire and drought, we’re doubling down on building resilience across the range.
That’s why we have a $100,000 goal this Giving TREESday. Will you join this effort to support the Redwood Resilience Fund?
MAKE YOUR GIFT TODAY [https://secure.savetheredwoods.org/a/donate-rrf-2]
Your contribution to the Redwood Resilience Fund is a powerful investment in a brighter, more resilient future for all. Together, we can:
1. Set redwood forests up for success in a changing climate by protecting old-growth giants and restoring younger forests to store more carbon than any forest on Earth.
2. Nurture wildlife by connecting habitat for northern spotted owls, coho salmon, and other species at risk.
3. Help these giants survive and thrive through prescribed fire and science-driven restoration.
4. Champion our public lands by revitalizing beloved parks to welcome and inspire visitors.
5. Build lasting connections by expanding education programs and community access to the redwood forests for all people.
Redwood forests aren’t just beautiful; they’re essential. They’re life-giving.
As someone who treasures these forests, your first gift will help create resilience across the redwood range.Make a gift to the Redwood Resilience Fund and be part of the healthy forests that will endure for generations. [https://secure.savetheredwoods.org/a/donate-rrf-2]
Together, we can weather any storm. Together, we can help redwood forests keep doing what they do best: store more carbon, maintain the health of watersheds, and act as guardians for a bustling ecosystem.
Thank you for helping us jump start Giving TREESday.
With gratitude,
Save the Redwoods League
Help restore and protect the redwoods
DONATE NOW [https://secure.savetheredwoods.org/a/donate-rrf-2]
https://www.savetheredwoods.org [https://www.savetheredwoods.org]

San Francisco, CA 94104
United States

body:
Peter, I want to reach out today to thank you for your tremendous support for House Democrats

---
| | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119968651/584809582/1662333048?amount=15&refcode=20251125_em_fr_b1_jeffries_main_v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZWUxODFmYy0xY2NhLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s5ff_ZTIrFraOgEPObXKCdFES5v9KbkExlZFqofh5ZE=)
---
Peter, I want to reach out today to thank you for your tremendous support for House Democrats. It would mean a great deal to me if you could take the time to read my entire message.
[Together, we are building a grassroots movement that will pave the way for a historic victory.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119968655/584809583/1662333048?amount=15&refcode=20251125_em_fr_b1_jeffries_main_v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZWUxODFmYy0xY2NhLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s5ff_ZTIrFraOgEPObXKCdFES5v9KbkExlZFqofh5ZE=)
All across the country, supporters like you are chipping in to fight back against extreme MAGA Republicans. So many of you are making donations, volunteering your time and spreading our winning message to your friends and neighbors.
Already this year, I’ve received donations from more than 160,000 people.
I’m so proud that my 2025 Democratic Members include:
– Veterans dedicated to protecting our freedoms
– Union members fighting for good-paying jobs
– Parents and grandparents who want a better future for their loved ones

Our mission, our plans, and the future we're fighting for all depend on staying the course -- even when things get tough. This is why I'm reaching out personally: **I need your support today** to help us recover, reach our November goals, and keep moving forward. Every contribution, no matter the size, gets us closer to saving the America First future we're fighting for. Please, if you can, take a minute and chip in:

clean_body: MISSED GOAL | | | | | Fellow Conservative, On November 14, 2025 , we sent out our mid-month email, hoping to reach our fundraising goal -- but we severely fell short. I 'm worried. The truth is, if we don't get back on track this month, the work we've been building toward could be set back. Our mission, our plans, and the future we're fighting for all depend on staying the course -- even when things get tough. This is why I'm reaching out personally: I need your support today to help us recover, reach our November goals, and keep moving forward. Every contribution, no matter the size, gets us closer to saving the America First future we're fighting for. Please, if you can, take a minute and chip in: Thank you for stepping up today and for reading all the emails from me and my campaign team. Together, we are a movement that can 't be stopped. name: Justin Riemer - RITE President
subject: RITE Warns New York and New Mexico of Federal Voter Registration Law Violations
body:
States violating federal requirements for verifying new registrants |
---
| |
---
| | **RITE Warns New York and New Mexico of Federal Voter Registration Law Violations**
_States violating federal requirements for verifying new registrants_
**WASHINGTON, DC –** Restoring Integrity and Trust in Elections (“RITE”) a nonprofit organization dedicated to protecting election integrity, has notified officials in [New York](https://riteusa.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc5917dfc5aa19cc3795efbb2&id=6013b64473&e=ea91f782ea) and [New Mexico](https://riteusa.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc5917dfc5aa19cc3795efbb2&id=bfe155f2d2&e=ea91f782ea) that key aspects of their voter registration practices violate the Help America Vote Act (HAVA) and undermine federally required identity verification protocols for new registrants.

RITE has demanded that the New York State Board of Elections remedy two HAVA violations. First, New York regulations permit county officials to register individuals who fail to provide their driver’s license number or last four digits of their social security number (“SSN last four”) on their registration forms. HAVA explicitly prohibits states from accepting a registration without one of the numbers, except for the few who possess neither. If practice matches process on paper, which it appears to, this is a serious HAVA violation that New York must remedy immediately.

Second, New York’s statewide registration form misstates federal requirements by presenting the driver’s license number and the SSN last four as interchangeable options. Under HAVA, an applicant must provide a driver’s license number if they have one; the SSN last four is permissible only when they do not. RITE is demanding that New York immediately correct the form and instruct county officials accordingly.

RITE has also written to New Mexico raising the same concerns about its noncompliant voter registration form, and to request clarification on several other HAVA-related practices, including whether the state claims any of the law’s limited exemptions available to jurisdictions that require applicants to provide their full social security number at registration. New Mexico stopped doing so in 2019. These exemptions include being able to opt-out of certain identify verification processes.

HAVA’s identity verification provisions play a critical role in maintaining the accuracy of statewide voter lists. The law requires states to collect the appropriate identifying numbers from every applicant, confirm those identifiers against government databases, and follow specific procedures when doing so. These requirements enable states to verify the identity and eligibility of applicants, including citizenship, and prevent duplicate or erroneous registrations.

“States must adhere strictly to federal laws designed to protect the integrity of our voter registration system,” said RITE President Justin Riemer. “HAVA’s verification requirements are not optional. They ensure states verify the identity and eligibility of new voters on the front end and guard against duplicate registrations. New York and New Mexico must take corrective action now.”

RITE continues to be a national leader in identifying and exposing weaknesses in state voter registration systems, especially when it comes to states’ failures to perform legally required verification processes for new registrants. ###
---

## A lot to be thankful for...
I heard a story the other day that went something like this:
A woman approached a man who had a sour expression on his face.
She encouraged the grumpy man to be thankful, and he replied, "Thankful for what? I don't even have enough money to pay my bills."
The woman thought for a bit and said, "Well, be thankful you're not one of your creditors."
Jokes aside, Thanksgiving week is here, and if you ask me, we've got more to be grateful for this year than in a long, long time.
After four years of lectures, lockdowns, and skyrocketing prices, the American people said enough is enough--and we took our country back.
That alone is worth an extra special Thanksgiving.
_We 're thankful the adults are back in charge._
Border crossings down 96% since January. Gas under three bucks in most states. Eggs finally affordable again.
There's still work to be done but think back to where we were last year.
What a difference an election can make.
_We 're thankful the left's nonsense got rejected at the ballot box._
No more men in women's sports getting trophies.
No more open borders disguised as compassion.
No more trillion-dollar green slush funds while your heating bill doubles.
_We 're thankful for leaders who actually love this country._
Trump, Vance, the new Senate majority, the House that held the line--they're not perfect, but they're fighting for us.
They get it: America First isn't a slogan, it's a promise.
And they're delivering.
Most of all, _we 're thankful for America._
For the millions of citizens that held the line at the ballot box, who said no to the woke mob and took the country back.
For organizations like Turning Point USA who continue to stoke the love of freedom in the next generation.
For this country of ours that remains resilient in the face of new challenges .
Those challenges are real, and we'll continue to face them head on as we look into the new year.
But if you ask me, it's worth it to take a step back and reflect on everything we have to be grateful for.
Happy Thanksgiving.

name: Chris Pappas
subject: Time to take action
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
body:
I’ll keep this brief.
I wanted to send you a quick note from the campaign trail.
Before we started this campaign, everyone told me this race was going to be tough. That’s because they knew national Republicans would throw everything they had at flipping this seat.
But I’ve won tough races before — four times in one of the swingiest districts in the country — with the support of a powerful grassroots team. That’s what we’re building here in New Hampshire, but now that the NRSC’s hand-picked opponent jumped into this race, we need to double down on our efforts.
If you’re with me, will you chip in $5 today to stand up to the MAGA agenda and keep this Senate seat blue? Here’s the link you can use:
**[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20251125_1_note?refcode=em20251125-1](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/221?c0=em_ms_cp_20251125_1_note.cHyKe8&refcode=em20251125-1&t=1&akid=3687%2E582294%2Eqfu19Q)**
Thank you,
Chris

We hate to hound you, but there's something we fur-gently need your help with before Saturday night.
| | |
---
Hi, friend!! Captain Flint and Bandit here – the furriest (and Dad's favorite) members of the Bennet family!
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119971540/584818642/851209409?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk982-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YWIxZmJlNi0yMGNhLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HCRkqo7SitmpgBy11r1v0hh3qa877aqrCREJTTzTxsg=)
As a cat and dog respectively, we don't always get along. But there's one thing on which we can agree: Our dad would be Colorado's best governor ever!
Whether it's lowering health care costs, ensuring affordable housing and child care for working families, or protecting our home state's natural beauty – he'll always dig deep to make Colorado the best state to live, work, and raise a family. Even when things get ruff.
When it comes to every person and pet that calls our state home, he'll never roll over for Trump’s or D.C. Republicans’ barking mad, fat-cat-funded _paw-licies._
**And after years spent convening folks to take on our state's greatest challenges and deliver solutions, he's the only candidate in this race who could get a cat and a dog to work together to send an email like this.**
But there's one more thing you fur-gently need to know: **Dad's staring down his biggest end-of-month fundraising deadline yet in this race on Sunday night.**
With all his free time to give us belly rubs being gobbled up by his hard work in the U.S. Senate and on the campaign trail here at home, we're helping by lending him our biggest, most irresistible puppy dog (and kitty cat) eyes to beg for your help –** because since he's running a grassroots campaign, he needs all paws on deck to reach his $30,000 goal before the deadline.**

(_Full disclosure – if he reaches this goal on time thanks to donations to this email, he’ll be so happy we might even get a few extra Greenies and Fancy Feasts_ 😋)
