name: Squad Victory Fund
subject: The clock is ticking. We need you with us
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20251125-1648-foote&t=1001&akid=1648%2E342411%2EmiMg4m ]Squad Victory Fund

Peter,

Our end-of-month fundraising deadline is around the corner, and it’s more
important than ever that we hit our goal. [ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20251125-movement.qu9ekd&refcode=em20251125-1648&amount=3&t=1002&akid=1648%2E342411%2EmiMg4m ]We’ll explain more, but
first, can you chip in $3 today?

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20251125-movement.qu9ekd&refcode=em20251125-1648&amount=3&t=1003&akid=1648%2E342411%2EmiMg4m ]Contribute ››

Our movement has never been about a single issue or election cycle. It’s
about building political power with and for working-class families.

Our progressive champions show up every single day, determined to organize
for a future that puts people first: defending reproductive freedom,
standing up to corporate greed, pushing for healthcare as a human right,
and lifting up voices that are too often ignored or forgotten.

The work is daring because this moment demands nothing less. And when the
Squad takes on far-right extremist forces, we’re not doing it alone. We do
it with a people-powered movement that believes in justice, dignity, and
equity for all.

And progress doesn’t just happen overnight. We know that courage and
persistence are what transform big ideas into meaningful, lasting change.
And to keep making progress, we have to meet moments like this one with
real commitment.

These end-of-month deadlines are critical benchmarks that help us
determine what we can build next. Falling short means limiting what we can
accomplish together, and we refuse to let anything stop our momentum.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20251125-movement.qu9ekd&refcode=em20251125-1648&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1004&akid=1648%2E342411%2EmiMg4m ]So, Peter,
will you chip in $3 to the Squad Victory Fund ahead of our
end-of-month deadline so we can continue to push for bold, transformative
change and show the GOP how powerful this movement really is?

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20251125-movement.qu9ekd&refcode=em20251125-1648&amount=3&t=1023&akid=1648%2E342411%2EmiMg4m ]Contribute ››

In solidarity,

The Squad Victory Fund

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.squadvictoryfund.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1648%2E342411%2EmiMg4m

Paid for by The Squad Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated equally among: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, and Rashida Tlaib for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

Email us: info@squadvictoryfund.com

Hi, it's Shawn Harris, the Democrat and military Vet running in the GA-14 special election for the seat just vacated by Marjorie Taylor Greene. The House is currently 213 (D) to 219 (R). The date of the election has not been set but we know it'll be in the next few weeks. If Republicans lose here, and in the other special elections (TN-07, TX-18, & NJ-11) we would decimate their majority in the House long before next November. Plain and simple. Adelita Grijalva & James Walkinshaw (two Dems) just won the two most recent special elections. Dems are on a roll. But if MAGA succeeds at replacing MTG in this district, they would help solidify Trump's bloc in Congress through 2026 and stop Democrats' chances in just a few short weeks. That's why my team is all hands on deck right now. We're staffing up, running ads and making phone calls. But we're behind our fundraising target and won't be able to sustain this if we don't catch back up ASAP. clean_body: | | | Hi, it's Shawn Harris, the Democrat and military Vet running in the GA-14 special election for the seat just vacated by Marjorie Taylor Greene. The House is currently 213 (D) to 219 (R). The date of the election has not been set but we know it'll be in the next few weeks. If Republicans lose here, and in the other special elections (TN-07, TX-18, & NJ-11) we would decimate their majority in the House long before next November. Plain and simple. Adelita Grijalva & James Walkinshaw (two Dems) just won the two most recent special elections. Dems are on a roll. But if MAGA succeeds at replacing MTG in this district, they would help solidify Trump's bloc in Congress through 2026 and stop Democrats' chances in just a few short weeks. That's why my team is all hands on deck right now. We're staffing up, running ads and making phone calls. But we're behind our fundraising target and won't be able to sustain this if we don't catch back up ASAP. | ~~ ~~ ~~ This race is make or break and you have the power to help Democrats break the Republican trifecta. Let's leave it all on the field. -Shawn Harris | ~~ "Facebook" ~ "X" \[BLUESKY\] "Bluesky" PAID FOR BY SHAWN FOR GEORGIA

name: Powered by People
subject: Greg Abbott is at it again
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople
body:
#
**First:** After Donald Trump demanded it, Greg Abbott and Texas Republicans enacted gerrymandered maps that would steal five seats from Democrats. Powered by People—and thousands of everyday Texans—organized, spoke out, and took action. We mobilized volunteers, hosted rallies, protested at the Capitol, and fought back against this power grab and attempt to rig the midterms.
**Then:** A federal court BLOCKED these maps after ruling they were racially gerrymandered. The court said that the old Texas maps needed to be used instead.
**Now:** Greg Abbott has appealed to the Supreme Court, and the Court just put a temporary hold on the ruling—letting the gerrymandered maps move forward for now. It shows exactly why we can’t stop our work: when we organize, we win—but the other side will do everything it can to overturn those wins.
Texans don’t back down. Not when our future is on the line. Not when our democracy is under attack. And definitely not when Abbott and Trump are doing everything they can to rig our elections in their favor.
[**This fight isn’t over. The attacks are going to keep coming, and we have to be ready to fight back. Can you donate $3 or more to fuel our organizing efforts today? By pitching in, you’re helping us take on Abbott, Trump, and Texas Republicans.**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20251125.GQsN2A&refcode=ema20251125-240487&amount=3&t=2&akid=240487%2E444211%2EEDgtQm)

Powered by People

name: James Talarico
subject: Secret police
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Talarico for Texas
body:
#
Peter --
There is a lot of fear right now in our communities.
Secret police are kidnapping people off our streets. Masked men in unmarked vehicles are tearing parents from their kids. They’re waiting in school pick-up lines and lurking in hospital waiting rooms.
* We should be cracking down on the cartels, not our communities.
* We should be deporting gang members, not small business owners.
* We should be hunting down human traffickers, not moms and babies.

This is not law enforcement. This is something else...
* They say it’s about law and order — but they’re waiting outside courthouses, arresting people who are following the law and showing up for their immigration hearings.
* They say it’s about the economy — but they’re deporting the very people who keep our economy running.
* They say it’s about illegal immigration — but now they’re detaining American citizens.

This has never been about immigration; it has always been about control.
The best way to control a population is to keep people afraid. Keep them looking over their shoulders. Keep them in line.
Don’t draw attention to yourself. Don’t criticize the state. Don’t say what you think. Otherwise you’ll be disappeared.
This is America. We’re not supposed to fear our government; our government is supposed to fear us.
We have to stop them.
James
👋 An important request before you scroll away...
James is running for the U.S. Senate to take on the billionaire mega-donors and their puppet politicians. But he can't do it alone. Flipping this seat will require the largest grassroots movement in Texas history.
[**If $5 is worth it to you to take back Texas, will you please consider making a contribution today? Right-wing super PACs have pledged to spend millions to buy this seat. It’s critical that we lay a strong foundation now.**](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-launch.bF5RK3&refcode=em251125-1-ak&t=1&akid=265%2E1347274%2EY4pT1T)

name: =?UTF-8?Q?James_O=E2=80=99Keefe?=
subject: The insiders are wired and ready — but this story dies without $38k in 10 days
body:
I still get chills thinking about what we pulled off together last month.
[View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e9751861/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvRFZOYVAyRjZNUQ/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTExMjU/LbmNsTjdvSVg2RQ/qP2hpZHM9bmM5UkRTS29sSEJqelhscw/gaSXmdQ/seiab8da2e6)

| | | | [****](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
[****](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.) Dear Patriot,

I still get chills thinking about what we pulled off together last month.

Because we kept our cameras rolling, we exposed that massive 8(a) contracting scam — executives on hidden tape admitting they were gaming the system for hundreds of millions. Tribal members we interviewed called it straight: "They're renting our sovereignty."

And it worked. The SBA suspended ATI Government Solutions. The Treasury Department launched a **$9 billion investigation**.

Real fraudsters are sweating, real money is being clawed back for taxpayers — **all because a few thousand everyday Americans like you said, "Enough is enough.**

[**And I need your help to keep the pressure on in every direction.**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)

That's the power we have when we stand together. No corporate overlords. No government strings. Just pure, citizen-funded journalism that forces accountability. [**Are you in**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)?

But right now, I'm writing you from the war room because we've got something even larger locked in — insiders ready to blow open the kind of entrenched corruption that makes the 8(a) mess look like small change.

The kind involving leverage, compromise, the shadows where power really hides.

The team is geared up and raring to go. Whistleblowers are putting everything on the line.

[**But we're staring at a**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)**[**$38,000 shortfall**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)**[**to launch safely**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.): cross-country flights for undercover meets, secure tech that can't be traced, legal shields for sources, and keeping paychecks coming for the staff who work 80-hour weeks without complaint because they believe in this mission as much as I do.

We've got **10 days** before this window slams shut. If we miss it, the evidence gets destroyed, sources get scared off, and the story dies. [**Chip in to help cover these costs so we can bring the truth to the light.**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)

When I started my career as an investigative journalist, I was scraping by on credit cards and prayers. Then the FBI raided me, the lawsuits piled up — and it was only because Americans like you stood by me. [**I need you again now**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.).

I'm a journalist who's paid a price for this work — arrests, betrayals, everything but regret.

And the one thing that keeps me going is knowing there are friends like you who understand: **if the price of truth isn't your life, then you're for sale**.

This is that moment again. [**Four hundred of us at $100 closes the gap tonight**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.). A few stepping up bigger gets the cameras rolling by morning.

[**Will you stand with me one more time?**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.) Whatever you can give today fuels the exposé that could change everything.

[**Rush your gift here.**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)

From the bottom of my heart — thank you for being the reason we're still in this fight.

In Truth,
James O’Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

P.S. When this drops and the headlines explode (and they will), I want you to remember: [**you were the one who made it possible. Sunlight is still the best disinfectant — and you're holding the torch.**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)

---
[****](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---

This email was sent to **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)** as part of your subscription to **America First War Room**

108 S Washington St. Suite 200
Alexandria, VA 22314

[Unsubscribe](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e9751861/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3N1YnNjcmlwdGlvbnMvdW5zdWJzY3JpYmU/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTExMjU/LbmNsTjdvSVg2RQ/qP2hpZHM9bmM5UkRTS29sSEJqelhscw/gaSXmdQ/s3od4148e06)

subject: Something’s off about this new poll…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abdul for U
body:
[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=&t=1001&akid=1368%2E251025%2EYG9Rdx ]Abdul for US Senate [ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=&t=1002&akid=1368%2E251025%2EYG9Rdx ]Abdul for US Senate

Peter,

A new poll of Michigan’s Senate race just dropped, and we’re not in it.

Yup, you read that right. They left Abdul out of the poll.

[ A ]A post from Abdul: 'The corporate wing of both parties can play ostrich
all it wants. But make no mistake: See us or not, all of us who want
affordable healthcare, housing, and groceries are coming for you.' He's
quoting a post that shows a Michigan Senate poll that doesn't include
Abdul.

Now, you don’t “accidentally” exclude the only candidate in the race who’s
never taken corporate PAC money and raised more in individual
contributions than any other campaign in this race last quarter — a
candidate that’s neck-and-neck for the lead in the primary.

It’s clear, they’re scared of what our movement represents. They know the
stronger we look, the weaker the old guard becomes.

But there’s some truth to this poll — that if we don’t continue building
grassroots strength, they’ll keep pretending this campaign doesn’t exist.
That hurts our ability to organize, earn news coverage, and build the
momentum we need to win this primary.

[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/507?c0=em-ms-aes-20251125-1-ak.Ovmpkx&amount=10&refcode=em20251125-1356&t=1004&akid=1368%2E251025%2EYG9Rdx ]That’s why we urgently need your support. Will you chip in whatever you

Team Abdul

You can bet this was ordered by Donald Trump and carried out by Pete Hegseth. But right now, that's besides the point. If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | ** | | | | | | | ** We will not give up the ship. Mark Kelly Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate

name: Justice Democrats
subject: Darializa is a true fighter
body:
#
Peter,
Our newest Justice Democrats endorsement in the 2026 cycle is Darializa Avila Chevalier: a 31-year-old, Afro-Latina, organizer, union member, and daughter of Dominican immigrants.
From successfully organizing to take down the statue of J. Marion Sims — a 19th-century gynecologist who experimented on enslaved women without anaesthesia — that had stood for 100+ years in Central Park, to freeing New Yorkers detained by ICE, to her current work as an investigator at a public defender’s office in Harlem, **her career has always centered around fighting for New Yorkers.**
Darializa also worked side-by-side with fellow Columbia University graduate Mahmoud Khalil in helping organize Columbia’s student encampment in support of a free Palestine from 2023 to 2024.
When Mahmoud was violently ripped off the streets by masked ICE agents and kept cruelly jailed in an ICE detention center during the birth of his first child, NY-13’s current representative did nothing but release a statement. What does his Congressman have to say about it? _“I expect the Department of Justice to work within the confines of the law.”_
**Espaillat has proven unable or unwilling to stand up to the lawlessness of the Trump administration, letting his own constituents like Mahmoud suffer as ICE continues to terrorize our communities.**
As Zohran Mamdani showed us just earlier this month in New York City, we have an opportunity to replace a corporate, Do-Nothing Democrat with a young, working-class fighter who will treat Trump’s fascism as the grave threat it is.
**In NY-13, that fighter is Darializa.**
**[We have just six months to make it happen: will you pitch in anything you can to elect Darializa and give NY-13 the fighter in Congress it deserves?](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20251125-dac.Vvqir4&refcode=em20251125-37223&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=37223%2E1203867%2E7Vgfde)**
**[Contribute](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20251125-dac.Vvqir4&refcode=em20251125-37223&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=21&akid=37223%2E1203867%2E7Vgfde)**
In solidarity,
Justice Democrats

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20251125-37223-footer&t=22&refcode2=37223_1203867_7Vgfde&akid=37223%2E1203867%2E7Vgfde)**
---

name: Emily Randall
subject: The right call
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emily Randall for Congress
body:
We’re doing a lot of ambitious things: hiring political staff, endorsing candidates, adopting a swing district, and more to come. I really don’t want to have to scale back. There’s way, WAY too much at stake.

| Peter, I don’t like writing emails like this, but I have to be honest: We are running far behind our fundraising goals for the month. During the shutdown, my priority was YOU and your families, not raising money. name: Team Downing
subject: Elon Musk Calls for National Voter ID. Do you agree?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
We can’t afford to wait for our elections to fix themselves.

[](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)[](https://trk.emails.troydowning.-a_zRmepXN1vek1vw)Peter,
The integrity of our electoral process is fundamental to the survival of our democracy. Now, one of the world's most influential voices is demanding immediate, commonsense action to ensure every legal vote is counted and election results are trusted.[](https://trk.emails.troydowning.-XZA)In his recent statements, the world's richest man laid out four essential safeguards that every American should be able to agree on to ensure election transparency and security:
1. Voter ID to stop fraud before it starts
2. Paper ballots to verify every vote
3. Same-day voting to keep the process secure
4. Proof of citizenship to protect the integrity of every election

These aren’t radical or partisan ideas. They’re simple, commonsense protections that are standard practice in developed democracies worldwide.**
**Now more than ever, securing our elections must be Congress’s top priority. Our majority, the integrity of our democracy, and President Trump’s America First agenda ALL DEPEND on delivering on this urgent voter ID mandate.
Peter, we’re begging you: [Please add your name today if you agree it's time to lock down our elections, restore trust in the vote, and support Elon Musk's call for mandatory national election standards:](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)[PROTECT OUR ELECT – SIGN TODAY
](https://trk.emails.troydowning.-xWgBVfSWgnivA)The integrity of every future election cycle rests in the hands of Patriots who are unwilling to compromise on the fundamental principles of our Republic.

Thank you in advance for your participation,
Team Downing | |

name: George Whitesides
subject: Following up with Peter
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119976052/584833145/148511826?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNjc3ODM5Yi0yOGNhLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tnhbv-DoWwvuEf1Mco-VzPThhfQF0jpkzbtbTY2KaII=)
Hi Peter, I’m glad I caught you ahead of the Thanksgiving holiday break.

Last week, I sent you my November campaign priorities survey. While we received a lot of feedback, according to our records, you haven’t sent your responses yet. **[Will you take a minute to complete the survey?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119976054/584833149/-600794686?refcode=em-11.25.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNjc3ODM5Yi0yOGNhLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tnhbv-DoWwvuEf1Mco-VzPThhfQF0jpkzbtbTY2KaII=&emci=19495dac-26ca-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=0677839b-28ca-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=36198509)**

We’re approaching a real turning point in my first re-election campaign:
* The longest shutdown in history is over, but millions of American families are still feeling its effect. Affordable healthcare and the rising cost of living has yet to be addressed by the GOP majority.

* Proposition 50 passed in California, and it changes the entire landscape of this race. Tens of thousands of voters are being folded into CA-27, and political experts at _Sabato’s Crystal Ball_ still rank us as one of the most competitive races nationwide.

**[That’s why today, instead of asking for a donation, I’m only asking for your input on our next steps as we move closer to the midterm election year. Can I count on your responses today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119976056/584833153/-600794686?refcode=em-11.25.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNjc3ODM5Yi0yOGNhLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tnhbv-DoWwvuEf1Mco-VzPThhfQF0jpkzbtbTY2KaII=&emci=19495dac-26ca-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=0677839b-28ca-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=36198509)**
| ****[Take the survey](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119976058/584833161/-600794686?refcode=em-11.25.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNjc3ODM5Yi0yOGNhLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tnhbv-DoWwvuEf1Mco-VzPThhfQF0jpkzbtbTY2KaII=&emci=19495dac-26ca-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=0677839b-28ca-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=36198509)****
---

I look forward to reading what you have to say.

Thank you,

George
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119976061/584833175/-2104984614?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNjc3ODM5Yi0yOGNhLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tnhbv-DoWwvuEf1Mco-VzPThhfQF0jpkzbtbTY2KaII=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119976063/584833194/-723877621?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNjc3ODM5Yi0yOGNhLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tnhbv-DoWwvuEf1Mco-VzPThhfQF0jpkzbtbTY2KaII=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119976064/584833199/1617125231?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNjc3ODM5Yi0yOGNhLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tnhbv-DoWwvuEf1Mco-VzPThhfQF0jpkzbtbTY2KaII=) George has spent his career solving problems. To learn more about George and his commitment to working families, please visit: [GeorgeWhitesides.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119976069/584833208/-1896241937?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNjc3ODM5Yi0yOGNhLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tnhbv-DoWwvuEf1Mco-VzPThhfQF0jpkzbtbTY2KaII=)

name: Mark Kelly
subject: President Trump is calling for me to be hanged.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut
body:
| | | **An important message from my friend and colleague, Senator Mark Kelly --**
---
President Trump is calling for me to be hanged.
I put out a video, alongside veterans of the military and former members of the intelligence community. It had a simple message: If you are serving in the military, you have an obligation to refuse illegal orders.

Trump’s friends in the White House didn’t like that. They accused us of insurrection.
At some point, the President heard about it, and he hasn’t stopped posting and reposting about us since — accusing us of sedition, calling for our arrest, calling for us to be hanged.

It is no small thing for the President of the United States to call for your execution. Elon Musk called me a traitor. Trump’s advisor, Roger Stone, called for me to be executed. And now Trump himself has called for me to be hanged.
As someone whose family has faced political violence before, I know you have to take words like this seriously, and that’s why I’m writing to you.

There’s no telling what kind of storm we’re heading into right now. Unfortunately, we need to be prepared for any outcome.
**[Can you split a donation with Senator Blumenthal and me to help us raise the resources we’re going to need to stand against Trump and the threats coming our way from him and his Administration?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119976275/584833800/1573430854?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1428-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM3OTQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGE3NzgzOWItMjhjYS1mMDExLTgxOTYtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Fv9yiNDRI6x6-6W5NksfwMTc_gQfP4OD5dUzooJLIIA=)**
| | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119976277/584833810/1573430854?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1428-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM3OTQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGE3NzgzOWItMjhjYS1mMDExLTgxOTYtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Fv9yiNDRI6x6-6W5NksfwMTc_gQfP4OD5dUzooJLIIA=)
---
I really appreciate this.

Thank you,

Mark Kelly
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/p3FPDNcG3USxiOP5q9s2qQ2?unsubscribedata=ALic%2FHNHBTVPdhj1WXdBg7T%2FibAKRnXPrXWAA30r%2F2xBGY5h%2FIoPcHmoQ%2BKmclwWu15WAT%2Fmb5MAKOJ3PNtcqoJH2jv%2FiC1xOhef0GMG1KQNONOzI8Us%2Fl%2BvM%2BfRE%2BXVA6FS6N0g6fPmvnfdholckqSpIbZ30pK2NUqtDWmOrbrYSrb5TAy2NjiFB8WzUIWiGunUwL7%2FEH6mgFj%2FA3nrSzWE8zpW8QKd%2FaLnPxY%2F4airoFfvuidjBTogxWcmy0Qh02W1A6jKC%2FWTSracbIYxqQBykvmsXS%2FSkAfVjQNqNTqau5fuP9Q%2BzC69TNuKzZsgv6LQ3XI6GBPDbkaol4QI%2FiqV2x4fGYJssGoTySEidn5%2Fn%2BwgujJYnF8d5dhm9RNMzHlqkn3PnwRbZKSYf6GAILOTzBTixcO21PJ0AuhG1%2BYRFcIcR6wKpAB%2Fw5WZKI9O) | | Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut

[**So we need to hear from YOU:
DO YOU SUPPORT VOTE-BY-MAIL?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/poll-vote-by-mail/?source=VPP_20251125_EMPOLL_E2_T0_NS_RS&t=10&akid=22012%2E878179%2EL9AeR1) | [YES, WE MUST PROTECT VOTING RIGHTS! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/poll-vote-by-mail/?source=VPP_20251125_EMPOLL_E2_T0_NS_RS&t=11&akid=22012%2E878179%2EL9AeR1)

name: Beth Poole, Evergreen
subject: This is how we win.
disclaimer_text: paid for by Evergreen Action
body:
One action today can help shift the fight.
| | | | [](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/4250653/87SdQ4wZ) |
---|---|---
---
| Hi Friend,

Giving Tuesday is just a week away, but you don’t have to wait to make a difference.

When you give early to Evergreen, you’re standing with a movement of seasoned climate advocates who are ready to pivot where we can make the most difference— _through state leadership_ —**and that means your impact begins right away.**

That’s because Evergreen is already working in places like Michigan, Pennsylvania, New York, and Wisconsin to help get more affordable clean energy online and provide local decision makers with solutions that actually benefit people, not drain their wallets. **And your support goes directly to fueling the momentum, relationships, and public support that fuels those campaigns,** even in the toughest of political environments.

[**Will you make your early Giving Tuesday contribution today and help us keep fighting for climate progress at the state level?**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/4250654/87SdQ4wZ) |
---
[POWER OUR WORK](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/4250655/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---
| While federal investments in clean energy get decimated, state leaders need our help. They’re facing significant challenges with rising energy costs, wrongly blamed on clean energy and environmental policies. To prevent the buildout of more dangerous and outdated fossil fuel infrastructure, decision makers like Governors-to-be Mikie Sherrill and Abigail Spanberger—both of whom ran on clean energy as solutions to the affordability crisis—will need the policy support to execute on those promises.

_And this is what Evergreen does best._ |
---
| **Together with your support, we’ll:**
* Provide targeted state lawmakers and governors with **cutting-edge policy guidance** to adopt laws that lower gas and electric bills.
* Launch **strategic accountability campaigns** to reform the power grid and unlock clean energy in the PJM interconnection region—the nation’s largest power market—helping states modernize outdated rules and bring thousands of clean energy projects online.
* Defend and advocate for **strong state clean energy laws and siting reforms** , giving rural communities in Michigan and elsewhere a voice in clean energy’s future.
* Cut pollution from transportation and buildings, driving **policies that create jobs, improve public transit, advance electrification, and make homes more affordable and efficient.**

|
---
| We are ready to push forward, go on offense, and help states continue to lead on climate in the face of federal inaction. But fossil fuel companies and many generators, grid operators, and utilities will be fighting to take us backward—and with the support of Republican allies, those forces are only growing stronger.

With your support, we can fight back and show that clean energy isn’t just our path to a safer climate; it’s how we build an affordable, livable future. [**Will you make a gift ahead of Giving Tuesday? Any amount helps.**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/4250656/87SdQ4wZ) |
---
[GIVE TODAY](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/4250657/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---
| With gratitude, |
---
| | |
---
### Beth Poole
Senior Fundraising Director
Evergreen Action
---
---
* * *
---
| _Evergreen is building the ambitious, actionable policy roadmap for an all-out mobilization to defeat climate change—and to create millions of jobs in a thriving, just, and inclusive clean energy future. None of this would be possible without your support._ |
---
---
| | [ ](https://evergreenaction.com/?utm_source=digital_template&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=evergreen&utm_content=footer)
---
Follow Evergreen Action on Bluesky and LinkedIn.
---
[ ](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/4250658/87SdQ4wZ) | [](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/4250659/87SdQ4wZ)
---|---
And follow our new project, **Hope This Helps.**
---

clean_body: One action today can help shift the fight. | | | | | ---|---|--- | Hi Friend, Giving Tuesday is just a week away, but you don’t have to wait to make a difference. When you give early to Evergreen, you’re standing with a movement of seasoned climate advocates who are ready to pivot where we can make the most difference— through state leadership —and that means your impact begins right away. That’s because Evergreen is already working in places like Michigan, Pennsylvania, New York, and Wisconsin to help get more affordable clean energy online and provide local decision makers with solutions that actually benefit people, not drain their wallets. And your support goes directly to fueling the momentum, relationships, and public support that fuels those campaigns, even in the toughest of political environments. | | While federal investments in clean energy get decimated, state leaders need our help. They’re facing significant challenges with rising energy costs, wrongly blamed on clean energy and environmental policies. To prevent the buildout of more dangerous and outdated fossil fuel infrastructure, decision makers like Governors-to-be Mikie Sherrill and Abigail Spanberger—both of whom ran on clean energy as solutions to the affordability crisis—will need the policy support to execute on those promises. And this is what Evergreen does best. | | Together with your support, we’ll: Provide targeted state lawmakers and governors with cutting-edge policy guidance to adopt laws that lower gas and electric bills. Launch strategic accountability campaigns to reform the power grid and unlock clean energy in the PJM interconnection region—the nation’s largest power market—helping states modernize outdated rules and bring thousands of clean energy projects online. Defend and advocate for strong state clean energy laws and siting reforms , giving rural communities in Michigan and elsewhere a voice in clean energy’s future. Cut pollution from transportation and buildings, driving policies that create jobs, improve public transit, advance electrification, and make homes more affordable and efficient. | | We are ready to push forward, go on offense, and help states continue to lead on climate in the face of federal inaction. But fossil fuel companies and many generators, grid operators, and utilities will be fighting to take us backward—and with the support of Republican allies, those forces are only growing stronger. With your support, we can fight back and show that clean energy isn’t just our path to a safer climate; it’s how we build an affordable, livable future. | | With gratitude, | | | | Beth Poole Senior Fundraising Director Evergreen Action | Evergreen is building the ambitious, actionable policy roadmap for an all-out mobilization to defeat climate change—and to create millions of jobs in a thriving, just, and inclusive clean energy future. None of this would be possible without your support. | | | Follow Evergreen Action on Bluesky and LinkedIn. | ---|--- And follow our new project, Hope This Helps.** | | | ---|---|---|--- © 2025 Evergreen Action and paid for by Evergreen Action. All rights reserved. Contributions or gifts to Evergreen Action are not tax deductible. 1250 Connecticut Ave NW, Suite 700, Washington DC 20036 | |

name: Tim Scott
subject: Senate Leadership Survey closing soon!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR AMERICA
body:
If we don’t act now, we won’t just lose ground, we’ll lose our future.

[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bxQI/?__vbtrk=MzM1NjM3OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzM1NjM3OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
Friend, you were the subject of conversation in my last meeting.
It’s Chairman Tim Scott. I’ve reached out not once, not twice, but THREE times & now my colleagues are wondering why you haven’t answered.
Because the official Senate Leadership Survey is closing soon & your response is nowhere to be found!
As we prepare for 35 crucial Senate races in 2026, the voice of strong conservative fighters has never been more critical.
The radical Left is pulling every trick in the book - raising millions, flooding the airwaves, and doing everything they can to turn our Majority into a punchline.
If we don’t act now, we won’t just lose ground, we’ll lose our future:
[TAKE SENATE LEADERSHIP SURVEY
](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bxQI/?__vbtrk=MzM1NjM3OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzM1NjM3OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)We don’t need the opinion of poll-tested consultants; we need to hear directly from patriots on the ground, like you, friend.
[Your feedback shapes our strategy, your donation fuels our fight, and your support today will be the difference between victory & defeat.](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bxQI/?__vbtrk=MzM1NjM3OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzM1NjM3OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
This is the kind of fight that decides elections & the only way to win is if you act right now!

name: Crow for Congress
subject: Throwback
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
body:
Jason Crow For Colorado [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88523/images/Screenshot%202025-08-21%20at%2010.50.41%E2%80%AFAM.png]
Friend, what do you see in this picture?

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-nov25?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-nov25?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com]

If we ignore the bowl cut, you’ll see a kid who has no clue what life has in store for him. All he wanted was to play with his LEGOs and run around in the backyard.

Jason Crow grew up in a working-class family, so he knows what the struggle is like for so many Americans. He learned early on to never give up.

He started working at a young age. He worked construction and at Arby’s — and after high school, he enlisted in the National Guard to help pay for college.

# Campbell's Soup VP busted for trashing his own products in wild tirade
A **[Campbell Soup cybersecurity analyst](https://substack.com/redirect/93ce2878-4019-4e32-a563-b4d6b8f4624b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** secretly recorded a top executive trashing the company's iconic canned products as "s--- for f---ing poor people" during a November meeting at the company headquarters, sparking a wrongful termination lawsuit and internal probe.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/93ce2878-4019-4e32-a563-b4d6b8f4624b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Exec Trashes Core Products** : VP Martin Bally allegedly dismissed Campbell's soups as low-quality fare for the economically disadvantaged, admitting he rarely buys them himself amid rants on bioengineered ingredients like 3D-printed chicken.
* **Racial Hostility Exposed** : Bally's recorded tirade included profane slurs against Indian colleagues, claiming they "don't know a f---ing thing," fueling claims of a toxic, discriminatory workplace culture.
* **Swift Retaliatory Firing** : Analyst Robert Garza, hired just two months prior, lost his job 20 days after reporting the audio to supervisors, prompting his lawsuit for damages over alleged vengeance.
* **Company Damage Control** : Campbell's placed Bally on leave, launched an investigation, and defended its "high-quality" food as "patently absurd" to criticize, vowing the remarks clash with corporate values.

* * *
* * *

# Meta picks Google as their new chip partner and Nvidia tanks
Nvidia shares **[plunged 4% in premarket trading](https://substack.com/redirect/0f96a9cc-4da6-400f-aba0-bb241dd173b1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Tuesday after a report revealed Meta Platforms plans to integrate Google's tensor processing units into its data centers by 2027, signaling Big Tech's push to diversify beyond Nvidia's dominant GPUs amid booming AI infrastructure demands.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/0f96a9cc-4da6-400f-aba0-bb241dd173b1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Meta Eyes TPU Integration** : Meta, a top AI spender with $70-72 billion in projected capex this year, may rent Google's TPUs via the cloud next year for immediate testing before full data center rollout.
* **Google 's Competitive Edge**: Alphabet shares surged 4.2% premarket after Monday's 6% rally, as Meta's potential adoption validates Google's homegrown TPUs--launched in 2018 and now optimized for cloud AI workloads.
* **Broadcom Gains Traction** : Shares of Broadcom, a key designer of Google's TPUs, climbed over 2% premarket following an 11% prior-day jump, highlighting supply chain ripple effects in the intensifying AI chip race.
* **Diversification Fuels Bubble Fears** : Amid debates over an AI valuation bubble, hyperscalers like Meta seek chip alternatives to cut Nvidia dependency, even as Nvidia's recent sales beat underscores its enduring market leadership.

* * *
* * *
# Space Force goes old school with its new satellite naming system
In a nod to World War II fighter planes, the U.S. Space Force unveiled a dramatic new naming system Tuesday for its satellites and weapons--**[Attack, Defend, Pursue](https://substack.com/redirect/4262a66b-af6e-4d5b-b62d-ab9f9b2ec2cb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** --signaling an era of aggressive orbital warfare amid rising threats from China and Russia.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/4262a66b-af6e-4d5b-b62d-ab9f9b2ec2cb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Revives Historic Aircraft Codes** : The naming convention draws from the 1924 Army Air Service scheme, using prefixes like A for Attack and P for Pursuit to replace confusing acronyms for satellites and ground systems.
* **Instantly Recognizable:** The Air Force naming system uses F for fighters and B for bombers leading to such iconic names as the F15 (Eagle) and B17 (Flying Fortress) and the B2 (Spirit)
* **Streamlines Bureaucratic Chaos** : The change brings an end to multiple designations per asset boosting transparency and operational clarity for future deployments.
* **Heralds Offensive Capabilities** : The naming system foreshadows persistent, armed space fleets for intelligence and strikes, praised by experts as a "start over" for independent Space Force dominance.

* * *
* * *
# Bessent hints at a new Fed Chair before Christmas
Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent predicted Monday a "very good chance" President Donald Trump will announce **[a new Federal Reserve chair before Christmas,](https://substack.com/redirect/4c0810b1-7ee7-48fc-929e-cf7733f2db58?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** potentially reshaping U.S. monetary policy amid ongoing interest rate debates and Powell's term ending in 2026.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/4c0810b1-7ee7-48fc-929e-cf7733f2db58?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Bessent leads candidate interviews** : As head of the search, Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent has one final interview pending, emphasizing the process is progressing smoothly without premature speculation on the pick.

[](https://substack.com/redirect/829012c1-d57c-4d8c-add8-e9001ac84fb7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Finalists span finance, policy** : Potential nominees include National Economic Council director Kevin Hassett, ex-Governor Kevin Warsh, BlackRock's Rick Rieder, and Fed Governors Christopher Waller and Michelle Bowman.
* **Trump 's critiques spark urgency**: The president, a vocal Fed critic who recently joked about firing Chair Jerome Powell, urged Bessent to accelerate rate cuts, framing the shift as essential for economic relief.
* **Fed role eyes simplification** : Bessent advocates returning the central bank to a subdued "background" function, focusing on calming markets and serving Americans rather than dominating complex post-crisis interventions.

* * *
* * *
# Drone ETF launches and heads skyward in $60B market
Wall Street investors are pouring billions into the explosive drone economy, fueling a new **[REX Drone ETF that skyrocketed 4.65% on launch](https://substack.com/redirect/24d8fb3c-2611-499d-99b8-10b6e96e7926?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** amid military breakthroughs in Poland and Walmart's rapid expansion of aerial deliveries to remote U.S. homes.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/24d8fb3c-2611-499d-99b8-10b6e96e7926?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **ETF Ignites Drone Frenzy** : REX's DRNZ fund allocates 80% to UAV innovators like Ondas Holdings, whose stock surged 24% on connectivity tech for aerial intelligence.
* **Military Might Accelerates** : AeroVironment's Switchblade munitions dominate battlefields from Ukraine to the Middle East, as U.S. defense budgets pivot sharply toward unmanned superiority.
* **Commercial Deliveries Explode** : Walmart partners with DroneUp for swift rural drops, joining Amazon and UPS in transforming logistics with crop monitoring and pipeline inspections.
* **Growth Projections Dazzle** : Industry eyes $60 billion by 2030 at 8-10% annual clip, blending AI from Palantir with untapped efficiencies in stealth security and global connectivity.

Space Force goes old school with its new satellite naming system In a nod to World War II fighter planes, the U.S. Space Force unveiled a dramatic new naming system Tuesday for its satellites and weapons-- --signaling an era of aggressive orbital warfare amid rising threats from China and Russia. | | ---|---|--- Revives Historic Aircraft Codes : The naming convention draws from the 1924 Army Air Service scheme, using prefixes like A for Attack and P for Pursuit to replace confusing acronyms for satellites and ground systems. Instantly Recognizable: The Air Force naming system uses F for fighters and B for bombers leading to such iconic names as the F15 (Eagle) and B17 (Flying Fortress) and the B2 (Spirit) Streamlines Bureaucratic Chaos : The change brings an end to multiple designations per asset boosting transparency and operational clarity for future deployments. Heralds Offensive Capabilities : The naming system foreshadows persistent, armed space fleets for intelligence and strikes, praised by experts as a "start over" for independent Space Force dominance. Bessent hints at a new Fed Chair before Christmas Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent predicted Monday a "very good chance" President Donald Trump will announce potentially reshaping U.S. monetary policy amid ongoing interest rate debates and Powell's term ending in 2026. | | ---|---|--- Bessent leads candidate interviews : As head of the search, Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent has one final interview pending, emphasizing the process is progressing smoothly without premature speculation on the pick. Finalists span finance, policy : Potential nominees include National Economic Council director Kevin Hassett, ex-Governor Kevin Warsh, BlackRock's Rick Rieder, and Fed Governors Christopher Waller and Michelle Bowman. Trump 's critiques spark urgency: The president, a vocal Fed critic who recently joked about firing Chair Jerome Powell, urged Bessent to accelerate rate cuts, framing the shift as essential for economic relief. Fed role eyes simplification : Bessent advocates returning the central bank to a subdued "background" function, focusing on calming markets and serving Americans rather than dominating complex post-crisis interventions. Drone ETF launches and heads skyward in $60B market Wall Street investors are pouring billions into the explosive drone economy, fueling a new amid military breakthroughs in Poland and Walmart's rapid expansion of aerial deliveries to remote U.S. homes. | | ---|---|--- ETF Ignites Drone Frenzy : REX's DRNZ fund allocates 80% to UAV innovators like Ondas Holdings, whose stock surged 24% on connectivity tech for aerial intelligence. Military Might Accelerates : AeroVironment's Switchblade munitions dominate battlefields from Ukraine to the Middle East, as U.S. defense budgets pivot sharply toward unmanned superiority. Commercial Deliveries Explode : Walmart partners with DroneUp for swift rural drops, joining Amazon and UPS in transforming logistics with crop monitoring and pipeline inspections. Growth Projections Dazzle : Industry eyes $60 billion by 2030 at 8-10% annual clip, blending AI from Palantir with untapped efficiencies in stealth security and global connectivity. The Capitalist is a reader-supported publication Reject Corporate Left Wing Journalism * You're currently a free subscriber to . For the full experience, | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Matthew Miller 548 Market Street PMB 72296, San Francisco, CA 94104 ? ?

subject: November Campaign Update

body:
The 2026 race is wide open.

| | |
---
# Bernard Johnson for TX-19
Real Policies. Real Solutions. Real Representation. Thank you for your continued support. With Congressman Arrington retiring and the 2026 race now open, this is our moment to bring substantive policy to Washington. I'm writing to update you on our comprehensive policy platform, and to ask for your investment in making these policies a reality.
### 📊 What's Changed Since 2024
**Then:** Third-party candidate challenging an 80% incumbent **Now:** Open seat. Proven policies. Movement is building momentum.
## Updated Policy Platform
## 🏠 The Three Generational Acts
**Land ownership. Business capital. Debt-free education.** For 3rd generation American families, this provides the economic foundation that previous generations had access to. Not loans. Not subsidies. Actual ownership and opportunity. [Read Full Policy →](https://www.bernardjohnson4congress.com/the_three_generational_acts?e=a7dc8436aef29fc41d8bccc6c574b323&utm_source=bernardjohnson4congress&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=november_2025&n=1)
## 🤖 AI Transparency and Human Oversight Act
**Your job. Your rights. Your future.** AI companies must provide 2 years' notice before job elimination, fund retraining, and maintain human control over critical decisions. Independent analysis shows this exceeds EU regulation in worker protection. [Read Full Policy →](https://www.bernardjohnson4congress.com/the_ai_transparency_and_human_oversight_act?e=a7dc8436aef29fc41d8bccc6c574b323&utm_source=bernardjohnson4congress&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=november_2025&n=2)
## 🛡️ IEP for America (Child Protection)
**National registry. Permanent accountability. Survivor support.** Predators can't hold public office. Period. National sex offender registry across all states. Comprehensive survivor support through voluntary tax contributions. This policy would have prevented Epstein-type systems. [Read Full Policy →](https://www.bernardjohnson4congress.com/the_individualized_emancipation_plan_iep_for_america?e=a7dc8436aef29fc41d8bccc6c574b323&utm_source=bernardjohnson4congress&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=november_2025&n=3)
## ⚖️ 10-Year Sunset Clause
**Every law must justify its existence.** All federal legislation expires after 10 years unless Congress reviews, justifies, and reauthorizes it. No more outdated laws. No more permanent government expansion without accountability. [View All Policies →](https://www.bernardjohnson4congress.com/policies_and_political_commentaries?e=a7dc8436aef29fc41d8bccc6c574b323&utm_source=bernardjohnson4congress&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=november_2025&n=4)
## Invest in Your Future
Your donation doesn't just support a campaign. It builds these policies into reality. [$5](https://www.bernardjohnson4congress.com/donate?amount=5&e=a7dc8436aef29fc41d8bccc6c574b323&utm_source=bernardjohnson4congress&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=november_2025&n=5) [$10](https://www.bernardjohnson4congress.com/donate?amount=10&e=a7dc8436aef29fc41d8bccc6c574b323&utm_source=bernardjohnson4congress&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=november_2025&n=6) [$20](https://www.bernardjohnson4congress.com/donate?amount=20&e=a7dc8436aef29fc41d8bccc6c574b323&utm_source=bernardjohnson4congress&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=november_2025&n=7) [$50](https://www.bernardjohnson4congress.com/donate?amount=50&e=a7dc8436aef29fc41d8bccc6c574b323&utm_source=bernardjohnson4congress&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=november_2025&n=8) [$100](https://www.bernardjohnson4congress.com/donate?amount=100&e=a7dc8436aef29fc41d8bccc6c574b323&utm_source=bernardjohnson4congress&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=november_2025&n=9) [Or choose your own amount →](https://www.bernardjohnson4congress.com/donate?e=a7dc8436aef29fc41d8bccc6c574b323&utm_source=bernardjohnson4congress&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=november_2025&n=10)
* **$5:** Spreads the Three Generational Acts to 10 families
* **$10:** Prints 25 policy cards about AI worker protection
* **$20:** Funds outreach to 50 voters about the IEP
* **$50:** Gas money for one rural town hall
* **$100:** Event booth where hundreds learn about our policies

**Where Your Money Goes:** Every dollar funds grassroots organizing, policy education, and direct voter contact across TX-19. No consultants. No corporate donors. Just direct investment in spreading these policies to voters who need them.
### Your Voice Matters
Each policy page includes a comment section. Share your thoughts, ask questions, challenge positions. This campaign is built on conversation, not just during election season, but throughout my time in office. **Before I vote on anything in Congress, you'll see my reasoning. You'll have a chance to weigh in.** **The 2026 race is wide open. Arrington is retiring. This is our opportunity.** But we can't compete with major party machinery without your support. Every $5, $10, $20 donation builds the infrastructure to spread these policies across West Texas. Thank you for believing in substantive policy over empty promises. — Bernard Johnson [Twitter/X](https://www.bernardjohnson4congress.com/r?u=jV2O8dHWazmXFCw5z8vKLUqKp9e--PPhmszOmAsOMVs&e=a7dc8436aef29fc41d8bccc6c574b323&utm_source=bernardjohnson4congress&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=november_2025&n=11) | [Website](https://www.bernardjohnson4congress.com?e=a7dc8436aef29fc41d8bccc6c574b323&utm_source=bernardjohnson4congress&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=november_2025&n=12) | [Volunteer](https://www.bernardjohnson4congress.com/volunteer?e=a7dc8436aef29fc41d8bccc6c574b323&utm_source=bernardjohnson4congress&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=november_2025&n=13) Paid for by Bernard Johnson for Congress

name: Laura Gillen
subject: 🖐️ reasons why I need you to open this
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Gillen for NY
body:
We are five days away from our November fundraising deadline, so I want to share five reasons why a $5 contribution today would make a real difference.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119978375/584840374/800699251?refcode=BLU_EM_LGC_2025-11-25_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzIwMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZGQ3NGU4Ni0yYmNhLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bqjAK9ZY09qZKtCbERXb0MLVMnlVF_tYyKdWB1fMkIQ=)
---
| Peter,

We are five days away from our November fundraising deadline, so I want to share five reasons why a $5 contribution today would make a real difference.

**1\. This is the most competitive district in New York.**
I won by only 2 points in 2024 and I have been named the most vulnerable Democrat in the state. A small contribution goes a long way when the margins are this close.

**2\. Anthony D’Esposito is signaling he wants a rematch.**
Politico reports that he is refusing to rule out another run. He has been attacking me online for months and it is clear he is testing the waters for a comeback.

**3\. Republicans are already targeting this seat.**
This district is at the very top of their list because it could decide control of the House. Every dollar we raise now helps us stay competitive.

**4\. We cannot take back the House without winning here.**
If we lose this race, the path to a Democratic majority becomes almost impossible. That is how central this race is to the entire country.

**5\. Your contributions keep us in this fight.**
If everyone reading this email chipped in $5, we would hit our goal before the deadline.

[_**If you can give $5 (or more!) today I would be grateful. Every single contribution helps us protect this district and keep our campaign strong.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119978376/584840375/800699251?refcode=BLU_EM_LGC_2025-11-25_1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzIwMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZGQ3NGU4Ni0yYmNhLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bqjAK9ZY09qZKtCbERXb0MLVMnlVF_tYyKdWB1fMkIQ=)

name: Autism Health Inc.
subject: Please Support Autism Health this Holiday Season!
body:
|
---
| |
---
| | **Only 5 Days Left to Bid in Our Black Friday Silent Auction!**
---
|
---
| Don’t miss your chance to shop with purpose this holiday season! The Autism Health **Black Friday Silent Auction** is your opportunity to find meaningful, one-of-a-kind gifts — all while supporting families impacted by autism. Every dollar raised goes directly toward Autism Health Inc.’s mission to expand research, education, and family support programs. This **online-only auction** features an incredible lineup of items, including:
* **Custom Baseball Bat Signed by Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.**
* **Custom Baseball Bat Signed by General Michael Flynn**
* 3-Month Health Coaching Package with Signed Warrior Mom Book
* 60-Minute Private Session with Rev. Wendy Silvers
* 2 Hours in the EE System (Energy Enhancement System)
* Various Supplement Packages and so much more!

There’s something for everyone — from health and wellness packages to rare collectibles and exclusive experiences. **Act fast — bidding closes November 30th at 9 PM PST!**
Register to bid, browse items, and place your bids before it’s too late.
---
| [REGISTER HERE](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=9a150c4d27&e=3a42edfdc4 "REGISTER HERE")
---
| Thank you for helping us make a lasting difference in the lives of those impacted by autism. Together, we’re building a future full of hope, healing, and opportunity.
---
|
---
|
## **Support Autism Health this Giving Tuesday!**
---
|
---
| **Giving Tuesday** is just **7**** days away on December 2, 2025**, and Autism Health Inc. is asking our community to come together in support of families impacted by autism. This global day of giving is a chance to turn compassion into action and help us continue providing education, resources, and hope to families and professionals worldwide. Your donations directly support our **Autism Health Summit** , **family scholarships** , **monthly support groups** , and **educational webinar series**. Every contribution helps us offer cutting-edge research, integrative treatment education, and a supportive community for those navigating autism and related neurological conditions.
---
| [DONATE HERE](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=660fef2238&e=3a42edfdc4 "DONATE HERE")
---
| This **Giving Tuesday** , please consider making a tax-deductible donation to Autism Health. Your support allows us to reach more families, expand our programs, and continue changing the future of autism care—one family at a time.
---
|
---
|
## **Give a Family Hope This Holiday Season: Support the “Adopt a Family” Program**
---
|
---
| As we enter the season of gratitude and giving, you have a meaningful opportunity to bring hope, healing, and stability to a family impacted by autism. Autism Health is partnering with the **Dr. Goodenowe Community Health Initiative** to bring life-changing support to families through our **_Adopt a Family_ program**. This initiative provides a comprehensive, science-based approach that blends advanced interventions with essential personal support for individuals with autism. **Your impact:** A $600 gift supports one individual for a critical three-month period. **What your generosity provides:**
* Access to the full Community Health Initiative
* Dr. Goodenowe’s advanced plasmalogen precursor products
* The Engage community connection platform
* Personalized guidance through the Community Health Navigator peer-mentorship program

Families enrolled in this program are already experiencing powerful improvements—better focus, calmer moods, enhanced communication, improved sleep, reduced anxiety, and greater social engagement. You’re not just supporting a supplement or a service—**you’re providing an entire ecosystem of physical, social, and emotional support** that helps a child reach their potential and brings renewed strength to their family.
---
| [DONATE HERE](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=199caeba87&e=3a42edfdc4 "DONATE HERE")
---
| Join us in making a profound difference this holiday season!
---
|
---
| **Black Friday Deal for the Autism Health Summit!**
---
|
---
| The biggest savings of the year are here! For Black Friday weekend only, enjoy **an additional $25 off** your Autism Health Summit 2026 tickets using discount code **BlackFriday** at checkout. This sale ends **Cyber Monday** , so now is the perfect time to secure your spot. Tickets are **already discounted $50** for both General Admission and VIP — and prices will **increase after January 1st** , making this the best opportunity to lock in the lowest rate available. This powerful three-day event brings together world-class experts, practitioners, and families to share cutting-edge research, innovative therapies, and real-world solutions for autism and related neurological conditions.
Our headline speakers include:
* **Aaron Siri, Esq.** – Leading medical freedom attorney
* **Dr. Toby Rogers** – Researcher and public health advocate

Join us in San Diego for education, empowerment, and community like never before.
---
| [REGISTER HERE](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=92d4d89794&e=3a42edfdc4 "REGISTER HERE")
---
| We can’t wait to welcome you to the Autism Health Summit 2026!
---
|
---
| **YOUR DONATIONS MAKE A DIFFERENCE!**
---
| Autism Health is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization dedicated to educating individuals, families, and communities about autism spectrum disorder (ASD). Autism Health provides educational programs, workshops, events and resources tailored to meet the diverse needs of those impacted by autism and other neurological disorders.
---
| Autism Health Inc. depends on generous donations from our community. Large or small, every donation gets us closer to achieving our goals. We are grateful for your assistance!
---
| [DONATE NOW](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=0e30f10470&e=3a42edfdc4 "DONATE NOW")
---
| **Autism Health Inc.
San Diego, CA**
**[www.AutismHealth.com](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=15638284f2&e=3a42edfdc4)**
Contact Us: [info@autismhealth.com](mailto:info@autismhealth.com)
---
| | | | | | | [](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=5b8755a97d&e=3a42edfdc4)
---

---
| | [](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=96b9e38caf&e=3a42edfdc4)

name: Kevin Kijewski for Michigan Attorney General
subject: 🇺🇸 Kevin Kijewski for AG - Pre-Thanksgiving Update 🇺🇸
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kevin Kijewski for Michigan, 115 W Allegan St, Ste 900, Lansing, MI 48933_
body:
| | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/kevinformi/kevin-kijewski-for-ag-pre-thanksgiving-update-4741038?e=4b10910eed)
---
[|
---](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=f3b43a6457&e=4b10910eed)
[|
---](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=44cd770146&e=4b10910eed)
| | | | | |
# Pre-Thanksgiving Update from Kevin
---
| | Dear Friend and Patriot,
I hope this message finds you well! We have been very busy this past week traveling across the state on our pathway to reclaim Michigan as your next Michigan Attorney General in 2026.
On the writing front, I had an important [op-ed published in The Midwesterner that details how tools enabling mass lockdowns still lurk](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=143aa31365&e=4b10910eed) in Michigan's Public Health Code. This is very troubling, given that Governor Whitmer recently admitted her lockdowns were based on "very little or very bad information" and she caused so much damage abusing her power. As someone who challenged her 2020 high school shutdown in court and got her to back down, I fought back [while others (including prosecutors) targeted citizens to force compliance or largely stayed quiet amid the lockdowns (as described in news reports from major papers)](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=0daaa631e4&e=4b10910eed). As Michigan’s next Attorney General, I'll always take legal action to stop unconstitutional mandates, always steer prosecutors toward liberty, and advocate emergency power reform. Click the image below to read Kevin’s latest article:
---
[|
---](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=7174d09f72&e=4b10910eed)
| | | | | | | | | | | |

**Endorsement news:**
I’m pleased to announce that the following patriots have endorsed our campaign for AG, recognizing our commitment to protecting Michigan families and restoring integrity to Lansing. They have joined our coalition, lending their voice to our mission of making Michigan great again for all residents, not just some. These endorsements from key GOP party officials matter. They reflect that more people across the state see the urgency of this race and want real leadership.
* Peggy Doornboss, MIGOP State Committeewoman (3rd Congressional District)
* Susan Kuhn (Former Oakland County Commissioner)
* Tawn Belinger, MIGOP State Committeewoman (6th Congressional District)

---
[|
---](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=cc368acb70&e=4b10910eed)
| |

On the trail, [I had a great time connecting with passionate delegates in Ottawa County](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=e01ba52465&e=4b10910eed) last Tuesday. The overwhelming support for real conservative leadership was truly energizing. While other candidates in the race decided to go to the gubernatorial debate in Traverse City last Thursday, I decided it was more important keep my commitment to meet and speak extensively with delegates. [Ottawa County patriots are fired up and ready to reclaim Michigan's future from failed Democrat policies](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=47230c5a24&e=4b10910eed), and our campaign is thankful for the tremendous support!
---
[|
---](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=8c3c111edf&e=4b10910eed)
| | | | | | | | | | [|
---](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=7607c19980&e=4b10910eed)
| [|
---](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=5371f027bf&e=4b10910eed)
| | Also last Tuesday, [it was great to speak with committed patriots in Jackson County, the birthplace of the Republican Party, about reclaiming Michigan’s future](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=2485f14992&e=4b10910eed)! They are firmly committed to having an AG restore our safety, defend our constitutional rights, and secure election integrity for all Michiganders. [Thanks to Jackson County GOP for the incredible support ](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=75310119ca&e=4b10910eed)– together, we'll make Michigan red again and restore effective leadership in the MI Department of Attorney General!
---
[|
---](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=fe5c905f35&e=4b10910eed)
| | Lastly on Saturday, I had the privilege of j[oining fellow conservatives at the Monroe GOP Charlie Kirk Gala](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=6504001385&e=4b10910eed), an inspiring evening dedicated to honoring bold leadership and recommitting to our core values of freedom, family, and faith. It was especially moving to hear from speakers like [Paula Scanlan](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=455b057bc4&e=4b10910eed), whose powerful testimony on standing up for women's rights in sports at the University of Pennsylvania. It was also great to share a meal with patriots like Republican National Committeeman Rob Steele, U.S. Congressman Tim Walberg, and State Representative Jim DeSana - discussing how we’ll flip Michigan red, restore the rule of law, defend constitutional rights, and ensure election integrity for all.
---
[|
---](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=18bcedb834&e=4b10910eed)
[|
---](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=05ee0adda9&e=4b10910eed)
| | I’m looking forward to meeting with additional Republican groups in December from across the state.
I’m committed to keeping you informed and welcome your feedback. As Michigan's next Attorney General, I’ll fight to uphold the rule of law, prosecute dangerous criminals, protect our Second Amendment rights, stop political prosecutions, and defend the hardworking people of this state from government overreach. [To win against the radical left's agenda, please contribute today and join the movement to take Michigan back!](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=7d8b2a6b11&e=4b10910eed)
Very truly yours,Kevin Kijewski
Candidate for Michigan Attorney General

name: Governing Group
subject: Changing Utah's Political Dynamics–One City at a Time
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GOVERNING GROUP PAC
body:
| | | | | [|
---](https://beckyforutah.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9cc818aa94e94ffd36a8547b3&id=288542b698&e=6484bb6dd5)
| | | | | |

Dear Friend,This year’s municipal elections were a major milestone for Governing Group and for Utah’s future. With your support, [**our endorsed candidates won 47 municipal races across the state**](https://beckyforutah.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9cc818aa94e94ffd36a8547b3&id=b3f55b332a&e=6484bb6dd5). That includes 14 mayors, 21 city and town council members, and 12 newly elected school board members. These leaders reflect exactly what our state needs right now—steady, civil, community-focused leadership.This cycle proved something important: Utah voters value candidates who listen and lead with purpose. They want leaders who show up, build trust, and put their communities above partisanship. And that is exactly the type of leadership your support helped make possible.As one of our endorsed candidates, Orem Mayor Karen McCandless, shared, “Governing Group’s support helped us keep our campaigns rooted in listening to residents and solving problems together.” That is what your contributions made possible.**But our work is not done.**
If we want to keep this progress going into the next cycle and expand it, **we need to start preparing now**. Building strong, values-driven campaigns requires year-round training, communications support, and resources. Your support today will determine how many candidates we can help tomorrow.**Will you make a donation to help us keep this momentum going?
** Every contribution—whether $25, $50, or $250—directly supports leaders who are committed to civility, integrity, and community-first governance.Thank you for believing in this work, and for helping elect the kind of leaders Utah deserves.Warmly,
Becky Edwards
Governing Group PAC

name: Mark Kelly
subject: President Trump is calling for me to be hanged.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada Rosen for Nevada
body:
| | |
---
President Trump is calling for me to be hanged.
I put out a video, alongside veterans of the military and former members of the intelligence community. It had a simple message: If you are serving in the military, you have an obligation to refuse illegal orders.
Trump’s friends in the White House didn’t like that. They accused us of insurrection.
At some point, the President heard about it, and he hasn’t stopped posting and reposting about us since — accusing us of sedition, calling for our arrest, calling for us to be hanged.
It is no small thing for the President of the United States to call for your execution. Elon Musk called me a traitor. Trump’s advisor, Roger Stone, called for me to be executed. And now Trump himself has called for me to be hanged.
As someone whose family has faced political violence before, I know you have to take words like this seriously, and that’s why I’m writing to you.
There’s no telling what kind of storm we’re heading into right now. Unfortunately, we need to be prepared for any outcome.
**[Can you split a donation with Jacky Rosen and I to help us raise the resources we’re going to need to stand against Trump and the threats coming our way from him and his Administration?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119979424/584842981/1203578610?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5648-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMWYyNmE3Ny0yZGNhLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mgLMQ3SwrNzB-NBWM1kMHF9XCUNExLhcT9C5MKvzdBM=)**

name: True the Vote
subject: Grateful for this moment — and for you
body:
November 25, 2025 | Read Online (
https://click.convertkit-mail2.com/92u79dlprzbnh69vndlc9hzod7d33hwhn03e8/e0hph7h74w0vekc8/aHR0cHM6Ly9ja2FyY2hpdmUuY29tL2IvcWR1OGg3aDRubXFkMHR6d25ubXc3dTgyZHpka2tpNGhrb3Z4OQ==
)

Hi Friend —

As we gather with family and loved ones this Thanksgiving, my
heart is full of gratitude — for God’s faithfulness, for the
blessings we too often overlook, and for the extraordinary True
the Vote community that has chosen to stand for truth in a time
when truth is under attack.

This year has reminded us that safeguarding America’s elections
isn’t a seasonal task or a political project. It’s a calling. And
every time the fog of uncertainty rolls in ... when trust is
undermined, laws are ignored, and citizens are dismissed, this
community reminds me why our work matters so much.

Because you don’t back down.

You pray.
You show up.
You give your time, your voice, your courage.
And together, we keep pushing forward.

At True the Vote, we’ve expanded our projects, elevated citizen
training, strengthened legal efforts, and built tools that will
equip Americans to take ownership of their elections at a scale
we’ve never seen before. (
https://click.convertkit-mail2.com/92u79dlprzbnh69vndlc9hzod7d33hwhn03e8/7qh7h8h9zpol8obz/aHR0cHM6Ly90cnVldGhldm90ZS5vcmcvdGhlLXdheS1mb3J3YXJk
) We are preparing for 2026, and we are preparing with purpose.

But we definitely need your help.

As you reflect this week on God’s blessings — large and small —
would you prayerfully consider adding True the Vote to your
year-end giving? Every gift, no matter the size, becomes fuel for
the fight ahead: research, litigation, collaborations and project
support, citizen engagement initiatives, technology
infrastructure, and the day-to-day operations that keep this
mission alive.

If you’re able, would you make a donation today? (

)

Your support ensures that when the next challenge comes — and it
will — we will be ready.

This Thanksgiving, know how profoundly grateful I am for you. For
your belief in this mission, your faithfulness, and your
willingness to stand in the gap at a time when America needs it
most.

May God bless you and your family, keep you safe, and surround
you with peace and joy in the days ahead.

Keep the faith. Never quit. And Happy, Happy Thanksgiving!

Ephesians 6 FTW!

Ever onward —

# [Tell Trump & Vance: "Stop whining about Biden, and fix the damn economy YOU broke!"](https://default.salsalabs.org/T516f6c20-f5ca-446d-a447-e756b5fd92c3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td21932ba-9f7d-4b7f-88ee-7377b46e2a60/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) In less than a year, [Trump and Vance have already managed to screw up the economy across the board](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td2266905-d158-4f06-ad77-5f66d04696e3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9): • Inflation is higher
• Unemployment is higher
• Economic growth is lower
• The national debt is MUCH higher They’ve done this through a combination of world-class hubris, terrible policies, and wildly incompetent appointees to carry them out. And yet, they’re not doing a damn thing to fix it — they’re instead whining about Biden, and trying to blame him. Even though he’s been out of office for nearly a year, and even though all the economic indicators were better when he left. Enough is enough. [**Tell Trump & Vance: Stop whining about Biden, and fix the damn economy that YOU broke!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T990b0d37-ad9d-4e1a-a480-072f5d92396d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
