name: Chris Bolling
subject: Grateful for you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Virginia, www
body:
Virginia didn’t win by accident. You made it happen.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119979935/584844211/-793144256?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYjNiMmUzMC0yZmNhLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fRiDOrOluyXLjz4FBD4iRLiRwtbxCgvQM8hSNhBQ8zw=&emci=0a8ff103-61c9-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=bb3b2e30-2fca-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=31008101)
---
Peter, as we head into Thanksgiving week, we’ve been thinking a lot about what this moment means — and who made it possible. **This month, Virginians made history.** We elected Abigail Spanberger, Ghazala Hashmi, and Jay Jones. We delivered a Democratic trifecta. We flipped seats across the Commonwealth. And we proved, once and for all, that when Virginians organize, we win. None of that happened by chance. It happened because of you. You knocked doors, made calls, shared information, brought neighbors with you to vote, donated, and kept showing up even when the path got hard. That kind of commitment is rare, and it’s the reason Virginia is leading the way for the country. Today, we simply want to say _thank you._
**Thank you for believing in this movement.**
**Thank you for showing what’s possible.
Thank you for helping build a Commonwealth worthy of the people who call it home.** We’re grateful for you, not just for what you did this year, but for what we’ll build together next. With gratitude, — Chris Bolling
Executive Director, Democratic Party of Virginia

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119979962/584844352/-1882479441?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.11.25_Not-Everyone-Can-Afford-To-Give_B1_F1_S1_C1_AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNWQwMmQ2OTYtMmZjYS1mMDExLTgxOTYtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=gr7Z8yPlauveOFdER0LtJgBxCn9euFfqkBbsBzb_7Z4=)
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119979963/584844353/-423659337?amount=5&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.11.25_Not-Everyone-Can-Afford-To-Give_B1_F1_S1_C1_AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNWQwMmQ2OTYtMmZjYS1mMDExLTgxOTYtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=gr7Z8yPlauveOFdER0LtJgBxCn9euFfqkBbsBzb_7Z4=) Folks, The holidays should be a time of comfort. A time to breathe, to gather, and to feel secure. But across Arizona, too many families are looking at their bills and wondering how they’ll make it through the season. **Under the Republican trifecta, costs keep rising while wages stand still – and working folks are getting pushed to their limit.** _It shouldn’t be this way._ **That’s exactly why I’m in this race for Congress in Arizona’s 1st district.** I believe we can build a future where families don’t have to work day and night just to stay afloat — but right now, our representatives in Congress aren’t fighting for that future. They’re bending over backwards for the wealthy few while ignoring the hardworking Americans who sent them to Congress in the first place. And the payoff is obvious: MAGA megadonors and super PACs are already showering my Republican opponent, Gina Swoboda, with cash because they know she’ll advance Trump’s billionaire-first agenda. I know we have what it takes to fight back and win, but it won’t be easy. We’ll need grassroots donors like you on our side. **A lot of folks simply can’t afford to donate right now. When you’re worried about feeding your family, political donations aren’t in the budget. I get that.** If you can pitch in even $5 or $10, just know it makes a difference in reaching undecided voters, countering dark money ads, and building the kind of grassroots power that we need to win. It’s a vote of confidence in a better tomorrow, and it truly moves this campaign forward. **So I’m asking you personally:** [**_If it makes sense for you, will you be one of the few who chips in to this email today?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119979964/584844354/-423659337?amount=5&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.11.25_Not-Everyone-Can-Afford-To-Give_B1_F1_S1_C1_AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNWQwMmQ2OTYtMmZjYS1mMDExLTgxOTYtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=gr7Z8yPlauveOFdER0LtJgBxCn9euFfqkBbsBzb_7Z4=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [ CHIP IN $5 NOW >> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119979965/584844355/-423659337?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.11.25_Not-Everyone-Can-Afford-To-Give_B1_F1_S1_C1_AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNWQwMmQ2OTYtMmZjYS1mMDExLTgxOTYtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=gr7Z8yPlauveOFdER0LtJgBxCn9euFfqkBbsBzb_7Z4=)

| | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him.
---

Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675*, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671.

clean_body: For years, liberals called RFK Jr a quack... an alarmist... a conspiracy theorist.| | | | November 25 | | | | | The truth liberals want to ignore could ruin your health. | | | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him. | | | | | | Hello Friends,
We have so much to be thankful for in this great country and state. I feel truly blessed to serve you in the Pennsylvania State House. Pennsylvania sits at a critical tipping point, and we have less than 11 months until the first votes will be cast in the 2026 general election. I critically need your help to retain this key seat.
I have been working very hard in Harrisburg to fight for the policies and values that will move Pennsylvania in the right direction. When not in Harrisburg, my schedule is full attending numerous local events at fire departments, veterans’ organizations, sportsman’s clubs, scouting ceremonies, school events, and much more! I am doing everything I can to make sure we are in the best possible position to win the election.
Pennsylvania faces a critical choice for our future. Do we want to follow the path of a state like New York with higher taxes, bigger government, and stifling regulations? Or, instead, do we implement policies similar to high-growth states like Texas and Florida that drive prosperity, enhance individual freedom, and enable families to flourish? I need your help to get our message out and empower our fight. Pennsylvania is the battleground state in the country. Our State House could not be any closer—it is split 102 Democrats to 101 Republicans. Of those 203 seats, there are only 15 districts, mostly in suburban areas like ours, that are legitimately competitive and will see intense election battles to determine the direction of our Commonwealth. I would greatly appreciate your continued support as I work in Harrisburg to get Pennsylvania on the right track. We have an upcoming holiday fundraiser event on December 10th at Wildwood Country Club.
---

name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: This is despicable.

body:
This is despicable. **Millions of Americans could _permanently_ lose their food-stamp benefits in a matter of weeks because of the Republicans’ spending bill.** This is a nationwide catastrophe for families who rely on SNAP to put food on the table. We must act quickly. I refuse to let Trump gut food assistance, but I can’t stop this alone — I need your voices rising up with mine to stop this injustice. | **↓↓↓ SIGN NOW ↓↓↓** **[_That’s why I need you to sign my urgent SNAP petition before midnight. We must send a loud message that slashing SNAP and letting families go hungry is unacceptable. Will you be one of the 25,000 signatures I need?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119980669/584846957/-1529422692?source=LOC_EM_PET_2025.11.25_SNAP-Rehash_B1_F1_S1_C1_90AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMDY1M2RmOC0zMGNhLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Adh3RYlPffnTuE1GntO5qTgdlx4n7GiURQSoGViGxWE=&emci=62de3155-b2c5-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=d0653df8-30ca-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=7659029)** | | [ SIGN THE PETITION >> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119980671/584846959/-1529422692?source=LOC_EM_PET_2025.11.25_SNAP-Rehash_B1_F1_S1_C1_90AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMDY1M2RmOC0zMGNhLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Adh3RYlPffnTuE1GntO5qTgdlx4n7GiURQSoGViGxWE=&emci=62de3155-b2c5-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=d0653df8-30ca-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=7659029)

This is beyond cruel.
SNAP is one of the most effective anti-hunger programs in the country. It keeps vulnerable Americans afloat in moments of hardship.
**And yet Trump and Republicans want to gut it — all to help fund more tax breaks for billionaires.**
To make matters worse, the administration has up to $6 billion in reserves to fund SNAP. It’s clear Trump cares more about pushing political propaganda than helping feed American families.
The government has a responsibility to do everything possible to safeguard these essential, life-saving benefits.
**[_But it’s going to take all of us speaking out together to make a difference. clean_body: This is despicable. Millions of Americans could permanently lose their food-stamp benefits in a matter of weeks because of the Republicans’ spending bill. This is a nationwide catastrophe for families who rely on SNAP to put food on the table. We must act quickly. I refuse to let Trump gut food assistance, but I can’t stop this alone — I need your voices rising up with mine to stop this injustice. | ↓↓↓ SIGN NOW ↓↓↓ | | This is beyond cruel. SNAP is one of the most effective anti-hunger programs in the country. It keeps vulnerable Americans afloat in moments of hardship. And yet Trump and Republicans want to gut it — all to help fund more tax breaks for billionaires. To make matters worse, the administration has up to $6 billion in reserves to fund SNAP. It’s clear Trump cares more about pushing political propaganda than helping feed American families. The government has a responsibility to do everything possible to safeguard these essential, life-saving benefits. | Together in the fight, — Kirsten Gillibrand * A message from DSCC Chair Kirsten Gillibrand: =

name: EMILYs List
subject: Peter, we need all hands on deck

name: Phyllis, Advocates Council Member
subject: Will you join me as an advocate?
body:
I choose action over despair | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/119981536/584849706/2141984067?sourceid=1150982&utm_campaign=26emkge-1111aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=acsigner&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMmEyMTlhNi0zMmNhLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2OJLmhIlWGBHW3CJRWE75OYU9ZwSHVV5HIK0KXYQrg0=&emci=c9cf87d5-8ac5-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=f2a219a6-32ca-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=954237)
---
|
---
Dear Peter,

I had an abortion in 1974. I was living in New York, so accessing care was simple and easy. Today—over 50 years later—it's unthinkable that abortion is harder to obtain and more dangerous in much of the country than it was then.

I can't imagine what women in states like Texas, Oklahoma, and Alabama are going through trying to get the care they need—the care I needed—at home.

[Abortion is normal. Where you live shouldn't determine the care you receive.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/119981537/584849707/2141984067?sourceid=1150982&utm_campaign=26emkge-1111aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=acsigner&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMmEyMTlhNi0zMmNhLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2OJLmhIlWGBHW3CJRWE75OYU9ZwSHVV5HIK0KXYQrg0=&emci=c9cf87d5-8ac5-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=f2a219a6-32ca-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=954237)

As a longtime supporter of reproductive rights, I started donating to the Center when it became clear to me that the most important work in protecting reproductive rights was happening in the courts. The Center has a proven track record of fighting—and winning—critical cases to protect our freedom. I choose action over despair. [I'd like to personally invite you to join the team during this urgent time by chipping in just $10.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/119981542/584849712/2141984067?sourceid=1150982&utm_campaign=26emkge-1111aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=acsigner&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMmEyMTlhNi0zMmNhLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2OJLmhIlWGBHW3CJRWE75OYU9ZwSHVV5HIK0KXYQrg0=&emci=c9cf87d5-8ac5-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=f2a219a6-32ca-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=954237) This Giving Tuesday, your gift will be matched dollar-for-dollar to defend the right to abortion care everywhere. | [GIVE $10 NOW](https://click.everyaction.com/k/119981543/584849713/2141984067?am=10&sourceid=1150982&utm_campaign=26emkge-1111aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=acsigner&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMmEyMTlhNi0zMmNhLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2OJLmhIlWGBHW3CJRWE75OYU9ZwSHVV5HIK0KXYQrg0=&emci=c9cf87d5-8ac5-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=f2a219a6-32ca-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=954237)
---
I am a proud member of the Center's _Advocates Council_ because I believe in their lawyers expertise, courage, and their ability to WIN. [Will you join me in taking action ahead of Giving Tuesday?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/119981544/584849714/2141984067?sourceid=1150982&utm_campaign=26emkge-1111aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=acsigner&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMmEyMTlhNi0zMmNhLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2OJLmhIlWGBHW3CJRWE75OYU9ZwSHVV5HIK0KXYQrg0=&emci=c9cf87d5-8ac5-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=f2a219a6-32ca-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=954237)

[All gifts are doubled until December 2 at midnight, so your impact will go twice as far.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/119981545/584849746/2141984067?sourceid=1150982&utm_campaign=26emkge-1111aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=acsigner&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMmEyMTlhNi0zMmNhLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2OJLmhIlWGBHW3CJRWE75OYU9ZwSHVV5HIK0KXYQrg0=&emci=c9cf87d5-8ac5-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=f2a219a6-32ca-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=954237)

Together, we can hope, dream, and take action toward a world where reproductive freedom is a right guaranteed for all.

Sincerely,

Phyllis T.
_Advocates Council_ Member

clean_body: I choose action over despair | | | Dear Peter, I had an abortion in 1974. I was living in New York, so accessing care was simple and easy. Today—over 50 years later—it's unthinkable that abortion is harder to obtain and more dangerous in much of the country than it was then. I can't imagine what women in states like Texas, Oklahoma, and Alabama are going through trying to get the care they need—the care I needed—at home. As a longtime supporter of reproductive rights, I started donating to the Center when it became clear to me that the most important work in protecting reproductive rights was happening in the courts. The Center has a proven track record of fighting—and winning—critical cases to protect our freedom. I choose action over despair. This Giving Tuesday, your gift will be matched dollar-for-dollar to defend the right to abortion care everywhere. | I am a proud member of the Center's Advocates Council because I believe in their lawyers expertise, courage, and their ability to WIN. Together, we can hope, dream, and take action toward a world where reproductive freedom is a right guaranteed for all. Sincerely, Phyllis T. Advocates Council Member | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|---|--- The Center for Reproductive Rights uses the power of law to advance reproductive rights as fundamental human rights around the world. © Center for Reproductive Rights Center for Reproductive Rights 199 Water St. New York, NY 10038 United States

name: Tom Fitton
subject: Corruption Doesn’t Break for the Holidays
body:
With Thanksgiving in just two days, families across America are starting to slow down and prepare for this season of goodwill and cheer.

| [ | |
---
|
--- ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=77968&L=36576&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL25vbi1kb25vci1lbmQtb2YteWVhci8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnM=&hash=87514ada50cd037993099643eea7e31118400408f66b2e02eb0a9f8e3a30f2ab) |
---
| Dear Fellow American,

With Thanksgiving in just two days, families across America are starting to slow down and prepare for this season of goodwill and cheer.
**Unfortunately, corruption does NOT take a break for the holidays**.
But because of our supporters, neither will Judicial Watch.
Right now, Judicial Watch has more than **140 active lawsuits** moving through our nation’s courts, all the way up to the Supreme Court of the United States.
To maintain and expand this aggressive docket in 2026, we must stay on track with our year-end budget. **Our ambitious goal is to raise $9.6 million more dollars by December 31 st**.
Closing this year out strong is especially crucial because we are already seeing Leftwing political activists pour a wave of litigation into our nation’s court system to gut election integrity in 2026.
_[So I ask you to please consider making a generous first-time financial gift to Judicial Watch today](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=77968&L=36576&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL25vbi1kb25vci1lbmQtb2YteWVhci8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnM=&hash=87514ada50cd037993099643eea7e31118400408f66b2e02eb0a9f8e3a30f2ab)_. Your generous tax-deductible gift will help us get a head start to block these schemes and hit the ground running in the new year.
| [ Fuel Our Fight for the Rule of Law in 2026 ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=77968&L=36576&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL25vbi1kb25vci1lbmQtb2YteWVhci8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnM=&hash=87514ada50cd037993099643eea7e31118400408f66b2e02eb0a9f8e3a30f2ab)
---

Below are just a sample of the legal battles we’re preparing for in 2026 that you could help fund:

**_Fighting For Honest Elections_**

In October, our donors sent us to the United States Supreme Court to defend the right of candidates to challenge unconstitutional election laws. In this case, in Illinois, where mail-in ballots received up to 14 days after Election Day are still counted.

The High Court has now also granted review in our case against Mississippi for “extending” Election Day for 5 days after election day is over.

_Both Supreme Court cases – which will run into 2026 – could set strong precedents to establish that ballots must be received by Election Day to be counted_.

Others can and do complain about attacks on honest elections, but Judicial Watch _acts_ ... _and we act where it counts the most, in the courts_.

And as you see, our legal victories have _meaningful impact_ when it comes to _protecting the integrity_ of our elections.

Federal Law sets election days; it doesn’t set election weeks or election months. Our supporters have funded our fight to make corrupt state officials obey the law.

**_Scrubbing Dirty Voter Rolls_**

Dirty voter rolls can mean dirty elections, making Judicial Watch’s National Voter Registration Act (NVRA) lawsuits one of the most important safeguards for clean elections in 2026 and beyond.

Our NVRA lawsuits have already **removed over 5 million ineligible names** from voter rolls in more than a dozen states.

We will continue active lawsuits against **California, Illinois** and **Oregon** in 2026 over their failures to follow federal law and undertake reasonable efforts to clean their voter rolls between elections.

**_Fighting Illegal Immigration and Challenging Illegal Sanctuary Cities_**

Through our donors’ support, we recently opened a lawsuit against the mayor of Evanston, Illinois, to obtain records related to his obstruction of federal immigration enforcement.

We’ve also sued the governor of Arizona, Katie Hobbs, for reportedly ordering state agencies and the National Guard to **withhold cooperation from federal immigration authorities**.

This may be the first you are hearing of these cases, and you will hear more as we will continue leading the charge against such “sanctuary” policies by state and local government officials who break federal immigration law.

**_Challenging the Left’s Effort to Create Discriminatory Laws and Quotas to Divide Americans_**

As the Left pushes race-based laws and quotas to divide Americans, your backing allows us to defend the principle that government should not discriminate against any citizen.

In Evanston, Illinois, Judicial Watch has brought an ongoing federal class-action lawsuit against the city’s “reparations” scheme that pays public funds to _only_ black residents.

This lawsuit carries the potential to set a precedent that will make it easier for us and others to overturn similar unjust reparation giveaways in other parts of the country.

**_Plus our efforts to expose and prosecute public corruption including holding Deep State actors accountable who have conspired against President Trump_**

Judicial Watch remains the largest and most successful Freedom of Information Act litigator in the country, fighting at the forefront of government transparency.

_“Exhibit A” was the recent indictment of James Comey, coming nearly a decade after your Judicial Watch began working to uncover his crimes_.

A first-time financial gift from you today will fund lawsuits to continue exposing the Clinton, Obama, and Biden era Deep State actors who targeted President Trump and tried to hide their misconduct from the American people.

I am very proud of what we have accomplished since 1994.

You may not know it, but **you following our work has a real effect on our ability to take on corruption** ...the larger our network, the bigger our voice in Washington.

But with bigger challenges to the rule of law facing us than ever and 2026 starting in just weeks, I am asking you to take an additional step today: _[Please consider a tax-deductible year-end gift to join Judicial Watch as a financial supporter_](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=77968&L=36576&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL25vbi1kb25vci1lbmQtb2YteWVhci8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnM=&hash=87514ada50cd037993099643eea7e31118400408f66b2e02eb0a9f8e3a30f2ab).

[ CONTRIBUTE TO FUEL MORE VICTORIES IN 2026 ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=77968&L=36576&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL25vbi1kb25vci1lbmQtb2YteWVhci8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnM=&hash=87514ada50cd037993099643eea7e31118400408f66b2e02eb0a9f8e3a30f2ab)
---

It is only through the generous gifts of our donors that Judicial Watch can continue serving as a real force upholding our freedoms.

With your support today, we can secure even more victories for the rule of law in the year ahead.

Sincerely,

Tom Fitton
President, Judicial Watch

P.S. Corruption does not take a break for the holidays. With your support, neither will we. [Please join Judicial Watch with a tax-deductible gift today so can stay on track to fight the crucial Election Integrity, Immigration, and Government Transparency battles that await in 2026](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=77968&L=36576&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL25vbi1kb25vci1lbmQtb2YteWVhci8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnM=&hash=87514ada50cd037993099643eea7e31118400408f66b2e02eb0a9f8e3a30f2ab).

[ MAKE YOUR YEAR END GIFT TODAY ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=77968&L=36576&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL25vbi1kb25vci1lbmQtb2YteWVhci8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnM=&hash=87514ada50cd037993099643eea7e31118400408f66b2e02eb0a9f8e3a30f2ab)
---

subject: The Department of War is coming after me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Governor
body:
You can bet this was ordered by Donald Trump and carried out by Pete Hegseth. But right now, that's besides the point.

The Department of War is coming after me because they don’t like what I have to say.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119981757/584850470/1121921142?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-11-25_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmRlNGQ4ODAtMzJjYS1mMDExLTgxOTYtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=6nX4VBJ3heSXDQ7-MGRsAUIrXDXECycn8tr7Sn1XJXw=)
When I was 22 years old, I swore an oath to the Constitution. I've upheld that oath every day since.
If Trump is trying to intimidate me from doing my job, it won’t work.
I’ve given too much to this country to be silenced by bullies who care more about their own power than about protecting the Constitution.
Call this what it is: **Political persecution.**
You can bet this was ordered by Donald Trump and carried out by Pete Hegseth. But right now, that's besides the point.

clean_body: You can bet this was ordered by Donald Trump and carried out by Pete Hegseth. But right now, that's besides the point. The Department of War is coming after me because they don’t like what I have to say. = When I was 22 years old, I swore an oath to the Constitution. I've upheld that oath every day since. If Trump is trying to intimidate me from doing my job, it won’t work. I’ve given too much to this country to be silenced by bullies who care more about their own power than about protecting the Constitution. Call this what it is: Political persecution. You can bet this was ordered by Donald Trump and carried out by Pete Hegseth. But right now, that's besides the point. = = = = = = = We will not give up the ship. **High school dropout. Waffle House waitress. First woman to graduate from The Citadel. Single mom. Fighter.** **Nancy Mace wasn’t born into power. She worked for every inch of ground she’s gained.** At 17, she dropped out of high school and took a job slinging hash browns at Waffle House to survive. No silver spoon. No Ivy League connections. Just grit, grace, and a whole lot of graveyard shifts. **By the grace of God, she turned that struggle into a story no politician can touch.** She made history as the first woman to graduate from The Citadel, South Carolina’s legendary military college. She built her own business. She raised two kids on her own. And when the Left came for everything she believed in, she stood her ground.Now, she’s running for Governor of South Carolina. Nancy Mace is a battle-tested conservative who’s walked through fire and come out swinging. In Congress, she’s been one of President Trump’s fiercest allies, fighting to secure our border, protect our daughters, and stop the Left’s sick agenda dead in its tracks. **She’s not here to make friends. She’s here to make history.** Nancy is fighting to:
* Eliminate South Carolina’s Income Tax—the highest in the Southeast
* Prosecute violent criminals and pedophiles with zero leniency
* Crack down on sanctuary sheriffs who let illegal aliens roam free
* Defund radical public universities that indoctrinate, not educate
* Reform education so students learn how to think—not what to think
* Work hand-in-hand with President Trump to put South Carolina FIRST

Through every hardship, Nancy never gave up. And now she’s ready to do what she’s always done: roll up her sleeves, take the heat, and lead from the front. **South Carolina is worth fighting for. And Nancy Mace is just getting started.**
---
| |
# PAID FOR BY NANCY MACE FOR GOVERNOR

| | 295 Seven Farms Drive, Suite C-186Charleston, SC 29492

Losing our country to the radical Trans Mob that wants my head on a stick. And that’s exactly what will happen if we don’t PUNCH BACK. name: Raphael Warnock
subject: If you haven’t had a chance to respond yet, there’s still time
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
Your direct input helps ensure I’m focused on the issues that matter most to you as I fight back.
Friend, I wanted to reach out and say thank you to the thousands of folks who have already responded to our new priorities survey.
---
Trump and Washington Republicans are waging an all-out campaign of chaos and cruelty, and people are hurting. This has got to stop – and your direct input helps ensure I’m focused on the issues that matter most to you as I fight back.
So if you haven’t had a chance yet, will you speak out in our survey now?
**You can use this link:[https://surveys.signforgood.com/warnock-november-priorities-surv-email](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119981939/584851054/475082512?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&code=jtk5644-su-nd&refcode=jtk5644-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYTZhMGFjNC0zM2NhLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XK6DDJrjy1rJ8bi-ks-F1x2S6yo75Nj-GStQ9IdVc18=&emci=8ab6f107-59c6-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=ca6a0ac4-33ca-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=1586379)**
Thank you,
Rev. Warnock
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Rev. Raphael Warnock**
Subject: New priorities survey
| | |
---
Friend,
Health care premiums for many are about to double, even triple. Tariffs are causing the price of everything to skyrocket. And electric bills are through the roof.
Meanwhile, Trump’s White House is building a $300 million ballroom and his cabinet is spending taxpayer money on hundred-million-dollar jets.
The split screen is baffling – and frankly, it’s unconscionable. Billionaires are busy making a fortune, while everyday folks are struggling just to make ends meet.
**I refuse to accept this, and it’s clear that Georgians and Americans across the country refuse to accept this too. That’s why Democrats won decisive victories in key races right here in Georgia and throughout the country earlier this month. Now, I’m using every tool at my disposal to push back against Trump and the GOP’s dangerous agenda in the Senate. But to fight for you and your family as best as I can, I need to hear your latest thoughts directly.**
**[My team put together a new priorities survey so you can share your thoughts and concerns with me, and I’m counting on your response. Will you take a quick moment to let me know what’s top of mind for you right now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119981940/584851055/475082512?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&code=jtk5644-su-nd&refcode=jtk5644-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYTZhMGFjNC0zM2NhLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XK6DDJrjy1rJ8bi-ks-F1x2S6yo75Nj-GStQ9IdVc18=&emci=8ab6f107-59c6-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=ca6a0ac4-33ca-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=1586379)**
| | [Take the Survey](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119981941/584851056/475082512?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&code=jtk5644-su-nd&refcode=jtk5644-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYTZhMGFjNC0zM2NhLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XK6DDJrjy1rJ8bi-ks-F1x2S6yo75Nj-GStQ9IdVc18=&emci=8ab6f107-59c6-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=ca6a0ac4-33ca-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=1586379)
---
I urge you, friend: Don’t give in to those who are trying to weaponize despair. I know we can win when we stand together – and I’m honored to have you by my side in this fight.
Sincerely,

Rev. Raphael Warnock
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

name: Heidi Hall
subject: Our last message before Thanksgiving
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HEIDI HALL FOR CONGRESS
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251125_em_fr_b1_HH_big [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251125_em_fr_b1_HH_big]
Friend,
I moved to Grass Valley with my two boys because I wanted to raise them in a place that was close-knit and different from what we experienced in the Bay Area.
I've been here for about 20 years now, and I know how important Thanksgiving is to our rural communities.
That's why I don't want to interrupt it by emailing you about fundraising goals and campaigning.
But while the 3 men who got together to try to force me out of this race probably expect me to be behind a stove all day, I'm not giving up.
And I have to let you know that this is a really important time for us, Friend, and we need your help.
We still need to raise $5,115 online to reach our fundraising goal for November, and we're trying to do it before Thanksgiving because we need the extra time to plan ahead.
Friend, if you have the chance, will you please take a second to donate any amount that you can to our campaign and help us reach our goal before Thanksgiving and before our End of Month Deadline just days later? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251125_em_fr_b1_HH_big]
HELP US REACH OUR GOAL [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251125_em_fr_b1_HH_big]
Thank you and Happy Thanksgiving,
Heidi Hall
Heidi Hall has spent her three-decade public service career working with others to solve problems, protect our land and water, improve health, and build opportunities for others, all while raising two boys primarily as a single mom.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251125_em_fr_b1_HH_big [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251125_em_fr_b1_HH_big]
Raised by parents who had persisted to make a middle-class life for their kids in Contra Costa County while lifting up others, Heidi was taught to push through and overcome challenges rather than complain about them. She learned to stick up for the vulnerable, to respect working people, and to value equal opportunity and justice.
After graduating from Pomona College and earning graduate degrees from Columbia and Rutgers, Heidi went to work for the Rockefeller Foundation promoting reproductive care and then began her career at the Environmental Protection Agency, stopping the dumping of toxic waste and holding corporate polluters accountable.
Today, Heidi chairs the Nevada County Board of Supervisors, where she’s taken on homelessness, expanded broadband access, and worked to reduce crime and illegal cannabis growth. Heidi flipped her seat from red to blue – and now she’s ready to do it again in Congress to take on toxic politics in Washington and put people first.
Prefer to donate via mail? Address a check to:
Heidi Hall for Congress
PO Box 729
Grass Valley, CA 95945
SUPPORT HEIDI [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251125_em_fr_b1_HH_big]
PAID FOR BY HEIDI HALL FOR CONGRESS

Heidi Hall for Congress
PO Box 729
Grass Valley, CA 95945
United States

That's why I don't want to interrupt it by emailing you about fundraising goals and campaigning. But while the 3 men who got together to try to force me out of this race probably expect me to be behind a stove all day, I'm not giving up. And I have to let you know that this is a really important time for us, Friend, and we need your help. We still need to raise $5,115 online to reach our fundraising goal for November, and we're trying to do it before Thanksgiving because we need the extra time to plan ahead. Friend, if you have the chance, will you please take a second to donate any amount that you can to our campaign and help us reach our goal before Thanksgiving and before our End of Month Deadline just days later? [] HELP US REACH OUR GOAL [] Thank you and Happy Thanksgiving, Heidi Hall Heidi Hall has spent her three-decade public service career working with others to solve problems, protect our land and water, improve health, and build opportunities for others, all while raising two boys primarily as a single mom. [] Raised by parents who had persisted to make a middle-class life for their kids in Contra Costa County while lifting up others, Heidi was taught to push through and overcome challenges rather than complain about them. She learned to stick up for the vulnerable, to respect working people, and to value equal opportunity and justice. After graduating from Pomona College and earning graduate degrees from Columbia and Rutgers, Heidi went to work for the Rockefeller Foundation promoting reproductive care and then began her career at the Environmental Protection Agency, stopping the dumping of toxic waste and holding corporate polluters accountable. Today, Heidi chairs the Nevada County Board of Supervisors, where she’s taken on homelessness, expanded broadband access, and worked to reduce crime and illegal cannabis growth. Heidi flipped her seat from red to blue – and now she’s ready to do it again in Congress to take on toxic politics in Washington and put people first. Prefer to donate via mail? Address a check to: Heidi Hall for Congress PO Box 729 Grass Valley, CA 95945 SUPPORT HEIDI [] PAID FOR BY HEIDI HALL FOR CONGRESS Heidi Hall for Congress PO Box 729 Grass Valley, CA 95945 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

name: Team WFP
subject: With just one week left in the Tennessee special election, Republicans are scared
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party PAC (77 Sands St
body:
| | | Hey, Peter — Since we reached out about Aftyn Behn’s campaign to flip a House seat in Tennessee, _Nashville Scene_ reported that far-right money is flooding in:1 [](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquqxZ_WMtWQ5nsYnjR236T9dIDKXTJfDi2bQOB8GD2BnMygLjOfNryZkoBkti4Yi2S6vtQxv0ys1UDRah7cirqRdhPa_QFR8xuCnTi6rywcaSMtxtnnuGXGBbsTduS__l6VZ6iYO0GxSjrbXuBSXsMkC5zxER8ecZSZBsb5ueOOPJDWkDn6qTBmUBgFSEAkBBXpWAQBR4bbTj4qYRUOwBeolSeMpF9N9ZoNK69XAaXZzgKhBtfT8sn_RmFhGDP267MsolnK85bBiIL_gF2XgsEljVUPdDppiVOg0JKRaVtNswBybUNbKF0HteJPRFT0Y_rFoJoqVpPRyEef6uCwcGxIm2UHckE0CXyWdfETkd-eH7FfffJR0ulUhbcS4rFGy4WNJa8G6oiyF5vFa55na0PvzMZqNXUq70lxvK86sV1iMT7uNxWCqcUkWWCoVyJTFPWbPAIZI4atDKJnM5fxjtVM/4lw/hC2O29usQAid6pmA4lChwA/h0/h001.YqmcRWgBbcVj9OGIRLa_a2lj6uQVti1nsNT7hDrlpBw) Super PACs including “MAGA Inc.” have just dumped nearly $1 million into this race, with the majority going towards attack ads against Working Families champion Aftyn Behn. Sounds to us like they’re scared, Peter. And they should be. clean_body: | | | Hey, Peter — Since we reached out about Aftyn Behn’s campaign to flip a House seat in Tennessee, Nashville Scene reported that far-right money is flooding in:1 Super PACs including “MAGA Inc.” have just dumped nearly $1 million into this race, with the majority going towards attack ads against Working Families champion Aftyn Behn. Sounds to us like they’re scared, Peter. And they should be. If Aftyn wins the special election in just one week, it will make it that much harder for House Republicans to give themselves and their billionaire friends handouts with our tax dollars. — Team WFP Source: 1\. , Nashville Scene, November 19, 2025 \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Working Families Party Date: Tue, Nov 18, 2025 Subject: Two weeks to send a Working Families champion to Congress Peter, In just two weeks, we have an opportunity to flip a congressional seat and make Republicans’ already razor-thin margin in the House of Representatives even smaller. Tennessee State Rep. Aftyn Behn — a proven champion for working people — is running in a special election against a MAGA Republican who’s been backed by the Bezos family and extremist election-buying billionaire Jeffrey Yass. 1 Aftyn isn’t taking corporate PAC money, and she’s not bankrolled by special interests. Her campaign to make our communities affordable and protect our human rights relies on people like you, pitching in $10 or whatever you can to help share her message in the final two weeks of this election. Aftyn Behn has dedicated her life to making this country work for the many, not the few. As a rural organizer and State Representative, she has won important victories for the people of Tennessee, helping to pass legislation to rebuild distressed communities and win a First Amendment case protecting reproductive freedoms. Aftyn understands the crisis that our neighbors are facing as the cost of living keeps going up, and she is laser-focused on real solutions that would put money in the pockets of working people — not the billionaires who are working so hard to oppose her. This election won’t be easy. Tennessee Republicans gerrymandered Aftyn’s district in 2022 to disenfranchise Democratic and Black voters in the Nashville area. But Trump and his corrupt, incompetent Republican Party have voters mad — and now, Trump faces a 55% disapproval rating in a district he won by double digits in 2024. What’s more, the nationwide progressive sweeps in elections two weeks ago show that voters across the country are ready to hear how we’ll work to protect their communities from billionaire greed and government corruption. We have a real shot to win this, Peter. But we can’t do it without you. In solidarity, Working Families Party Source: 1\. , The Tennessean, September 30, 2025 Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. Paid for by Working Families Party PAC (77 Sands St. #6, Brooklyn, NY, 11201). | | Sent via . clean_body: | | | Hi Peter, Brianna here. I wanted to follow up on the note my team sent yesterday and announce that today, we are launching an end-of-month fundraising goal of $10,000. I know the holiday season is a busy and expensive time for many families, and I truly appreciate every supporter who steps up even when it’s not easy. But that’s exactly why I’m reaching out personally: we need to build momentum now so we don’t enter December already behind. Your support keeps us moving forward. — Brianna \-----Begin Original Message----- November has flown by, Peter! We only have 6 days left in the month, and we are falling short of our end-of-month fundraising goal. It’s completely understandable as we approach the holiday season – this is a busy and expensive time of year for so many. The Colorado State Treasurer race is highly competitive and we can’t afford for our voter outreach to slow down. Every conversation we fund now helps us build the momentum we need heading into 2026. Thank you for believing in our campaign. Let’s finish November strong. — Team Titone Fighting for working families, consumer protections, and small businesses in the House of Representatives has been the honor of Brianna's lifetime. Brianna is running to be your next Colorado State Treasurer to support small businesses, and fight hard to save hard-working Coloradans money. **** Follow Brianna Online: ** Paid for by Brianna for Treasurer. Registered Agent Brianna Titone.

name: David Hogg
subject: We’ve got one week till the Georgia runoffs
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
We’re one week away from Akbar’s election. Can you help him win?
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20251125-1&t=1&akid=2879%2E587540%2EcvU3ud)
Peter,
I want to tell you about a leader in Georgia who’s one week away from winning a runoff to become the youngest member of the General Assembly: **Akbar Ali.**
[](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20251125_1_akbar.7GQErC&refcode=em20251125-2879&amount=5&t=2&akid=2879%2E587540%2EcvU3ud)
Akbar is a 21-year-old small‐business owner, a proud graduate of Kennesaw State University, and a former First Vice Chair of the Gwinnett County Democratic Party.
Earlier this month, he advanced to the runoff in Georgia’s House District 106. That runoff takes place _in just one week_ so we need all hands on deck to help him win.
**[Can you split $5 or more now between Akbar and Leaders We Deserve?](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20251125_1_akbar.7GQErC&refcode=em20251125-2879&amount=5&t=3&akid=2879%2E587540%2EcvU3ud)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20251125_1_akbar.7GQErC&amount=5&refcode=em20251125-2879&t=22&akid=2879%2E587540%2EcvU3ud)**
Akbar’s campaign is rooted in his home of Gwinnett County, where he says leadership means listening and being present in neighborhoods — not just showing up on day one.
Here’s what Akbar is fighting for:
**✅ Fully funding our public schools** — better pay and real support for teachers, ensuring classrooms have what they need.
**✅ Protecting rights and dignity for every Georgian** — including trans rights, immigrant communities, and LGBTQ+ neighbors.
**✅ Lowering costs for working families** — from housing and healthcare to strengthening the scholarships and expanding access to education.
**✅ Making sure our neighborhoods show up** — he’s served on transit advisory boards, been involved in school PTAs, and is rooted in community organizing.
Akbar is exactly the kind of young progressive leader we set out to build this movement around. He’s truly a _leader we deserve._ And we’re all in on this race.
**[Will you contribute $5 now to power the final week of this campaign?](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20251125_1_akbar.7GQErC&refcode=em20251125-2879&amount=5&t=23&akid=2879%2E587540%2EcvU3ud)**
In solidarity,
David Hogg
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20251125-1&t=24&refcode2=2879_587540_cvU3ud&akid=2879%2E587540%2EcvU3ud)**

clean_body: Read my latest op-ed.| | | Dear Peter, I wrote an about Alaska's Permanent Fund and how we can ensure it sticks around for future generations. Please take a moment to read it below: | | Preserving the PFD has always been important to me. As a State Representative for several terms, I stood up to Party bosses and voted to protect it. Thanks for taking a read. If you have any questions about this proposed change, please feel free to send me an email: mailto:info@nancyforalaska.com?subject=Question on your PFD proposal Nancy Dahlstrom Alaska's Lt. Governor and 2026 Republican candidate for governor | | | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Nancy Dahlstrom For Governor P.O.Box 770725, Eagle River, Alaska 99577

name: Mark Kelly
subject: The Department of War is coming after me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chrissy Houlahan for Congress
body:
You can bet this was ordered by Donald Trump and carried out by Pete Hegseth. But right now, that's besides the point.
| | |
---
The Department of War is coming after me because they don’t like what I have to say.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119983648/584857331/1349576396?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1198-bu-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZDQ0ZGQ1ZS0zOWNhLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=71V4cgrZiJuCm4Ye_8PjVvCB1LC9mZA3bUg29XPJBKU=)
When I was 22 years old, I swore an oath to the Constitution. I've upheld that oath every day since.
If Trump is trying to intimidate me from doing my job, it won’t work.
I’ve given too much to this country to be silenced by bullies who care more about their own power than about protecting the Constitution.
Call this what it is:**Political persecution.**
You can bet this was ordered by Donald Trump and carried out by Pete Hegseth. But right now, that's beside the point.
**[The point is that I need you to chip in whatever you can afford to Chrissy Houlahan and me so we have the resources necessary to fight back against what comes next.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119983650/584857332/1349576396?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1198-bu-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZDQ0ZGQ1ZS0zOWNhLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=71V4cgrZiJuCm4Ye_8PjVvCB1LC9mZA3bUg29XPJBKU=)**

Mark Kelly

clean_body: | = Hi Peter, it’s Callie. I’m reaching out to share the latest numbers before my next meeting: We’re six days out from the end of the month. We’ve officially endorsed 60 (& counting!) Democratic pro-choice women running for office up and down the ballot next year. We’re on the first day of our End-of-Month fund, and we need to raise $20,000 per day for EMILYs List women before the month ends! Want to help hit our goal? Then pitch in with your customized amount here: November Supporter Record for Peter 📅 Month: November ❌ Status: Inactive Make your first donation of the month and match our average online contribution of $16:** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: | = Every dollar you give now powers the women who are on the frontlines — running for governor, state legislature, Congress, and beyond — to protect our freedoms and defend reproductive rights. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = With gratitude, Callie Fines (she/her/hers) Chief Financial Officer, EMILYs List Thank you for your support! name: Team Tina Newsletters
subject: Here’s your November news! 🗞️
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek
body:
|
#
---
| | Hi Peter, What a month! We have a lot to catch up on. I know life can be busy, and your inbox can fill up with political emails, so I appreciate any time you can dedicate to reading these monthly newsletters. Thanks!
— TK
---
* * *
**We won!**
This ruling, the fourth of its kind, validated the facts on the ground. Oregon does not want or need military intervention, and President Trump’s attempts to federalize the guard is a gross abuse of power. Governor Kotek is still fighting to have Oregon’s troops demobilized.
* * *
**Governor Kotek led the states in making sure SNAP benefits were restored.**
As soon as a federal court ordered the Trump Administration to immediately release 100% of funding to pay for Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program (SNAP) benefits, Governor Kotek issued an emergency order to restore those benefits, and Oregon state employees worked through the night to get SNAP benefits to Oregonians in need.
* * *
**Governor Kotek releases Executive Order to Accelerate Climate Protections for Lands and Waters**
Governor Kotek was commended by the Pew Charitable Trusts for her executive order protecting natural resources. Governor Kotek’s directive calls on state agencies to work together to strengthen the ability of Oregon’s lands and waters to adapt to and recover from increasing environmental changes, including frequent, severe natural disasters and extreme weather events.
[READ MORE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119984379/584859508/1422406816?refcode=AU_TK_CL_GEN_GEN_AC_20251125_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYjQ0ZGQ1ZS0zOWNhLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z2wRsfToxBPQw2sEJpmhKmvII0zqoAc1Wr3MKnLFNdw=&emci=a9e807bb-25ca-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=fb44dd5e-39ca-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=15353729)
---
* * *
**Oregon is making the change to clean energy faster.**
Governor Kotek’s order outlines actions to reduce emissions through strategic electrification, efficiency improvements, and deployment of clean energy infrastructure that simultaneously fight climate change, strengthen grid reliability, and deliver more affordable energy for communities across our state.
* * *
**The Community Safety Firearms Act is now law**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119984380/584859509/-1363126158?refcode=AU_TK_CL_GEN_GEN_AC_20251125_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYjQ0ZGQ1ZS0zOWNhLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z2wRsfToxBPQw2sEJpmhKmvII0zqoAc1Wr3MKnLFNdw=&emci=a9e807bb-25ca-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=fb44dd5e-39ca-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=15353729)
[READ MORE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119984381/584859537/-1363126158?refcode=AU_TK_CL_GEN_GEN_AC_20251125_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYjQ0ZGQ1ZS0zOWNhLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z2wRsfToxBPQw2sEJpmhKmvII0zqoAc1Wr3MKnLFNdw=&emci=a9e807bb-25ca-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=fb44dd5e-39ca-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=15353729)
---
* * *
**Oregon Becomes First U.S. State to Earn “Accessibility Verified” Status**
Wheel the World (WTW), a platform dedicated to making travel accessible for all, has officially designated Oregon as “Accessibility Verified.” Oregon welcomes all visitors, including those with disabilities, and this recognition makes it a go-to destination for all travelers.
[READ MORE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119984382/584859538/1071717120?refcode=AU_TK_CL_GEN_GEN_AC_20251125_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYjQ0ZGQ1ZS0zOWNhLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z2wRsfToxBPQw2sEJpmhKmvII0zqoAc1Wr3MKnLFNdw=&emci=a9e807bb-25ca-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=fb44dd5e-39ca-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=15353729)
---
* * *
**Thanks for tuning in to this month’s edition of Team Tina’s Newsletter. Please forward this to a friend to help us reach more Oregonians — and if someone forwarded you this message,**[_**sign up to keep receiving updates here!**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119984383/584859539/2107422739?refcode=AU_TK_CL_GEN_GEN_AC_20251125_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYjQ0ZGQ1ZS0zOWNhLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z2wRsfToxBPQw2sEJpmhKmvII0zqoAc1Wr3MKnLFNdw=&emci=a9e807bb-25ca-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=fb44dd5e-39ca-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=15353729)
Thanks, team. Talk soon!
— Team Tina
| Tina Kotek is working hard to make Oregon a better place to live and work for all Oregonians – and making real progress on issues like housing and homelessness, education and child care, and mental health and addiction services. **Can you chip in any amount now to support her work?** | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119984384/584859540/-780220320?refcode=AU_TK_CL_GEN_GEN_AC_20251125_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYjQ0ZGQ1ZS0zOWNhLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z2wRsfToxBPQw2sEJpmhKmvII0zqoAc1Wr3MKnLFNdw=)

Portland, OR 97242 **[tinafororegon.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119984385/584859541/1133357015?refcode=AU_TK_CL_GEN_GEN_AC_20251125_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYjQ0ZGQ1ZS0zOWNhLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z2wRsfToxBPQw2sEJpmhKmvII0zqoAc1Wr3MKnLFNdw=&emci=a9e807bb-25ca-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=fb44dd5e-39ca-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=15353729) | [info@tinafororegon.com](mailto:info@tinafororegon.com)** | Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek

name: Aftyn Behn
subject: No one thought we could do it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
If we win, 2026 shifts.
| No one thought we would have an opportunity to flip a seat this year.

Not the establishment, not the media, and certainly not the GOP. [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/97084?t=6&akid=21999%2E878179%2ESBA327) **But we won our primary with _pure grassroots power_ and showed what’s possible for Democrats in the Deep South.**

And now, we’re barreling towards the December 2nd special election here in TN-07, where I’ll be facing off against Trump’s hand-picked candidate.

[**Republicans are already pouring money into this race to stop us from flipping this seat, and I’m counting on your support to help me fight back. Will you split a contribution between my campaign and the Voter Protection Project today?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/97084?t=7&akid=21999%2E878179%2ESBA327) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Aftyn Behn and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/97085?t=8&akid=21999%2E878179%2ESBA327)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/97086?t=9&akid=21999%2E878179%2ESBA327)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/97087?t=10&akid=21999%2E878179%2ESBA327)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/97088?t=11&akid=21999%2E878179%2ESBA327)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/97084?t=12&akid=21999%2E878179%2ESBA327)
I’m an organizer, state rep, and pissed-off social worker running for Congress because we need leadership that meets this moment.

For the past decade, I’ve been at the heart of a long-term political project to take back Tennessee, shoulder to shoulder with fellow organizers, activists, movement lawyers, community groups, and mentors who took the time to teach me what real power-building looks like.

Now, I’m taking this fight national – and this special election could make history. It’s the only red-to-blue special in the country.

**If we flip this seat...Republicans lose a vote in the House, and 2026 shifts.**

It will take record-breaking support to win this race, but I know we have what it takes. [**Donate to my campaign and the Voter Protection Project to help us win this race and flip this seat →**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/97084?t=13&akid=21999%2E878179%2ESBA327)

Onwards!
– Aftyn Behn
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=21999%2E878179%2ESBA327). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=21999%2E878179%2ESBA327).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=21999%2E878179%2ESBA327) to request fewer emails. ---

body:
VoteVets is fighting back against these attacks on our democracy from a wannabe King.
#
**First,** the President of the United States threatened sitting members of Congress because he disagreed with them. All of those threatened are Democrats who have served this country honorably.
**Then,** the Department of War came after one of our own, Senator Mark Kelly.
**Now,** VoteVets is prepared to mobilize and fight back against this political persecution.
There is no doubt that Donald Trump ordered this phony investigation. But VoteVets won’t back down and let this country fall into full authoritarianism.
VoteVets and its members love this country and what it stands for. We, like Mark, took an oath to support and defend the Constitution of the United States against all enemies, foreign and domestic. We will not surrender to bullies.
VoteVets is fighting back against these attacks on our democracy from a wannabe King. We’re doing all we can to hold this administration accountable.
But we need your help. We rely on small-dollar donations to power our work, so we’re asking:

clean_body: | = Trump’s AI Order Is a Direct Threat to State Power and Voter Control = Friend, The Trump administration is preparing an executive order designed to override state-level AI laws — even after the Senate already rejected this overreach before. This isn’t just about artificial intelligence, or information security. It’s about who gets to decide how our states are governed. And if Trump gets his way, it won’t be voters — it’ll be him. Secretaries of State are already on the front lines of election security, data oversight, and fighting AI-driven disinformation. Stripping them of their authority could open the floodgates for abuse in our elections and beyond. We can’t let this happen. We have to fight back now. = | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Trump’s goal is clear: silence oversight, consolidate power, and rewrite the rules. Peter - We're pretty sure you didn't wake up this morning, jump out of bed and say "Today is the day I am going to split a donation between Jon Ossoff's U.S. Senate campaign and Tammy Baldwin!" _(If you did, great! Here’s the link and thank you in advance:**[secure.actblue.com/donate/stb-em-ossoff](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=stb-em-ossoff.Y8Sd3h&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20251125_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=5119%2E35263%2EAsTGLs)**)_ Otherwise, please give us a second to explain why we’re asking you to chip in and why particularly right now. It is going to take sustained effort from now through Election Day. And we have to get to work right away. Unfortunately, a lot of people think maybe it's too early to give. _You are receiving this email because of your past support for Democrats in North Carolina and across the country. We need your support to elect Richard Hudspeth and flip the US House, but if you’d prefer not to receive emails from our campaign, you can unsubscribe at any time._
---
| | Friend, As we prep for Thanksgiving this week, I’ve been thinking about what it means to call Western North Carolina home. This is a place defined by resilience, generosity, and neighbors who show up for one another. And for all we’ve faced this year, there’s still so much to be grateful for. I’m grateful for the people who keep this region moving forward—our teachers, nurses, small-business owners, volunteers, and every neighbor who steps in without being asked. And as we celebrate, we can’t forget those who are struggling right now: families whose incomes have fallen while costs rise, immigrants taken from their loved ones and the communities they help build, and folks who are worried about affording the health care they need. Their struggles remind us that gratitude must call us to action. I’m inspired by who we can be, and protective of who we are. Western North Carolina has always stood for compassion, fairness, and dignity—and in a moment of division and uncertainty, those values are worth defending. I see a community ready to rebuild, to heal, and to imagine a future where every family has a fair shot. So as you gather this week, I hope you’ll take a moment, not to make the holiday political, but to keep our community strong. Share our message with someone at your table. Ask if the folks around you are registered to vote. And if you feel called, consider making a contribution so we can reach more of our neighbors. Thanksgiving is a moment to reflect, but also a moment to protect what we cherish.
---
[ DONATE NOW ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119985302/584862571/859996678?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMjA4MTkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDdjYzE0MmQtM2NjYS1mMDExLTgxOTYtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=YBP-UpZIWtXbneGAVEIjD-F9osxATuNoZj2_ju6erc8=)
---
Thank you for believing that NC-11 deserves better. Wishing you and your loved ones a warm and meaningful Thanksgiving.Take care,
**Dr. Richard Hudspeth****
**Democrat for U.S. Congress

name: Mark Kelly
subject: The Department of War is coming after me
body:
The Department of War is coming after me because they don’t like what I have to say.

When I was 22 years old, I swore an oath to the Constitution. I've upheld that oath every day since.

If Trump is trying to intimidate me from doing my job, it won’t work.

I’ve given too much to this country to be silenced by bullies who care more about their own power than about protecting the Constitution.

Call this what it is: Political persecution.

You can bet this was ordered by Donald Trump and carried out by Pete Hegseth. But right now, that's besides the point.

The point is that I need you to chip in whatever you can afford to Roy Cooper and me so we have the resources necessary to fight back against what comes next. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cvf_email_kellysplit]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately and be split between Mark Kelly and Roy Cooper:
