The first $7,000 of each contribution from a person and the first $10,000 from a multicandidate committee (“PAC”) will be allocated to Cooper for North Carolina. The first $3,500 of a person’s contribution and the first $5,000 of a PAC’s contribution will be designated for the primary election; the next $3,500/$5,000 will be designated for the general election. The next $10,000 from a person and $5,000 from a PAC will be allocated to North Carolina Democratic Party – Federal. The next $44,300 of a contribution from a person and the next $15,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC General Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Headquarters Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Legal Fund. A contributor may designate his or her contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if following it would result in an excessive contribution.

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email address, with a check, or with a spouse — thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119985417/584863096/-1397648958?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_VIP_AC_20251125_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzIzNWZhZmItM2NjYS1mMDExLTgxOTYtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=I8aSzxNRYS_cxPuwCncM2J6QHPJwyWG4vitd0eX42iI=)
---
Hi there, While it’s a tumultuous time in our country, there’s some good news coming out of this month’s elections. **Arizona Democrat Jay Ruby has won a seat on the Prescott City Council!** [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119985418/584863097/541746778?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_VIP_AC_20251125_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzIzNWZhZmItM2NjYS1mMDExLTgxOTYtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=I8aSzxNRYS_cxPuwCncM2J6QHPJwyWG4vitd0eX42iI=) I’m Lindsay, Jay’s campaign manager. And I need you to know that what we accomplished in rural Arizona represents an undeniable shift in our political landscape. **Prescott hasn’t elected a Democrat to city council since 2013. ** _Let me say that one more time:_ Prescott, Arizona hasn’t elected a Democrat to city council in over a decade. Until now... Two of our Republican opponents had financial backing from a far-right PAC and another had a public endorsement from the Republican mayor-elect. With the money we raised from a majority of small-dollar donors, we hustled to reach as many voters as possible - at their front doors, at community events, in their mailboxes, and on their phones. Jay beat the next Republican candidate by _170 votes_ because we worked our tails off for nine months. But the conversations we’ve started in Prescott can’t end with Jay’s campaign. [**The Arizona Democratic Party has big plans to activate rural voters, with more on the line than ever before. Can you help us keep these wins coming?****Chip in $17, $70, or $170 today to celebrate the 170 votes that the Yavapai County GOP never saw coming.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119985419/584863098/541746778?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_VIP_AC_20251125_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzIzNWZhZmItM2NjYS1mMDExLTgxOTYtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=I8aSzxNRYS_cxPuwCncM2J6QHPJwyWG4vitd0eX42iI=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119985420/584863099/79744751?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_VIP_AC_20251125_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzIzNWZhZmItM2NjYS1mMDExLTgxOTYtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=I8aSzxNRYS_cxPuwCncM2J6QHPJwyWG4vitd0eX42iI=)

clean_body: | = Hi there, While it’s a tumultuous time in our country, there’s some good news coming out of this month’s elections. Arizona Democrat Jay Ruby has won a seat on the Prescott City Council! = I’m Lindsay, Jay’s campaign manager. And I need you to know that what we accomplished in rural Arizona represents an undeniable shift in our political landscape. Prescott hasn’t elected a Democrat to city council since 2013. Let me say that one more time: Prescott, Arizona hasn’t elected a Democrat to city council in over a decade. Until now... Two of our Republican opponents had financial backing from a far-right PAC and another had a public endorsement from the Republican mayor-elect. With the money we raised from a majority of small-dollar donors, we hustled to reach as many voters as possible - at their front doors, at community events, in their mailboxes, and on their phones. Jay beat the next Republican candidate by 170 votes because we worked our tails off for nine months. But the conversations we’ve started in Prescott can’t end with Jay’s campaign. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you, Lindsay Campaign Manager, Jay Ruby for Prescott City Council Arizona Democratic Party PO Box 36123 Phoenix, AZ 85067-6123 United States mailto:info@azdem.org | PAID FOR BY THE ARIZONA DEMOCRATIC PARTY. NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. GREG FREEMAN, TREASURER. WWW.AZDEM.ORG

Fellow American,

The political landscape is shifting fast — and not in our favor.

Across the country, Democrats are racking up major wins. And now, we’ve even elected a self-described socialist. If that doesn’t signal where the far-left is trying to take this country, I don’t know what does.

What does this mean for our future? Higher taxes. Bigger government. More power consolidated in the hands of a radical political class that’s determined to reshape America from the ground up.

And while they continue to celebrate, we’re still dealing with the fallout from a government shutdown that hurt families, strained small businesses, and created uncertainty for millions. During that shutdown, I refused to exploit the situation — I didn’t ask for a dime.

But now, our campaign has fallen behind.

I’m not asking for much. In fact, I’m only asking for $1.

| [**CHIP IN $1**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=c9c17912497c4be38ccf0862e7d6587a&_e=R4NV6ws8hcxSMtCEF4H2ESi2w0B1En1MtD16GKI3ITImtd3x7a6sM9T9FC-inI4srKViHsjmlsVuSCMdaZTIkcUP_pAjOhnf6Z-xLm-EYNEXVhQrIo2RvvCN-GkJjgMV7Mw8SsMx1XXR-QqU3IruXR6DRvr0BV_-7xGdk7ZS7PRRrylEC7jV8kIJKCtDki_514P5oEZsx1I2cG3SvjGceSxu_vCtuWBv6FpVTVRw7PCf6UV0uM69VyBzK6k5uO4IZsMGgnG_CgWyCgr3fxTQgX7vq8ev3eBvBG9Q-RptxA_RNj4ZJcrne617wCe1Kx-EHS4flYHMla6MNJ1GtJPcSFWgKcqPq5CsvlTI9Z_TSxgHRhi8uv9n4pyWRCKWdffhdQImA4Rz_hSLKQI039dqkjUU9V5t_-l6bG-D7FY8OedY7g8baEXHpxBZDY-4SxX92_IldqFWoISJADKXZrjg3ASXimXZWLBw8RF4EkiyqmdF3rZ8dZLulTAJG_7mrTP3gNQsTlV-NxSH90rRKmo7hOuITGlMAc7PGmpoixfHLzvQDz8WD2ZGKx-74BLTvrKQ3FL5b6bg2CpWRJO4FYmOnAVGTCTIov_RhrQs0c1Wwnfl-Uy71xxXDwZCsXyGWF_EmgrqdGKdhzvYmeVlAa9UOxdDGrRRhx8HrLonXheJkEvRMEQuycur9ltIVvOhThmMq64iO8YbkU10DyPKOZZ-K1_xKIlNAux7s1twBQqyqTA%3D)

Just one dollar to help us close the gap and get back on track.

If everyone reading this chipped in just $1, we’d immediately have the resources we need to push back against the far-left surge and protect the values we believe in.

[**Will you chip in $1 right now and help us stand strong in this critical moment?**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=c9c17912497c4be38ccf0862e7d6587a&_e=R4NV6ws8hcxSMtCEF4H2ESi2w0B1En1MtD16GKI3ITImtd3x7a6sM9T9FC-inI4srKViHsjmlsVuSCMdaZTIkcUP_pAjOhnf6Z-xLm-EYNEXVhQrIo2RvvCN-GkJjgMV7Mw8SsMx1XXR-QqU3IruXR6DRvr0BV_-7xGdk7ZS7PRRrylEC7jV8kIJKCtDki_514P5oEZsx1I2cG3SvjGceSxu_vCtuWBv6FpVTVRw7PCf6UV0uM69VyBzK6k5uO4IPwBNXhTOmmHj_T95WRkIljtVZK-CiU2wsN2hrul7w87q7zHalJCDOjoj8tp39auFDatWKZnBSo90vwtF7TXEzK5MPHE39z4YkefGbf8ltTlYqPJzJ_h0moLRlJd-6_0oEK4B47wgla2SUHRAP-vINk4KfvropPYcuNCUXld_BAjRATo7PP4mlrQ5iBqq68vFStYFxjnMaVLpBveuD5U5U62XqIohfwk6ESk-2L2hDc7ju53vFpPeK4Uwv50euHxKv12q2677_frOcmqLTFN266r3IksBZlKezNymHGh5vWUaPCVKFop5IetjbwUzzjXxF4iMbcM-Q2evzD1u8RQDXRMxhNjUYtWXwK6itfHXkBs2HtT9ZeaBR8R3GppuWmJqcIgy0c34_xjz5qERvL7TdRYPI4jr_zSG1uybcu0BpIBfz8ofEd0pgTcvhM8bwjPMDtzJJGtQDPPHd9_i4Nw11P25LQqwTF4WxMPQDf0Ni7Q%3D)

The stakes couldn’t be higher — thank you for stepping up.

Thank you,

Tim Walberg

**_MEET TIM_**

Tim Walberg believes in the Michigan values of hard work, entrepreneurship, compassion, and creating opportunities for each person to use their God-given gifts to care for their families, reach for their dreams, and help their community. As an elected official, community foundation leader, manager in higher education, and pastor, Tim has demonstrated a consistent commitment to advancing opportunities for individuals to succeed and doing his part in elected office to help make America a pillar of freedom and hope in the world.

Of all of Tim's accomplishments, he is most proud of his family. Tim and his wife Sue have been married for 50 years. They live in Tipton where they raised their three now-adult children Matthew, Heidi, and Caleb. Matthew and his wife Erin, and Heidi and her husband Prince have blessed Tim and Sue with their pride and joy, their six grandchildren.

name: James Carville
subject: I’m mad as hell that this race just shifted in the wrong direction
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
If we don’t get off our butts and help Chris Pappas right now, we can kiss the Senate majority goodbye.
Folks, it’s James Carville.
I’ve been around the block a few times and worked on a heck of a lot of campaigns. So believe me when I tell you: **This ain’t good.**
John Sununu — yeah, _those Sununus_ — just jumped into the U.S. Senate race in New Hampshire. And now the political eggheads have DOWNGRADED Democrats’ chances of winning there.
**[💥Before you read another word, split $10 or whatever you can between Chris Pappas and Heartland Patriots to help Chris fight back right now.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97837?refcode=em20251125-9742&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9742%2E614464%2Evb07YL)**
Let me tell you what this means: **If we don’t get off our butts and help Chris Pappas right now, we can kiss our chances of winning back the Senate majority goodbye.**
This isn’t some back-bench, no-name guy we’re up against. **Sununu’s won a Senate seat before.**
He’s got name ID, deep pockets, and Wall Street’s dark money machine ready to drown us in attack ads. This is the far-right’s big play, y’all — they know if they take New Hampshire, Democrats have _no viable path_ to flipping the Senate.
Chris Pappas is the real deal. I mean it. He’s won the toughest district in New Hampshire four damn times, and he knows how to bring folks together. But he cannot — **_cannot_** — do this alone.
So here’s what I need from you:
**[Split a contribution between Chris Pappas and Heartland Patriots today. $10, $25, whatever you can spare. Because if we let the GOP buy this seat for Sununu, we’re gonna be stuck with Republican control for years to come.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97837?refcode=em20251125-9742&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9742%2E614464%2Evb07YL)**
**[Split a donation now »](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97837?refcode=em20251125-9742&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=9742%2E614464%2Evb07YL)**
I’m mad as HELL that this race just shifted in the wrong direction — but that means it’s time to get serious. Chris is the only one who can hold this seat, but he needs a hell of a lot more firepower to fend off what’s coming.
Let’s show these Republican bigshots that we’re not scared — and we sure as hell ain’t backing down.
**[Give what you can right now.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97837?refcode=em20251125-9742&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=9742%2E614464%2Evb07YL)** Let’s win this damn thing and flip control of the Senate.
— James Carville
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97837?refcode=em20251125-9742&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=9742%2E614464%2Evb07YL)

name: Nikki Budzinski
subject: Sincerely asking for your input
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki for Congress
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119985476/584863329/-2063340125?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OTg1NmE4NS0zZGNhLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3s-OdSoZUTRGKiYgB18WF1DHNsse0Yys4PswhPO-oQc=)
As you know, I’m in Congress to fight for working families.

And while I spend a lot of time on the ground in Central and Southern Illinois to listen to what matters most to you, it’s impossible to reach everyone.

**[So before we break for the Thanksgiving holiday with family and friends, I’m sincerely asking for your input: Will you take our November campaign priorities survey?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119985477/584863399/-1046055840?refcode=em-11.25.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OTg1NmE4NS0zZGNhLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3s-OdSoZUTRGKiYgB18WF1DHNsse0Yys4PswhPO-oQc=&emci=7c856a85-3dca-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=89856a85-3dca-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=13891387)**

I’m deeply disappointed by the lack of action from the Republicans in power both in Congress and the White House. Families, veterans, seniors, farmers, and more are struggling to make ends meet while the GOP focuses on tax breaks for their billionaire donors. They won’t lift a finger to help the middle class.

I’ve worked hard despite the GOP majority to get results – protecting local jobs in Granite City, ensuring our public schools get the funding they need, and prioritizing veteran care.

**[There’s more work to be done, and your thoughts will inform what I focus on as we move into the midterm election year. **Derek, I’m Aftyn Behn. I’m running in the LAST congressional race this year, and I would love your support — because hell will freeze over before I let Republicans get away with their agenda unchecked.** Here’s the situation here in Tennessee:
* Early voting is already underway.
* Election Day is December 2.
* Republicans are SCARED. We’ve shrunk their margin to single digits, so they’re running multiple six-figure ad campaigns against me.

name: Elaine Luria
subject: I’m running for Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action
body:
I’m running to help families get ahead instead of just getting by, to ensure veterans get the support they need, and to defend our Constitution.
| | | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5ada6bc4-74bb-479e-85dc-f8040bcdd582/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbf41b5f3-9bcc-49a5-ae3a-76c82dfb1357/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Hi, Peter, Elaine Luria here. I’m a mom, a Navy vet, and a former Democratic Congresswoman. I just announced I’m officially running for Congress in Virginia’s 2nd District. [Before I explain why I’m getting back into the fight, I’m personally asking you to split a donation between my campaign and Blue Amp Action today. No donation is too small to have an impact in these crucial early days. ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2fc75622-5afb-43c9-a550-3ad3483b2269/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [Become a Founding Donor](https://default.salsalabs.org/T404de47a-3d7d-41a7-abfa-99162d8031d4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| On January 3rd, 2021, I stood in the House chamber and swore to support and defend the Constitution of the United States against all enemies, foreign and domestic. Three days later, the Capitol was attacked, and I had a choice to make: be a politician, or be a patriot. I put our republic first: I served on the January 6th Committee, seeking truth, justice, and accountability for the American people. That decision may have cost me my House seat in 2022, after an onslaught of MAGA cash targeted our district. But I’d make the same choice all over again, because I swore an oath—the same oath I swore at 17 when I entered the Naval Academy—to protect the country I love. That’s why I’m running for Congress in 2026. I’m running to help families get ahead instead of just getting by, to ensure veterans get the support they need, and to defend our Constitution. These aren’t just talking points, Peter. We can win this. We’ve already done so twice before. And last Tuesday, Virginians proved they’re intent on a new direction. I’m ready to bring tough leadership to communities across Coastal Virginia, but I can’t go it alone. I’m counting on patriots like you to join me on the right side of history. The first week of a campaign is a crucial testing ground for the strength of our movement. If you’re ready to take back our district and flip the House majority, [will you become one of the very first supporters of my 2026 Congressional campaign by splitting a $25 contribution today? ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1eaa9b27-1a49-4da3-bce0-55a09da72aee/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [Become a Founding Donor](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9c7f2a69-080f-43e9-8462-70a7bc45e5eb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| I want you to know how grateful I am for your support. Together, Elaine Luria

PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208
---

---
| | |
---
| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade, it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in a democracy, not a dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T51f0f025-e246-46fb-8d3d-e89c7c6b39e9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: The Mountain Minute: 11/25/2025
body:
Thanksgiving prices fall in Colorado but families still pay more than most Americans
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
**PRESENTED BY[ROCKYMOUNTAINVOICE.COM](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
| | Hi friends,
Happy Thanksgiving week! 🦃🦃🦃
Listen to today's Mountain Minute podcast [here](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), or watch on [YouTube](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) or [Rumble](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.). Here is a summary of today's top stories:
🏔️ **Here in Colorado...** Tina Peters was [moved into solitary confinement](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) as state officials urged Gov. Polis to block her transfer during appeal. Xcel’s proposed [10% rate hike](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) sparked backlash from families already stretched thin. A DPS audit revealed over [$4 billion in long-term liabilities](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) and nearly $1 billion in unspent bond cash, intensifying concerns about mismanagement. Mesa County’s Vineyard Church has a [“historic” opportunity](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) for it’s Jesus-based mental health program amid soaring suicides, while the state [cut health-insurance subsidies for illegal immigrants](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), leaving 5,000 people suddenly facing full-price premiums. And Joy’s Kitchen—serving 5,000 families monthly—was [abruptly evicted before Thanksgiving](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), forcing an emergency move as demand surges.
**🇺🇸 On the National Stage...** A newly unsealed court filing accused Meta of hiding internal evidence that [its platforms harm children](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), tolerating repeated violations tied to sex trafficking, and designing addictive products for minors. And in Nigeria, the number of [abducted children surged to more than 300](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) after officials updated the count from a mass kidnapping at St. Mary’s Catholic School, triggering an urgent, large-scale rescue effort.
🗣️ **Commentary Spotlight...** Commentators argued that [soaring child-care costs](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) are erasing the value of many second incomes, making homeschooling and one-income households more financially practical than ever. Meanwhile, Thanksgiving prices are finally easing—though [still higher in Colorado](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)—offering families a rare bit of relief heading into the holiday season.
This is the Mountain Minute for Tuesday, November 25, 2025.
– Team RMV
---
|
---
**TODAY'S TOP STORIES**
**[Thanksgiving prices fall in Colorado but families still pay more than most Americans](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY SHAINA COLE, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
_This Thanksgiving, the cost of celebrating for Colorado families is at its lowest since the peak in 2022. The American Farm Bureau Federation reports that a traditional Thanksgiving dinner for ten now costs $55.18 – a five percent decline from last year._
_Colorado continues to sit above the national average. According to KKTV, the same meal costs $61.63 in the state, which is about $6.45 more than what the typical American pays but still roughly $13 cheaper than the year before._
_The West once again tops the chart as the most expensive region for Thanksgiving, with a $61.75 average that closely matches Colorado’s $61.63 estimate. That’s not a fluke; analyses of grocery spending show Western states, including Colorado, consistently near the top for food costs, reflecting higher farm labor and input costs for fruit and vegetable producers, elevated wages and rents in Western cities, and steeper transportation expenses to move food through mountain corridors and into smaller markets._
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Trying to move the needle in Mesa County’s mental health crisis as leaders call the moment “historic”](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY JEN SCHUMANN, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* **Mesa County faces a severe mental-health crisis:** Suicide claims about 50 lives a year—31 deaths per 100,000 people—and nearly 13% of residents can’t access needed care, leaving local providers overwhelmed and the community desperate for solutions.
* **BeWell offers a Jesus-centered model filling critical gaps:** Launched inside Canyon View Vineyard Church, the program blends clinical tools like CBT and EMDR with spiritual support, delivering more than 500 free sessions in 18 months and becoming a lifeline for residents who lack access to traditional care.
* **A major expansion is now underway:** After a donor offered a $400,000 matching gift, leaders called the moment “historic,” outlining plans for more staff, more counseling capacity, and a dedicated mental-health center to help move the county’s “needle” out of the danger zone.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
The Rocky Mountain Voice is a 501(c)(3) that exists to promote informed civic engagement and the principles of self-governance through enterprise reporting on public policy, politics, government, and culture throughout the state of Colorado. The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support!
[DONATE TO ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
|
---
**[Stop Financing the Second Job](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY CHRISTIAN HORSTMANN, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* **Child care is consuming the “second paycheck”:** With full-time care costing over $1,000 a month—and up to $1,650 in places like Boulder—many Colorado parents find that a second income barely covers daycare, commuting, meals out, and the “time savers” needed to survive two-job schedules.
* **Homeschooling reframes the financial equation:** The author argues that home education often costs less and offers far more flexibility, allowing families to borrow materials, buy used, share resources, and adjust spending without penalties—making one-income homeschooling workable even for single parents.
* **The trade-off yields deeper family benefits:** Choosing a home-first life creates slower mornings, stronger sibling bonds, personalized learning, and time to build character—returns that don’t show up on a pay stub but, the author says, offer the best long-term investment for families.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️ **
[**Preparing for Battle — The Full Armor of God**](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
**BY DRAKE HUNTER | COMMENTARY | NOVEMBER 23** _When Peter wrote these words, he wasn’t describing a paranoid state of mind—he was describing a prepared one. Being alert and sober-minded means living fully awake—alert in God’s love and clear-minded in Christ’s truth._
[**The numbers didn’t match: El Paso’s canvass exposes a statewide reporting failure the state never explained**](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
**BY JEN SCHUMANN | STATE | NOVEMBER 22** _Colorado voters expected a routine post–Election Day canvass after the November 4 coordinated election. Instead, El Paso County became ground zero for the latest crisis involving Secretary of State Jena Griswold’s office after a canvass board member noticed that the numbers on the state’s website didn’t match the county’s certified reports._
__
[**What unfolded during the uncertified transition**](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[****](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**BY JEN SCHUMANN | LOCAL | NOVEMBER 21** _Florissant’s May 2, 2023 election put five new people on the fire district board, and the change was obvious right away. The newcomers had run together as a coordinated slate. Within weeks, their actions toward Fire Chief Erik Holt sparked a sequence of events that ended with his firing, a criminal investigation left on the floor—and a lawsuit now sitting before the Tenth Circuit Court of Appeals._
__

**Feel like you have a unique story, commentary or tip to share?** Email [submit@rockymountainvoice.com](submit@rockymountainvoice.com).
|

Here is a summary of today's top stories: 🏔️ Here in Colorado... Tina Peters was as state officials urged Gov. Polis to block her transfer during appeal. name: Mark Kelly
subject: The Department of War is coming after me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Governor
body:
You can bet this was ordered by Donald Trump and carried out by Pete Hegseth. But right now, that's besides the point.
| | |
---
The Department of War is coming after me because they don’t like what I have to say.

Call this what it is:**Political persecution.**
You can bet this was ordered by Donald Trump and carried out by Pete Hegseth. But right now, that's besides the point.

name: NHGOP Fundraising Team
subject: Please don't disappoint Grandma...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Hampshire Republican State Committee, Chairman Jim MacEachern
body:
Grandma expects us to fight back (and finish dessert)

| | | | | [|
---](https://gop.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6abc8216f2c93cdbede56dda3&id=36e8f3dbb3&e=f3aa6419cd)
| | | | | |

Friend,We’ve had a lot of urgent fundraising emails this year... but this one is different.This time, **Grandma is watching.** She walked into the kitchen, took one look at our daily fundraising total, and said:**“If the NHGOP doesn’t hit its goal tonight... nobody is getting pie on Thursday.”** And frankly — we can’t risk it.Because while Democrats spend their holidays pushing income taxes, shutting down the government, and trying to bring Washington dysfunction to New Hampshire, **Grandma expects us to fight back (**_**and finish dessert).** _Every dollar you give tonight will help us build the team we need to stop the Democrats’ agenda in 2026 — higher taxes, bigger government, and policies that make it harder for families to get ahead.**Grandma doesn’t tolerate that nonsense.** She believes in personal responsibility, living within your means, and protecting what makes New Hampshire the safest, most affordable, most fiscally responsible state in the country.And she also believes in pie.
But she’s not handing it out until we close this fundraising gap.We’re short — and your support right now will make the difference.[**Chip in HERE before Grandma turns off the oven:**](https://gop.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6abc8216f2c93cdbede56dda3&id=9113114376&e=f3aa6419cd)
---
| [SAVE THE PIE](https://gop.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6abc8216f2c93cdbede56dda3&id=d3d4660a39&e=f3aa6419cd)
---
| [MAKE GRANDMA PROUD](https://gop.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6abc8216f2c93cdbede56dda3&id=75b701cffe&e=f3aa6419cd)
---
| |

Thank you,
NHGOP Fundraising Team

clean_body: Grandma expects us to fight back (and finish dessert) | | | | | | | | | | | Friend,We’ve had a lot of urgent fundraising emails this year... but this one is different.This time, Grandma is watching. She walked into the kitchen, took one look at our daily fundraising total, and said:“If the NHGOP doesn’t hit its goal tonight... nobody is getting pie on Thursday.” And frankly — we can’t risk it.Because while Democrats spend their holidays pushing income taxes, shutting down the government, and trying to bring Washington dysfunction to New Hampshire, Grandma expects us to fight back (and finish dessert). Every dollar you give tonight will help us build the team we need to stop the Democrats’ agenda in 2026 — higher taxes, bigger government, and policies that make it harder for families to get ahead.Grandma doesn’t tolerate that nonsense. She believes in personal responsibility, living within your means, and protecting what makes New Hampshire the safest, most affordable, most fiscally responsible state in the country.And she also believes in pie. But she’s not handing it out until we close this fundraising gap.We’re short — and your support right now will make the difference. | | | | Thank you, NHGOP Fundraising Team | | | | | | | | | Paid for by the New Hampshire Republican State Committee, Chairman Jim MacEachern. name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: President Trump is using the FBI to target me
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=2382%2E135344%2EjXUNi0)

Friend —
Last night, the FBI's Counterterrorism Division appeared to open an inquiry into me in response to a video the President did not like.
In that video, I directly quoted the Uniform Code of Military Justice alongside five other Members of Congress with service and veteran backgrounds. Officers and enlisted in our military are trained to follow lawful orders and refuse to follow illegal orders. It’s part of the training. This has been the case since World War II.
Since then, the President has misquoted me and then called for my arrest, trial, and death by hanging. Secretary of Defense Pete Hegseth has threatened my friend, Senator Mark Kelly, with court-martial. And now, it appears the president has directed the FBI to target the rest of us.
**This is exactly why we made that video in the first place.**
President Trump believes in weaponizing the federal government against his perceived enemies and does not believe laws apply to him or his Cabinet. He uses legal harassment as an intimidation tactic to scare people out of speaking up. He’s done it to law firms, universities, private sector companies, and private individuals.
But these kinds of tactics won’t work on me. And neither will the total wave of death threats, bomb threats, and general harassment he has unleashed.
I have always worked to be upfront and honest in these emails. This latest news from the FBI means that I have had to start thinking through a legal defense strategy – and we do not know exactly where President Trump and his Department of Justice will take this inquiry. And for the time being, all of that planning is being paid for through campaign dollars.
[**So, any contribution you can make now will be put to work immediately to ensure I have the resources to fight back.**](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-nov25.9EZGVj&refcode=em251125&t=2&akid=2382%2E135344%2EjXUNi0)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/127?c0=ebs-em-nov25.p9wmKo&amount=3&refcode=em251125&t=21&akid=2382%2E135344%2EjXUNi0)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/129?c0=ebs-em-nov25.mlMpk7&refcode=em251125&t=22&akid=2382%2E135344%2EjXUNi0)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/122?c0=ebs-em-nov25.acN8ty&refcode=em251125&t=23&akid=2382%2E135344%2EjXUNi0)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/123?c0=ebs-em-nov25.7Jzc07&refcode=em251125&t=24&akid=2382%2E135344%2EjXUNi0)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/124?c0=ebs-em-nov25.NLtrYQ&refcode=em251125&t=25&akid=2382%2E135344%2EjXUNi0)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/127?c0=ebs-em-nov25.p9wmKo&refcode=em251125&t=26&akid=2382%2E135344%2EjXUNi0)**
---
****
To be frank, the whole thing isn’t about one line from one video. The events of the last week do not represent the country we know and love.
I refuse to believe that this is the new normal — where the President of the United States uses fear and intimidation against people with whom he disagrees.
But I can’t do this alone.
Thank you for reading — and thank you in advance for your help.
Elissa Slotkin

P.O. Box 4145
East Lansing, MI 48826

name: Jazz Lewis
subject: November Newsletter
body:
https://www.jazzlewis.com/ [https://www.jazzlewis.com/]
November 2025 Newsletter
Community Comes Together at Ardmore Park
Earlier this month, I spent the day at Ardmore Park helping build a brand-new playground, and it was truly special. This is the community where I grew up , so seeing neighbors, partners, and volunteers come together to create a space for families means a great deal to me. The energy, teamwork, and commitment everyone brought to the project showed just how much people care about investing in the next generation .
Knowing that future children will get to enjoy this park the way I did as a kid makes this project even more meaningful. This new play space is more than equipment; it’s a reminder of what we can accomplish when we roll up our sleeves and work side by side . I’m grateful to everyone who made it happen and proud to see Ardmore Park continue to grow as a safe, welcoming place for families across the community.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88468/images/Community%20Comes%20Together%20at%20Ardmore%20Park.jpg]
Building a New Future Along the Blue Line Corridor
This month, I joined so many amazing community leaders for the public launch of the Blue Line Corridor Coalition (BLCC) to advance a community-led vision for long-overdue investment along this key stretch of Prince George’s County. The BLCC brings together state, local, and neighborhood partners to drive equitable development and strengthen the county’s long-term economic foundation.
We’re already seeing meaningful progress. November marked continued movement on projects like the Capitol Heights Metro redevelopment , LISC’s 210 on Park , new modular homes in Fairmount Heights , and the Central Avenue Connector Trail — all bringing new housing, retail, mobility improvements, and opportunities for families.
The BLCC’s vision remains clear : transform underused spaces, grow entrepreneurship, expand workforce training, and celebrate the corridor’s cultural legacy. This work is laying the foundation for a stronger economy and ensuring longtime residents can stay, thrive, and benefit from the progress ahead .
Learn more here [https://ggwash.org/view/101422/reimagining-the-blue-line-corridor-turning-decades-of-planning-into-promise?fbclid=IwY2xjawONYWdleHRuA2FlbQIxMABicmlkETBtSVFZS29LNDZFSFI3UnFNc3J0YwZhcHBfaWQQMjIyMDM5MTc4ODIwMDg5MgABHlO1cKZeCnHv9k9euepMklg-D-IrOB9hQqzoGp0YcatYFpOB2QOSEjcekxVI_aem_plM469H4-2cDIic7VAynHA] .
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88468/images/Building%20a%20New%20Future.png]
Happy Thanksgiving!
Happy Thanksgiving! Wishing you a joyful start to the holiday season, filled with great food, big laughs, and moments that warm the heart. As you travel, celebrate, and gather with loved ones , stay safe and enjoy reconnecting with friends and family!
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88468/images/Thanksgiving%202025.png]
https://www.jazzlewis.com/ [https://www.jazzlewis.com/]
Delegate Jazz Lewis
Democrat, District 24, Prince George's County
Taylor House Office Building, Room 151

name: Jena for CO
subject: Trump is trying everything
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jena for Colorado
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2511-q4-jg?refcode=251125-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2511-q4-jg?refcode=251125-email]
Peter –
Have you seen the latest on Tina Peters?
Earlier this month,Trump’s Federal Bureau of Prisons requested that Colorado transfer Peters from state to federal custody. Jena has urged the Governor to deny the transfer request.
Jena said, “Allowing Trump’s transfer of Tina Peters would supercharge Trump’s attempts to re-write history and disseminate election lies. It would also undermine our efforts to enforce the law and protect Colorado elections.” Peters was convicted by a jury of her peers and sentenced to 9 years in prison for compromising election equipment.
Ever since, Trump has tried to meddle in Colorado’s legal system by having the DOJ intervene in the case, threatening “harsh measures” against Colorado, and now requesting Peters be moved to federal custody.
Jena has stood up to Peters and Trump as Secretary of State, and won. She is ready to keep up the fight as the next Attorney General, but she needs your help to get there.
Can you chip in now to ensure we elect a leader who can take on far-right extremists and win? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2511-q4-jg?refcode=251125-email]

name: Jane Fonda Climate PAC
subject: What your $1 can do right now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
We’re switching things up.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119988630/584873530/1328794144?refcode=ea.4b0bb8d8-45ca-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.4b0bb8d8-45ca-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRiMGJiOGQ4LTQ1Y2EtZjAxMS04MTk2LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=tFGJT0rA_tXrUhioe2H28IxRpAeUl1FZr6RCrg09ZMw=&emci=4dbddf4f-16ca-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=4b0bb8d8-45ca-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=4823105)
---
Team, we usually see a dip in grassroots donations after Election Day, but this month’s numbers are falling further behind than we hoped. With runoffs _and_ a special election in Tennessee’s 7th Congressional District that could bring us one step closer to flipping the House in 2026, we wanted to try something a little different today. **We’ve set an ambitious $45,000 fundraising goal to hit by midnight on November 30, and we’re asking our most dedicated supporters to chip in just $1 toward that goal.** That’s it. One dollar. **[What do you say? So if you’ve ever wondered if a single dollar can make a difference, here’s your answer: Yes. It already has. And with your help, it will again. Because it’s not just your $1. It’s $1 from thousands of people just like you. People who know the climate crisis and a Trump Administration are existential threats, and who are choosing to act, not wait. = Every contribution — big or small — goes directly toward organizing, candidate support, and infrastructure that fights back against the fossil fuel lobby and builds lasting power for the climate movement. **High school dropout. Waffle House waitress. First woman to graduate from The Citadel. Single mom. Fighter.** **Nancy Mace wasn’t born into power. She worked for every inch of ground she’s gained.** At 17, she dropped out of high school and took a job slinging hash browns at Waffle House to survive. No silver spoon. No Ivy League connections. Just grit, grace, and a whole lot of graveyard shifts. **By the grace of God, she turned that struggle into a story no politician can touch.** She made history as the first woman to graduate from The Citadel, South Carolina’s legendary military college. She built her own business. She raised two kids on her own. And when the Left came for everything she believed in, she stood her ground.Now, she’s running for Governor of South Carolina. Nancy Mace is a battle-tested conservative who’s walked through fire and come out swinging. In Congress, she’s been one of President Trump’s fiercest allies, fighting to secure our border, protect our daughters, and stop the Left’s sick agenda dead in its tracks. **She’s not here to make friends. She’s here to make history.** Nancy is fighting to:
* Eliminate South Carolina’s Income Tax—the highest in the Southeast
* Prosecute violent criminals and pedophiles with zero leniency
* Crack down on sanctuary sheriffs who let illegal aliens roam free
* Defund radical public universities that indoctrinate, not educate
* Reform education so students learn how to think—not what to think
* Work hand-in-hand with President Trump to put South Carolina FIRST

Through every hardship, Nancy never gave up. And now she’s ready to do what she’s always done: roll up her sleeves, take the heat, and lead from the front. **South Carolina is worth fighting for. And Nancy Mace is just getting started.**

Today, I hope you’ll join me in supporting Rep. Valerie Foushee for re-election. **[If that’s all you need to hear, please use this link to donate to Valerie’s campaign today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119989127/584875405/1751535416?amount=10&source=SBD_VF_EM_FR_112525_Cooper-Endorsement_180DO_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMWFjYWQwMy00OGNhLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x3z2sLFUCz21wU1eoCHcFjc6ycRcpvTNJePc4MRyY_o=)** I didn’t plan to go to Washington. I spent my career serving folks right here in North Carolina by expanding Medicaid in our state, protecting access to reproductive care, and creating good-paying jobs in the clean energy economy of the future. **But because of extreme Republicans in D.C., we’re in danger of losing all of that progress.** I’m supporting Valerie because I know that she’s stood up for North Carolinians on these issues and more, and I know that she’ll continue standing up for us in Congress, too. clean_body: If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | = = Peter — I’m Roy Cooper, former Governor and Attorney General of North Carolina, and current Democratic candidate for United States Senate. Today, I hope you’ll join me in supporting Rep. Valerie Foushee for re-election. = I didn’t plan to go to Washington. I spent my career serving folks right here in North Carolina by expanding Medicaid in our state, protecting access to reproductive care, and creating good-paying jobs in the clean energy economy of the future. But because of extreme Republicans in D.C., we’re in danger of losing all of that progress. I’m supporting Valerie because I know that she’s stood up for North Carolinians on these issues and more, and I know that she’ll continue standing up for us in Congress, too. I truly believe that our best days are ahead of us. But when I get to Washington, I will need proven fighters by my side to make sure that we deliver the progress that North Carolinians deserve. Valerie Foushee is one of those fighters. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = I’m glad to have you join us. Thanks, Roy Cooper * | | | ---|---|--- = Valerie is fighting to protect access to health care, working families, and to reform our criminal justice system. But she needs your help to continue to do this great work in Congress. name: Jasmine Crockett
subject: This is brazen corruption
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
#
**BREAKING: Jasmine Crockett introduces the “No Presidential Payouts Act”**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98046?refcode=em20251125-9767&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9767%2E614464%2EUBosOH)
Y’all, it’s Jasmine Crockett.
In case Donald Trump or any of his MAGA sycophants are reading this, let me be 100% clear: **Taxpayers don’t owe Donald Trump a dime for his legal mess.**
While families across this country are stretching every dollar just to keep up with rent and grocery bills, this man is out here trying to squeeze **$230 _million_** out of the federal government to pay his own lawyers.
_You read that right._ Donald Trump wants the American people — the very folks he’s been attacking and ignoring — to cover his legal bills.
**That’s why I introduced the No Presidential Payouts Act, because your tax dollars should serve you — _the people_ — not protect a President’s pocket or bail out a billionaire with too many court dates.**
**[And that’s why I’m working overtime to win back the House for Democrats — so we can provide the check on Donald Trump’s power that our country so desperately needs right now. But to get the job done, I need your support. So please, split $10 or more between my campaign and State Democrats Committee, and let’s get to work. >>](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98046?refcode=em20251125-9767&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9767%2E614464%2EUBosOH)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $5](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98047?refcode=em20251125-9767&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=5&t=3&akid=9767%2E614464%2EUBosOH) [Contribute $15](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98047?refcode=em20251125-9767&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=15&t=4&akid=9767%2E614464%2EUBosOH) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98047?refcode=em20251125-9767&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=5&akid=9767%2E614464%2EUBosOH) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98047?refcode=em20251125-9767&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=6&akid=9767%2E614464%2EUBosOH) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98047?refcode=em20251125-9767&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=7&akid=9767%2E614464%2EUBosOH) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98047?refcode=em20251125-9767&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=8&akid=9767%2E614464%2EUBosOH) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98046?refcode=em20251125-9767&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=9&akid=9767%2E614464%2EUBosOH)
---
**I’m not afraid to call this what it is:** brazen corruption from the man who’s supposed to be leading our country. And I’ll be damned if we let him get away with it.
But the truth is that fighting people like Donald Trump takes resources and grassroots power. **And I need you in this fight with me.**
**[Every dollar you chip in helps me keep pushing back against this corruption, holding these folks accountable, and making sure our government works for the people, not the powerful. Let’s send a message loud enough for Trump to hear from his courthouse: we’re not paying your bills, and we’re not backing down.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98046?refcode=em20251125-9767&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=10&akid=9767%2E614464%2EUBosOH)**
Thank you,
Jasmine

If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.statedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe_state-democrats-committee/?t=11&akid=9767%2E614464%2EUBosOH).

If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: I’m not afraid to call this what it is: brazen corruption from the man who’s supposed to be leading our country. And I’ll be damned if we let him get away with it. But the truth is that fighting people like Donald Trump takes resources and grassroots power. And I need you in this fight with me. Thank you, Jasmine Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats.com). Not authorized by any federal candidate or candidate committee.

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: President Trump is using the FBI to target me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Folks,

Last night, the FBI's Counterterrorism Division appeared to open an inquiry into me in response to a video the President did not like.

In that video, I directly quoted the Uniform Code of Military Justice alongside five other Members of Congress with service and veteran backgrounds. Officers and enlisted in our military are trained to follow lawful orders, and refuse to follow illegal orders. It’s part of the training. This has been the case since World War II.

Since then, the President has misquoted me, and then called for my arrest, trial, and death by hanging. Secretary of Defense Pete Hegseth has threatened my friend, Senator Mark Kelly, with court martial. And now, it appears the president has directed the FBI to target the rest of us.

**This is exactly why we made that video in the first place.**

President Trump believes in weaponizing the federal government against his perceived enemies and does not believe laws apply to him or his Cabinet. He uses legal harassment as an intimidation tactic, to scare people out of speaking up. He’s done it to law firms, universities, private sector companies and private individuals.

But these kinds of tactics won’t work on me. And neither will the total wave of death threats, bomb threats, and general harassment he has unleashed.

I have always worked to be upfront and honest in these emails. This latest news from the FBI means that I have had to start thinking through a legal defense strategy – and we do not know exactly where President Trump and his Department of Justice will take this inquiry. And for the time being, all of that planning is being paid for through campaign dollars.

[**_So, your split contribution to Maggie Hassan and me will be put to work immediately to ensure I have the resources to fight back._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119989303/584875682/291031615?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.11.25_Elissa-Slotkin-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_90OP_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMWFjYWQwMy00OGNhLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7CxmtVeIDhvR7iIoFj2T_2fSHeWCOi_xmSLPEVErOFI=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Elissa Slotkin and Maggie Hassan will go through immediately:_ | | [ DONATE $10 NOW >> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119989305/584875684/291031615?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.11.25_Elissa-Slotkin-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_90OP_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMWFjYWQwMy00OGNhLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7CxmtVeIDhvR7iIoFj2T_2fSHeWCOi_xmSLPEVErOFI=)

I refuse to believe that this is the new normal -- where the President of the United States uses fear and intimidation against people with whom he disagrees.

From: **Rashida Tlaib******
Date: Mon, Nov 24, 2025
Subject: Demand Congress reverse SNAP cuts now
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Friend,
**SNAP nutrition benefits are the most effective anti-hunger program in the U.S.,** but they do much more than address hunger. SNAP helps reduce poverty and improve health outcomes with studies showing that SNAP recipients have lower annual medical costs than people with similar means who do not receive SNAP.1 It leads to better education outcomes and self-sufficiency in urban and rural communities alike.
And yet, during Trump’s government shutdown, he illegally withheld SNAP funds from tens of millions of beneficiaries, using food insecurity as a weapon against vulnerable families.
**Trump’s attacks come just months after Republicans passed their Big Budget Betrayal that cut $187 billion from SNAP over the next decade―the largest cut in the program’s history.**
In response, Democrats in the House and Senate have introduced the **_Restoring Food Security for American Families and Farmers Act of 2025_****** to reverse Republicans’ SNAP cuts.
[**Add your name to urge the House and Senate to hold a vote on revering the $187 billion in SNAP cuts now.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39uDKkapQVnT18L0ER7M9FmembDrCA77QiZL64yPijK5S5Xvs4Zca5YLRP-fMBCnT92ToUvQZVYQZKXMvFXymZE2PoDOzd3rVFqCxbVrGipp1vqbp-oQ96JzrbwMnc-sxU0xNWrWL2j-ou77WzTzkKyd31iSaRokLyIv_7N17A9OdSFOGI_F8sVT_li4tk1dpHpp7cPW4h11WG2Rw7oyx-cILrDZV7Io34tvrMQB20BLEi8c6SFN90rgIvvDc4KYUAh39v4K_lgU_Oni5EiFfptrhZXjmmrG1sseU4KFdjsoOs1X5yNY_Ucy-R6kAznerXF7Yx0Z_gyXUg_AsRimVhA8roJuHp4QSrfPcC9-N0yZ31Gx_mSnDRgeerJFvNGtcw/4lw/lvr17FsqQR-HbFylw03_ZQ/h3/h001.xt9JtyaHiwyKQntNRYeZj7Gaff0qBfCETEtyfdXOca0)

Nutrition assistance used to be a bipartisan issue. But when Republicans passed their Big Budget Betrayal, they not only cut benefits, but shifted some of the cost responsibilities to states. As a result, states will be forced to find money in their state budgets by cutting other services, raising taxes, or cutting or eliminating SNAP altogether.
**These cuts will impact every single one of the more than 40 million Americans who currently receive SNAP, with roughly 4 million expected to lose all or most of their benefits―including children, seniors, veterans, and people with disabilities.**
[**We will not allow Donald Trump and his Republican Party to take food away from children and the most vulnerable. Add your name to demand Congress pass the**** _Restoring Food Security for American Families and Farmers Act_****now.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39uDKkapQVnT18L0ER7M9FmembDrCA77QiZL64yPijK5S5Xvs4Zca5YLRP-fMBCnT92ToUvQZVYQZKXMvFXymZE2PoDOzd3rVFqCxbVrGipp1vqbp-oQ96JzrbwMnc-sxVWUBmBJdVZn-8YemEB4UKV0B4QS5H2HOHUQdiCpyd-v4QJ5HjC3O7jTFrOx6mlDGRhmI7RytTgDSZGAroqX8aFzZ4x5mr59mb0jcNxjLlFx6NC8mpcGB-VnZ7yenavFB0X_lgTojIkBCeldTI6C8Gp_G_BTJbLfe0JS8BMOyAQcm6AAZVKspyNTcC2GvBcrKabmbhAT-Pq73LCTVT5T_g0n0zozD2Z4mVqwSJgVIypuor4mAdRx7HgjwHrZqO48m8/4lw/lvr17FsqQR-HbFylw03_ZQ/h5/h001.hAFGy9qqteohXNSlfgaBWnbdNLEBPvqGpMaW953xDi0)

clean_body: Republicans’ cuts will impact every single one of the more than 40 million Americans who currently receive SNAP. | | | Friend, Cuts to SNAP nutrition benefits are a direct attack on vulnerable people and communities. So when Republicans cut $187 billion from SNAP―the largest cut in the program’s history―they directly attacked children, seniors, veterans, and people with disabilities. Now, Democrats have introduced the Restoring Food Security for American Families and Farmers Act, which would reverse these cuts and protect states from having to either make up the difference or potentially eliminate SNAP altogether. | This holiday season, as families gather around the table, let’s make sure their plates are as full as their hearts. With love, Rashida P.S. If you or someone you know is experiencing food insecurity, please see my email below with resources to help. \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Rashida Tlaib** Date: Mon, Nov 24, 2025 Subject: Demand Congress reverse SNAP cuts now To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, SNAP nutrition benefits are the most effective anti-hunger program in the U.S., but they do much more than address hunger. SNAP helps reduce poverty and improve health outcomes with studies showing that SNAP recipients have lower annual medical costs than people with similar means who do not receive SNAP.1 It leads to better education outcomes and self-sufficiency in urban and rural communities alike. And yet, during Trump’s government shutdown, he illegally withheld SNAP funds from tens of millions of beneficiaries, using food insecurity as a weapon against vulnerable families. Trump’s attacks come just months after Republicans passed their Big Budget Betrayal that cut $187 billion from SNAP over the next decade―the largest cut in the program’s history. In response, Democrats in the House and Senate have introduced the Restoring Food Security for American Families and Farmers Act of 2025**** to reverse Republicans’ SNAP cuts. Nutrition assistance used to be a bipartisan issue. But when Republicans passed their Big Budget Betrayal, they not only cut benefits, but shifted some of the cost responsibilities to states. As a result, states will be forced to find money in their state budgets by cutting other services, raising taxes, or cutting or eliminating SNAP altogether. These cuts will impact every single one of the more than 40 million Americans who currently receive SNAP, with roughly 4 million expected to lose all or most of their benefits―including children, seniors, veterans, and people with disabilities. Together, we’re standing up to Republicans’ cruelty, which is putting tax cuts for billionaires over food for our children. With you in this fight, Rashida P.S. If you or someone you know is experiencing food insecurity, you may find these links helpful: Type your zip code into for a map of local food pantries and resources to help pay for transit, housing, and healthcare. Access or donate baby formula at . Find a nearby or that’s accessible to all. Buy low-cost surplus food from local grocery stores and restaurants through the , the (see for info about SNAP recipients getting $50 of free groceries), and the . And if you’re over 65 or disabled on Medicaid or Medicare, you may be eligible for free home-delivered meals with . See if you qualify . We’ll keep fighting together to guarantee food, healthcare, and housing as human rights. 1 Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . name: John Fetterman
subject: *real* fixes for Social Security
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
[ https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51612?t=1001&akid=10443%2E434096%2E9KyAdW ]John Fetterman

Folks, let’s be real. Trump and his crew can’t come right out and say they want to kill Social Security – too many folks have paid into it.

So they lie. Say it’s wasteful. Say it’s going broke. Say Wall Street can do better. Say they’re “fixing” it.

Their idea of fixing it is closing offices, cutting staff, and making it harder for older Americans to qualify for disability. That's not fixing it – that's scrapping it for parts so they can cash in. 😡

Now, I’ll be straight with you: Social Security does need real improvements. But what's needed is a far cry from what Trump and his crew are talking about.

Right now, Social Security isn't keeping up with seniors' actual costs. And yes, the fund might face trouble in a decade or so.

So I helped introduce a couple bills that will *actually* fix Social Security:

1️⃣ One that makes sure benefits keep up with the real cost of living – because folks shouldn't have to choose between prescriptions, rent, or food.

2️⃣ And a second that makes the ultrawealthy pay their fair share – because that’s money we can use to protect Social Security and keep our promises to seniors.

I’m working every day to protect and improve Social Security, but I need to hear from you. Please folks, will you take my 60-second Social Security survey now and tell me what you think? 👉

https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/52351?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=1002&akid=10443%2E434096%2E9KyAdW

Thanks for weighing in,

John ❤️

--------

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

name: Ted Cruz
subject: Brace yourself
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
I know this will be a shock, but I need you to hear it all the same. |
Fellow American,

name: Tyler Bowyer, Turning Point Action
subject: 🎁 Wrap your gift in victory
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TURNING POINT ACTION (TPACTION
body:
Please read the following message from our sponsor.
* * *

| | | | [](https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/0d804185d77c44cf8b97960ea95e1dcd-6fbfe5c2f71a4fb0863861fa04452543/63)
---
Friend,
---
At Turning Point Action, we don’t chase headlines. We chase victories. Real ones — in the field, in battlegrounds, with every door we knock and every ballot we chase. 2024 proved that our machine works. _The 10 states we chased ballots in?_ We won every single one of them to help put Donald J. Trump back in the White House. _And now, we're building something even bigger..._ To guarantee our America First movement wins again and again for years to come. And to celebrate that momentum — and remind you what your support fuels — we want to send you something bold: **🎁 Our limited-edition “47” Wrapping Paper.** _**[Give any amount today to help Turning Point Action prepare for 2026 — and we’ll send you a roll, as our thank-you for standing with us.](https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/0d804185d77c44cf8b97960ea95e1dcd-6fbfe5c2f71a4fb0863861fa04452543/63)**_
---
[](https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/0d804185d77c44cf8b97960ea95e1dcd-6fbfe5c2f71a4fb0863861fa04452543/63)
---
_Limited-edition “47” Wrapping Paper dimensions are 24”x8’. Upon your gift to Turning Point Action, please allow 3–4 weeks for fulfillment — all wrapping paper will be fulfilled prior to Christmas 2025 and donations must be received by 11/27/25. Limit ONE order per household._
---
This isn’t a holiday gimmick. It’s about showing your support for a movement that works — and the next phase of a mission we refuse to walk away from. And your gift to Turning Point Action does more than show your support... It builds the machine that’s winning elections across the country. Your gift today will power: ✅ Training activists across the country ✅ Upgrading the TPAction app ✅ Registering voters ✅ Pressuring weak-kneed politicians ✅ Growing our ballot chasing operations You aren’t just wrapping a present... You’re wrapping the next victory.
---
[ **Support Turning Point Action****&**
**Claim Your “47” Wrapping Paper**](https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/0d804185d77c44cf8b97960ea95e1dcd-6fbfe5c2f71a4fb0863861fa04452543/63)
---
2024 was the proof that our concept works. 2026 is the pressure test. And we’re already moving into new battlegrounds, deploying new coalitions, and prepping to win — all over again. And this time, we aren’t coming from behind — we’re going in with a plan, infrastructure, and people who know exactly what to do. Friend, help build what’s next for the fight ahead... Give any amount now and get your roll of “47” Wrapping Paper as a token of the movement you’re fueling.
---
**For Charlie,**
**Tyler Bowyer**
Chief Operating Officer Turning Point Action
---
[](https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/0d804185d77c44cf8b97960ea95e1dcd-6fbfe5c2f71a4fb0863861fa04452543/63)

Your gift wraps more than your presents — **it chases more ballots, wins more battlegrounds, and helps build a grassroots army for 2026.** _**[Make your gift to Turning Point Action today and receive your limited-edition “47” Wrapping Paper as a personal thank-you for fueling the fight.](https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/0d804185d77c44cf8b97960ea95e1dcd-6fbfe5c2f71a4fb0863861fa04452543/63)**_

name: Former Navy SEAL Adam Schwarze
subject: I do not advertise the nature of my work
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Schwarze for Senate
body:
The SEAL creed begins: “I do not advertise the nature of my work, nor seek recognition for my actions.” | [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=a01555e4c8b84a06931d461b05db29ac&_e=8lVnHNOAEg3efSIg6SyaIoacLInnDTkuvhT3lZCmKuh4uXfoOpNvq8m8H--_KtfYTgo2vpAuGWsfjyz2qCY49QyWzo7pb-7UE9oU6O7lwS0y2LBVBRlQk1PlzYpVyklJDQivIoHGjEZckXUg37-IEUh7yYNc_E-NSv9TDFwH9yOgE2gL4TNoO-IcAM_eGr4OmC594xb-n8fSCc4mKMml84AGXsx0vbw5lrLVgN0LEMWg1mIcMy4BifjDDKq8vPEMtD51_7k4or2au2GXUmrPsWUAqnd6y9E3rZNa5v8BoVH63WCMsOdJ9abflIggD33quN49tgPls9XU9SniBEcgoGt57lwxOADggHR4XmTvyCwP3PRRENGCYrw4nGkeMDiQgF5kIpwZpZkfk57OGODbXDpgw6VLHbpgzZQEKzxKJsNMfbWtfqhvhpr1a5kAq8gtCEVxJaExn1ozxaI05qKNFUatEh13JkvH5qdAGb3UhcInut_OuBMPv07BLZZXpUPuzGP8J1OD0BN8SNM1csTNFCiLRC_MZqOIuzpeyyJ-iEzYcc0mHDCW6zqNmRJziY1dxntYaVds1mdvTS5U0dqZja41mbpMrYSx_9txQZZ2gHyG-ALV66OGqgvzQG44M1FAZHftus0kBiuGMcdnjTvNETM8pNC_8Z-9CQc0Tw3FnhKRad-IOfclcTTC6dBp6aRGXyJZNl-k9rpt-r_orSCrp_pTUwB3OtD2d4Kb9sfToOMeXbtstH1UoYvC0aNnSgnFSeblMbGpgMHIMcddA2WeMQ%3D%3D)

---
Peter,

The SEAL creed begins: _**“I do not advertise the nature of my work, nor seek recognition for my actions.”**_

I’ve lived that line since the day I was pinned with my trident after graduating from BUDS.

Three combat tours in Iraq as a Marine infantryman.

**Six more deployments as a SEAL officer—Middle East, Pacific, and Africa. 70+ countries.**

Places that don’t make the evening news.

I never needed a megaphone.

I needed a plan, a team, and the discipline to execute when lives were at stake.

Minnesota needs the same quiet professionalism in the Senate. That’s why I’ve tossed my hat in the ring,_**in hopes of becoming the Republican nominee in what is shaping up to be Minnesota’s closest Senate race in a generation.

subject: Privatizing our services doesn't help Americans

body:
Seriously, folks -- Privatizing the USPS doesn't help Americans, it will harm rural communities all over the country, and it will remove a vital public service from our everyday lives. In addition, it'll destroy a safe, secure, and widely-used method of voting that is critical for those rural communities, for the disabled, and for our senior citizens.
RUSH $25 or more right now to protect mail-in voting, defend the USPS, and fight for the public services we need most >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=112525_2&amount=25]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
WaPo - Opinion: A frantic warning from 100 leading experts: Our democracy is in grave danger [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=112525_2&amount=25]
We’ll keep this short, Team: those experts are right.
The attacks of the last few years in our state legislatures across the country targeting the right to vote, especially minority communities, are an assault on our democracy.
Now Trump, DOGE, and the MAGA movement want to privatize our postal service and harm mail-in voting , which has helped millions of Americans vote -- not just in the pandemic, but going back to the states that adopted the widespread practice in the early 90's.
“ Our entire democracy is now at risk ,” they wrote. “ History will judge what we do at this moment. ”
With so much at stake now -- not just with voting rights -- we've got to push our efforts to fight back into overdrive ASAP.
Team, none of this happens without all of us doing our fair share. Step up to fuel our work with $25 or whatever you can today to try and stop the destruction of our government, save our democracy, and protect the right to vote >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=112525_2&amount=25]

clean_body: Seriously, folks -- Privatizing the USPS doesn't help Americans, it will harm rural communities all over the country, and it will remove a vital public service from our everyday lives. In addition, it'll destroy a safe, secure, and widely-used method of voting that is critical for those rural communities, for the disabled, and for our senior citizens. RUSH $25 or more right now to protect mail-in voting, defend the USPS, and fight for the public services we need most >> [] Voter Action Project [] WaPo - Opinion: A frantic warning from 100 leading experts: Our democracy is in grave danger [] We’ll keep this short, Team: those experts are right. The attacks of the last few years in our state legislatures across the country targeting the right to vote, especially minority communities, are an assault on our democracy. Now Trump, DOGE, and the MAGA movement want to privatize our postal service and harm mail-in voting , which has helped millions of Americans vote -- not just in the pandemic, but going back to the states that adopted the widespread practice in the early 90's. “ Our entire democracy is now at risk ,” they wrote. “ History will judge what we do at this moment. ” With so much at stake now -- not just with voting rights -- we've got to push our efforts to fight back into overdrive ASAP. Team, none of this happens without all of us doing our fair share. name: Mark Kelly
subject: A few thoughts for you, if you have a minute
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
body:
In 1990, during Desert Storm, I was stationed on the USS Midway. I flew 39 combat missions over Iraq and Kuwait. I had a missile blow up next to my airplane, I was shot at dozens of times by anti-aircraft fire.
[](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251125_2_kelly.7nBn0j&refcode=em20251125-2&t=1&akid=3690%2E582294%2EztWriw)**
Team, it’s been a weird few days.
In 1990, during Desert Storm, I was stationed on the USS Midway. I flew 39 combat missions over Iraq and Kuwait. I had a missile blow up next to my airplane, I was shot at dozens of times by anti-aircraft fire. If you had told me before one of those missions that 25 years later the President of the United States would call for me to be hanged, I would have said you were crazy.
But that’s exactly what happened last Wednesday.
Sadly, this is the kind of thing we’ve come to expect from this president. He’s a person who can live through the same year we have — rising political violence, escalating tensions, assassinations — and go on to wish death upon sitting members of Congress.
Yes, it was concerning, but more than anything, it’s incredibly sad. I served 25 years in the Navy, launched into orbit 4 times, and ran for Senate because I love this country. To me, there is nothing more American than standing up for our Constitution.
Donald Trump will never understand that. He’ll never understand putting service to this country before yourself. He’s made billions of dollars off his presidency while millions of people are wondering how they’ll afford their health care, or how to feed their kids.
He just doesn’t get it, and he never will. But that makes it even more important that people who do get it — people like you — stick together. That’s how we’ll get through this.
There’s no telling what’s ahead of us. This is uncharted territory for me, for my family, for my team, and we have to be ready for anything.
I wish I didn’t need to ask you to do any more than you already have, but today, that’s what I need to do.
**[Can you split a donation between me and Chris Pappas to help raise the resources we’ll need to stand against Trump and anything he throws at us?](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251125_2_kelly.7nBn0j&refcode=em20251125-2&t=2&akid=3690%2E582294%2EztWriw)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251125_2_kelly.7nBn0j&amount=5&refcode=em20251125-2&t=21&akid=3690%2E582294%2EztWriw)**
Again, I can’t thank you enough. It really means the world to me.
Mark
**New Hampshire is poised to be one of the closest Senate races in the country in 2026. Will you chip in today to help Chris stop the Republicans from flipping the Granite State red and expanding their Senate majority?**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_footer?refcode=em20251125-2&t=22&refcode2=3690_582294_ztWriw&akid=3690%2E582294%2EztWriw)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/cps_receive_fewer_emails/?t=23&akid=3690%2E582294%2EztWriw)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/cps_update_your_information/?t=24&akid=3690%2E582294%2EztWriw)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.chrispappas.org/unsubscribe/cps_unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=3690%2E582294%2EztWriw)

name: Josh Gottheimer
subject: it’s up to us
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH GOTTHEIMER FOR CONGRESS
body:
# [#] Team,

From day one, I’ve been clear that we must protect families from surging healthcare costs.

Jersey families are bearing the brunt of skyrocketing childcare, groceries, and energy bills. The impending 26% surge in healthcare costs for 24 million families on the ACA, and the 175% increase in health insurance premiums for some Jersey families, is a burden we cannot ignore.

It is up to us to fight for the American people.

Both sides must get to the table, find common ground, and deliver a bipartisan plan that makes healthcare more affordable for both Jersey families and all Americans. True bipartisan leadership is the only way

If you’re with me in this fight for bipartisan solutions, can you make a donation of any amount, no matter how small, to support my campaign today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jg-fr-2511?amount=]

Thank you for your support. Now more than ever, it’s important for us to stand together as a united front, fighting for the well-being of our Jersey families.

– Josh
Josh Gottheimer represents New Jersey’s Fifth Congressional District. Josh is in Congress to fight for lower taxes and Jersey Values. He’s working across the aisle to find real solutions for New Jersey families and is actively fighting against the ideological gridlock in Washington. Republicans have always talked a big game about helping working folks when facing cameras or on the campaign trail, but time and again, they've protected big-money interests over the people.

We flipped two seats on the all-Republican Public Service Commission — a huge win alongside a wave of many other Democratic victories across the country.
People are tired of the constant struggle to afford healthcare, groceries, and other basic necessities, and they’re demanding change. _We’re on a mission to deliver it._
But Peter, this is only the beginning, and we can’t slow down now.
We need to carry this momentum all the way through to the 2026 elections.
With a razor-thin majority, Republicans are ready to pull out all the stops to maintain power. And while they may out-raise us and out-spend us, with enough early preparation, we can win this fight together.
[The fate of our democracy rests on the Georgia Senate race, and we're not taking any chances. name: Jon Ossoff for Georgia
subject: $5 well spent
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for SenateThis email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail
body:
#

We have a question for you, Peter. And please — really think about it.
If you knew — and we mean really knew — that a $5 contribution meant Jon Ossoff would win reelection in the closest and most expensive Senate race of the midterms, wouldn't you make that donation?
And what if you knew that the same $5 meant Democrats would retake the Senate and be able to stop Trump's legislative agenda for the next two years, wouldn't it be $5 well spent?
We understand that it probably doesn’t seem like $5 is enough to accomplish those goals in the face of the millions that Super PACs are pouring into this race.
But the truth is, as you read this, there are lots of people like you who share these goals who have already given their $5 today.
Now they are hoping you'll do the same. MAGA is coming after Jon with everything they’ve got, and we need your help to fight back.
