If you knew — and we mean really knew — that a $5 contribution meant Jon Ossoff would win reelection in the closest and most expensive Senate race of the midterms, wouldn't you make that donation? And what if you knew that the same $5 meant Democrats would retake the Senate and be able to stop Trump's legislative agenda for the next two years, wouldn't it be $5 well spent? We understand that it probably doesn’t seem like $5 is enough to accomplish those goals in the face of the millions that Super PACs are pouring into this race. But the truth is, as you read this, there are lots of people like you who share these goals who have already given their $5 today. Now they are hoping you'll do the same. ---
| | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him.
---
Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him.

This wasn’t part of any planned launch or official demo.

The observers were silent, watching intently.

It was a real-time demonstration of advanced capabilities — something that exceeded all expectations.

Industry leaders are replaying the footage and discussing what it means for automotive AI.

Once you’ve seen it, you’ll realize: the future of AI-driven vehicles is here already.

[Watch the full clip today and see the technology in action.](https://links.main.yourcapitalminds.com/u/click?_t=affa6bfca09a497f86454ba803e6a9a2&_m=46f4257358844c728eaa7d22ef85abd5&_e=106DM-R393bUjvHryWvS6U4BasxhmzVy3k-edjnzqBqdHG4zdXaUyBASTfUSUD3rcRzrz8taajJnJG6sV6xigQcH4EEXFySVZA1nSo4QEVYd02qWegF5pyVWVtsluk4C1JTkxK7wA98NnVvzg-N368SaDe75_YqQKDnU8iynzSwXRPl0kjgqGllxys0_rY3ag-xtluGO4xTFSRP7fVem9IGxUtrjJ4YvfaBCGs0_qCZ4ENWdEOzZHqEh4ANZEUOdo-kIu4uLGcYfWmY_px5qAhkolPKH7bzbMOaEAapkOaxS1P0aEgqMno0fl87vYhegRxTUf-mLN23aHwdru0fLwLMTotcTutWHhOpA3qMkguZ86gzj_24sKjiQlH3z3wKzv2eIiejY80_27aBrlw4ZJdMjLl2tveUL0Rj8oy1DNUlnmEeKva-WKhvYY3jdN15faTzmwUfbYf9GCf-vB_ZJL_X9ZhM7JHYv9QwOlwnO3J20FaUuB-steWc16d5xnRg7vOCIXkv01DYQOY5kOq7hNoqctY4yE_ooC7r0uCt73LZ76UYwMcmwcAZkV9ZnEE1cM5wp8TDKvT13ceQaeS3dMA%3D%3D)
Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675*, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671.

body:
You can bet this was ordered by Donald Trump and carried out by Pete Hegseth. But right now, that's besides the point. | | | |
---
The Department of War is coming after me because they don’t like what I have to say.
[ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvbs9zJH3bzXGa-Qxcdd9sQoQZ3_sb3kZBd_5oUtYCR743rkvBAyETzMzKvkncM6v6MJH1SI2vI4cbpM4JDhOT8_7FExzsGQDhD4VHLgy_fyzuZAD6IX018c1lwpCpR-aIHHpvgv-jrbWG68ID7dAHNSd2VRaHuEXhn-U1VaNabKmxtFSZ5xxZkTi3rrjdgbZEcayeEBy6fbSYExh11nYimK5lG-9iifGlYnbiEaXDxn6h825pF7M-psoqKafJFKygxfsoonwh9jZOLk9IZhA0_u90owJZlg-jsMpFBYdS5vYdfGov5fb_740Ohf1pvsop28tczou5eB1Me3bpfbRAkT2DTLqGuqfyCve6Gl6NJnjHqb6YrdnVvwfUnEDs1LdU/4lw/diZWPnZrSk6-mF3tdrimLA/h0/h001.dw4e-WY_kOte1KGBDwrwPcHoBbhw0FvZwEITZ_4CoLY)

When I was 22 years old, I swore an oath to the Constitution. I've upheld that oath every day since.
If Trump is trying to intimidate me from doing my job, it won’t work.
I’ve given too much to this country to be silenced by bullies who care more about their own power than about protecting the Constitution.
Call this what it is: **Political persecution.**
You can bet this was ordered by Donald Trump and carried out by Pete Hegseth. But right now, that's besides the point.

subject: Two numbers
body:
# [](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/8?t=1&akid=977%2E1086043%2EJ2yIWW)
$22.97, Peter.
**That’s the average donation to support Wes Moore so far this month.** It’s with thousands of Marylanders and folks across this country who believe in our mission, chipping in $22.97 at a time, that we’re able to keep Wes in the fight no matter what comes our way.
But here’s another number, Peter: **$18,198.**
That’s how far we are from our November grassroots fundraising goal. With only days to go, we need your help to close that gap, increase our momentum, and power our campaign to reelect Wes.
**[So Peter, before it’s too late — will you chip in your first donation to Wes Moore? Every single contribution adds up.](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251125-2.CymtZr&refcode=em-20251125-2&t=2&akid=977%2E1086043%2EJ2yIWW)**

name: Tobias Read
subject: I joined Nine Secretaries of State demanding answers — now I need your help before Nov. 30
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251125em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251125em]
Hi, it’s Oregon Secretary of State, Tobias Read.
I don’t sound the alarm lightly. But what we’re seeing from this administration is dangerous.
Last week, I joined eight other Secretaries of State in demanding urgent answers from the Department of Justice and Department of Homeland Security about their secretive and improper use of voter data.
Here’s what we now know:
1. The DOJ requested unredacted statewide voter registration lists — including dates of birth, partial Social Security numbers, and full driver’s license numbers.

2. I refused. Oregon law is clear, and the federal government had no authority to demand that information.

3. But now DHS has confirmed that they have already received voter data from the DOJ — the same data federal officials initially claimed they didn’t have — and that they intend to load it into the insecure and error-prone SAVE system, which is used by ICE and CBP. What they plan next? They won’t say.
Let me be clear: This is exactly why I refused to turn over Oregonians’ private data. Because we cannot trust how this lawless, cruel administration will use it.
Senior officials gave Secretaries of State two completely different explanations — first saying the data was for HAVA and NVRA compliance, then admitting they were funneling it into a system used for immigration enforcement.
They misled us. And they misled the American people.
That’s why we’ve demanded a full accounting of how this data is being used, shared, and secured. The federal government owes the public the truth.
But I need your help.
Standing up to federal overreach comes with costs — strategic, political, and operational. This is an unprecedented moment and we’ve made the decision to hire staff and keep communicating with Oregonians. And we need a strong final push to stay on track for November. If you can, will you chip in before the deadline to help us protect voter privacy and hold this administration accountable? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251125em]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251125em]
Your support helps ensure Oregon continues to lead on election security, voter privacy, and democratic integrity — no matter how much pressure comes from Washington, D.C.
We cannot let this administration misuse sensitive information to intimidate voters or tear families apart. And with your help, we won’t.
Thank you for standing with me in this fight.
Tobias Read
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251125em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251125em]

clean_body: [] Hi, it’s Oregon Secretary of State, Tobias Read. I don’t sound the alarm lightly. But what we’re seeing from this administration is dangerous. Last week, I joined eight other Secretaries of State in demanding urgent answers from the Department of Justice and Department of Homeland Security about their secretive and improper use of voter data. Here’s what we now know: 1. The DOJ requested unredacted statewide voter registration lists — including dates of birth, partial Social Security numbers, and full driver’s license numbers. 2. I refused. Oregon law is clear, and the federal government had no authority to demand that information. 3. But now DHS has confirmed that they have already received voter data from the DOJ — the same data federal officials initially claimed they didn’t have — and that they intend to load it into the insecure and error-prone SAVE system, which is used by ICE and CBP. What they plan next? They won’t say. Let me be clear: This is exactly why I refused to turn over Oregonians’ private data. Because we cannot trust how this lawless, cruel administration will use it. Senior officials gave Secretaries of State two completely different explanations — first saying the data was for HAVA and NVRA compliance, then admitting they were funneling it into a system used for immigration enforcement. They misled us. And they misled the American people. That’s why we’ve demanded a full accounting of how this data is being used, shared, and secured. The federal government owes the public the truth. But I need your help. Standing up to federal overreach comes with costs — strategic, political, and operational. This is an unprecedented moment and we’ve made the decision to hire staff and keep communicating with Oregonians. And we need a strong final push to stay on track for November. If you can, will you chip in before the deadline to help us protect voter privacy and hold this administration accountable? [] DONATE NOW [] Your support helps ensure Oregon continues to lead on election security, voter privacy, and democratic integrity — no matter how much pressure comes from Washington, D.C. We cannot let this administration misuse sensitive information to intimidate voters or tear families apart. And with your help, we won’t. Thank you for standing with me in this fight. Tobias Read [] [] [] [] Friends of Tobias Read (5208) PO Box 42307 Portland, OR 97242 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: President Trump is using the FBI to target me.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for the People PAC ([fightforthepeoplepac
body:
Peter -
Last night, the FBI's Counterterrorism Division appeared to open an inquiry into me in response to a video the President did not like.
In that video, I directly quoted the Uniform Code of Military Justice alongside five other Members of Congress with service and veteran backgrounds. Officers and enlisted in our military are trained to follow lawful orders, and refuse to follow illegal orders. It’s part of the training. This has been the case since World War II.
Since then, the President has misquoted me, and then called for my arrest, trial, and death by hanging. Secretary of Defense Pete Hegseth has threatened my friend, Senator Mark Kelly, with court martial. And now, it appears the president has directed the FBI to target the rest of us.
**This is exactly why we made that video in the first place.**
President Trump believes in weaponizing the federal government against his perceived enemies and does not believe laws apply to him or his Cabinet. He uses legal harassment as an intimidation tactic, to scare people out of speaking up. He’s done it to law firms, universities, private sector companies and private individuals.
But these kinds of tactics won’t work on me. And neither will the total wave of death threats, bomb threats, and general harassment he has unleashed.
I have always worked to be upfront and honest in these emails. This latest news from the FBI means that I have had to start thinking through a legal defense strategy – and we do not know exactly where President Trump and his Department of Justice will take this inquiry. And for the time being, all of that planning is being paid for through campaign dollars.
**[So, your split contribution to Kamala Harris' Fight for the People PAC and me will be put to work immediately to ensure I have the resources to fight back.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-fftp-ebs?refcode=em251125&refcode2=805_2563979_L9-gNX&akid=805%2E2563979%2EL9-gNX)**

****
To be frank, the whole thing isn’t about one line from one video. The events of the last week do not represent the country we know and love.
I refuse to believe that this is the new normal — where the President of the United States uses fear and intimidation against people with whom he disagrees.
But Kamala Harris and I can’t do this alone.
Thank you for reading — and thank you in advance for your help.
Elissa Slotkin

name: Chris Ahuja
subject: Sherman Failed Us Again. I’m Fighting Back
body:
We deserve better in CA-32.

| | | | | | | | | | | | | | | [|
---](https://chrisahuja.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=97f443092fb7c091746070aa0&id=e85b815c4d&e=5a6ee82cdb)
| | | | | | Dear Peter,**This Thanksgiving, I’m grateful for the movement we’re building together** — a movement fueled by people who believe CA-32 deserves honesty, dignity, and leadership that reflects our community’s values.**And that’s why what we’re seeing from our current representative is so unacceptable.**
Brad Sherman’s recent conduct on a public airplane — viewed by multiple witnesses and reported to our campaign — wasn’t just inappropriate. It was embarrassing. It showed a stunning lapse in judgment at a time when our district needs someone focused on serving families, not creating distractions.
Meanwhile, people here are struggling with skyrocketing housing and food costs, unemployment, and rising healthcare bills while ICE continues creeping and kidnapping our neighbors. **Families are doing everything they can to stay afloat — and Washington should be doing the same for them.**
**But instead of leadership, CA-32 gets excuses.** Instead of accountability, we get entitlement. Instead of representation, we get absence.
**This campaign is about changing that.**
It’s about restoring integrity, service, and a basic respect for the people who call this district home. It’s about showing up, every day, for families, workers, and seniors who deserve better than what they’re getting now.
**This Thanksgiving, I’m asking you to help us keep building this movement.**
[**Your contribution of $27, $54, or whatever you can give today keeps us competitive, keeps us growing, and keeps us fighting for the future our community deserves.**](https://chrisahuja.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=97f443092fb7c091746070aa0&id=118d192b41&e=5a6ee82cdb)
**Thank you for standing with me.** Thank you for believing we can do better — and for helping make it possible.
Because right now, too many families in CA-32 feel like they’re carrying their burdens alone.
---
| [Donate](https://chrisahuja.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=97f443092fb7c091746070aa0&id=97deefd7b2&e=5a6ee82cdb)
---
| |

**With gratitude,
**[****](https://chrisahuja.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=97f443092fb7c091746070aa0&id=fa2c6d261e&e=5a6ee82cdb)**Chris Ahuja****Democrat for Congress, CA-32**
---
| | | | | | | | | [ View email in browser](https://mailchi.mp/chrisahuja/sherman-failed-fight-back?e=5a6ee82cdb)
Christopher Ahuja for Congress * 21255 Burbank Blvd Ste 120 * Woodland Hills, CA 91367-6669 * USA

subject: The price of a cup of coffee
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Talarico for Texas
body:
#
$5, Peter. That’s the donation we’re asking you to make today.
Here’s why:
For the price of a large cup of coffee, you can make a significant impact on Texas’ U.S. Senate race and the fight for the Senate majority.
We know it may seem like $5 is a drop in the bucket in a state as big and expensive as Texas. But small donations are the heart of our campaign.
It takes a movement of people to take back Texas from billionaire mega-donors and their puppet politicians. This race is going to be a marathon that requires a steady pace of support.
So yes, $5 does matter. We wouldn’t ask you if your support wasn’t important.
[**Will you make a $5 contribution to our campaign for the U.S. Senate today? This takes all of us — thousands of us chipping in to show our support for James.**](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-launch.bF5RK3&refcode=em251125-2-ak&t=1&akid=258%2E1347274%2E6vpDqf)

Hey folks,
Grant Hermes jumped on with me to discuss the Kash Patel chaos, Trump's attacks on Democratic lawmakers, the total collapse of DOGE, and some genuinely alarming stuff coming out of DHS. We also got personal about what the economy feels like right now for actual human beings--not the fantasy world Trump is trying to gaslight us into believing. You don't want to miss this one.
### **Timestamps**
* **00:07:12** -- Grant walks through the breaking MSNBC report on Trump debating whether to dump Kash Patel--and why the denial basically confirms it.
* **00:18:54** -- We dig into DOGE's quiet dissolution and the real legacy it leaves behind: shuttered research, lost data, and a mountain of harm.
* **00:29:36** -- The financial squeeze on American families, why childcare is breaking people, and how both parties keep missing the assignment.
* **00:36:58** -- Grant breaks open the DHS/Coast Guard scandal: why swastikas were reclassified and what "hate incidents don't exist anymore" actually means.
* **00:49:52** -- A broader look at what's happening to everyday life--from airfare to Oreos--and why everything feels more expensive and shittier for the rest of us.

This was one of those conversations that hits every nerve at once--policy, economics, identity, fear, hope. If you care about what's happening inside federal agencies, if you're watching the affordability crisis touch every corner of your life, or if you just want to understand the stakes as we head into 2025, this episode is essential. President Donald Trump went off-script during today's turkey pardoning ceremony, roasting the "big fat slob" Democrat Illinois governor JB Pritzker, Nancy Pelosi, Chuck Schumer, Biden and more.
**[Watch Trump cook the dems without mercy right here:](https://substack.com/redirect/3d78c155-14bc-473b-b045-5ee446dd7c7c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[](https://substack.com/redirect/3d78c155-14bc-473b-b045-5ee446dd7c7c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[ Click To Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/3d78c155-14bc-473b-b045-5ee446dd7c7c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
The turkeys, named "Gobble" and "Waddle" have been pardoned by Trump, with Trump joking that the last set of White House turkeys had a "null and void" pardon with former President Joe Biden's use of the autopen.
"I am officially pardoning them," Trump said of Biden's turkeys. "And they will not be served for Thanksgiving dinner."
Trump also quipped about naming the turkeys Chuck and Nancy, after Chuck Schumer and Nancy Pelosi. "But then I realized I would be pardoning them," Trump said. "And I would NEVER pardon those two people."

# Male wins female lifting competition, event organizers strip title after backlash
The most recent World's Strongest 'Woman' winner, Jammie Booker, has been stripped of her title after organizer found out that **["she" was actually a "he."](https://substack.com/redirect/0be63096-a080-4b99-8046-ce2f347af8c4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[](https://substack.com/redirect/634658da-c80c-4f9a-ba6a-8e422c009d47?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Booker 's best kept secret:** The Official Strongman Games World Championship in Arlington, Texas' rules state that competitors must compete in the category of their biological sex, but Booker never disclosed her male identity.
* **Viral call to action:** Organizers caught wind of the scandal after the viral video of second place, and rightful winner, lifter Andrea Thompson, allegedly calling the event "b---s---" before storming off the unfair podium. Organizers were swift to recall Booker's first place title, reassigning awards accordingly and make a public statement about the event's commitment to fairness.
* _Back in September, Politibrawl interviewed political activist and college wrestler Olivia Rondeau about transgenders in female sports. # **Trump launches 'Genesis Mission' to for AI development**
President Donald Trump signed an**[executive order](https://substack.com/redirect/51a67ebf-45f9-47f3-8d8b-3958b0c7c12c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Monday creating the "Genesis Mission," a new federal program that pairs government research facilities with private tech firms to harness artificial intelligence for scientific and engineering innovations.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/51a67ebf-45f9-47f3-8d8b-3958b0c7c12c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **How it works** : The measure requires energy officials and science policy leaders to open up federal information archives, supercomputer networks and equipment to corporate partners. Energy Secretary Chris Wright noted businesses have already deployed AI extensively for commercial purposes like language processing and customer service, but this effort redirects that capability toward solving scientific challenges using specialized datasets stored at government labs.
* **Technical integration** : The order establishes a centralized digital system connecting AI tools directly with laboratory scientists, engineers and research equipment to speed up discoveries.
* **Regulatory plans** : The Genesis Mission builds on Trump's July blueprint "Winning the Race: America's AI Action Plan," which prioritized innovation leadership and private infrastructure investment. Additional orders are under consideration, including one that would authorize Justice Department lawsuits against states creating their own AI rules - a patchwork Trump criticized.

clean_body: Trump did not hold back... "That governor, he's a big fat slob!!!" | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? Trump did not hold back... "That governor, he's a big fat slob!!!" | | | Nov 25 | | | | | | | | | | | | President Donald Trump went off-script during today's turkey pardoning ceremony, roasting the "big fat slob" Democrat Illinois governor JB Pritzker, Nancy Pelosi, Chuck Schumer, Biden and more. The turkeys, named "Gobble" and "Waddle" have been pardoned by Trump, with Trump joking that the last set of White House turkeys had a "null and void" pardon with former President Joe Biden's use of the autopen. "I am officially pardoning them," Trump said of Biden's turkeys. "And they will not be served for Thanksgiving dinner." Trump also quipped about naming the turkeys Chuck and Nancy, after Chuck Schumer and Nancy Pelosi. "But then I realized I would be pardoning them," Trump said. "And I would NEVER pardon those two people." Must Watch Flashback: Tulsi Gabbard makes Mark Kelly look like a CLOWN when she refuses to play his silly games Get your "Communism Kills" Commie Mamdani shirt here: | | ---|---|--- Male wins female lifting competition, event organizers strip title after backlash The most recent World's Strongest 'Woman' winner, Jammie Booker, has been stripped of her title after organizer found out that Booker 's best kept secret: The Official Strongman Games World Championship in Arlington, Texas' rules state that competitors must compete in the category of their biological sex, but Booker never disclosed her male identity. Viral call to action: Organizers caught wind of the scandal after the viral video of second place, and rightful winner, lifter Andrea Thompson, allegedly calling the event "b---s---" before storming off the unfair podium. Organizers were swift to recall Booker's first place title, reassigning awards accordingly and make a public statement about the event's commitment to fairness. Back in September, Politibrawl interviewed political activist and college wrestler Olivia Rondeau about transgenders in female sports. Check out her insider perspective in | | | | ---|---|--- | Sep 14 | Trump launches 'Genesis Mission' to for AI development President Donald Trump signed an Monday creating the "Genesis Mission," a new federal program that pairs government research facilities with private tech firms to harness artificial intelligence for scientific and engineering innovations. | | ---|---|--- How it works : The measure requires energy officials and science policy leaders to open up federal information archives, supercomputer networks and equipment to corporate partners. Energy Secretary Chris Wright noted businesses have already deployed AI extensively for commercial purposes like language processing and customer service, but this effort redirects that capability toward solving scientific challenges using specialized datasets stored at government labs. Technical integration : The order establishes a centralized digital system connecting AI tools directly with laboratory scientists, engineers and research equipment to speed up discoveries. Regulatory plans : The Genesis Mission builds on Trump's July blueprint "Winning the Race: America's AI Action Plan," which prioritized innovation leadership and private infrastructure investment. Additional orders are under consideration, including one that would authorize Justice Department lawsuits against states creating their own AI rules - a patchwork Trump criticized. Donald Trump is weaponizing the FBI to intimidate and target members of Congress — including me. |
#

We knew this moment would come, team. **The President of the United States is weaponizing the FBI to intimidate and target me.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119992504/584885543/1937676057?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_JC_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20251125_PM2_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODUyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YWNjMGY3Ny01MWNhLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=l0iXlSJrnKodcvx2d-NS79K9BiptT1Fg21p-mHCEjiE=) After Donald Trump called for me and other veteran members of Congress to be _imprisoned and murdered_ last week, his hyper-politicized FBI and Department of Justice is doing his dirty work to try and intimidate us. clean_body: Donald Trump is weaponizing the FBI to intimidate and target members of Congress — including me. | We knew this moment would come, team. The President of the United States is weaponizing the FBI to intimidate and target me. = After Donald Trump called for me and other veteran members of Congress to be imprisoned and murdered last week, his hyper-politicized FBI and Department of Justice is doing his dirty work to try and intimidate us. I served this country as an Army Ranger in Iraq and Afghanistan. I took an oath to defend the Constitution. That oath never expires — it lasts a lifetime, and I will honor it every single day in Congress. But that oath is exactly why Donald Trump and his lackeys are targeting me. They’re coming after me because I am standing up for our democracy, the Constitution, and rule of law. I will not be intimidated. # [Michigan Ascends, Ohio State Pretends](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3722532&post_id=179859208&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc5ODU5MjA4LCJpYXQiOjE3NjQxMTMxNDEsImV4cCI6MTc2NjcwNTE0MSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTM3MjI1MzIiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.9NUssupQCgROcK3bcf_fBV87dN1NEYAK1niWEpWYKtg)
### David Shuster celebrates Wolverine excellence while gleefully dismantling the Buckeyes' insecurities, myths, and scarlet-clad delusions.
| | [David Shuster](https://substack.com/@davidshuster) and [Blue Amp](https://substack.com/@blueamp)
---
| Nov 25
---
| [](https://substack.com/@davidshuster)| | [](https://substack.com/@blueamp)
---|---|---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3722532&post_id=179859208&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc5ODU5MjA4LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc2NDExMzE0MSwiZXhwIjoxNzY2NzA1MTQxLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMzcyMjUzMiIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.WXkvLJ3G6mJRlYHNxqS53H81lz1FmHJz54G7ah5PDuA&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3722532&post_id=179859208&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc5ODU5MjA4LCJpYXQiOjE3NjQxMTMxNDEsImV4cCI6MTc2NjcwNTE0MSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTM3MjI1MzIiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.9NUssupQCgROcK3bcf_fBV87dN1NEYAK1niWEpWYKtg&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3722532&post_id=179859208&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc5ODU5MjA4LCJpYXQiOjE3NjQxMTMxNDEsImV4cCI6MTc2NjcwNTE0MSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTM3MjI1MzIiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.9NUssupQCgROcK3bcf_fBV87dN1NEYAK1niWEpWYKtg)
---
| | [](https://substack..Jvwyu08LixRLqjZwURcn-oY3Av26zMzEzzBWrYFeRi8?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/blueamp/p/the-unassailable-majesty-of-michiganand?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/0eb0f6f8-a05b-40e0-b514-20e475029715?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/0eb0f6f8-a05b-40e0-b514-20e475029715?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
_**By David Shuster**_
Scattered across the United States, there are a handful of institutions that stand as monuments to human aspiration - proud citadels where learning, dignity, and achievement still mean something. And then, approximately 180 miles south of Ann Arbor, Michigan there is The Ohio State University.
But let's begin with the sublime.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/0eb0f6f8-a05b-40e0-b514-20e475029715?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The University of Michigan is not merely a university; it is an edifice of civilization. Its laboratories hum with discovery, its classrooms glow with intellect, and its football program possesses more victories than any other team to ever strap on a helmet in the storied history of college football. This is not happenstance. It is the natural consequence of excellence pursued with intelligence and dedication.
On Saturdays, Michigan Stadium-- the largest in the entire United States, becomes a cathedral of athletic splendor.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/0eb0f6f8-a05b-40e0-b514-20e475029715?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
A hundred and ten thousand voices thunder "The Victors," the march that John Phillips Sousa called the greatest college fight song ever written. It is a hymn not merely to touchdowns, but to excellence itself. The atmosphere, in maize and blue, is so magnificent, so triumphantly American, that lesser schools and fans often cover their ears out of sheer envy.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/0eb0f6f8-a05b-40e0-b514-20e475029715?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The University of Michigan shakes with history. It radiates purpose. It echoes gloriously of success.
No accounting of Michigan's splendor is complete, however, without a glance, inevitably mocking, toward that perennial inferior irritant lumbering just south of the state line: the football team of _The_ Ohio State University, an institution whose insistence on its definite article reveals more about its insecurity than its significance.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/0eb0f6f8-a05b-40e0-b514-20e475029715?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* * *
Blue Amp Media has obvious biases when it comes to college football. Subscribe if you do, too!
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.BNoQuwStilHXR5Lp7wyExveYb9gMppvWAdAlCrMYt5M?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=179859208)
* * *
Its supporters swarm in scarlet like a colony of overcaffeinated ants, proclaiming the imminence of glory with a fervor usually reserved for lunatic cults
And what, pray tell, is a "Buckeye"? Nature answers with an honesty OSU fans rarely manage. It is a small, hairless nut--an emblem perfectly suited to a fan base whose most animated arguments often resemble the frantic babble of a squirrel guarding a meager winter stash.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/0eb0f6f8-a05b-40e0-b514-20e475029715?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Ohio State has its share of accomplishments, including a crude lack of self-awareness that never goes out of style in Columbus. However, to mention the two universities in the same breath is to commit an act of rhetorical malpractice. The University of Michigan sits comfortably among the world's finest academies, a global beacon of scholarship and innovation. Ohio State--how to put this politely? -- does not. One might visit their campus seeking intellectual stimulation and leave with nothing more than the vague memory of a marching band formation.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/0eb0f6f8-a05b-40e0-b514-20e475029715?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
In the end, the rivalry persists because it must: a drama of giants and pretenders, of scholars and strivers, of a Maize-and-Blue colossus forever pursued by its scarlet-clad aspirants. And every year, as sure as the autumn leaves fall over Ann Arbor, Michigan, renews its case for why excellence, when properly cultivated, needs no bluster. Michigan wins, Ohio State whines. Michigan achieves; Ohio State implodes. Michigan leads, Ohio State follows.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/0eb0f6f8-a05b-40e0-b514-20e475029715?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Long live the Wolverines. And may the Buckeyes continue, as ever, to crack under pressure.
* * *
#### But on a more serious note--Blue Amp Media is a place that amplifies the voices of people and stories that need to be told. Check out these recent impactful articles:
* **["I Still Remember": A Survivor Speaks Before the Epstein Files Drop](https://substack.com/redirect/3e79ab9d-46ea-4a18-af1c-b3072c5e3734?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
* **[They Secretly Gave Powell"The Kraken." They're Secretly Giving Trump War With Venezuela](https://substack.com/redirect/f6101851-0f78-4c7b-9316-aa46a35098ff?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: KMart. Sears. Payless. Toys-R-Us. What happened?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
From Red Lobster to nursing homes, private equity’s playbook of pillaging doesn’t discriminate.

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=2714%2E4032634%2E60Bn9p)
---
KMart. Sears. Payless. Toys-R-Us. JOANN Fabrics. Party City. Whatever happened to them? **Private equity.** Private equity firms like to tell a nice story about how they buy up failing businesses and make them better. That’s a lie. Over and over again, they buy up businesses doing just fine and run them into the ground. In fact, companies bought by private equity firms are 10 times more likely to go bankrupt than those that aren’t. Here’s how it works: **Step one:** A private equity firm buys a business like Red Lobster. But they typically don’t buy it with their own cash. Instead, they force the business, Red Lobster, to take out a massive loan to pay for its own sale. Now the business is staggering under a huge debt load. **Step two:** They strip the company of its assets to turn a profit. This can look like selling the land under the Red Lobster stores, then private equity will pocket that money, and then Red Lobster has to pay rent on land it used to own. So now Red Lobster is stuck paying the initial loan, and now their rent for the land, all while the private equity firm charges them a management fee for its services. So Red Lobster is stretched to the breaking point. It can’t pay its bills. It lays off workers and stores close. **Step three:** After all the life has been sucked out of the company and it's saddled with debt, Red Lobster is forced to file for bankruptcy. You’d think the private equity firm would have to pony up and help pay off the debt, right? No. Our system **lets private equity firms collect all the benefits** of owning the other companies **while taking on none of the risk** associated with running those companies straight into the ground. So who has to shoulder the consequences? Workers — nearly all of whom have lost their jobs and who’ve had their pensions completely wiped out by the bankruptcy. And consumers — who get stuck with higher prices and worse experiences. Private equity doesn’t discriminate when it comes to following this same playbook to loot entire industries. We often hear about how private equity sucks up entire franchises — but they also sink their teeth into life-or-death industries like hospital systems, nursing homes, veterinary clinics, or fire truck manufacturing. And these private equity firms are living large while their cost-cutting and efficiency-boosting schemes put lives at risk. The CEO of the private equity firm that wiped out hospitals — yes, hospitals — in Massachusetts owned not one, but two yachts, while patients were bleeding out because of his financial cost-cutting. This isn’t a business model — it’s legalized looting. And it’s wrong. I believe these practices should be illegal. There should be **at least** some level of accountability for the people pillaging our stores, restaurants, hospitals, nursing homes, and prisons. But Washington has done next to nothing to rein in these firms. That’s why I’m working on a few different bills to stop this. **I wrote my Stop Wall Street Looting Act to make sure these private equity firms are held accountable for the debt they saddle companies with — and it’s a start. My Corporate Crimes Against Healthcare Act specifically addresses the problem of private equity in the healthcare industry so no one can bankrupt a hospital and get away on their not one but two yachts scot-free.** These private equity firms are buying off politicians and spending millions on lobbying to ensure they can continue making millions off of these practices. The workers and the hospital patients and the consumers do not have an army of lobbyists to watch out for them — but this issue impacts people all across America, and it’s time we do something about it. [**It’s going to take all of us continuing to raise the alarm to rein this legalized looting in. If you’re also sick and tired of these private equity firms raking in the big bucks while everyone else pays the price, chip in $28 or anything you can strengthen our grassroots movement for bold, systemic reform?**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3239?amount=28&t=8&akid=2714%2E4032634%2E60Bn9p) Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth

clean_body: From Red Lobster to nursing homes, private equity’s playbook of pillaging doesn’t discriminate. | | | KMart. Sears. Payless. Toys-R-Us. JOANN Fabrics. Party City. Whatever happened to them? Private equity. Private equity firms like to tell a nice story about how they buy up failing businesses and make them better. That’s a lie. Over and over again, they buy up businesses doing just fine and run them into the ground. In fact, companies bought by private equity firms are 10 times more likely to go bankrupt than those that aren’t. Here’s how it works: Step one: A private equity firm buys a business like Red Lobster. But they typically don’t buy it with their own cash. Instead, they force the business, Red Lobster, to take out a massive loan to pay for its own sale. Now the business is staggering under a huge debt load. Step two: They strip the company of its assets to turn a profit. This can look like selling the land under the Red Lobster stores, then private equity will pocket that money, and then Red Lobster has to pay rent on land it used to own. So now Red Lobster is stuck paying the initial loan, and now their rent for the land, all while the private equity firm charges them a management fee for its services. So Red Lobster is stretched to the breaking point. It can’t pay its bills. It lays off workers and stores close. Step three: After all the life has been sucked out of the company and it's saddled with debt, Red Lobster is forced to file for bankruptcy. You’d think the private equity firm would have to pony up and help pay off the debt, right? No. Our system lets private equity firms collect all the benefits of owning the other companies while taking on none of the risk associated with running those companies straight into the ground. So who has to shoulder the consequences? Workers — nearly all of whom have lost their jobs and who’ve had their pensions completely wiped out by the bankruptcy. And consumers — who get stuck with higher prices and worse experiences. Private equity doesn’t discriminate when it comes to following this same playbook to loot entire industries. We often hear about how private equity sucks up entire franchises — but they also sink their teeth into life-or-death industries like hospital systems, nursing homes, veterinary clinics, or fire truck manufacturing. And these private equity firms are living large while their cost-cutting and efficiency-boosting schemes put lives at risk. The CEO of the private equity firm that wiped out hospitals — yes, hospitals — in Massachusetts owned not one, but two yachts, while patients were bleeding out because of his financial cost-cutting. This isn’t a business model — it’s legalized looting. And it’s wrong. I believe these practices should be illegal. There should be at least some level of accountability for the people pillaging our stores, restaurants, hospitals, nursing homes, and prisons. But Washington has done next to nothing to rein in these firms. That’s why I’m working on a few different bills to stop this. I wrote my Stop Wall Street Looting Act to make sure these private equity firms are held accountable for the debt they saddle companies with — and it’s a start. My Corporate Crimes Against Healthcare Act specifically addresses the problem of private equity in the healthcare industry so no one can bankrupt a hospital and get away on their not one but two yachts scot-free. These private equity firms are buying off politicians and spending millions on lobbying to ensure they can continue making millions off of these practices. The workers and the hospital patients and the consumers do not have an army of lobbyists to watch out for them — but this issue impacts people all across America, and it’s time we do something about it. name: Gabby Giffords
subject: Threats will not stop my husband
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
I am so proud of Mark for standing up and doing what is right, just as he’s done since he was 22 years old.
#

[](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-nov25-dod/.t5EZ4X&refcode=em251125-2-1mil&refcode2=6260.6688874.e8Nb_n&t=1&akid=6260%2E6688874%2Ee8Nb_n)

Team, this is Gabby Giffords.
Just a quick note from me, after everything that has happened over the last week.
Mark is my husband and my best friend. He is a 25-year combat pilot veteran. He served our country with strength, courage, and integrity in and out of the uniform. He has dedicated his entire life to protecting us and upholding the Constitution.
For that, people like Elon Musk, Pete Hegseth, and Donald Trump accuse him of sedition, call him a traitor, and demand his execution. These actions aren’t just false — they are dangerous.
The words these men speak are taken seriously by millions and millions of people. I personally know the reality of political violence all too well.
But I know that danger will not stop him. I am so proud of Mark for standing up and serving our country, just as he’s done since he was 22 years old.
He needs us now. And I am humbly asking you for your help.
[**Please, make a donation to Mark. It might seem like a small act with everything he is up against, but with thousands and thousands of people joining you, it really will make all the difference.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-nov25-dod/.t5EZ4X&refcode=em251125-2-1mil&t=2&akid=6260%2E6688874%2Ee8Nb_n)

Friend,

There’s a lot happening in this race, and I want to make sure you know exactly what’s at stake before November ends. If you’re short on time, please consider **[chipping in $3](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119992925/584887081/-1516755731?refcode=em-11.25.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmNkNGQ0ODAtNTJjYS1mMDExLTgxOTYtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=hDt8TfL6Ff-JtPWPUjWNZO2j8ywFZpxI2PZeAupr098=)** before this key deadline.
* **I flipped CA-45 by just 653 votes in 2024.** That made this one of the biggest Democratic wins in the country, and put a big red target on our back. The GOP hasn’t stopped coming for this seat since.

* **The field is crowded -- four Republicans have already jumped in the race to unseat me.** Every one of them would back the MAGA agenda in Congress. And with just three seats separating control of the House, national Republicans see this race as one of their top flip opportunities.

* **Prop 50 changed the map, and make no mistake -- CA-45 remains one of the most competitive races nationwide.** Our district now includes thousands of new voters who’ve never seen my name on a ballot. We’re working hard to reach them, but that outreach takes serious resources.

* **Outside money and attacks are increasing fast ahead of the midterm election year.** National GOP super PACs are flooding CA-45 with millions to erase our progress and drag us backwards.

**[I’ve pledged to accept ZERO dollars from Big Pharma or Big Oil -- and I never will. I’m relying on people like you to power this movement. name: Jessica Mackler, EMILYs List
subject: A Thanksgiving thank-you (and a recipe…)
body:
As we head into Thanksgiving, I want to start by saying something simple: |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119992631/584885962/-2051551973?sourceid=1057394&refcode=WUEFEK62_20251125_JMRecipe_ALL&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMGJlNmMwMC01MmNhLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=o1EVdfadklU8SDrG2NT31SrsWrOJkvVgUB2NQIr3xtM=) Hi Peter, it’s Jessica Mackler — president of EMILYs List.

As we head into Thanksgiving week, I want to start by saying something simple: **Thank you**. In a year that has tested all of us, your support, your grit, and your commitment to protecting our fundamental freedoms have meant everything.

Now, something you might not know about me is that **I love cooking** — especially at Thanksgiving. It’s my favorite day of the year. I spend days planning, chopping, seasoning, and (let’s be honest) bossing everyone around in the kitchen. And the thing my friends and family always fight over is my famous stuffing. It’s not fancy and it’s not complicated, but it’s the dish everyone asks for year after year.

And this year, I want to share it with you. But first, I need to ask for your help.

We’re entering the final stretch of November, and we need to raise **$20,000 every day** to stay on track for our End-of-Month goal and build the early power Democratic pro-choice women will need to win in 2026.

We’re behind right now — and if we don’t close this gap, our work recruiting and supporting candidates early could take a real hit.

So here’s my offer:

**If you donate on this email — in any amount — I’ll send you my famous Thanksgiving stuffing recipe.** No match, no gimmicks, no merch — just something I love, from my kitchen to yours, as a thank-you for stepping up when it matters. clean_body: As we head into Thanksgiving, I want to start by saying something simple: | = Hi Peter, it’s Jessica Mackler — president of EMILYs List. As we head into Thanksgiving week, I want to start by saying something simple: Thank you. In a year that has tested all of us, your support, your grit, and your commitment to protecting our fundamental freedoms have meant everything. Now, something you might not know about me is that I love cooking — especially at Thanksgiving. It’s my favorite day of the year. I spend days planning, chopping, seasoning, and (let’s be honest) bossing everyone around in the kitchen. And the thing my friends and family always fight over is my famous stuffing. It’s not fancy and it’s not complicated, but it’s the dish everyone asks for year after year. And this year, I want to share it with you. But first, I need to ask for your help. We’re entering the final stretch of November, and we need to raise $20,000 every day to stay on track for our End-of-Month goal and build the early power Democratic pro-choice women will need to win in 2026. We’re behind right now — and if we don’t close this gap, our work recruiting and supporting candidates early could take a real hit. So here’s my offer: If you donate on this email — in any amount — I’ll send you my famous Thanksgiving stuffing recipe. No match, no gimmicks, no merch — just something I love, from my kitchen to yours, as a thank-you for stepping up when it matters. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = I know things feel heavy right now. But we’re already seeing powerful signs of hope — major Democratic victories in 2025 that show voters are ready to stand up for reproductive freedom and real leadership. We have real momentum, but only if we keep moving. = = From my family to yours — thank you for being part of this movement. Warmly, Jessica Mackler President, EMILYs List = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? Sign up to get less email . We'd hate to see you go, but if you want to stop receiving all email, unsubscribe . Have a question? Feel free to drop us a line at mailto:information@emilyslist.org or simply reply to this email. Contributions or gifts to EMILYs List or endorsed candidates are not tax deductible. EMILYs List P.O. Box 96612 Washington, DC 20077 United States | ---|---

name: Heather from VPP
subject: Can you please read this?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
If Democrats tune out now, it will cost us everything.
| Hi there, I won’t keep you long, but I needed to reach out urgently because heading into the holiday weekend, _we’re hitting a bad fundraising slump._

**Our numbers have been trending downwards since Election Day, and honestly, we can’t afford a slowdown like this!** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/97102?t=6&akid=22010%2E878179%2EUS_YzG) If Democrats only tune in right before the election, we’ll lack the critical year-round resources we need to reach voters and STOP Trump’s MAGA agenda.

[**_We did the math and we need 2,000 more local supporters to chip in $7 tonight to get back on track — you’ll even receive your own Voter Protection Membership Card! Can I count on you to do your part to take back the House by rushing $7? »_**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/97102?t=7&akid=22010%2E878179%2EUS_YzG) | [CHIP IN $7 TO CLAIM YOUR MEMBERSHIP CARD AND FLIP THE HOUSE BLUE »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/97102?t=8&akid=22010%2E878179%2EUS_YzG)
---
Thank you,

Heather G.
The Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=22010%2E878179%2EUS_YzG). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=22010%2E878179%2EUS_YzG).**

name: Elise Stefanik
subject: I’m thankful for your support
body:
It’s Time To Save New York

| | | | [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/byyC/?__vbtrk=MzM2MTMwOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzM2MTMwOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
Friend, we are on pace for a historic victory!
I am so thankful for all of the support I have already received from across the Empire State and the nation from patriots like you that are committed to saving America from Radical Leftists like Zohran Mamdani and Kathy Hochul.
Thanks to you this race in a traditionally Democrat stronghold is already within the margin of error.
**New York is now a toss-up state!**
Our message of delivering a safer and more affordable state for all is resonating with New Yorkers who are tired of nearly two decades of single party Democrat rule currently led by the embattled and deeply unpopular Governor Kathy Hochul.
**[Kathy Hochul is the _WORST_ governor in America.](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/byyC/?__vbtrk=MzM2MTMwOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzM2MTMwOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**

[SAVE NEW YORK](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/byyC/?__vbtrk=MzM2MTMwOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzM2MTMwOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
Under her abysmal leadership New York has implemented** _failed bail reform_** and was** _cemented as a sanctuary state_**. The results of these decisions have been devastating as violent criminals are routinely put back on our streets to recommit violent crimes and we are seeing a rise in crime from illegal immigrants.
Her record on handling the state’s economy is even worse. She has** _raised taxes_** and pushed failed policies that** _raised the cost of living_**. With Kathy Hochul at the helm New York has some of the highest taxes, rent, energy prices, utility bills, and cost of groceries in the country.
And when New Yorkers looked to Governor Hochul to rein in the extremism emerging from her own party she decided to bend the knee. She** _helped elect Zohran Mamdani_** , who is a communist and jihadist sympathizer, as Mayor of NYC.
To borrow a phrase from Governor Hochul herself:**"This bullsh*t has to stop"**.
It is clear that Hochul is out of touch and New Yorkers are ready for new leadership. But now it is up to us to lay the groundwork for victory next year.
Every major Democrat donor in the country is being called upon to save Kathy Hochul from her coming reckoning at the ballot box in a last-ditch effort to keep New York blue.
**Firing Hochul and flipping New York red is going to be a team effort** and I need every one of my patriotic supporters right now to help me deliver my message to every voter across the Empire State.

[FIRE KATHY HOCHUL](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/byyC/?__vbtrk=MzM2MTMwOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzM2MTMwOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
Friend, here is how you can help today.
My team just dropped a new ad that I want every New Yorker to see:

[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/byyC/?__vbtrk=MzM2MTMwOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzM2MTMwOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
_NEW AD: Kathy’s Own Words: This Bullsh*t has to stop._

[WATCH ELISE’S NEW AD](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/byyC/?__vbtrk=MzM2MTMwOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzM2MTMwOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
To defeat Hochul we need to expose her failed record and provide voters with an alternative vision for the state. This ad helps with that mission.
**_[So please, take a minute to watch my new ad, send it to every New Yorker you know, and make a contribution of whatever you can so we can keep it running](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/byyC/?__vbtrk=MzM2MTMwOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzM2MTMwOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_****.**
This is our opportunity to SAVE NEW YORK!
I am grateful for all of the support I am receiving to win this fight. Thank you for continuing to stand by my side.
**Let’s finish the fight to make New York affordable and safe again.**

_Your fellow patriot,_
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/byyC/?__vbtrk=MzM2MTMwOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzM2MTMwOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
**Elise Stefanik**
Proud New Yorker
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/byyC/?__vbtrk=MzM2MTMwOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzM2MTMwOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)

body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=40476%2E3422442%2E3Z8eEI)
Peter,
Katie Porter is running to be California’s next governor—and this race is heating up. She’s counting on grassroots supporters to power her to victory, so here are **[5 reasons to chip in $5 today.](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21694?c0=em_ms_kp_20251125_1_ak.bqpPYr&refcode=em20251125-40476&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=40476%2E3422442%2E3Z8eEI)**
**1\. Katie will lower costs as governor.** She’s spent her career standing up for everyday Californians, and now she’s ready to take that experience to the governor’s office.
**2\. Trump is trying to steal our democracy.** California needs a governor who will stop Trump from tipping the scales in his favor. Katie held him accountable during his first term and she’ll do it again as governor.
**3\. Republicans want to flip California red.** The closest candidates to Katie in recent polls are both Republicans—who will stop at nothing to see us lose.
**4\. Our opponents are spending big.** A billionaire has already spent over a million dollars on campaign ads. Unlike them, Katie relies on grassroots donations to power this campaign.
**5\. Katie’s in the lead—and we need to keep it that way.** Three polls in a row show Katie is the Democratic frontrunner, but we can’t afford to get complacent.
**[Peter, can you pitch in $5 to help us lower costs, protect democracy, and elect Katie Porter as California’s next governor?](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21694?c0=em_ms_kp_20251125_1_ak.bqpPYr&refcode=em20251125-40476&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=40476%2E3422442%2E3Z8eEI)**

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: President Trump is using the FBI to target me
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119993570/584889223/-1872585127?&refcode=E16412-20251125-ElissaSlotkin-Image-Surrogate&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWNjOTNjNjctNTRjYS1mMDExLTgxOTYtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=GD4s2FqA3RCGAFoVfqSFhe9AhuI_bQmVcMgsbbjvK0o=) Peter – Last night, the FBI's Counterterrorism Division appeared to open an inquiry into me in response to a video the President did not like. In that video, I directly quoted the Uniform Code of Military Justice alongside five other Members of Congress with service and veteran backgrounds. Officers and enlisted in our military are trained to follow lawful orders, and refuse to follow illegal orders. It’s part of the training. This has been the case since World War II. Since then, the President has misquoted me, and then called for my arrest, trial, and death by hanging. Secretary of Defense Pete Hegseth has threatened my friend, Senator Mark Kelly, with court martial. And now, it appears the president has directed the FBI to target the rest of us. **This is exactly why we made that video in the first place.** President Trump believes in weaponizing the federal government against his perceived enemies and does not believe laws apply to him or his Cabinet. He uses legal harassment as an intimidation tactic, to scare people out of speaking up. He’s done it to law firms, universities, private sector companies and private individuals. But these kinds of tactics won’t work on me. And neither will the total wave of death threats, bomb threats, and general harassment he has unleashed. I have always worked to be upfront and honest in these emails. This latest news from the FBI means that I have had to start thinking through a legal defense strategy – and we do not know exactly where President Trump and his Department of Justice will take this inquiry. And for the time being, all of that planning is being paid for through campaign dollars. clean_body: | | = Peter – Last night, the FBI's Counterterrorism Division appeared to open an inquiry into me in response to a video the President did not like. In that video, I directly quoted the Uniform Code of Military Justice alongside five other Members of Congress with service and veteran backgrounds. Officers and enlisted in our military are trained to follow lawful orders, and refuse to follow illegal orders. It’s part of the training. This has been the case since World War II. Since then, the President has misquoted me, and then called for my arrest, trial, and death by hanging. Secretary of Defense Pete Hegseth has threatened my friend, Senator Mark Kelly, with court martial. And now, it appears the president has directed the FBI to target the rest of us. This is exactly why we made that video in the first place. President Trump believes in weaponizing the federal government against his perceived enemies and does not believe laws apply to him or his Cabinet. He uses legal harassment as an intimidation tactic, to scare people out of speaking up. He’s done it to law firms, universities, private sector companies and private individuals. But these kinds of tactics won’t work on me. And neither will the total wave of death threats, bomb threats, and general harassment he has unleashed. I have always worked to be upfront and honest in these emails. This latest news from the FBI means that I have had to start thinking through a legal defense strategy – and we do not know exactly where President Trump and his Department of Justice will take this inquiry. Peter,

Today I'm reaching out, in hopes that you and your family, whether it's chosen or related, are able to be together this Holiday season. For generations this was a given. But today, sadly it isn't because it's just way too expensive. Turkey, stuffing, cranberry sauce, mashed potatoes, sweet potatoes, green beans, macaroni and cheese, pumpkin pie; prices are at an all time high. Travel costs have skyrocketed as well. I'm sure you have seen all this for yourselves. When I was growing up, regular, middle class families had no problem affording a classic Thanksgiving meal once a year. But inflation, tariffs, and the greed of the billionaire class has changed all that. According to new research, 68% of Americans say that Thanksgiving is more expensive than ever - and of those, more than a quarter of Americans won't be celebrating at all due to the cost of groceries. Just imagine not being able to eat with your family due to lack of food. **Nearly half (42%) will be celebrating a scaled-down version.** These statistics are stark - and when broken down by age, younger generations are the most affected. The current Trump-manufactured affordability crisis is deep. Inflation, income inequality and billionaire greed are breaking the back of the American middle class. It's literally disappearing before our very eyes. All because those at the top keep getting to keep more of their profits as gifts from Congress, while the burden of funding our Government gets placed on the Middle class and working poor.
---

Today's Congress is so out of touch, they don't even recognize affordability for the crisis it is. We're ruled by people who quite simply don't have a clue what it's like to need to balance a budget at the end of the month. Who can't relate to the rising cost of groceries on a minimum wage check. In Congress, I'll fight against inflation, Trump's Tariff Tax, and the affordability crisis. I'll fight for working families who deserve to sit down to a complete holiday meal on Thanksgiving just like their parents did. I can't get to Congress to put the burden back on the rich and rebuild the Middle Class without YOU. We can lift the working poor, stop the inflation, and make sure every table has food on it. clean_body: | | Peter, Today I'm reaching out, in hopes that you and your family, whether it's chosen or related, are able to be together this Holiday season. For generations this was a given. But today, sadly it isn't because it's just way too expensive. Turkey, stuffing, cranberry sauce, mashed potatoes, sweet potatoes, green beans, macaroni and cheese, pumpkin pie; prices are at an all time high. Travel costs have skyrocketed as well. I'm sure you have seen all this for yourselves. When I was growing up, regular, middle class families had no problem affording a classic Thanksgiving meal once a year. But inflation, tariffs, and the greed of the billionaire class has changed all that. According to new research, 68% of Americans say that Thanksgiving is more expensive than ever - and of those, more than a quarter of Americans won't be celebrating at all due to the cost of groceries. Just imagine not being able to eat with your family due to lack of food. Nearly half (42%) will be celebrating a scaled-down version. These statistics are stark - and when broken down by age, younger generations are the most affected. The current Trump-manufactured affordability crisis is deep. Inflation, income inequality and billionaire greed are breaking the back of the American middle class. It's literally disappearing before our very eyes. All because those at the top keep getting to keep more of their profits as gifts from Congress, while the burden of funding our Government gets placed on the Middle class and working poor. Today's Congress is so out of touch, they don't even recognize affordability for the crisis it is. We're ruled by people who quite simply don't have a clue what it's like to need to balance a budget at the end of the month. Who can't relate to the rising cost of groceries on a minimum wage check. In Congress, I'll fight against inflation, Trump's Tariff Tax, and the affordability crisis. I'll fight for working families who deserve to sit down to a complete holiday meal on Thanksgiving just like their parents did. I can't get to Congress to put the burden back on the rich and rebuild the Middle Class without YOU. We can lift the working poor, stop the inflation, and make sure every table has food on it. Let's Heal Washington! Brent Hennrich | | Marie Gluesenkamp-Perez has betrayed Democrats and the voters of WA-3 by repeatedly voting with MAGA against women's rights, immigrants, and more. Brent Hennrich is a lifelong Washingtonian, a proud working class dad, and lifelong Democratic activist. Chip in now to help elect a Democrat ready to stand up to MAGA. | | | | Paid for by Brent Hennrich for Washington ---|--- (C)2025 Brent Hennrich for Washington, all rights reserved Our mailing address is: Brent Hennrich for Washington PO BOX 820070 Vancouver, WA 98682 We hate to see you go, but if you believe you received this email in error, or you no longer wish to receive our emails you can | | Sent via . subject: I just want to say thanks, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Yassamin Ansari for Congress
body:
|

Peter, I just wanted to say thank you one more time before you log off for the holidays. Thank you to the Arizonans who have stood by us as we’ve confronted this administration at every unlawful turn, whether it’s when they’ve targeted our communities with ICE, killed jobs, cut benefits, and unlawfully withheld funding from non-profits. **Your support shows that the American people have our back.** And I especially want to say thank you to the folks who have pitched in to support our work. The last couple months haven’t been easy, and with this administration’s attacks on healthcare and food assistance, we know that you’re making your dollar stretch even further than you’ve had to before. **Your support, whether it’s $1 or $100, is fundamental and meaningful to the work we’re doing.** So thank you, Peter, for standing with us every step of the way. I can’t do this work without you on our side. I’m grateful you are a part of this movement. — Yassamin | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119993791/584889991/470246576?refcode=AU_YA_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251125_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZTUwOGE4ZS01NmNhLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4Ji-TQcG6hnjSlMRDMkjwZMd2btimdwaJbj1_pB6C_k=)
